Genesis5:1 Hih pen Adam’ suanlekhakte’ laibu ahi hi. Pasian in mi a piansakin
Genesis5:2 Amah in numei le pasal a piangsak hi. Amaute a kipiansakin amah in amaute
Genesis5:3 Adam kum za le kum sawmthum a phak khit ciangin
Genesis5:4 Seth a suah khit ciangin Adam kum zagiat sung nungta lai hi. Amah in tanu le tapa dang zong a nei hi.
Genesis5:5 Tua ahih ciangin Adam’ nuntak hun sungteng pen kum zakua le kum sawmthum hi a
Genesis5:6 Seth kum za le kum nga a phak ciangin Enosh kici tapa khat a nei hi.

Genesis5:8 Tua ahih ciangin Seth’ khan sungteng pen kum zakua le kum sawm le nih hi a
Genesis5:9 Enosh kum sawmkua a phak ciangin

Genesis5:12 Kenan kum sawmsagih a phak ciangin

Genesis5:14 Tua ahih ciangin Kenan’ khan sungteng pen kum zakua le kum sawm hi a
Genesis5:15 Mahalalel kum sawmguk le kum nga a phak ciangin Jared kici tapa khat nei hi.
Genesis5:16 Jared’ suah khit ciangin Mahalalel kum zagiat le kum sawmthum nungta a
Genesis5:17 Tua ahih ciangin Mahalalel’ khan sungteng pen kum zagiat le kum sawmkua le nga hi a

Genesis11:7 Hong pai un

Genesis11:9 Tua ahih ciangin a min Babel kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in tua munah leitung khempeuh’ kampau kitukalhsak hi. Tua lai mun panin Topa in leitung khempeuhah amaute a thehthang hi.

Genesis11:20 Reu kum sawmthum le nih a phak khit ciangin amah in Serug kici tapa khat nei hi.

Genesis11:22 Serug kum sawmthum a phak khit ciangin amah in Nahor kici tapa khat nei hi.

Exodus19:3 Pasian kiangah Moses paito hi. Topa in mual panin amah sam a
Exodus19:4 Egypt mite tungah ka bawlna le muvanlai in a kha tawh a note a puak bangin note hong pua-in keima kiangah kong paipihna na mu khin uh hi.
Exodus19:5 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in ka thu mangin ka thuciamna na zuih uhleh mite khempeuh lak panin note pen keima mi na hi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khempeuh keima a’ hi a
Exodus19:6 note pen keima siampi nasep a sem minam
Exodus19:7 Tua ahih ciangin Moses hong pai-in upate sam a
Exodus19:8 Mi khempeuh in
Exodus19:9 Topa in Moses tungah
Exodus19:10 Topa in Moses kiangah
Exodus19:11 a ni thum ni-in a baihsa-in om un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ni thum ni-in Sinai Mual tungah mite khempeuh’ muhna-ah Topa hong paisuk ding hi.
Exodus19:12 Nangmah in mite a dingin dalna khat a kimkotah na koih ding a
Exodus19:13 Khut peuhmah in tua mi kithat ding pa lawngkha lo ding a
Exodus19:14 Tua ahih ciangin mualtung panin mite kiangah Moses paisuk a
Exodus19:15 Amah in mite kiangah
Exodus19:16 A ni thum ni zingsang ciangin van gingin khua phia a
Exodus19:17 Tua ciangin Moses in giahphual panin Pasian a dawn dingin mite paikhiatpih a
Exodus19:18 Meikhu in Sinai Mual tuamcip hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mei sung tua mualtungah Topa a kumsuk hi. A khu
Exodus19:19 Peengkul aw a nak gin’ semsem laitakin Moses pau a

Exodus20:1 Pasian in hih thute khempeuh gen a
Exodus20:2 “Kei pen salsuahna Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Exodus20:3 “Keimah longal pasian dang na bia kei ding uh hi.
Exodus20:4 “A kiseek milim hitaleh
Exodus20:5 Tuate’ mai-ah na kun kei ding uh a
Exodus20:6 ahih hangin kei hong itin ka thupiakte a zui mi a tul tampite tungah itna kip a lak pa ka hi hi.
Exodus20:7 “ Topa note’ Pasian’ min a sia lamin na zang kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama min a zang khialte gim pia ding hi.
Exodus20:8 “Sabbath ni a siangtho-a zat ding phawk un.
Exodus20:9 Ni guk sung nomau’ na semin na nasep ding khempeuh uh na hih ding uh hi.
Exodus20:10 Ahi zongin a ni sagih ni pen Topa note’ Pasian’ Sabbath ni ahi hi. Tua ni-in note
Exodus20:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh a ni guk sung tengin Topa in van le lei
Exodus20:12 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitang tungah na khan uh a sau theih nadingin na nu le na pa uh zahtak un.
Exodus20:13 “Mi na that kei ding uh hi.
Exodus20:14 “Nulepa mawhna na bawl kei ding uh hi.
Exodus20:15 “Na na gu kei ding uh hi.
Exodus20:16 “Na vengte uh langkhatah a man loin teci na pang kei ding uh hi.
Exodus20:17 “Na vengte uh inn na deihgawh kei ding uh hi. Na vengte uh zi hitaleh
Exodus20:18 Tu-in mite khempeuh in vangingte
Exodus20:19 Moses kiangah
Exodus20:20 Moses in mite kiangah
Exodus20:21 Pasian’ omna meii sah nai-ah Moses a pai laitakin mite a gamla-ah a ding uh hi.
Exodus20:22 Topa in Moses kiangah
Exodus20:23 Note in kei tawh nong biakkhop dingun ngun pasian-te le kham pasian-te na bawl kei ding uh hi.
Exodus20:24 Note in keima a dingin lei tawh biakna tau khat bawl unla
Exodus20:25 Note in keima a dingin suang tawh biakna tau na bawl uhleh
Exodus20:26 Tua tungah na seelsim uh a kidawk khak loh nadingin ka biakna tau tung kahtoh nading kahlei a kulin na sang bawl kei ding uh hi
Exodus21:1 “Tu-in hihte pen amaute’ tungah na piak ding biakna ngeina kipte ahi hi.

Exodus21:10 Amah in zi dang khat a lakthuah leh
Exodus21:11 Amah in hih thu thumte tuanu a dingin a bawl kei leh
Exodus21:12 “Mi khat satin a sisak mi peuhpeuh kithat ding hi.

Exodus21:14 Ahih hangin mi khat in midang khat thah ding tumin a thah leh

Exodus21:21 Ahih hangin ni khat ahi a
Exodus21:22 “Mite kitawngin numei naupaii khat liamsak a
Exodus21:23 Siatna khatpeuh in a zuihbeh leh
Exodus21:24 mit tang ding mit
Exodus21:25 meikang tang ding meikang

Exodus21:28 “Bawngtal khat in pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh a ki tawh a piklup ciangin

Exodus23:1 “Thuman lo na genkhia kei ding uh hi. Elna tawh teci pang dingin migilo pa tawh na kipawl kei ding uh hi.
Exodus23:2 Siatna a bawl dingin mihon na zui kei ding uh hi. Thutang a hei khia dingin mihonpi nung zui-in thu neihna-ah teci na pang kei ding uh hi.
Exodus23:3 Ama thu neihna-ah mizawng pa na langneih kei ding uh hi.
Exodus23:4 “Na langneih mite’ bawngtal ahi a
Exodus23:5 Nangmah a hong mudah pa’ la a van tawh a puk na muh leh a la tawh amah na nusia kei ding a
Exodus23:6 “Ama thu neihna-ah mizawng pa a thutang kimlai na lelsak kei ding uh hi.
Exodus23:7 A man lopi a mi mawhsak ding panin kikem unla
Exodus23:8 Sumgolh na la kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sumgolh in uliante’ mit tawsak a
Exodus23:9 “Khualmi na nengniam kei ding uh hi. Khualmi’ lungsim na thei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt gamah khualmi na hi ngei uh hi.
Exodus23:10 “Note in na leitang uhah kum guk sung khai tuhin a piangte na kaikhawm ding uh hi.
Exodus23:11 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna ciangin
Exodus23:12 “Ni guk sung na nasep uh na sem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na bawngtal le na la in tawlngakna a neih theih nading le
Exodus23:13 Note’ tunga kong gente khempeuh thudon un; pasian dangte’ min genin nei kei unla
Exodus23:14 “Kum khatin thumvei
Exodus23:15 Silngo sawh loh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Keimah in note kong thupiak bangin Abib kha sung a kisehsa hun ciangin ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua kha sungin Egypt panin note na paikhia uh hi. Khut hawmguak tawh keima mai-ah kuamah hong kilak lo ding hi.
Exodus23:16 “Note in lo-a na tuh uh
Exodus23:17 Topa Pasian ’ mai-ah pasal khempeuh kum khatin thumvei kilaak ding uh hi.
Exodus23:18 “Note in silngo sawh anlum tawh keimah biakpiakna si na pia khawm kei ding uh a
Exodus23:19 “Note in na anpalte uh lakah a tung masa pen Topa na Pasian uh inn-ah na paipih ding uh hi. “Note in a pi’ nawizu tawh keelno na huan kei ding uh hi.
Exodus23:20 “En un
Exodus23:21 Amah thudonin ama aw ngai unla

Exodus23:24 amau’ pasian-te’ mai-ah note kun loin
Exodus23:25 Note in Topa na Pasian uh nong bia ding uh a
Exodus23:26 Note’ leitangah kuamah nausia om lo ding a

Exodus23:28 Note’ mai panin Hiv mite

Exodus23:30 Note khangin tampi pha-in leitang na luah matengun note’ mai panin tawm tawmin amaute ka hawlkhia ding hi.

Exodus25:4 a dum

Exodus26:1 “Tua tham loin a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan dalna puan sawm le a dum
Exodus26:2 Dalna puan a dung pi sawmli le pi nih hi ding a
Exodus26:3 Dalna puan ngate khatlekhat kikhuituah ding hi.
Exodus26:4 A kikhuituah a masa dalna puan a nawlnung pen’ nawl dung sukah khaudum tawh a bilvangte na bawl ding hi. Tua bangmahin a kikhuituah a nihna dalna puan a nawlnung pen’ nawl dung suk mahah a bilvangte na bawl ding hi.
Exodus26:5 Dalna puan khat tungah bilvang sawmnga bawlin
Exodus26:6 Biakbuk pen bup khat a suah theih nadingin nangmah in kham kilhna sawmnga bawlin

Exodus26:36 “Puanbuk kongkhak dingin a dum
Exodus26:37 Kongpuankhai a dingin singkha khuampi nga bawlin kham tawh na zut ding hi. A vankhainate kham hi ding a
Exodus27:1 “Biakna tau ding singkha sing tawh bawl in. Pi sagih le alang sau-in pi sagih le alang mah na zaisak ding hi. Biakna tau a ning kikim ding a
Exodus27:2 A kiu lite-ah ki na bawl ding hi. A kite pen a biakna tau tawh sakhat hi ding a
Exodus27:3 Ama a dingin vut koih nading beelte le kawbiate
Exodus27:4 Ama a dingin siklen
Exodus27:5 Siklen in biakna tau kimciang a batsuk theih nadingin biakna tau zawl nuai panin na bulh ding hi.
Exodus27:6 Biakna tau a dingin singkha sing zawlte bawlin sumngo tawh tuate na zut ding hi.
Exodus27:7 A kipuak ciangin biakna tau pang nihte-ah a zawlte a om theihna dingin a kualte’ vang sungah a zawlte kikhum ding hi.
Exodus27:8 Singpekte tawh kuak nei-in biakna tau na bawl ding a
Exodus27:9 “Biakbuk tual na bawl ding hi. A tual in leitaw lam pangah pang khat a dingin pi za le sawmnga a sau
Exodus27:10 A khuam sawmnih le a bullen sawmnih pen sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding a
Exodus27:11 Leilu lampang a ding zong a sauna tua bangmah hi-in
Exodus27:12 Nitumna lam pangah buktual a vailam a dingin khuampi sawm le bullen sawmte tawh pi sawmsagih le nga a sau a kikhai suk dalna puan om ding hi.
Exodus27:13 A mailam
Exodus27:14 Kongpi pang khat-a ding a kikhaisuk dalna puan pi sawmnih le nih le alang hi ding a

Exodus28:1 “Tua ciangin keima tungah siampi na a sem dingin Israel mite lak panin na sanggampa Aaron le a tapate Nadab le Abihu
Exodus28:2 Minthanna le hoihna tawh a kidim nadingin na sanggampa Aaron a’ ding biakna puan siangtho na bawl ding hi.
Exodus28:3 Keima siampi nasepna-ah amah a ap theih nadingun amaute in Aaron’ puante a bawl nading
Exodus28:4 Amaute’ bawl ding puante: Awmdal khat
Exodus28:5 Amaute in kham
Exodus28:6 “Amaute in siampipuan pen
Exodus28:7 A kizop khawm theih nadingin a mong nihte-ah a kimat liangkaihna puan nih nei ding hi.
Exodus28:8 Amah a gak dingin hoihtakin a kigan tua tunga puan om pen
Exodus28:9 Nangmah in onik suang nih la-in tuate’ tungah Israel tapate’ min na gelh ding a
Exodus28:10 amau’ suahna tawh kizui-in amau’ min gukte suang khat tungah gelhin
Exodus28:11 Kizepna a bawlpa in min gelhna a bawl bangin Israel tapa sawm le nihte’ minte suang nihte tungah na gelh ding hi. Tuate pen kham a zepna tawh na um ding hi.
Exodus28:12 Israel tapate phawkna suang dingin siampipuan’ liangkaih puan tungah tua suang nihte na bulh ding hi. Aaron in ama liangko nihte tungah phawkphawk dingin Topa’ mai-ah amaute’ min pua ding hi.
Exodus28:13 Kham tawh kibawl a kiphut kizepna le
Exodus28:14 khau bangin a kihual

Exodus28:17 Tua sungah suang gual li-in na bulh ding hi. Sardis suang
Exodus28:18 A gual nihna-ah emerald suang
Exodus28:19 A gual thumna-ah jakinth suang
Exodus28:20 A gual lina-ah beryl suang
Exodus28:21 Israel tapate’ min tawh kituakin amaute’ min a omna suang sawm le nih om ding hi. Tuate pen minam sawm le nihte a dingin amau’ min ciat kigelhin
Exodus28:22 Awmdal a dingin khau tawh a kibang
Exodus28:23 Awmdal a dingin kham kual nih na bawl ding a
Exodus28:24 Awmdal mong a kual nihte sungah kham khau nihte na khum ding hi.
Exodus28:25 Khau mong nihte zepna tawh na zom ding a
Exodus28:26 Kham kual nih na bawl ding a
Exodus28:27 Kham kual nih na bawl ding a

Exodus29:1 “Amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun amaute na sianthosak nadingin amaute’ tungah na hih ding thute: Bawngtalno khat le a sitbaang lo tuutal nih

Exodus29:3 Lawh khat sungah tuate koihin tuate a lawhin paipihin
Exodus29:4 “Kikhopna buk kongkhakah Aaron le a tapate na paipih ding a

Exodus29:6 Ama lu tungah dialpi khim sakin
Exodus29:7 Nangmah in nilh sathau la-in

Exodus29:10 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk mai-ah bawngtal na paipih ding hi. Aaron le a tapate in bawngtal lu tungah amau’ khut nga ding uh a
Exodus29:11 Topa’ mai
Exodus29:12 Bawngtal sisan tawmkhat la-in na khutme tawh biakna tau kite na nuh ding a
Exodus29:13 A gilpi tuam a thau khempeuh le a sin tunga a utok le a kal nihte le a kal tuam a thau na la ding a
Exodus29:14 Ahih hangin bawngtal sa le a vun le a ekte

Exodus29:22 “Nangmah in tuutal thau
Exodus29:23 le Topa’ mai-ah a om silngo sawh loh anlum lawh sung panin anlum khat

Exodus29:25 Tua ciangin amau’ khutsung panin tuate na la ding a
Exodus29:26 “Nangmah in Aaron a kikipsakna tuutal sa-iik la-in Topa’ mai-ah vei-a piak dingin na vei ding hi. Tua pen nangma tanh hi ding hi.
Exodus29:27 “Kipsakna sa pen Aaron le ama tapate a’ ding ahih ciangin
Exodus29:28 Tua pen Aaron le ama tapate a dingin Israel mite’ tung panin a kaih tawntung ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thunuama amau’ biakna panin Israel mite in a piak ding siampite’ tanh ahi hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah amau’ piak ahi hi.
Exodus29:29 “Aaron’ biakna puan siangthote pen ama sih khit ciangin a tapate’ tungah kipia ding a
Exodus29:30 Ama za luahin siampi na a sem a tapa in siangtho munah nasem dingin kikhopna bukah a pai ciangin ni sagih sung tuate silh ding hi.
Exodus29:31 “Nangmah in kipsakna tuutal la-in a siangtho biakna mun khatah a sa na huan ding hi.
Exodus29:32 Aaron le a tapate in kikhopna buk kongkhakah tuutal sa le lawh sunga om anlum ne ding uh hi.
Exodus29:33 Amaute in amaute a kikipsak nading le a siangthosak dingin kilemna a kibawlna tua ante ne ding uh a
Exodus29:34 Kipsakna sate khat peuhpeuh ahi a
Exodus29:35 “Tua bangin nang kong thupiakte khempeuh tawh kituakin Aaron le ama tapate’ tungah na hih ding a
Exodus29:36 Kilem nadingin mawhna hanga biakna-in ni simin bawngtal khat na pia ding hi. Siangthosak nadingin sathau na nilh ciang le kilemna na bawl ciangin biakna tau a dingin khialhna hanga biakna khat zong na pia ding hi.
Exodus29:37 Biakna tau a dingin ni sagih sung kilemna bawlin na siangthosak ding hi. Tua ciangin biakna tau a siangtho pen suak ding a
Exodus29:38 “Tu-in biakna tau tungah na piak tawntung dingte hih bang ahi hi: Nisimin a kizomin kum khat a pha tuuno nihta hi ding hi.
Exodus29:39 Tuuno khat zingsang lamin na pia ding a
Exodus29:40 Tuuno a masa tawh annel lawh khat le a oliv thau hai khat tawh a kihel leh tuibuah dingin leenggahzu hai khat hi ding hi.
Exodus29:41 Tuuno adang khat nitakin na pia ding a
Exodus29:42 Nang tunga thu kong gen nading
Exodus29:43 Tua lai-ah Israel mite tawh ka kituah ding a
Exodus29:44 Keimah in kikhopna buk le biakna tau ka siangthosak ding a
Exodus29:45 Israel mite lakah keimah tengin amau’ Pasian ka hi ding hi.
Exodus29:46 Amaute’ lakah keimah ka tenna hangin Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih Topa amau’ Pasian ka hihna amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa amau’ Pasian ka hi hi.

Exodus35:1 Moses in Israel mihonpi khempeuh khawmin amaute kiangah
Exodus35:2 Ni guk sungin nasep kiman ding a
Exodus35:3 Sabbath ni-in na tenna khempeuh uhah mei na cih kei ding uh hi
Exodus35:4 Moses in Israel mihonpite khempeuh tungah
Exodus35:5 Note in Topa’ tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. A pia nuam peuhmah in Topa’ tungah biakna paipih un. Tuate in: Kham
Exodus35:6 a dum
Exodus35:7 a kisansak tuutal vunte le savunte; singkha sing
Exodus35:8 meivak a’ ding sathau
Exodus35:9 siampipuan le awmdalah bulh dingin onik suang le suang dangte ahi hi.
Exodus35:10 “Note’ lak panin siamna a nei mi peuhmah hong paisak unla
Exodus35:11 a puanbuk le a khuhna
Exodus35:12 singkuang a zawlte tawh
Exodus35:13 sabuai a zawlte le a nazatte khempeuh tawh
Exodus35:14 khuavak dingin meivakkhuam zong
Exodus35:15 paknamtui biakna tau
Exodus35:16 meihal biakna tau
Exodus35:17 buktual a a puankhaite
Exodus35:18 biakbuk khetphimte le huang khetphimte
Exodus35:19 siangtho munah zat dingin limtakin a kigan puante
Exodus35:20 Tua ciangin Israel mihonpi khempeuh Moses’ omna panin paikhia uh hi.
Exodus35:21 Piak nopna lungsim a nei mi peuhmah hong pai tawm uh a
Exodus35:22 Tua ahih ciangin numei
Exodus35:23 A dum
Exodus35:24 Ngun ahi a
Exodus35:25 A hih thei numei khempeuh in a khut uh tawh khau khuk uh a
Exodus35:26 Hih theih siamna a nei numei khempeuh in zong keelmul khuk uh hi.
Exodus35:27 Makaite in siampipuan le awmdal a bulh dingin onik suang le suang dangte
Exodus35:28 meivak ding
Exodus35:29 Topa in Moses tunga a thupiaksa nasep nadingin na khat peuhpeuh a pia nuam numei pasal Israel mi khempeuh in utthu-a biakna-in Topa’ tungah hong paipih uh hi.

Exodus35:34 Topa in amah le Dan minam Ahisamak’ tapa Oholiab tungah midangte hilh siamna pia khin hi.
Exodus35:35 Amah in khutsiam nasep
Exodus36:1 “Bezalel le Oholiab le biakbuk lamna-ah nasep khat peuhpeuh sep nading zia a thei dingin Topa in siamna le pilna a guat mi peuhmah in Topa’ thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin sem ding uh hi
Exodus36:2 Moses in Bezalel le Oholiab le Topa in nasep siamna a guat mi
Exodus36:3 Israel mite in biakbuk sep nadingin utthu-a a piak uh nate a paipih khempeuh uh amaute in Moses’ tung panin a sang uh hi. Amaute in zingsang simin utthu-a piakna ama tungah paipih uh ahih manin
Exodus36:4 biakbuk nasep a namkim a sem mi khempeuh amau’ nasepna ciat panin hong pai uh a
Exodus36:5 Moses kiangah
Exodus36:6 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in thu pia-in giahphual khempeuhah thu kizasak a
Exodus36:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ piaksa nate pen nasepna khempeuh hih nadingin kicing a
Exodus36:8 Nasem mite’ lak panin a hih thei mi khempeuh in puan dal sawm tawh biakbuk bawl uh hi. Tuate pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih le a dum
Exodus36:9 Tua puan a dung pi sawmli le nih
Exodus36:10 Amaute in puan dal ngate khatlekhat khuituahin
Exodus36:11 Amaute in a kikhuituah masa puan a nawlnung pen nawl dung sukah khau dum tawh a bilvangte bawl uh a
Exodus36:12 Amaute in puan khat tungah bilvang sawmnga bawlin
Exodus36:13 Amaute in kham kilhna sawmnga bawlin
Exodus36:14 Amaute in biakbuk a tung khuh nadingin keelmul tawh puan dal sawm le khat a bawl uh hi.
Exodus36:15 Tua puante a dung pi sawmli le nga
Exodus36:16 Amaute in puan dal ngate khatlekhat khuituahin
Exodus36:17 Amaute in a kikhuituah puan khat a nawlnung pen nawlah a bilvang sawmnga bawlin
Exodus36:18 Tuate bup khat a suah theih nading
Exodus36:19 Amaute in puanbuk-a dingin a kisansak tuutal vunte le keel vunte tawh khuhna khat a bawl uh hi.
Exodus36:20 Tua ciangin amaute in biakbuk-a dingin singkha sing tawh a po to khawm ding khuampeekte a bawl uh hi.
Exodus36:21 A khuampeekte khat a tun pi sawm le pi nga hi a
Exodus36:22 A bulh nadingin khuampeek khat in zang nih ciat nei a
Exodus36:23 Amaute in biakbuk-a dingin khuampeekte hih bangin bawl uh hi: Leitaw lampang a dingin khuam sawmnih;
Exodus36:24 a khuampeek sawmnihte’ bulah bullen sawmli ngun tawh
Exodus36:25 Biakbuk a pang nihna lam
Exodus36:26 le ngun tawh kibawl a bullen sawmli
Exodus36:27 Nitumna lam
Exodus36:28 Biakbuk nung lam kiute a dingin a khuampeek nih zong a bawl uh hi.
Exodus36:29 Tuate a bul lamah kikak a
Exodus36:30 Ngun tawh kibawl amau’ bullente tawh khuampeek giat om hi: Bullen sawm le guk om a
Exodus36:31 Amaute in singkha singzawl
Exodus36:32 biakbuk a pang langkhat a khuampeekte a dingin zawl nga
Exodus36:33 A khuampeekte’ kimciang takah mong khat panin mong khat dongin a zawl laita paisuaksak uh hi.
Exodus36:34 Amaute in kham tawh khuampeekte zutin
Exodus36:35 Amaute in a dum
Exodus36:36 Tua puan a dingin amaute in singkha khuampi li bawl uh a
Exodus36:37 Amaute in puanbuk kongkhak-a dingin a dum
Exodus36:38 a khuampi ngate a vankhainate tawh a bawl uh hi. Amaute in tuate’ luzepnate kham tawh zutin
Exodus37:1 Bezalel in singkha sing tawh singkuang bawl a
Exodus37:2 Kham citak tawh a sung le a pua zutin
Exodus37:3 A kiu lite a dingin kham kual li
Exodus37:4 Singkha singzawlte zong bawl a
Exodus37:5 singkuang puak nadingin singkuang panga kualte sungah a zawlte a khum hi.
Exodus37:6 Kham citak tawh hehpihna tokhom khat bawl a
Exodus37:7 Amah in sek tawh a kiseek kham tawh kherub nih
Exodus37:8 Kherub khat mong khatah
Exodus37:9 Kherub-te in a khate uh tua tokhom tungah zalin
Exodus37:10 Amah in singkha sing tawh sabuai zong bawl a
Exodus37:11 Kham citak tawh zut a
Exodus37:12 Khut peek cia a pha zawl khat a kimkotah bawl a
Exodus37:13 Tua sabuai a dingin kham kual li sungin
Exodus37:14 Sabuai puak nading zawlte a len dingin a zawl gei-ah a kualte om hi.
Exodus37:15 Sabuai puak nadingin singkha singzawlte bawl a
Exodus37:16 Amah in sabuai tunga om ding beellekuangte
Exodus37:17 Amah in kham citak tawh meivakkhuam zong a bawl hi. Meivakkhuam a bul le a kungte pen a kiseek nate tawh kibawl hi. A haite
Exodus37:18 A pangte panin hiang guk meengkhia a
Exodus37:19 Hiang khat tungah a nun le a pak a om
Exodus37:20 A meivakkhuam tung mahmahah a nun le a pak tawh a om
Exodus37:21 meivakkhuam panin hiang guk a kopte’ bulah tua tawh sakhat ahi nun khat om hi.
Exodus37:22 Amau’ nunte le a hiangte pen tua tawh sakhat hi a
Exodus37:23 A meivak sagihte le a taitehte le a kuangte kham citak a bawl ahi hi.
Exodus37:24 Amah in kham citak tawi sawmnih le tawi khat a gik tawh tua meivakkhuam le a nazatte khempeuh a bawl hi.
Exodus37:25 Amah in singkha sing tawh paknamtui biakna tau bawl a
Exodus37:26 Amah in a tungzang
Exodus37:27 le a puak nading zawlte a len dingin a pang tuak a geihual nuai takah kham kual nih a bawl hi.
Exodus37:28 Amah in singkha sing tawh a zawlte bawlin
Exodus37:29 Amah in paknamtui bawlte’ gawm bangin a siangtho nilh sathau le a siangtho a namtui paknamtui zong a bawl hi.
Exodus38:1 Amah in meihal biakna tau zong singkha sing tawh bawl a
Exodus38:2 Amah in tua tau a dingin a kiu lite-ah a kite a bawl hi. A kite
Exodus38:3 Biakna tau nazat khempeuh
Exodus38:4 Biakna tau a dingin a zawl nuai-ah
Exodus38:5 A zawlte a len dingin sumngo siklen kiu lite’ tunga ding a kual li a sung hi.
Exodus38:6 Singkha sing tawh a zawlte bawl a
Exodus38:7 A puak nadingin biakna tau pangte a om a kualte sungah a zawlte khum a
Exodus38:8 Amah in kikhopna buk kongkhakah na a sem numeite’ limlangte panin sumngo tawh kisilna kuang le a ngakna a bawl hi.
Exodus38:9 Amah in buktual a bawl hi. Leitaw lampang buktual a puan kikhaite pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih hi a
Exodus38:10 A khuampite sawmnih hi a
Exodus38:11 Leilu lampang a ding zong tua bangmah ahi hi.
Exodus38:12 Nitumna lampang a dingin puan kikhai sukte pi sawmsagih le pi nga hi a
Exodus38:13 A mailam
Exodus38:14 Kongpi pang khat-a ding puan kikhai sukte pen pi sawmnih le nih le alang hi a
Exodus38:15 A pang langkhat ading zong tua bangmah ahi hi. Buktual kongpi hih lam le hua lamah khuampi thum le bullen thum tawh a puan khaisukte pi sawmnih le nih le alang ahi hi.
Exodus38:16 Buktual kimkota puan kikhai sukte khempeuh pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih ahi hi.
Exodus38:17 Khuampite a’ ding a bullente pen sumngo hi a
Exodus38:18 Buktual kongpi puankhai pen a dum
Exodus38:19 A khuampite li hi a
Exodus38:20 Biakbuk le buktual kimkota ding khetphimte khempeuh sumngo ahi hi.
Exodus38:21 Hihte pen siampi Aaron’ tapa Ithamar’ vaihawmna nuai-ah Levi mite’ sep ding Topa’ omna ahi biakbuk-a dingin Moses’ thupiakna tawh a kisim van malte ahi hi.
Exodus38:22 Judah minam Hur’ tapa ahi Uri’ tapa Bezalel in Topa in Moses a thupiak khempeuh a bawl hi.
Exodus38:23 A khut siam
Exodus38:24 Nasep nadinga a kizang kham khempeuh
Exodus38:25 Mi simna sungah a kihel mihonte tung panin a kingah ngunte
Exodus38:26 Mi khat ciangin beka khat (biakinn shekel-in shekel lang) pai pia a
Exodus38:27 Ngun talen za khatte pen biakbuk khuam bullente le dalna puan khuam bullente dingin sun’ ding ahi hi. Talen za khatte bullen zakhat
Exodus38:28 Amah in shekel tulkhat zasagih sawmsagih le nga pen khuampi tunga vankhai nadingin bawl a
Exodus38:29 A kipia sumngo khempeuh
Exodus38:30 Amah in tua tawh kikhopna buk kongkhakte a dingin khuam bullente
Exodus38:31 buktual kimkota khuam bullente
Exodus39:1 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus39:2 Amaute in siampipuan pen kham
Exodus39:3 Hoihtakin a kigeel
Exodus39:4 Amaute in siampipuan a dingin liangkaih puan bawl uh a
Exodus39:5 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus39:6 Israel tapate a phazah tawh kizui-in
Exodus39:7 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin Israel tapate phawkna suang dingin siampipuan’ liangkaih puan tungah a bulh uh hi.
Exodus39:8 Amaute in kham
Exodus39:9 Tua awmdal a ning kikim a
Exodus39:10 Amaute in tua sungah suang gual li bulh uh a
Exodus39:11 A gual nihna-ah emerald suang
Exodus39:12 A gual thumna-ah jakinth suang
Exodus39:13 A gual lina-ah beryl suang
Exodus39:14 Israel tapate a phazah tawh kituakin amaute’ min a kigelhna suang sawm le nih om hi. Tua min gelhnate pen minam sawm le nih a huamin a kigelh ahi hi.
Exodus39:15 Amaute in awmdal tungah khau tawh a kibang
Exodus39:16 Kham tawh a kibawl zepna nih le kham kual nih bawl uh a
Exodus39:17 Amaute in awmdal mongte-ah a om kual nihte pen kham khau nihte tawh a khih uh hi.
Exodus39:18 Amaute in zepna nihte tungah khau mong nihte zom uh a
Exodus39:19 Tua ciangin amaute in kham kual nih bawl uh a
Exodus39:20 Amaute in kham kual nih bawl uh a
Exodus39:21 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus39:22 Amaute in khau dum bek tawh a kigan siampi puantualpi zong a bawl uh hi.
Exodus39:23 A kikeek loh nadingin puantualpi ngawng pen puan ngawng vang bangin a ngawng kimkotah a zimna om hi.
Exodus39:24 Puantualpi mongte-ah amaute in a dum
Exodus39:25 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus39:26 Biak nasep nadinga puantualpi mong kimkot tungah siklong khat
Exodus39:27 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus39:28 le khau hoih tawh a kigan dialpi le khau hoih tawh a kigan lukhute
Exodus39:29 le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a kibawl puan kawnggak le phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem a dum
Exodus39:30 Amaute in kham citak tawh a siangtho kizepna peek khat bawl uh a
Exodus39:31 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus39:32 Tua bangin kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk nasep khempeuh kiman hi. Topa in Moses a thupiaksa khempeuh bangin Israel mite in sem khin uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute man khin uh hi.
Exodus39:33 Amaute in biakbuk
Exodus39:34 a kisansak tuutal vunte le savun dangte tawh a kibawl khuhna le kong puankhai dalna puan;
Exodus39:35 thuciamna singkuang
Exodus39:36 sabuai le a nazat khempeuhte le Ompihna Anlum;
Exodus39:37 kham citak meivakkhuam le meivak a kibulhsa tawh a meivakte le a nazatte khempeuh le meivak a ding sathau;
Exodus39:38 kham biakna tau
Exodus39:39 sumngo biakna tau le a sumngo siklen
Exodus39:40 buktual a puan kikhaite
Exodus39:41 siampi nasep nadingin siangtho mun a zat ding hoihtakin a kibawl puante
Exodus39:42 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin Israel mite in nasep khempeuh hih uh hi.
Exodus39:43 Moses in nasep khempeuh vel a
Exodus40:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Exodus40:2 “Kha masa a ni masa ni-in nangmah in kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk na lam ding hi.
Exodus40:3 Tua buk sungah thuciamna singkuang na koih ding a
Exodus40:4 Tua ciangin sabuai tumpihin a om ding bangin na koih ding hi. Meivakkhuam zong tumpihin a meivakte na bulh ding hi.
Exodus40:5 Thuciamna singkuang mai-ah paknamtui hal nadingin kham biakna tau na koih ding a
Exodus40:6 Kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk kongkhak mai-ah meihal biakna tau koihin
Exodus40:7 kikhopna buk le biakna tau kikalah kisilna kuang na koih ding a
Exodus40:8 A kimkotah buktual na bawl ding a
Exodus40:9 “Tua ciangin sathau la-in
Exodus40:10 Nangmah in meihal biakna tau le a nazat khempeuh zong sathau nuhin biakna tau na ap ding a
Exodus40:11 Kisilna kuang le a ngakna zong sathau nuhin na ap ding hi.
Exodus40:12 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk kongkhakah Aaron le ama tapate paipihin
Exodus40:13 amah in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingin puan siangthote Aaron silhsakin
Exodus40:14 Tua ciangin ama tapate zong paipihin puantungsilhte na silhsak ding a
Exodus40:15 amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun amaute’ pa sathau na nilh bangin amaute zong sathau na nilh ding hi. Amau’ sathau kinilhna in amau’ khang tawntungin siampi hi paisuaksak ding hi
Exodus40:16 Moses in zong Topa in amah a thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin a hih hi.
Exodus40:17 A kum nihna a kha masa
Exodus40:18 Moses in biakbuk lam hi. Amah in a bullente koihin
Exodus40:19 Biakbuk tungah a tungkhuhna zal a
Exodus40:20 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin amah in thuciamna suangpek la-in singkuang sungah koih a
Exodus40:21 Biakbuk sungah singkuang paipihin
Exodus40:22 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus40:23 Topa’ mai tua sabuai tungah a om ding bangin anlum a koih hi.
Exodus40:24 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus40:25 Topa’ mai-ah meivakte a koih hi.
Exodus40:26 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus40:27 tua tungah a namtui paknamtui a hal hi.
Exodus40:28 Amah in biakbuk kongkhak ding kongpuankhai a mun dingah a khai hi.
Exodus40:29 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin amah in kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk kongkhakah meihal biakna tau koih a
Exodus40:30 Kikhopna buk le biakna tau kikalah kisilna kuang koih a
Exodus40:31 Moses le Aaron le a tapate in amau’ khut le a khete uh tua tui tawh a sil uh hi.
Exodus40:32 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin
Exodus40:33 Amah in biakbuk le biakna tau kiimah a buktual bawl a
Exodus40:34 Tua ciangin meii in kikhopna buk tuam a
Exodus40:35 Tua ahih manin kikhopna buk sungah Moses tum thei lo hi.
Exodus40:36 A khualzin sung tawntung uh biakbuk tung panin meii a kilakkhiat toh peuhpeuh ciangin Israel mite mailam nawtin pai uh a
Exodus40:37 ahih hangin meii a kilakkhiat kei leh a kilakkhiat ni mateng amaute paikhia lo uh hi.
Exodus40:38 Bang hang hiam cih leh a khualzin sung tawntung uh Israel mi khempeuh’ muhna-ah biakbuk tungah sunin Topa’ meii om a
Leviticus1:1 Topa in Moses sam a
Leviticus1:2 “Israel mite tungah gen inla
Leviticus1:3 “Ama biakna pen bawnghon panin meihal biakna ahihleh
Leviticus1:4 Amah in meihal biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga ding a
Leviticus1:5 Tua ciangin amah in Topa’ mai-ah a bawngtal go ding hi. Aaron’ suan siampite in a si hong paipihin
Leviticus1:6 Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna ganhing a vun hawkin semnen ding a
Leviticus1:7 Aaron’ suan siampite in biakna tau tungah mei koihin
Leviticus1:8 Tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite in a sanente
Leviticus1:9 ahih hangin a sungkuate le a khete tui tawh sil ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tawh kihal biakna
Leviticus1:10 “Meihal biak nadingin ama letsong pen tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh a hon lak panin ahihleh
Leviticus1:11 Amah in Topa’ mai biakna tau tung leilu lampangah go ding a
Leviticus1:12 Tua ciangin amah in semnen ding a
Leviticus1:13 ahih hangin a sungkuate le a khete amah in tui tawh sil ding hi. Siampipa in a vekpi-in pia-in
Leviticus1:14 “ Topa’ tungah ama biakna pen vasa tawh meihal biakna ahihleh
Leviticus1:15 Tua ciangin siampipa in biakna tau-ah paipihin a lu heektat ding a
Leviticus1:16 Amah in a tangkhai le a multe bot khia-in
Leviticus1:17 Amah in a khate-in balkek ding a
Leviticus2:1 “Mi khatpeuh in Topa’ tungah an tawh biakna hong paipih le
Leviticus2:2 tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in annel khutdim le sathau
Leviticus2:3 An tawh biakna a valteng pen Aaron le a tapate a’ ding hi ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangtho pen ahi hi.
Leviticus2:4 “Nangmah in biak nadingin meibung sunga ki-em an tawh biakna na paipih ciangin
Leviticus2:5 “Na biakna pen beelpei daii tunga ki-em an tawh biakna ahihleh
Leviticus2:6 Balnenin a tungah sathau na sung ding hi. Tua pen an tawh biakna ahi hi.
Leviticus2:7 “Na biakna pen sikbeel daii sunga kihuan an tawh biakna ahihleh
Leviticus2:8 Nangmah in hih nate tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna
Leviticus2:9 Siampipa in an tawh biakna panin a phawkna biakna teng la-in
Leviticus2:10 An tawh biakna a valteng pen Aaron le a tapate a’ ding hi ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangthopen ahi hi.
Leviticus2:11 “ Topa’ tungah na paipih an tawh biakna pen silngo tawh kibawl lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh silngo hitaleh khuaizu hitaleh khat peuhpeuh Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in na hal kei ding hi.
Leviticus2:12 Anpal tawh biakna ahihleh Topa’ kiangah na paipih thei ding hi. Ahih hangin a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah kipia lo ding hi.
Leviticus2:13 An tawh na biaknate khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi. An tawh na biakna-ah na Pasian tawh na thuciamna ci sawh loin na om kei ding a
Leviticus2:14 “Anpal tawh Topa’ tungah biakna na piak leh
Leviticus2:15 Nang in a tungah sathau sungin
Leviticus2:16 Siampipa in phawk nadingin a kigawivui an pawlkhat le a sathau leh a paknamtui khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah meihal biakna ahi hi.
Leviticus3:1 “Mi khat’ biakna pen thunuama biakna ahih a
Leviticus3:2 Tua ciangin amah in a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk kongah go ding a
Leviticus3:3 Thunuama biakna panin Topa’ tungah mei tawh biakna-in a gilpi tuam a thaute le a sungkuate’ tunga a om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus3:4 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau le a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi.
Leviticus3:5 Tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in mei tunga om sing tunga meihal biakpiakna tau tung mahah hal ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa a dingin a gim namtui
Leviticus3:6 “ Topa’ tungah thunuama a piak ding ama biakna pen tuu le keel honte sung panin a nu hitaleh a pa hitaleh ganhing khat ahihleh
Leviticus3:7 Amah in biak nadingin tuuno khat a piak leh
Leviticus3:8 a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai-ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi.
Leviticus3:9 Tua ciangin thunuama biakna panin Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in a thau
Leviticus3:10 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus3:11 Tua ciangin siampipa in Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi.
Leviticus3:12 “Ama biakna keel ahihleh
Leviticus3:13 a lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai-ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi.
Leviticus3:14 Tua ciangin Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in piak dingin a gilpi tuam a thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus3:15 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus3:16 Tua ciangin siampipa in a gim namtui dingin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. A thau khempeuh Topa -a’ ahi hi.
Leviticus3:17 Tua pen na khang tawntungun na tenna khempeuh uhah note in a thau le sisan na nek loh nadingun a tawntungin ngeina kip hi ding hi
Leviticus4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus4:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih lo ding ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh
Leviticus4:3 a khial pa pen sathau a kinilh siampipa ahih a
Leviticus4:4 Amah in Topa’ mai kikhopna buk kongah a bawngtal paipihin
Leviticus4:5 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in a bawngtal si tawmkhat la-in
Leviticus4:6 Tua ciangin siampipa in a si sungah a khutme diahin
Leviticus4:7 Tua ciangin siampipa in kikhopna buk sung Topa’ mai-a om paknamtui biakna tau kite a si kimkhat nuhin
Leviticus4:8 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal thau khempeuh a gilpi tuam a thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus4:9 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus4:10 (thunuama biakna bawngtal panin hihte a kilak mah bangin) la ding a
Leviticus4:11 Ahih hangin bawngtal vun le a sa khempeuh
Leviticus4:12 a bawngtal buppi puakhia-in vut kibuakna
Leviticus4:13 “Israel mihonte khempeuh in theih lohna hangin khialhna khat gamta-in tua pen mihonte in a phawk kei a
Leviticus4:14 amau’ gamtatnasa khialhna a kitheih ciangin
Leviticus4:15 Tua ciangin mihonte’ upate in Topa’ mai
Leviticus4:16 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in kikhopna bukah bawngtal si kimkhat paipih ding a
Leviticus4:17 a si sungah a khutme diahin dalna puan mai Topa’ mai-ah sagih vei theh ding hi.
Leviticus4:18 Tua ciangin amah in Topa’ mai kikhopna buk sunga om biakna tau kite tungah a si kimkhat zut ding a
Leviticus4:19 Tua ciangin amah in a thau khempeuh la-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi.
Leviticus4:20 Tua bangin a bawngtal hih ding hi. Amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal a hihsa mah bangin hih zong hih ding hi. Siampipa in amau a’ dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a
Leviticus4:21 Amah in giahphual pua-ah bawngtal puakhia ding a
Leviticus4:22 “Ukpa khat khialin
Leviticus4:23 ama gamtatnasa khialhna ama tungah a va kihilh leh
Leviticus4:24 keel lu tungah a khut nga-in
Leviticus4:25 Tua ciangin siampipa in a khutme tawh khialhna hanga biakna si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuhin meihal biakna tau bulah a si omlai teng sung ding hi.
Leviticus4:26 Thunuama biakna sathaute mah bangin amah in biakna tau tungah a thau khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampipa in ama khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a
Leviticus4:27 “Hih lo ding
Leviticus4:28 ama gamtatnasa a khialhna ama tungah a kihilh ciangin amah in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin biak nading a sitbaang lo keel a nu khat paipih ding hi.
Leviticus4:29 Amah in a khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in
Leviticus4:30 Siampipa in a khutme tawh si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh ding a

Leviticus6:26 Khialhna hanga biakna a pia siampipa in kikhopna buktual sung a siangtho mun khatah ne ding hi.
Leviticus6:27 A sa a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi. Puan tungah a si a kithehkhak ciangin
Leviticus6:28 Tua ciangin a kihuanna leibeel kisukham ding hi. Ahih hangin taaubeelin a kihuan ahihleh a beel kikiatin tui sungah kisawp siang sitset ding hi.

Leviticus7:7 “Mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna tawh kibang a
Leviticus7:8 Mi khatpeuh’ meihal biakna a piaksak siampipa in ama piaksak tua meihal biakna a vun ngah ding hi.

Leviticus7:11 “Mi khatpeuh in Topa’ tungah a piak theih ding
Leviticus7:12 Amah in lungdam kohna-in a piak leh
Leviticus7:13 Amah in lungdam koh nadingin thunuama ama biakpiakna tawh silngo kisawh anlum mohte ama biakna-in paipih khawm ding hi.
Leviticus7:14 Amah in Topa biak nadingin tua biakna sung panin moh khat ciat pia ding a

Leviticus7:17 Ahih hangin a ni thum ni-in biakpiakna sa a omlai teng mei tawh kihal ding hi.

Leviticus7:19 “A nin na khat peuhpeuh tawh a kisawhkha sa kine lo ding a
Leviticus7:20 A nin hi napi-in thunuama Topa’ tungah biakpiakna sa a ne pa ama mipihte’ lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi.

Leviticus11:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah
Leviticus11:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen un: Hihte pen leitung a om ganhing khempeuh lak panin na nek theih ding uh a nungta ganhing ahi hi.

Leviticus11:4 Ahi zongin eknel haite lak pan hitaleh khecin kate lak pan hitaleh
Leviticus11:5 Sakikh ganhing in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note a dingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:6 Bilpi in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note a dingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:7 Vok pen khecin ka ahih hangin eknel hai lo ahih ciangin note a dingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:8 Note in tuate’ sa na ne kei ding uh a

Leviticus11:11 Tuate pen note a dingin a kihhuai hi ding hi. Note in tuate’ sa na ne kei ding uh a
