Leviticus11:19 gun vapi
Leviticus11:20 “Khe li tawh a pai
Leviticus11:21 Ahi zongin khe li tawh a pai
Leviticus11:22 Tuate lak panin na nek theih dingte uh: Kauphe kitom nam khempeuh
Leviticus11:23 Ahih hangin khe li nei-in kha a nei ganhing dangte khempeuh note a dingin a kihhuai ahi hi.
Leviticus11:24 “Hihte tawh note a nin na suak ding uh hi. A sisa a lawng peuhmahte a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a
Leviticus11:25 a sisa themkhat a pua peuhmah in a puan sawpin
Leviticus11:26 A khecin a ka ahih hangin eknel a hai lo ganhing peuhmah note a dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:27 Khe li tawh a pai ganhingte khempeuh lak panin amau’ khebom tawh a paite khempeuh note a dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a sisa a lawngkha peuhmahte a nitak dong a nin hi ding a
Leviticus11:28 a sisa a puapa in a puan sawpin
Leviticus11:29 “Leitungah a vak kawikawi
Leviticus11:30 tawlbawkpi
Leviticus11:31 A hontat ganhing khempeuhte lak panin hihte pen note a dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a sisa a lawng peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:32 Tuate a sisa khat peuhpeuh a tukna nate
Leviticus11:33 Tuate khat peuhpeuh lei beel khat peuhpeuh sungah a kiat leh
Leviticus11:34 Tua lei beel sungah a om a kine thei ding an tungah tua bang tui a tuk leh a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang beel sunga om dawn theih ding peuhmah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:35 Tua bang a sisa themkhat a tukna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. Meibung hitaleh beelpei hitaleh kisuzan ding hi. Tuate a nin hi a
Leviticus11:36 Ahi zongin tuinak le tuibeem ahihleh a siang hi ding a
Leviticus11:37 A kivawh ding khaici tungah tua a sisate themkhat a tuk leh
Leviticus11:38 Ahih hangin khaici tui kidiah a
Leviticus11:39 “Note’ nek theih ding ganhing khat peuhpeuh a sih leh a sisa a lawng pa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a
Leviticus11:40 a sisa a ne pa in ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. A sisa a puapa in zong ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:41 “Leitungah a hontat ganhing peuhmah a kihhuai hi a
Leviticus11:42 A awmtal peuhmah leh khe li-a a pai peuhmah
Leviticus11:43 A hontat ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh nomau mah a kihhuai-in na kibawltawm kei ding uh a
Leviticus11:44 Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap unla
Leviticus11:45 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong pai khiatpih pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin kei siangtho ka hih manin note na siangtho ding uh hi
Leviticus11:46 Hih pen a nin le a siang
Leviticus11:47 
Leviticus12:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus12:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Nupi khat gai-in ta pasal a neih leh ni sagih sung tua nu a nin hi ding a
Leviticus12:3 A ni giat ni-in a naungek vun dawn ki-at ding hi.
Leviticus12:4 Tua ciangin nupi in ama si luanna hangin a sian nadingin ni sawmthum le ni thum sung omlai ding hi. Amah in kisiansuahna ni a cin mateng a siangtho na khat peuhpeuh lawng loin
Leviticus12:5 “Ahih hangin amah in ta numei a neih leh
Leviticus12:6 “Amah a kisiansuahna hun a cin ciangin tapa a’ ding hitaleh tanu a’ ding hitaleh
Leviticus12:7 siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah pia-in
Leviticus12:8 “Tua nu in tuuno a piak zawh kei leh vakhu nih ahi a
Leviticus13:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah
Leviticus13:2 “Mi khat in ama pumpi vun tungah a bawk ahi a
Leviticus13:3 Siampipa in ama pumpi vun tunga natna mun vel ding hi. A natna munah a om a multe kangin ama vun sangin a natna thuktum zaw-in a kimuh leh
Leviticus13:4 Ahih hangin ama pumpi vun sungah a natna mun kang napi-in
Leviticus13:5 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel ding a
Leviticus13:6 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel kik ding a
Leviticus13:7 Ahih hangin amah a sian nadingin siampipa kiangah a kilah khit ciangin a meima in a vun sung a lawh leh siampipa mai-ah kilak kik ding hi.
Leviticus13:8 Siampipa in vel ding a
Leviticus13:9 “Mi khat in meima a neih ciangin siampipa kiangah kipaipih ding hi.
Leviticus13:10 Siampipa in vel ding a
Leviticus13:11 tua pen ama pumpi vun sungah a om luisa phaknatna hi a
Leviticus13:12 Siampipa’ muh theihna ciangah tua natna in a vun phukhamin
Leviticus13:13 siampipa in vel ding a
Leviticus13:14 Ahih hangin ama tungah ma thak a kilat ciangin amah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus13:15 Siampipa in a ma thak velin
Leviticus13:16 Ahih hangin a ma thak pen kikheel kikin a kang a suah leh
Leviticus13:17 siampipa in amah velin a natna pen a kang a suah leh
Leviticus13:18 “Mi khatpeuh’ pumpi vun sungah a damsa meimatum khat om a
Leviticus13:19 a meimatum munah a bawk kang ahi a
Leviticus13:20 Siampipa in vel ding a
Leviticus13:21 Ahih hangin siampipa in velin
Leviticus13:22 Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phaknatna hi a
Leviticus13:23 Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a kilawh kei leh meimatum pawn hi a
Leviticus13:24 “Tua ahih kei leh
Leviticus13:25 siampipa in vel ding hi. Tua mun a om a multe kangin a vun sangin a natna a thukzawk leh
Leviticus13:26 Ahih hangin siampipa in velin
Leviticus13:27 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel ding hi. Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phaknatna hi a
Leviticus13:28 Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a vun sung lawh loin mualin a om leh
Leviticus13:29 “Numei ahi a
Leviticus13:30 siampipa in tua natna vel ding hi. Tua natna pen a vun sangin thukzaw-in a kimuh a
Leviticus13:31 Siampipa in cithak natna velin
Leviticus13:32 a ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a natna vel ding hi. A cithak kilawh loin
Leviticus13:33 amah le amah a mul kikiat ding a
Leviticus13:34 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a cithak vel ding a
Leviticus13:35 Ahih hangin amah a kisiansak khit ciangin a cithak in a vun sung a lawh leh
Leviticus13:36 siampipa in vel ding a
Leviticus13:37 Ahih hangin ama mitah
Leviticus13:38 “Numei ahi a
Leviticus13:39 siampipa in vel ding a
Leviticus13:40 “Mi khat a sam pulh a
Leviticus13:41 Mi khat a taltang le a paang panin a sam le a mul a pulh leh
Leviticus13:42 Ahih hangin a lutol tung hitaleh a talkolh tung hitaleh ah a san kang meima a om leh
Leviticus13:43 Tua ciangin siampipa in amah vel ding a
Leviticus13:44 amah pen miphak hi a
Leviticus13:45 “Tua natna a nei mi phakpa in puankekte silhin a sam phiahsak ding a
Leviticus13:46 Amah in a natna a neih laiteng a nin hi ding hi. Amah a nin ahih manin giahphual pualam mun khatah amah guak teng ding hi.
Leviticus13:47 “Samul puan hitaleh saihadial puan hitaleh
Leviticus13:48 tua saihadial puan
Leviticus13:49 tua natna pen a hing melin ahi a
Leviticus13:50 Siampipa in a natna vel ding a
Leviticus13:51 Tua ciangin amah in a ni sagih ni-in a natna velkik ding hi. A natna pen puan tungah kizelin
Leviticus13:52 Amah in a puan hal ding hi. Tua natna pen puan a tung a phei-ah hitaleh
Leviticus13:53 “Siampipa in velin
Leviticus13:54 siampipa in tua natna a banna pen amaute in a sawp ding uh thu pia ding a
Leviticus13:55 Siampipa in tua natna a banna pen a kisawp khit ciangin vel ding hi. Tua natna a banna mun a mel a kikheel kei leh
Leviticus13:56 Ahih hangin siampipa in vel a
Leviticus13:57 Tua ciangin a puan tung hitaleh puan a tung a phei tungah hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a kilatkik leh
Leviticus13:58 Ahih hangin a puan hitaleh puan a tung a phei hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh a kisawp khit ciangin tua natna a paikhiatna na pen
Leviticus13:59 Hih pen samul puan hitaleh saihadial puan hitaleh puan a tung hitaleh a phei hitaleh
Leviticus14:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus14:2 “Hih pen amah a kisiansak ni-in mi phakpa’ zuih ding ngeina hi ding hi. Siampipa kiangah amah kipaipih ding a
Leviticus14:3 giahphual pualamah siampipa paikhia-in vel ding hi. Tua ciangin a phaknatna pen a phakpa’ tung pan a dam leh
Leviticus14:4 a kisiangsak ding mipa a dingin a hing vasa siang nih le taamtak sing le a ausan puan le puknah a la dingin siampipa in amaute sawl ding hi.
Leviticus14:5 Amaute in lei beel khat sunga kikoih tuiluang tungah a vasa khat a gawh ding uh siampipa in thu pia ding hi.
Leviticus14:6 Amah in a hing lai vasa pen taamtak sing le a ausan puan le puknah tawh la khawmin
Leviticus14:7 Amah in phaknatna panin a kisiangsak ding pa’ tungah sagihvei theh ding a
Leviticus14:8 A kisiangsak ding mipa in a puante sawpin
Leviticus14:9 A ni sagih ni-in amah in a sam
Leviticus14:10 “A ni giat ni-in amah in a sitbaang lo tuuno a pa nih
Leviticus14:11 Amah a siangsak ding siampipa in a kisiangsak ding mipa le hih nate
Leviticus14:12 Siampipa in tuuno a pa khat la-in sathau biingta khat tawh mawhna hanga biakna-in pia-in
Leviticus14:13 Amaute in khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna
Leviticus14:14 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat la-in
Leviticus14:15 Tua ciangin sathau biingta panin kimkhat la-in amahmah’ veilam khut sungah sungin
Leviticus14:16 a veilam khutsunga om sathau sungah a taklam khutme diahin
Leviticus14:17 Ama khut sungah a omlai sathau kimkhatte pen siampipa in a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bilteep
Leviticus14:18 Siampipa in a khutsunga sathau omlai teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ lu nilh ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in ama a dingin Topa’ mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi.
Leviticus14:19 “A nitna panin a kisiangthosak ding mipa a’ ding kilemna bawl nadingin siampipa in a khialhna hanga biakna pia ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah in meihal biakna go ding a
Leviticus14:20 meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate
Leviticus14:21 “Ahih hangin amah zawngin tuazah a piakzawh kei leh
Leviticus14:22 vakhu nih ahi a
Leviticus14:23 A ni giat ni-in amah in Topa’ mai
Leviticus14:24 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno
Leviticus14:25 Amah in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno go ding hi. Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat la-in
Leviticus14:26 Siampipa in amahmah’ veilam khut sungah a sathau kimkhat sung ding a
Leviticus14:27 a veilam khutsunga a om sathau tawmkhat a taklam khutme tawh Topa’ mai-ah sagihvei theh ding hi.
Leviticus14:28 Siampipa in ama khutsunga a om sathau tawmkhat a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bilteep
Leviticus14:29 Siampipa in a khutsunga a omlai sathau teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa a’ ding Topa’ mai-ah kilemna bawl nadingin a lu nilhsak ding hi.
Leviticus14:30 Amah in vakhu hitaleh kawl vakhuno hitaleh
Leviticus14:31 khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading
Leviticus14:32 Hih pen phaknatna a vei
Leviticus14:33 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah
Leviticus14:34 “Note a dingin kong piak Kanaan gamah na om ciangun note’ leitang a inn khat sungah phaknatna kong tunsak ciangin
Leviticus14:35 inn nei pa pai-in siampipa kiangah
Leviticus14:36 Tua ciangin
Leviticus14:37 Amah in a natna vel ding hi. A natna pen tua inn kawm tungah omin
Leviticus14:38 innsung panin innkongah siampipa paikhia ding a
Leviticus14:39 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa hong paikikin en ding hi. Tua inn kawm tungah a natna a kizelh leh
Leviticus14:40 natna a banna suang lakhia-in khuapi pualam a nin mun khatah a paipih nadingun siampipa in thu pia ding hi.
Leviticus14:41 Amah in a innsung kimkot kiatsakin
Leviticus14:42 Tua ciangin amaute in suang dang la-in
Leviticus14:43 “Amah in a suangte lakhia-in a inn kiatin a zut khit ciangin tua inn sungah natna hong suahkik leh
Leviticus14:44 siampipa pai-in en ding hi. Inn sungah a natna a kizelh leh
Leviticus14:45 Amah in tua inn
Leviticus14:46 Tua tham loin tua inn a kikhakcip sungteng a sungah a lut mipa a nitak dong a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus14:47 Tua inn sungah a lum mipa le an a ne mipa in ama puante sawp ding hi.
Leviticus14:48 “Ahih hangin siampipa hong pai-in a vel a
Leviticus14:49 Tua inn siangthosak nadingin amah in vasa neu nih
Leviticus14:50 beel sunga kikoih tui luang tungah a vasa khat go ding a
Leviticus14:51 taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khau pen a vasa hing tawh la khawmin
Leviticus14:52 Tua bangin amah in vasa si tawh
Leviticus14:53 vasa hing pen khuapi pualam gamlakah khahkhia ding hi. Tua bangin amah in tua inn a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a
Leviticus14:54 Hih pen phaknatna khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi: Cithak tawh kisai
Leviticus14:55 puan tung hitaleh innsung hitaleh ah a om phaknatna tawh kisai
Leviticus14:56 a bawk hitaleh meima hitaleh a tuampian’ khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in
Leviticus14:57 bang hunin nin a
Leviticus15:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah
Leviticus15:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Pasal khatpeuh
Leviticus15:3 Amah a ninsak a natui paikhia tawh kisai-in ngeina hih bang ahi hi: A natui a paipai a
Leviticus15:4 A natui a paikhia mipa’ lupna le a tutna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:5 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a
Leviticus15:6 A natui a paikhia mipa’ tutnasa na khat peuhpeuh tungah a tu mi peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a
Leviticus15:7 A natui a paikhia mipa’ pumpi a lawng mi peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a
Leviticus15:8 A natui a paikhia mipa in a siang mipa’ tungah cil a siat leh
Leviticus15:9 A natui a paikhia mipa a tutna tutphah khat peuhpeuh zong a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:10 Ama nuai-ah a om na khat peuhpeuh a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang na a pua mipa in a puante sawp ding a
Leviticus15:11 A natui a paikhia mipa in tui sungah a khut sil lopi-in a lawn’ mi peuhmah in ama puante sawp ding a
Leviticus15:12 A natui a paikhia mipa in a lawn’ lei tawh kibawl umlebeelte kisukham ding a
Leviticus15:13 “A natui a paikhia mipa a natui a kan ciangin a kisiansak nadingin amah in ni sagih sung ngak ding a
Leviticus15:14 A ni giat ni-in amah in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhuno nih la-in
Leviticus15:15 Siampipa in tuate
Leviticus15:16 “Mi khat in a natui a teh leh
Leviticus15:17 A tungah a natui a tukna puan le savun peuhmah tui tawh kisawp ding a
Leviticus15:18 Pasal le numei a lupkhawm khit ciangin
Leviticus15:19 “Numei khat in nin a neih ciangin
Leviticus15:20 Amah a nit hun sungin a lupna le a tutna peuhpeuh a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:21 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puan sawp ding a
Leviticus15:22 Ama tutna a lawng peuhmah in ama puante sawp ding a
Leviticus15:23 Ama tutna ahi lupna hitaleh na khat peuhpeuh hitaleh
Leviticus15:24 Pasal khat peuhmah tua nu tawh lumin
Leviticus15:25 “Numei khat in ama nit hun hi lo napi-in ni tampi sung a si a suak ahi a
Leviticus15:26 Ama ninneih hun sungtengin a tutna khempeuh zong a nit sungin ama lupna tawh kibang ding a
Leviticus15:27 Hih nate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding a
Leviticus15:28 Ahih hangin tua nu a nin a bei zawh ni sagih khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:29 A ni giat ni-in tua nu in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhuno nih la-in
Leviticus15:30 Siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nadingin khat pia-in
Leviticus15:31 “Amau’ laizang a om ka biakbuk ninsakkha le-uh amaute in sihlawh ding uh ahih ciangin
Leviticus15:32 Hih pen a natui a paikhia mipa ahih kei leh a natui tehin
Leviticus15:33 nin a nei nu a’ ding zong ahi hi. Hihte pen pasal a natui a paikhia mi
Leviticus16:1 Aaron’ tapa nihte in ngeina lopi-in Topa’ mai-ah mei tawh va pai-in a sihlawh khit uh ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah thu a gen hi.
Leviticus16:2 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus16:3 Ahih hangin siangtho munah Aaron hong pai ding zia in: Khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawngtalno khat le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat hong paipih ding hi.
Leviticus16:4 “Amah in a siangtho saihadial puantungsilh silhin
Leviticus16:5 “Amah in Israel mihonte tung panin khialhna hanga biak nadingin keeltal nih le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat la ding hi.
Leviticus16:6 Aaron in amahmah a dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in
Leviticus16:7 Tua ciangin amah in keeltal nih la-in
Leviticus16:8 Aaron in tua keel nihte tungah ai saanin
Leviticus16:9 Aaron in Topa a’ ding ai a pha keel paipihin
Leviticus16:10 Ahih hangin Azazel a dingin ai a pha keel pen gamlakah Azazel’ kiangah a kipuak theih nadingin kilemna bawl nadingin a hingin Topa’ mai-ah kipaipih ding hi.
Leviticus16:11 “Aaron in amahmah a dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in
Leviticus16:12 Amah in Topa’ biakna tau panin mei-am a dim paknamtui beel khat le a kisunen paknamtui khut nih dim la ding hi. Amah in dalna puan sungah paipihin
Leviticus16:13 thuciamna singkuang tungah a om hehpihna tokhom pen paknamtui khu in a tuam theih nadingin Topa’ mai-ah a om mei tungah a paknamtui koih ding hi. Tua hi kei leh amah si ding hi.
Leviticus16:14 Amah in bawngtal si tawmkhat la-in
Leviticus16:15 “Tua ciangin amah in mite a’ ding ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel go-in
Leviticus16:16 Amah in tua bangin Israel mite’ nitna hang
Leviticus16:17 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl dingin amah tumin ama a’ ding
Leviticus16:18 Tua ciangin Topa’ mai-ah a om biakna tau-ah amah va pai-in
Leviticus16:19 Amah in a khutme tawh a si tawmkhat biakna tau tungah sagihvei thehin
Leviticus16:20 “Amah in siangtho mun
Leviticus16:21 Aaron in keel hing lu tungah a khut tegel nga-in
Leviticus16:22 Keel in amau’ mawhnate khempeuh pua-in gam daihna-ah a pai dingin a keel khah ding hi.
Leviticus16:23 “Tua ciangin kikhopna bukah Aaron hong pai-in
Leviticus16:24 Amah in a siangtho mun khatah
Leviticus16:25 Amah in biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna sathau hal ding hi.
Leviticus16:26 Azazel’ kiangah keel a paisak pa in a puante sawpin
Leviticus16:27 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin hong kipaipih si a kilakna
Leviticus16:28 Tuate a hal pa in ama puante sawpin
Leviticus16:29 “Hih pen
Leviticus16:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni-in note siansak nadingin note-a’ ding kilemna kibawl ding a
Leviticus16:31 Tua pen note a dingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath hi a
Leviticus16:32 A pa’ tanga siampi dingin sathau a kinilh a ki-ap siampipa in kilemna bawlin
Leviticus16:33 Amah in biakbuk siansuahna bawlin
Leviticus16:34 Hih pen Israel mite a dingin amau’ khialhnate khempeuh hangin kum khatin khatvei kilemna a kibawlsak theih nadingin note a dingin a om tawntung ngeina kip khat hi ding hi
Leviticus17:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus17:2 “Aaron
Leviticus17:3 Israel mi khatpeuh in bawngtal ahi a
Leviticus17:4 Topa’ biakbuk mai
Leviticus17:5 Hih pen
Leviticus17:6 Siampipa in kikhopna buk kong-a Topa’ biakna tau tungah a si thehin
Leviticus17:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a biak uh keeldawite a dingin amau’ biakpiaknate go nawn lo ding uh hi. Hih pen amau’ khang tawntungin amaute’ tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi.
Leviticus17:8 “Nangmah in amaute tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: Israel mite sung pan hitaleh
Leviticus17:9 Topa’ tungah piak dingin kikhopna bukkongah a paipih kei leh
Leviticus17:10 “Israel mite sung pan hitaleh amau’ lakah a peem khualmite sung pan hitaleh mi khat in si khat peuhpeuh a nek leh
Leviticus17:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi nuntakna pen si sungah om hi. Note a’ ding kilemna bawl nadingin note a dingin biakna tau tungah tua si ka piazo hi. Si pen nuntakna ahih manin kilemna a piangsak na ahi hi.
Leviticus17:12 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khin hi: Note lakah kuamah in si ne lo ding a
Leviticus17:13 “Israel mite khatpeuh hitaleh
Leviticus17:14 Ganhing khempeuh’ nuntakna pen a si ahih manin Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khinzo hi: Ganhing khat peuhpeuh si na ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing khempeuh’ nuntakna pen a si ahi hi. Si a ne mi peuhmah a mipihte kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi.
Leviticus17:15 “A mawk sih hitaleh gamsate in a balgawp hitaleh a ne mi peuhmah
Leviticus17:16 Ahih hangin amah in tuate sawp loin ahi zongin
Leviticus18:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus18:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:3 Note na tenna uh Egypt gamah amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh a
Leviticus18:4 Note in keima biakna ngeina kipte semin ka thukhamte lenin tuate na zui ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:5 Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh hi. Tuate a zui mi peuhpeuh nungta ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:6 “Note kuamah in na kinaipih na behte uh mawhpih dingin na naih kei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:7 Na nu mawhpihna tawh na pa’ tungah maizumna na tun kei ding hi. Amah pen na nu ahih manin na mawhpih kei ding hi.
Leviticus18:8 Nangmah in na pa’ zi dangte zong na mawhpih kei ding hi. Tua pen na pa’ mindai nading ahi hi.
Leviticus18:9 Nangmah in na sanggamnu
Leviticus18:10 Nangmah in na tapa’ tanu ahih kei leh na tanu’ tanu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ mindaina pen nangma mindaina mah ahi hi.
Leviticus18:11 Na pa’ zi’ tanu
Leviticus18:12 Na ni na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu pen na pa’ sanggam numei ahi hi.
Leviticus18:13 Na nu’ sanggamnu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen na nu tawh a kinai beh numei ahi hi.
Leviticus18:14 Na pa’ sanggampa’ tungah mindaina na tun kei ding hi; tua pen ama zi na naih kei ding hi
Leviticus18:15 Na monu na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu pen na tapa’ zi ahi hi; amah na mawhpih kei ding hi.
Leviticus18:16 Na sanggampa’ zi na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua pen na sanggampa’ mindai nading ahi hi.
Leviticus18:17 Na luppih numei khat’ tanu na mawhpih kei ding a
Leviticus18:18 Nangmah in a sanggamnu a hingsuan dingin numei khat zi-in na la kei ding a
Leviticus18:19 “Nangmah in numei khat nin a neih laitak
Leviticus18:20 Na vengpa’ zi tawh na lumkhawm kei ding a
Leviticus18:21 Nangmah in Molek tungah meihal biakna-a piak dingin na tate khat peuhpeuh na pia kei ding a
Leviticus18:22 Numei khat tawh lupkhop bangin pasal khat tawh na lumkhawm kei ding hi; tua pen a kihhuai ahi hi.
Leviticus18:23 Ganhing khatpeuh tawh mawhin tua tawh na kininsak kei ding a
Leviticus18:24 “Hih nate khatpeuh tawh note kininsak kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh note’ mai-a ka paihkhiat minamte in hihte khempeuh tawh amaute kininsak uh hi.
Leviticus18:25 Leitung a nin suak ahih manin keimah in a leitang gimna pia-in
Leviticus18:26 Ahih hangin
Leviticus18:27 (bang hang hiam cih leh note’ ma-a a om gam mite in hih a kihhuaite khempeuh gamta uh ahih manin leitang a nin a suak hi;)
Leviticus18:28 tua bang hikeileh leitang in note’ ma-a a om minamte a luakkhiat bangin note in amah na nitsak uh ciangin amah in note hong luakhia ding hi.
Leviticus18:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih a kihhuaite khatpeuh a hihte peuhmah
Leviticus18:30 “Tua ahih ciangin note’ ma-a a kizang hih a kihhuai ngeinate khat peuhpeuh na gamtat ngei loh nading uh le tuate tawh nomau na kinitsak loh nadingun kong thuhilhte zui un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Leviticus19:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus19:2 “Israel mihonte khempeuh kiangah hih bangin gen in: Note na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa note’ Pasian keimah ka siangtho hi.
Leviticus19:3 Note a kuamah peuh in na nu le na pa uh zahtakin
Leviticus19:4 “Milimte lamah kihei kei unla
Leviticus19:5 “Note in Topa’ tungah thunuama biakpiakna na piak uh ciangin
Leviticus19:6 Tua pen na piak ni mah uh ahih kei leh a zing ciangin kine ding a
Leviticus19:7 A ni thum ni-in a kinek peuhmah leh
Leviticus19:8 Tua a ne mi peuhmah in ama mawhna pua ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa’ na a siangtho ninsak ahih manin ama mite sung panin kihawlkhia ding hi.
Leviticus19:9 “Na leitang tung panun an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus19:10 Note in na leenggui lo uh hawkmai loin
Leviticus19:11 “Note na guta kei ding uh hi. A man loin na gamta kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:12 Note in a man lopi-in keima min tawh na kiciam kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:13 “Note in na vengte uh na nengniam kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:14 Note in bilngongte phuisam loin
Leviticus19:15 “Note in thukhenna-ah thu a tang loin na khen kei ding uh hi. Mizawngte langgen loin
Leviticus19:16 Note in na mipihte lak uhah mi gensia-in vaksuk vakto loin
Leviticus19:17 “Note in na lungsim sung uhah na sanggampa uh na mudah kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:18 Note in nomau’ mipihte tungah phu la loin
Leviticus19:19 “Note in ka thukhamte na zui ding uh hi. Note in na ganhingte uh a namdang tawh ta na neisak kei ding uh hi. Note in na lo uhah khaici nam nih na pawikhawm kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:20 “Sila ahi numei
Leviticus19:21 Ahih hangin tua pa in amahmah a dingin mawhna hanga biak nadingin tuutal khat
Leviticus19:22 Siampipa in
Leviticus19:23 “Note
Leviticus19:24 A kum lina ciangin amau’ gah khempeuh siangtho-in
Leviticus19:25 Ahih hangin a kum ngana ciangin tuate pen note a dingin hong gah semsem nadingin tuate’ gah na ne thei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:26 “Note in sa khat peuhpeuh a sunga si tawh na nekhawm kei ding uh hi. Mailam thugen kholhna
Leviticus19:27 Note in na baa samte uh met loin na khamul mongte uh zong na tan kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus19:28 Note in mi site’ hangin dahna limin na ci tung uh liamsak loin note’ tungah ciaptehna khat peuhpeuh zong na sun kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:29 “Na tanu uh biakinn sungah paktat dinga piakna tawh siasak kei un. Tua bang hileh pasian dangte biakna sungah na tung ding uh a
Leviticus19:30 Note in ka Sabbath ni tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:31 “Vankahte le aisanna lamah kihei kei un. Amaute tawh a kininsak dingin amaute zong kei un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:32 “Note
Leviticus19:33 “Na gam sung uhah note lakah khualmi khat hong peem leh
Leviticus19:34 Note lakah a hong peem khualmite tualsung mi mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a
Leviticus19:35 “Note in thukhenna
Leviticus19:36 Note in tawi khaina man
Leviticus19:37 Note in ka thukhamte khempeuh le ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus20:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus20:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite khat peuhpeuh hitaleh Israel sunga a peem khualmite hitaleh
Leviticus20:3 Kei mahmah in tua mipa ka maisiat ding a
Leviticus20:4 Amah in Molek tungah a tate khat a piak ciangin mihonte in tua pa kimuhmawh bawlin amah a thah kei uhleh
Leviticus20:5 keimah in tua mipa le ama innkuanpihte maisiatin
Leviticus20:6 “Mi khat vankahna le aisan lamah kihei-in tuate thu a dot leh
Leviticus20:7 Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap unla siangtho un; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus20:8 Ka thukhamte zui unla
Leviticus20:9 “Bang hang hiam cih leh a nu ahih kei leh a pa a samsia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi. Amah in a nu ahih kei leh a pa samsia khin a
Leviticus20:10 “Pasal khatpeuh a vengpa’ zi tawh a mawh leh
Leviticus20:11 A pa’ zi tawh a lumkhawm mipa in a pa a mindaisak a suak hi. Amau tegel kithat ding hi. Amau’ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi.
Leviticus20:12 Pasal khat a monu tawh a lupkhop leh
Leviticus20:13 Pasal khat in numei khat tawh lupkhop bangin pasal dang khat tawh a lupkhop leh
Leviticus20:14 Pasal khat in zi nei-in
Leviticus20:15 Pasal khatpeuh ganhing khat tawh a mawh leh amah le a ganhing kithat ding hi.
Leviticus20:16 Numei khat in ganhing khat naihin tua tawh a mawh leh
Leviticus20:17 “Pasal khat in ama sanggamnu
Leviticus20:18 Pasal khat
Leviticus20:19 “Note pen na nu’ sanggamnu ahih kei leh na pa’ sanggamnu tawh na mawh kei ding uh hi. Tua pen a nai behte tawh mawhna ahih manin amaute in amau’ mawhna pua ding uh hi.
Leviticus20:20 Pasal khat
Leviticus20:21 Pasal khat in a sanggampa’ zi a lak leh
Leviticus20:22 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukham khempeuh le ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in
Leviticus20:23 Note’ mai-ah keimah in ka paihkhiat minamte’ ngeinate na zui kei ding uh hi. Amaute in hih nate khempeuh hih uh ahih manin amaute ka kih hi.
Leviticus20:24 Ahih hangin keimah in note kiangah
Leviticus20:25 Tua ahih ciangin note in ganhing a siang leh a nin
Leviticus20:26 Note pen keima a dingin na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah ka siangtho a
Leviticus20:27 “Numei ahi a
Leviticus21:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus21:2 
Leviticus21:3 ahih kei leh nungak ahi a sanggamnu (tua nu in pasal nei nai lo ahih manin amah tawh a kinai ahi hi; tua nu hangin amah kininsak thei ding hi) longal ama mite lakah misite’ hangin kininsak lo ding hi.
Leviticus21:4 Amah in pasal neisa numei khatpeuh hangin ama mite lakah va kininsakin
Leviticus21:5 “Amaute in a lu uh mettol loin
Leviticus21:6 Amaute pen amau’ Pasian a dingin siangtho ding uh a
Leviticus21:7 Amaute in numei paktat ahih kei leh a kininsaksa numei tenpih lo ding uh a
Leviticus21:8 Amah in note’ Pasian’ anlum pia ahih manin note in amah na ap ding uh a
Leviticus21:9 Siampipa khat peuhpeuh’ tanu in paktatna tawh amah le amah a kidaisak leh
Leviticus21:10 “Ama sanggamte lakah siampi lianpen
Leviticus21:11 Amah in a nu le a pa nangawn ahi zongin misi khat peuhpeuh kiangah pai loin
Leviticus21:12 Biakbuk panin zong paikhia loin
Leviticus21:13 Amah in a zi dingin nungak la ding hi.
Leviticus21:14 Meigong numei
Leviticus21:15 Tua pen ama mite lakah a tate a daisak loh nading ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a siangthosakpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus21:16 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus21:17 “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: Na suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi in a khang khangin ama Pasian’ anlum pia dingin hong neh thei lo ding hi.
Leviticus21:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh poina a nei
Leviticus21:19 khut liam
Leviticus21:20 elkul leh mi cingtaak lo
Leviticus21:21 Siampi Aaron’ suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi khatpeuh in Topa a’ ding meihal biakna a pia dingin a nai-ah hong pai lo ding hi. Amah in poina nei ahih manin
Leviticus21:22 Amah in ama Pasian’ anlum
Leviticus21:23 Ahih hangin amah in poina nei ahih manin
Leviticus21:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen hi.
Leviticus22:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:2 “Aaron le a tapate in keima min siangtho a daisak loh nadingun amaute in keima tungah a hong ap uh ahi
Leviticus22:3 Amaute kiangah
Leviticus22:4 “‘Aaron’ gui sung panin meima nei leh a natui a paikhia mi peuhmah in amah a siangtho mateng a siangtho an ne thei lo ding hi. Misi lawnna hitaleh a natui a teh pa lawnna hitaleh a nin na khat peuhpeuh a lawng pa
Leviticus22:5 amah a nit theih nadingin a bokvak ganhing khat hitaleh nitna a ngah theih nading mi khat hitaleh a lawng pa
Leviticus22:6 tua bang na a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a
Leviticus22:7 Ni a tum ciangin amah siang ding a
Leviticus22:8 A mawk sihte hitaleh gamsate in a balgawpte hitaleh amah in tuate nekna tawh amah kininsak lo ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus22:9 “Tua ahih ciangin amaute in ka thuhilhna zui ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh amaute in tua thu a daisak uh ciangin khialhna thuakin sihpih ding uh hi. Amaute a siangthosakpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus22:10 “A pualam mi in a siangtho an ne lo ding hi. Siampipa’ inn-ah a om peemta ahi a
Leviticus22:11 Ahih hangin siampipa khat in ama a dingin sum tawh sila khat a lei leh
Leviticus22:12 Siampipa’ tanu khat a pualam mi khat tawh a kiten leh tua nu in a siangtho biakna an ne thei lo ding hi.
Leviticus22:13 Ahih hangin siampipa’ tanu pen meigong ahi a
Leviticus22:14 “Mi khat in theih lohna hangin a siangtho an khat peuhpeuh a nekkhak leh
Leviticus22:15 Amaute in Topa’ tungah a piak ahi
Leviticus22:16 tua bangin amau’ an a siangthote nekna tawh mawhna le khialhna amaute puasak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen amaute a siangthosak Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus22:17 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:18 “Aaron le a tapate le Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite sung panin ahi zongin Israel mite sungah a peem mite lak pan ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin
Leviticus22:19 hong kisan’ theih nadingin bawngtal hitaleh tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh
Leviticus22:20 Note in a sitbaang khat peuhpeuh na pia kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hong kisang zo lo ding hi.
Leviticus22:21 Mi khatpeuh in bawnghon panin ahi a
Leviticus22:22 Ganhing a mittaw
Leviticus22:23 Bawngtal hitaleh tuuno hitaleh a na khat peuhpeuh a saulua ahih kei leh a tomluate pen note in utthu-a biakna-in na pia thei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin thuciamna tunsakna a piak dingin tua bangte kisang zo lo hi.
Leviticus22:24 A ciltangte a sanim
Leviticus22:25 “Gamdang mite khat peuhpeuh tung panin a kingah ganhingte zong na Pasian uh’ an dingin note in na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute sitbaang a
Leviticus22:26 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:27 “Bawng ahih kei leh tuu ahih kei leh keel khat a suah ciangin a pi tawh ni sagih sung omkhawm ding hi. A ni giat ni a kipanin tua ganno pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in kisang thei ding hi.
Leviticus22:28 A pi pen bawng hitaleh tuu hitaleh
Leviticus22:29 Note in Topa’ tungah lungdam koh biakna na piak uh ciangin
Leviticus22:30 A tua ni mahin kine ding a
Leviticus22:31 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiaknate zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus22:32 Note in keima min siangtho na daisak kei ding uh a
Leviticus22:33 note’ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih pa ka hi hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus23:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in a siangtho biak kikhopnate hi
Leviticus23:3 Ni guk sungin nasep kizo ding a
Leviticus23:4 “Hihte pen amaute a dingin a kiseh hunin note in na gen ding uh ahi Topa’ pawi a kisehte
Leviticus23:5 “A kha masa
Leviticus23:6 Tua kha mah
Leviticus23:7 A ni masa ni-in note in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a
Leviticus23:8 Ahih hangin note in Topa’ tungah meihal biakna ni sagih sung na pia ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi ding a
Leviticus23:9 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note tungah ka hong piak leitangah note tungin an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus23:11 Note hong kisan’ theih nadingin amah in Topa’ mai-ah anlom vei ding a
Leviticus23:12 Note in anlom na vei ni-un
Leviticus23:13 Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding an tawh biakna pen sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi ding a
Leviticus23:14 Note in na Pasian uh biakna na paipih ma
Leviticus23:15 “Note in Sabbath khit a zing ciang
Leviticus23:16 A Sabbath sagihna khit a zing ciang dong ni sawmnga dong na simto ding uh a
Leviticus23:17 Note in na tenna uh panin vei dingin an lawh nih a kibawl anlum nih nong paipih ding uh hi. Tuate pen annel a kibawl
Leviticus23:18 Note in anlum tawh
Leviticus23:19 Note in khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat le thunuama biakpiakna-in kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nih na pia ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:20 Siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah vei-a biakna-in anpal-anlum le tuuno nih tawh tuate vei ding a
Leviticus23:21 Note in tua ni mahin thu zaksakna na bawl ding uh a
Leviticus23:22 “Note in na leitang panun an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus23:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:24 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A kha sagihna
Leviticus23:25 Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Leviticus23:26 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:27 “Hih a kha sagihna ni sawm ni pen kilemna ni ahi hi. Tua pen note a dingin a siangtho kikhop hun hi ding a
Leviticus23:28 Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa note’ Pasian’ mai-ah note a dingin kilemna bawl nadingin kilemna bawl ni ahi hi.
Leviticus23:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in bang khat peuhpeuh a nekha mi peuhmah ama mite kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi.
Leviticus23:30 Tua ni-in na khat peuhpeuh a sem mi peuhmah keimah in ama mite lak panin ka that ding hi.
Leviticus23:31 Note in na na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen na khang tawntungun na tenna khempeuh uhah ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus23:32 Tua pen note a dingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath ni hi ding a
Leviticus23:33 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:34 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih kha sagihna a ni sawm le nga ni a kipan ni sagih sung pen Topa a’ ding buk pawi ahi hi.
Leviticus23:35 A ni masa ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi ding a
Leviticus23:36 Ni sagih sung note in Topa’ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh a
Leviticus23:37 “Hihte pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna
Leviticus23:38 Note in Topa’ tungah na piak uh Topa’ Sabbath-te
Leviticus23:39 “Note in leitang a piangte na kaihkhop khit uh
Leviticus23:40 Note in a ni masa ni-in singkung hoih gahte
Leviticus23:41 Note in tua pen kum simin ni sagih sung pawi-in na nei ding uh a
Leviticus23:42 No Israel mi khempeuh ni sagih sung buk sungah na teng ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:43 Tua pen keimah in Egypt gam panin amaute ka paikhiatpih lai-in Israel mite
Leviticus23:44 Tu-a bangin Moses in Israel mite tungah Topa’ pawi a kisehte a gen hi.
Leviticus24:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus24:2 “Meivak khat a tawntungin a kivaksuak theih nadingin meivak a dingin oliv gah a kisuzante panin sathau siangtho nang kiangah hong paipih nading uh Israel mite thu pia in.
Leviticus24:3 Kikhopna buk sung
Leviticus24:4 Amah in kham citak meivakkhuam tungah meivakte a ngeina bangin Topa’ mai-ah omsak tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus24:5 “Nangmah in annel la inla
Leviticus24:6 Nangmah in kham citak sabuai tungah tuate gual nihin na koih ding a
Leviticus24:7 Phawkna-in Topa’ tungah mei tawh biakna-in piak dingin anlum tawh a paikhawm theih nadingin nangmah in a gual nihte-ah paknamtui siangtho na koih ding hi.
Leviticus24:8 Sabbath ni simin Aaron in a tawntung thuciamna-in Israel mite tang dingin Topa’ mai-ah a ngeina bangin koih tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus24:9 Tua pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna sung panin amah in a tawntung a a ngah ding
Leviticus24:10 Tu-in Israel numei khat’ tapa
Leviticus24:11 Israel numei’ tapa in Min Siangtho gensia-in samsia hi. Amaute in Moses kiangah amah paipih uh hi. Ama nu’ min pen Shelomith hi a
Leviticus24:12 Topa’ deihna amaute tungah a kigen mateng amaute in tua mipa khumcip uh hi.
Leviticus24:13 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus24:14 “A samsia mipa pen giahphual pualamah paipih in. Ama samsiat a za mi khempeuh ama lu tungah amau’ khut ngasak inla
Leviticus24:15 Tua ciangin Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Ama Pasian a samsia mi peuhmah in ama khialhna thuak ding hi.
Leviticus24:16 Topa’ min a gensia mipa kithat ding hi. Mihonte khempeuh in amah denglum ding uh hi. Peemta hitaleh tualsung mi hitaleh
Leviticus24:17 “Mi a that pa kithat ding hi.
Leviticus24:18 Ganhing a that pa in a ganhing mahin loh ding hi. A thu-in ci lehang nuntakna le nuntakna a kithuk ding ahi hi.
Leviticus24:19 “Mi khat in a vengte khat a poisak leh
Leviticus24:20 guh kitan tang ding guh kitan
Leviticus24:21 Ganhing a that pa in loh ding a
Leviticus24:22 Note in peemta le tualsung mi a dingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Leviticus24:23 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Israel mite tungah hih thu a gen hi. Amaute in a samsia mipa giahphual pualamah paipih uh a
Leviticus25:1 Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses kiangah
Leviticus25:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitangah na tun uh ciangin
Leviticus25:3 Kum guk sung note in na lo uh na pawi ding uh a
Leviticus25:4 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna-ah leitang ading a thupi tawlngakna sabbath
Leviticus25:5 A li pote note in na kaikhawm kei ding uh a
Leviticus25:6 Lo na khawh loh uh hangin leitang tawlngak kumin a piang tawmte in note a’ ding
Leviticus25:7 A piang khempeuhte pen na bawngte uh le na leitang uhah a om ganhingte’ an ding ahi hi.
Leviticus25:8 “Kum nipi sagih hun pen note a dingin kum sawmli le kua ahih theih nadingin note in kum nipi sagih
Leviticus25:9 Tua ciangin note in kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in nakpi-in peengkul na tum ding uh a
Leviticus25:10 Note in a kum sawmngana siangthosakin
Leviticus25:11 Tua a kum sawmngana pen note a dingin jubilee hi ding hi. Tua kum sungin note in lo pawi loin
Leviticus25:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen jubilee ahi hi. Tua pen note-a’ dingin siangtho ding a
Leviticus25:13 “Hih jubilee kum sungin note khempeuh in nomau’ neihsa ciat na ngahkik ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:14 Note in na vengte’ tungah na zuak uh ahi zongin na vengte’ kiang panin na lei uh ahi zongin note khatlekhat na kikhem kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:15 Jubilee khit ciangin a jubilee kik dong a kum phazah tawh kituakin note in na vengte uh kiang panin lei-in
Leviticus25:16 A kum a tam lai leh a man na tamsak ding uh a
Leviticus25:17 Note khatlekhat kikhem loin na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus25:18 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi. Tua hileh note lungmuang takin gam sungah na teng ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:19 Leitang in an hong piangsak ding a
Leviticus25:20 “Note in
Leviticus25:21 keimah in a kum gukna-ah note tungah thupha kong pia ding a
Leviticus25:22 A kum giatna-ah lo na pawi ding uh ciangin
Leviticus25:23 “Leitang pen keima-a’ ahih manin neihsuak dingin leitang kizuak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note pen kei tawh a omkhawm khualmi leh peemtate na hi uh hi.
Leviticus25:24 “Note in na neih uh leitang khempeuh na kitanhkiksak thei ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:25 Na sanggampa zawngin a neihsa leitang khenkhat a zuak leh
Leviticus25:26 Mi khat in tua na a tatsak ding mi a neih kei a
Leviticus25:27 amah in tua na a zuak zawh a kumte sim ding a
Leviticus25:28 Ahih hangin amah in ama a dingin ngahkik zawh nading lampi a neih kei leh
Leviticus25:29 “Mi khat in khuapikulh sungah tenna inn khat a zuak leh
Leviticus25:30 Tua pen kum khat bit sungin a kitatkik kei leh
Leviticus25:31 Ahih hangin a kimkotah kulh a nei lo khua neu-a innte pen gam sung lote tawh a kibangin kingaihsun ding hi. Tuate kitanhkik thei ding a
Leviticus25:32 Ahi zongin Levi mite’ khuapite
Leviticus25:33 Levi mi khatpeuh in ama tatkik theih ding hinapi a tatkikzawh kei leh
Leviticus25:34 Ahih hangin amau’ khuapi taang gamte kizuak thei lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amau’ neih tawntung na ahi hi.
Leviticus25:35 “Na sanggampa uh zawngin
Leviticus25:36 Na sanggampa uh no kiangah hong ten theih nadingin ama tung panin a meet a khang la kei unla
Leviticus25:37 Note in ama tungah a meetin sum leitawi pia loin
Leviticus25:38 Kei pen note’ Pasian ahi ding le
Leviticus25:39 “Na gei-a om na sanggampa zawngin
Leviticus25:40 Amah pen a kicial nasem le peemta bangin nang kiangah om ding hi. Amah in jubilee kum mateng nangma na hong sem ding a
Leviticus25:41 tua ciangin nang kiang panin amah le ama kiangah a om a tate paikhia ding a
Leviticus25:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt gam panin ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte hi a
Leviticus25:43 Note in hih gawpgawpna tawh amah na uk kei ding uh a
Leviticus25:44 Note in na neih theih ding uh sila numei le sila pasalte hih bang ahi hi: Na kimkot uha om minam dangte lak panin sila numei le sila pasal na lei thei ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:45 Note in na gam sung uhah a suak
Leviticus25:46 Note in amaute pen note’ khit ciangin na tapate uh tungah amau’ neih tawntung dingin a luah dingin na pia thei ding uh hi. Note in sila-in amaute na nei thei ding uh a
Leviticus25:47 “Note lakah a teng khualmi ahih kei leh peemta khat hong hau a
Leviticus25:48 amah a kizuak khit ciangin amah kitanhkik thei ding a
Leviticus25:49 Ama innlak pa ahih kei leh a innlak sanggampa in tanh thei ding hi. Ama innkuan sunga a kinaipih a beh khatpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong amah a hauh leh amahmah kitanhkik thei ding hi.
Leviticus25:50 Midang tungah amahmah a kizuak a kipan jubilee kum dong amah a leipa tawh tuat ding a
Leviticus25:51 Kum tampi in a sap lai leh
Leviticus25:52 Ahih hangin jubilee kum ding kum tawmkhat bek in a sap leh amah in a topa tawh tuatna khat nei ding hi. Ama sepsak ding kum a omlai tawh kituakin ama kitatkhiat nadingin sum piakik ding hi.
Leviticus25:53 Amah pen a topa tungah a kum kumin a kicial nasempa tawh kibang ding hi. A topa in note’ muhna-ah hih gawpgawpna tawh amah uk lo ding hi.
Leviticus25:54 Hih bang danin amah a kitatkhiat kei leh
Leviticus25:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite pen kei a dingin nasemte ahi uh hi. Amaute pen Egypt gam panin keimah in ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte ahi uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus26:1 “Note in nomau a dingin a mai-ah na kun dingun milim bawl loin
Leviticus26:2 Note in ka sabbath-te tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus26:3 “Note in ka thukham zui-in
Leviticus26:4 keimah in note tungah guahtui a hunin kong pia ding a
Leviticus26:5 Na cil uh ante leenggah lawh hun dong kimang ding a
Leviticus26:6 “Keimah in gam sungah nopsakna hong pia-in
Leviticus26:7 Note in na galte uh na delh ding uh a
Leviticus26:8 Note nga in zakhat zo-in
Leviticus26:9 Keimah in note ka hong pi ngaihsut ding a
Leviticus26:10 Note in sauveipi a kikhol anluite ne-in
Leviticus26:11 Keimah in note lakah omna ka bawl ding a
Leviticus26:12 Keimah
Leviticus26:13 Note pen amau’ sila na hihloh nadingun Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Keimah in note’ gimna hakkolte kuaitanin note a dingtangin kong paisak hi.
Leviticus26:14 “Ahih hangin note in ka thu ngai loin
Leviticus26:15 ka thukhamte nialin
Leviticus26:16 keimah in note tungah hih bangin kong hih ding hi: Note’ tungah hong tung dingin keimah in thakhatthu a dipkuatna
Leviticus26:17 Keimah in note kong maisiat ding a
Leviticus26:18 “Tua bang hinapi-in note in ka thu nong ngaih kei veve uhleh
Leviticus26:19 keimah in na kiphatsakpih uh note’ vangliatna susia-in
Leviticus26:20 Na leitang un an piangsak loin
Leviticus26:21 “Tua ciangin kei hong demin
Leviticus26:22 Keimah in note’ lakah gamsate hong khahin
Leviticus26:23 “Hih banga hihna tawh note hong kihei tuan loin
Leviticus26:24 kei zong note hong gawtin
Leviticus26:25 Keimah in
Leviticus26:26 Keimah in note’ nuntakna an ka suksiat ciangin
Leviticus26:27 “Tua bang hinapi-in note in keima thu ngai loin
Leviticus26:28 note ka hong heh ngawh bawl ding a
Leviticus26:29 Note na gil uh kial lua ding ahih manin na tapate uh le na tanute uh’ sa na ne ding uh hi.
Leviticus26:30 Keimah in mual dawna na biaknate uh susia-in
Leviticus26:31 Keimah in na khuapite uh siasakin
Leviticus26:32 Keimah in leitang ka siasak ding a
Leviticus26:33 Keimah in minam dangte lakah note kong thehthang ding a
Leviticus26:34 Tua ciangin na galte uh leitangah na om tanvei uh
Leviticus26:35 Ama tungah na ten laitakun na ngahsak loh uh tawlngakna ahi a sabbath-te
Leviticus26:36 “Note’ sung panin galte’ leitangah a omlai mite tungah lungsim gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Nahthel ging in amaute taisak ding a
Leviticus26:37 Kuamah in delh lo napi-in namsau mai pan a taikhia bangin khatlekhat na kiphupai ding uh a
Leviticus26:38 Minam dangte lakah note na sia ding uh a
Leviticus26:39 Note’ sung panin galte’ leitangah a omlaite amau’ mawhna hangin kiam ding uh a
Leviticus26:40 “Ahih hangin kei tungah khemna tawh hong gamtatnasa uh le kei hong demna uh hangin amaute gawt bawlin
Leviticus26:41 
Leviticus26:42 keimah in Jakob tawh ka thuciamna
Leviticus26:43 Ahih hangin amaute in leitang nusia-in
Leviticus26:44 Bangbang ahi zongin
Leviticus26:45 Ahih hangin keimah in amaute ka ngaihsutna-in amau’ Pasian ka hih theih nadingin
Leviticus26:46 Hihte pen Moses tungtawnin Sinai Mual tungah Topa in amah le Israel mite kikalah a bawl thukhamte le biakna ngeina kipte le thute ahi hi.
Leviticus27:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus27:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mi khat in a tuam vilvelin kiciamna a bawl ciangin
Leviticus27:3 Pasal kum sawmnih panin kum sawmguk a phate a man na sehna pen
Leviticus27:4 Numei ahihleh shekel sawmthum hi ding hi.
Leviticus27:5 Kum nga pan kum sawmnih ciang a phate
Leviticus27:6 Kha khat pan kum nga ciang a phate pen pasal ahihleh ngun shekel nga hi ding a
Leviticus27:7 Kum sawmguk pan a tungsiahte pen pasal ahihleh shekel sawm le nga hi ding a
Leviticus27:8 “Mi khatpeuh zawnglua-in nangma sehzah a piakzawh kei leh
Leviticus27:9 “Mite in Topa’ tungah biakna-in a piakte pen ganhing ahihleh
Leviticus27:10 Amah in na khat peuhpeuh
Leviticus27:11 Tua pen Topa’ tungah a kipia thei lo ganhing nin khat ahihleh
Leviticus27:12 siampipa in hoih hi
Leviticus27:13 Ahih hangin amah in tua ganhing a tatkik nop leh
Leviticus27:14 “Mi khatpeuh in a siangtho dingin Topa’ tungah a inn a ap ciangin
Leviticus27:15 A ap pa in ama inn a tatkik nop leh
Leviticus27:16 “Mi khat in a luah ama leitang phelkhat Topa’ tungah a ap leh
Leviticus27:17 Amah in jubilee kum a kipanin a lo a ap leh
Leviticus27:18 Ahih hangin jubilee kum khit ciangin amah in a lo a ap leh
Leviticus27:19 Lo a ap pa in a tatkik nop leh
Leviticus27:20 Ahih hangin amah in a lo a tanh nuam lo ahi a
Leviticus27:21 A lo pen
Leviticus27:22 “Amah in luahna tawh a neih ahi lo
Leviticus27:23 siampipa in jubilee kum ciang dong ding tua man seh ding a
Leviticus27:24 Jubilee kum ciangin a lo pen a kileinapa
Leviticus27:25 “A kisehna peuhmah biakinn shekel kizang ding hi; gerah sawmnih ciangin shekel khat hi ding hi.
Leviticus27:26 “Ahih hangin tacil pen Topa a’ hi khinzo ahih mah bangin
Leviticus27:27 Ganhing nin ahihleh
Leviticus27:28 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a neih
Leviticus27:29 Mite lak nangawn panin a kisusiamang dingin a ki-apsa mi peuhmah
Leviticus27:30 “Leitang panin a piang khempeuh khaici hitaleh singgah hitaleh sawm-ah-khat Topa a’ hi a
Leviticus27:31 Mi khatpeuh in sawm-ah-khat a piak na khat peuhpeuh a tat nop leh
Leviticus27:32 Bawnghon leh tuulekeel hon sawm-ah-khat khempeuh le a cing pa’ ciangkhut nuai-a a pai ganhing khempeuh sawm-ah-khat peuhmah Topa a dingin a siangtho hi ding hi.
Leviticus27:33 Mi khat in pha hiam sia hiam ci-in kantel lo ding a
Leviticus27:34 Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Israel mite a dingin Moses tungah a piak thute ahi hi.

Numbers3:1 Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Moses tawh a thugen hun lai-a Aaron le Moses’ huna mite ahi hi.
Numbers3:2 Aaron’ tapate’ minte in: A ta upa Nadab
Numbers3:3 sathau a kinilh siampi
Numbers3:4 Ahih hangin Sinai sehnel gam Topa’ mai-ah mei siangtho lo a zat uh ciangin Topa’ mai-ah Nadab le Abihu si hi. Amaute in ta nei lo uh ahih ciangin Eleazar le Ithamar in a pa uh Aaron’ nuntak sungteng bek siampi na a sem uh ahi hi.
Numbers3:5 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:6 “Levi minamte va paipih inla
Numbers3:7 Amaute in biakbuk-ah a sep uh ciangin amah le mihonpi a dingin kikhopna buk mai-ah na sem ding uh hi.
Numbers3:8 Amaute in kikhopna buk sung nazat khempeuh vaan ding uh a
Numbers3:9 Nangmah in Aaron le a tapate’ tungah Levi mite na pia ding a
Numbers3:10 Nangmah in Aaron le a tapate na seh ding a
Numbers3:11 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:12 “En in
Numbers3:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh tacil khempeuh keima-a’ ahi hi. Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in
Numbers3:14 Topa in Sinai sehnel gam Moses kiangah
Numbers3:15 “Levi mite
Numbers3:16 Tua ahih ciangin Moses thu a kipiak bangin amah in Topa’ thupiakna tawh kizui-in amaute a sim hi.
Numbers3:17 Levi’ tapate’ min in: Gershon
Numbers3:18 Gershon’ tapate’ min in: Libni le Shimei ahi hi.
Numbers3:19 Kohath’ tapate’ min in: Amram
Numbers3:20 Merari’ tapate’ min in: Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Hih mite pen Levi mite beh lutangte ahi uh hi.
Numbers3:21 Gershon-te beh pen Libni mite le Shimei mite hi a
Numbers3:22 Amaute
Numbers3:23 Gershon-te beh in nitumna lam biakbuk nungah giahphual sat ding uh a
Numbers3:24 tua Gershon mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Lael’ tapa Eliasaf hi ding hi.
Numbers3:25 Gershon-te beh in kikhopna buk sungah a et dingte pen a biakbuk
Numbers3:26 buktual a puan kikhaite
Numbers3:27 Kohath-te beh pen Amram mite
Numbers3:28 Pasal khempeuh kha khat pan a tungsiah
Numbers3:29 Kohath-te beh in biakbuk leitaw lampangah giahphual sat ding uh a
Numbers3:30 Kohath mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Uzziel’ tapa Elizafan hi ding hi.
Numbers3:31 Amau’ et dingte pen thuciamna singkuang
Numbers3:32 Siampi Aaron’ tapa Eleazar pen Levi mi makaite tungah a ukpi hi ding a
Numbers3:33 Merari-te beh pen Mahli mite le Mushi mite hi a
Numbers3:34 Amaute kha khat panin a tungsiah pasal peuhmah tulguk le zanih ahi hi.
Numbers3:35 Merari-te beh sung pan a beh ukpi pen Abihail’ tapa Zuriel hi ding a
Numbers3:36 Merari-te beh’ et dinga a kisehte pen biakbuk khuampeekte
Numbers3:37 Buktual kimkota khuampite le a bullente tawh
Numbers3:38 Nisuahna lampang biakbuk mai
Numbers3:39 Moses le Aaron in Topa’ thupiakna tawh a innkuankuanun a sim Levi mi pasal kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah tul sawmnih le tulnih a pha hi.
Numbers3:40 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:41 Israel mite lak panin tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite nong laksak ding a
Numbers3:42 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topa’ thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh a sim hi.
Numbers3:43 Kha khat panin a tungsiah tacil pasal a kisim peuhmah tul sawmnih leh tulnih le zanih le sawmsagih le thum ahi hi.
Numbers3:44 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:45 “Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh le a ganhingte uh tang dingin Levi mite le a ganhingte uh la in. Levi mite keima a’ hi ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Numbers3:46 Levi mi pasal khempeuh sangin Israel mi tacil khempeuh zanih le sawmsagih le thumin tamzaw ahih manin
Numbers3:47 tuate tat nadingin shekel khatah gerah sawmnih a pha
Numbers3:48 tua a tamzaw teng a kitatna uh sumte Aaron le a tapate tungah pia in
Numbers3:49 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Levi mite banah a vallai mite tung panin kitatkhiatna sum la a
Numbers3:50 biakinn shekel zangin Israel mi tacilte tung panin sum shekel tul khat le zathum le sawmguk le nga a la hi.
Numbers3:51 Tua ciangin
Numbers4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers4:2 “Levi mite lak panin Kohath mite amau’ innkuankuan le a behbehin

Numbers4:4 Kikhopna buk sungah Kohath mite in a siangthopen nate tawh kisai nasepte sem ding uh hi.
Numbers4:5 “Giahphual a kisuan ding ciangin Aaron le a tapate tumin kidalna puan lakhia ding uh a
Numbers4:6 Tua ciangin amaute in savun tawh tuam ding uh a
Numbers4:7 “Ompihna Anlum sabuai tungah amaute in puan a dum phah ding uh a
Numbers4:8 Tua ciangin amaute in a ausan puan tawh tuate khuh ding uh a
Numbers4:9 “Mei vakna meikhuam pen
Numbers4:10 Amaute in a nazat khempeuh savun-in tunin a puak nading tal tungah koih ding uh hi.
Numbers4:11 “Puan a dum khat tawh kham biakna tau khuh ding uh a
Numbers4:12 Amaute in biakbuk sungah a kizang nazat khempeuh la-in puan dum khat tawh tunin
Numbers4:13 Amaute in a biakna tau panin a vutte luakkhia ding uh a
Numbers4:14 Tua lai-ah nasep nadinga a kizang
Numbers4:15 Aaron le a tapate in biakbuk le biakbuk nazat khempeuh a tun khit uh giahphual a kisuan ciangin
Numbers4:16 “Siampi Aaron’ tapa Eleazar in meivak tui
Numbers4:17 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah
Numbers4:18 “Levi mite lakah Kohath minamte a sih loh nadingin hih un.
Numbers4:19 A siangthopen nate nai-ah amaute a pai ciangun si loin a hinna dingun hih un. Aaron le a tapate pai-in a nasep ding uh le a van puak ding ciat uhah amaute seh ding uh hi.
Numbers4:20 Ahih hangin a siangtho nate tomkhano sung bek nangawn a en dingin amaute tum lo ding uh hi; tum le-uh si ding uh hi

Numbers4:22 “Gershon mite zong
Numbers4:23 Kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha mi khempeuh na sim ding hi.
Numbers4:24 Nasep le van puak ciangin Gershon-te beh’ nasep dingte:
Numbers4:25 Biakbuk dalna puante
Numbers4:26 buktual a puan kikhaite
Numbers4:27 Gershon beh pasalte’ nasep ding
Numbers4:28 Hih pen kikhopna buk sungah Gershon beh pasalte’ nasep hi a
Numbers4:29 “Merari mite zong amau’ innkuankuan le a behbehin
Numbers4:30 kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha mi khempeuh na sim ding hi.
Numbers4:31 Kikhopna buk sungah amau’ sep dingte in: Biakbuk khuampeekte
Numbers4:32 a kimkota om buktual a khuampite a bullente tawh
Numbers4:33 Hih pen siampi Aaron’ tapa Ithamar’ khutnuai-ah Merari mite in kikhopna buk sungah a sep ding teng uh ahi hi
Numbers4:34 Topa’ thupiakna bangin Moses le Aaron le mihonte’ makaite in Levi mite sung panin beh thumte - Kohath-te beh

Numbers5:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers5:2 “Amaute in miphakte
Numbers5:3 A laizangah keima omna ahi amau’ giahphual a nitsak loh nadingun hih bangin a nin numei le pasal paikhiasakin
Numbers5:4 Tua mah bangin Israel mite in hih uh a
Numbers5:5 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers5:6 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa’ tungah mite a khialh theihna ahi khialhna khat peuhpeuh
Numbers5:7 a gamtatnasa a khialhna pulak ding hi. Amah in a tatkhialhna-ah a kicingin dinkik ding a
Numbers5:8 Ahih hangin a khialhna mi in tua khialhna hanga ditkikna a sang ding tanau a neih kei leh
Numbers5:9 Amaute in siampipa tungah a paipih uh biakna peuhmah
Numbers5:10 Mi khempeuh’ na a siangthote zong ama a’ hi ding a

Numbers5:12 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Mi khatpeuh’ zi vakvai-in a pasal a palhngulh a
Numbers5:13 pasal khat in tua nu luppihin
Numbers5:14 a pasal in upmawhna lungsim nei-in
Numbers5:15 tua pa in siampipa kiangah a zi paipihin
Numbers5:16 “Siampipa in tua nu va paipihin
Numbers5:17 Siampipa in lei beel khatin tui siangtho la ding a
Numbers5:18 Siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah tua numei koih ding a
Numbers5:19 Tua ciangin siampipa in amah kiciamsakin
Numbers5:20 Ahih hangin na pasal’ ukna nuai-ah om napi-in nangmah vakvai a
Numbers5:21 (siampipa in tua numei kiciamsak ding a
Numbers5:22 hih tuisia in na gil sung zui hen la
Numbers5:23 “Tua ciangin siampipa in laibu khat sungah hih hamsiate gelhin tuisia sungah silkhia ding hi.
Numbers5:24 Tua numei a nasak velval thei ding tuisia a dawnsak

Numbers6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers6:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Numei ahi a
Numbers6:3 leenggahzu le khamtheihzu ne lo ding hi. Leenggahzu le khamtheihzu pan a kibawl tuithuk dawn lo ding a
Numbers6:4 Amah a kituam koih hun sungteng leenggui panin a piang bangmah ne lo ding a
Numbers6:5 “Tuam om dingin a kiciam hun sungteng ama lu tungah mulkiatna kitah lo ding hi. Topa a dingin a tuam om hun a cin mateng amah a siangtho hi ding a
Numbers6:6 Topa a dingin a tuam om hun sungteng mi siluang kiangah pai lo ding hi.
Numbers6:7 A nu
Numbers6:8 A tuam om hun sungteng Topa a dingin a siangtho ahi hi.

Numbers6:13 “A tuam om hun a cin ciangin zuih ding Nazir ngeinate: Kikhopna buk kongah amah kipaipih ding a
Numbers6:14 amah in Topa’ tungah letsong ahi meihal biak nadingin kum khat a pha a sitbaang lo tuuno a pa khat
Numbers6:15 le silngo sawh loh anlum lawh khat
Numbers6:16 “Siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah tuate paipihin a khialhna hanga biakna le a meihal biakna pia ding a
Numbers6:17 a tuutal pen Topa’ tungah thunuama biakna-in silngo sawh loh anlum lawh tawh piakhawm ding a
Numbers6:18 Tua Nazir mipa in a ki-ap a sam
Numbers6:19 “Siampipa in a kihuansa tuutal liang

Numbers8:1 Tu-in Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:2 “Aaron tungah hih bangin gen in. Meivakte na koih ciangin
Numbers8:3 Aaron in tua bangmahin hih a
Numbers8:4 Meivakkhuam a kibawlna zia in: Kham a kiseek hi a
Numbers8:5 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:6 “Israel mite lak panin Levi mi teng lakhia inla
Numbers8:7 Amaute siansak nadingin hih bangin na hih ding hi: Siansuahna tui amaute tungah theh inla
Numbers8:8 Tua ciangin bawngtalno khat le sathau le annel a kibawl an tawh biakna amaute na lasak ding a
Numbers8:9 Kikhopna buk mai-ah Levi mite paipihin
Numbers8:10 Topa’ mai-ah Levi mite na paipih ciangin
Numbers8:11 amaute in Topa’ na a sep theih nadingun Aaron in Israel mite sung panin Levi mite Topa’ mai-ah vei-a biakna-in a pia ding hi.
Numbers8:12 Tua ciangin Levi mite in bawngtalte’ lu tungah a khut uh nga ding uh hi. Levi mite a’ ding kilemna bawlsak nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in khat
Numbers8:13 “Aaron le a tapate’ mai-ah Levi mite na koih ding a
Numbers8:14 Tua bangin Israel mite lak panin Levi mite na khenkhia ding a
Numbers8:15 Amaute siangthosakin vei-a biakna-in na piak khit ciangin kikhopna bukah na a sem dingin Levi mite pai ding uh hi.
Numbers8:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite’ lak panin kei’ tungah amaute hong kipia khin hi. Israel mite’ tacil khempeuh tang dingin keima a dingin amaute ka la khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite’ lakah tacil khempeuh mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh keima-a’ ahi hi.
Numbers8:17 Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in keima a dingin amaute ka tuam koih a
Numbers8:18 Israel mite’ lak panin tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite ka la khin hi.
Numbers8:19 Kikhopna bukah Israel mite a dingin na a sem ding le
Numbers8:20 Tua bangin Moses le Aaron le Israel mihonpite khempeuh in Levi mite’ tungah a hih uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses’ tungah a thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in Israel mite in amaute tungah a hih uh hi.
Numbers8:21 Israel mite
Numbers8:22 Tua khit ciangin Aaron le a tapate’ omna kikhopna buk sungah na a sem dingin Levi mite a pai uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Levi mite’ tungah a hih uh hi.
Numbers8:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:24 “Hih pen Levi mite tawh a kisai thu ahi hi. Kum sawmnih le kum nga pan a tungsiah a phate
Numbers8:25 Kum sawmnga a phak uh a kipan nasepna panin amau kihemkhia-in na sem nawn lo ding uh hi.
Numbers8:26 Ahih hangin kikhopna buk sungah a sanggamte uh huh ding a

Numbers11:1 Mihonte in amau’ tuahsiatna hangin Topa’ zakin a phun uh hi. Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin heh mahmah a
Numbers11:2 Tua ciangin Moses’ zak dingin mite kiko uh hi. Moses in Topa’ tungah thu ngen a
Numbers11:3 Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Taberah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute’ lakah Topa’ mei a kuang hi.
Numbers11:4 Tu-in amaute’ lakah a om gamdang mite in anlim a lunggulh mahmah uh hi. Israel mite zong kap kik uh a
Numbers11:5 Egypt-ah man pia loin i nek ngasate
Numbers11:6 Ahih hangin tu-in i tha bei ta a
Numbers11:7 Manna pen nannan tang tawh kibang a
Numbers11:8 Mite pai kawikawi-in khawm uh a
Numbers11:9 Zanin giahphual tungah daitui a kiat ciangin manna tawh kia khawm hi.
Numbers11:10 Mite a innkuankuanun a milipin a puanbuk kongah a kahna uh Moses in a za hi. Topa nak hehlua mahmah ahih manin Moses lungkim lo hi.
Numbers11:11 Moses in Topa’ kiangah
Numbers11:12 Keimah in hih mite khempeuh paii ka hi hiam? Nangmah in kei’ kiangah
Numbers11:13 Hih mite khempeuh piak ding koi-ah sa ngah ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mai-ah amaute kapin
Numbers11:14 Kei guak in hih mite khempeuh ka sizo kei a
Numbers11:15 Hih bangin kei hong bawl ding na hih leh
Numbers11:16 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers11:17 Keimah hong paisukin tua munah nang tawh i kiho ding a
Numbers11:18 Mite tungah
Numbers11:19 Note in ni khat sung
Numbers11:20 na ikkhiat dong uh le na kih dong matengun kha khat sung tawntung sa na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ lakah a om Topa nialin a mai-ah na kap uh a
Numbers11:21 Ahih hangin Moses in
Numbers11:22 Amaute’ khamzah dingin tuuhonte le bawnghonte amau a dingin kigozo ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh tuipi ngasate khempeuh amau’ khamzah ding kimanzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
Numbers11:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers11:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses paikhia-in mite’ tungah Topa’ thugente a gensawn hi. Amah in mite a makai mi sawmsagih kaikhawmin
Numbers11:25 Tua ciangin meii sungah Topa hong paisukin amah hopih a
Numbers11:26 Giahphual ah mi nih om uh a
Numbers11:27 Tangval khat va tai-in Moses kiangah
Numbers11:28 Ama teel mite lakah khat ahi
Numbers11:29 Ahih hangin Moses in ama kiangah
Numbers11:30 Tua ciangin Moses le Israel upate giahphual ah a ciahkik uh hi.
Numbers11:31 Topa’ kiang panin huih nungin
Numbers11:32 Tua sun tawntung le a zan tawntung le a zing ciang tawntung mite dingin vamimte a khawm uh hi. Tawm a khawm pen mipa in beem sawm dim khawm a
Numbers11:33 Sa a kigaih ma
Numbers11:34 Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Kibrothhattaavah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sa a lunggulh mite tua lai munah a vui uh hi.
Numbers11:35 Kibrothhattaavah panin Hazeroth munah mite pai uh a

Numbers12:5 Meii khuam sungah Topa hong kumsukin

Numbers13:2 “Israel mite tungah ka piak Kanaan leitang a vaan dingin mi sawl inla
Numbers13:3 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topa’ thupiakna tawh Paran gamlak panin Israel mite’ lutang ahi mi khempeuh a sawl hi.
Numbers13:4 A sawl mite’ min hih bang ahi hi: Reuben minam panin Zakkur’ tapa Shammua; Simeon minam panin Hori’ tapa Shafat; Judah minam panin Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb; Issakhar minam panin Josef’ tapa Igal; Efraim minam panin Nun’ tapa Hoshea; Benjamin minam panin Rafu’ tapa Palti; Zebulun minam panin Sodi’ tapa Gaddiel; Josef minam (Manasseh minam) panin Susi’ tapa Gaddi; Dan minam panin Gemalli’ tapa Ammiel; Asher minam panin Mikhael’ tapa Shethur; Naftali minam panin Vofsi’ tapa Nahbi; Gad minam panin Makhi’ tapa Geuel ahi hi.
Numbers13:5 Hihte pen gam vaan dingin Moses in a sawl mite’ min ahi hi. Moses in Nun’ tapa Hoshea pen Joshua ci-in a min kheelsak hi.
Numbers13:6 Moses in Kanaan gam a vaan dingin amaute sawlin amaute kiangah
Numbers13:7 leitang bangci hiam

Numbers13:9 a leitang a lei hoih hiam

Numbers13:11 Amaute Negeb lamah paito uh a
Numbers13:12 Amaute Eshkol kuam tung uh a
Numbers13:13 Tua lai panin Israel mite in leenggah bawk a lawhna hangin tua mun pen Eshkol Kuam kici hi.
Numbers13:14 Ni sawmli a cin ciangin gam vaanna panin amaute hong ciahkik uh hi.

Numbers28:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers28:2 “Israel mite thu pia-in amaute tungah
Numbers28:3 “ Topa’ tungah na piak ding uh mei tawh kihal biakna in: A sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno nih
Numbers28:4 Tuuno khat zingsangin na pia ding uh a
Numbers28:5 An tawh biakna-in oliv thau hai khat tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat na pia ding uh hi.
Numbers28:6 Tua pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna
Numbers28:7 Leenggahzu tawh biakna pen tuuno khat ciangin hai khat hi ding hi. Topa’ tungah leenggahzucil tawh biakna pen siangtho munah na sung ding uh hi.
Numbers28:8 A tuuno khat nitakin na pia ding uh hi. Zingsang a an tawh biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biakna mah bangin
Numbers28:9 “Sabbath ni-in a sitbaang lo
Numbers28:10 Hih pen tatsat loin meihal biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah Sabbath simin meihal biakna ahi hi.
Numbers28:11 “Kha simin a ni masa ni-in Topa’ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Bawngtal nih
Numbers28:12 Bawngtal khat ciangin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh thum zong hi ding hi. A tuutal khat ciangin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi ding hi.
Numbers28:13 Tuuno khat a dingin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat ciat hi ding a
Numbers28:14 Leenggahzu tawh biaknate pen
Numbers28:15 Khialhna hanga biakna-in Topa’ tungah keel a pa khat zong kipia ding hi. Tua pen a kitatsat loin meihal biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah a kipia ding ahi hi.
Numbers28:16 “Kha masa a ni sawm le ni li ni pen Topa’ Paisan Pawi ni ahi hi.
Numbers28:17 Tua kha a ni sawm le ni nga ni pen biakna pawi ni hi a
Numbers28:18 A ni masa ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat om ding hi. Tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Numbers28:19 Topa’ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tuate pen bawngtalno nih
Numbers28:20 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi. Bawngtal khat ciangin annel lawh thum le tuutal khat ciangin annel lawh nih tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi.
Numbers28:21 Tuuno sagihte khat ciangin annel lawh khat mah tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi.
Numbers28:22 Note a dingin kilemna bawl nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers28:23 Meihal biak nading ahi zingsang a meihal biakna banah tatsat lo-a biakna-in hihte na pia ding uh hi.
Numbers28:24 Tua bangmahin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna ahi
Numbers28:25 A ni sagih ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a
Numbers28:26 “Na nipikal pawi hunun Topa’ tungah an thak tawh biakna na piak hun uh anpal piak ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Numbers28:27 meihal biakna
Numbers28:28 Sathau tawh a kibawl ahi an tawh a biak nadingin zong
Numbers28:29 tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi.
Numbers28:30 Note a dingin kilemna bawl nadingin keel a pa khat zong na pia ding uh hi.
Numbers28:31 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate banah tuate le leenggahzu tawh biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tuate a sitbaang lo ahih ding thei ta un.
Numbers29:1 “A kha sagihna a ni masa ni-in kikhopna siangtho khat na nei ding uh a
Numbers29:2 meihal biakna
Numbers29:3 Bawngtal tawh piak dingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate lawh thum
Numbers29:4 le tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi.
Numbers29:5 Note a dingin kilemna bawl nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:6 A khasim meihal biakna le an tawh biakna
Numbers29:7 “Hih kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a
Numbers29:8 Topa’ tungah a gim namtui meihal biakna na piak dingte un: Bawngtalno khat
Numbers29:9 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel tawh biaknate pen
Numbers29:10 tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi.
Numbers29:11 Kilem nadingin khialhna hanga biakna le a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:12 “A kha sagihna ni sawm le ni nga ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat nei-in tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Numbers29:13 A ni masa ni-in meihal biakna
Numbers29:14 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate pen
Numbers29:15 le tuuno sawm le lite khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi.
Numbers29:16 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:17 “A ni nih ni-in bawngtalno sawm le nih
Numbers29:18 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:19 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.

Numbers29:21 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte

Numbers35:1 Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei-ah Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers35:2 “Amaute in amau’ neih a luah uh sung panin ten nadingin Levi mite tungah khuapite a piak dingun Israel mite thu pia in. Khuapi kiima lonona gamte Levi mite tungah na pia ding hi.
Numbers35:3 Khuapite pen amau’ tenna hi ding a
Numbers35:4 Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi lonona gamte pen khuapikulh panin a kimkot pi tul le zanga ciang ban ding hi.
Numbers35:5 Khuapi laizang panin na teh ding a
Numbers35:6 Levi mite tungah na piak uh khuapite pen bukna khuapi gukte hi ding a
Numbers35:7 Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi vekpi sawmli le giat hi-in
Numbers35:8 Israel mite’ neihsa sung panin na piak ding khuapite pen minam tamte tung panin tam la-in
Numbers35:9 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers35:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Jordan kantanin Kanaan gamah na tun uh ciangin
Numbers35:11 sawm lopi-in mi khatpeuh a thatkha mi thatte a va tai theih nading
Numbers35:12 Thu kikhen dingin mihonpi mai-ah a din ma-in mi thatte a sih loh nadingin tua khuapite pen phulapa’ kiang panin note a dingin bukna hi ding hi.
Numbers35:13 Na piak uh tua khuapite
Numbers35:14 Bukna khuapi dingin Jordan galkhatah khuapi thum
Numbers35:15 Sawm lopi-in mi khatpeuh a thatkhate a tai theih nadingin hih khuapi gukte pen Israel mite
Numbers35:16 “Ahih hangin mi khat in na-a kizang sik khat tawh midang khat satin a sih leh
Numbers35:17 Amah in mi a sih theih nading mah ahi a khutsunga om suang khat tawh a suk a
Numbers35:18 Tua ahih kei leh
Numbers35:19 A kinaipih pen khat in a phu la-in mi that pa that ding a
Numbers35:20 “Amah in muhdahna tawh sunin
Numbers35:21 tua ahih kei leh galbawlna tawh a khutin tumin a sih leh
Numbers35:22 “Ahih hangin galbawl lopi-in thakhatin amah sunin
Numbers35:23 ahih kei leh
Numbers35:24 tua mi that pa le a phulapa’ kikalah hih ngeina kipte tawh kizui-in mihonpi in khen ding hi.
Numbers35:25 A phulapa’ khutsung panin mihonpi in mi that pa honkhia-in
Numbers35:26 Ahih hangin hun khat peuhpeuhah amah a taina bukna khuapi gamgi khengin a pai a
Numbers35:27 a phulapa in ama bukna khuapi daihual pualamah amah mu-in
Numbers35:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi lianpen pa a sih matengin tua mipa a bukna khuapi sungah a om ding ahi hi. Ahih hangin siampi lianpen pa a sih khit ciangin mi that pa a neihsa leitangah ciahkik thei ding hi.
Numbers35:29 “Hihte pen na tenna khempeuh uhah na khang tawntungun thukham le ngeina hi ding hi.
Numbers35:30 Khatpeuh in mi khat a thah leh
Numbers35:31 Tua tham loin
Numbers35:32 Siampi lianpen pa a sih ma-in bukna khuapi-ah a taisa mipa a gamah a ciahkik theih nadingin ama nuntakna tat nading sum na sang kei ding uh hi.
Numbers35:33 Na tenna uh leitang na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi thahna in leitang ninsak a
Numbers35:34 A laizangah keimah ka tenna leitang na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa keimah
Numbers36:1 Josef’ tapate beh Manasseh
Numbers36:2 “Israel mite tungah aisanna tawh gamhluah dingin leitang piak ding Topa in ka topa tungah thu hong pia hi. Ka sanggampa uh Zelofehad’ gamhluahte a tanute tungah piak dingin Topa in ka topa tungah thu hong pia hi.
Numbers36:3 Ahih hangin Israel sungah minam dangte’ tapate khat peuhpeuh tawh amaute kiteng leh ka pate uh’ gamhluah panin amau a’ teng kilakhia-in a manawh minamte tungah tua gamh kipia beh ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin ko’ ngahsa gamh a kikhenkhia ding ahi hi.
Numbers36:4 Israel mite’ Jubilee hong tun ciangin amau a’ te pen a manawh minamte’ tungah kipia beh ding hi. Ka pa uh namte’ gamhluah panin amau a’ kikhenkhia ding hi
Numbers36:5 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topa’ genna tawh kizui-in Israel mite thu pia a
Numbers36:6 Zelofehad’ tanute tawh kisai-in Topa’ thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Amaute in hoih a sak pente uh tawh kiteng uh hen. Ahih hangin amau’ behte bek tenpih thei ding uh hi.
Numbers36:7 Israel mite’ gamhte minam khat pan namdang khatah paikhia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh a minam gamhluah ciat uh tawh kip ding uh hi.
Numbers36:8 Israel mi khempeuh in a pate uh’ gamh a luah theih nadingun
Numbers36:9 Tua ahih ciangin minam khat pan adang ah gamh paikhia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite’ sung panin minam khempeuh amau’ gamh ciat tawh kip ding uh hi
Numbers36:10 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Zelofehad’ tanute gamta uh hi.
Numbers36:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Zelofehad’ tanu Mahlah
Numbers36:12 Josef’ ta Manasseh’ tapate’ innkuan sungah amaute in pasal nei uh a
Numbers36:13 Hihte pen Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei-ah Israel mite tungah Moses tungtawnin Topa in a piak thupiaknate le ngeina kipte ahi hi.
Deuteronomy1:1 Hihte pen Jordan galkhat gamlak
Deuteronomy1:2 Tua mun pen Horeb panin Seir Mual tawnin Kadeshbarnea lamah ni sawm le ni khat paina ahi hi.
Deuteronomy1:3 Heshbon gamah a teng Amor kumpipa Sihon
Deuteronomy1:4 
Deuteronomy1:5 Moab gam Jordan galkhatah Moses in hih thu gentel a
Deuteronomy1:6 “Horeb gam sungah Topa i Pasian in eite’ kiangah
Deuteronomy1:7 Kithawi-in na khualzin uh kipan kik unla
Deuteronomy1:8 En un
Deuteronomy1:9 “Tua hun laitakin note kiangah
Deuteronomy1:10 Topa na Pasian un note tampi hong phasakzo hi. En un
Deuteronomy1:11 Topa
Deuteronomy1:12 Kei guak in note’ thu kineihnate siansak nading tavuan lianpi bangci puakzawh ding ka hi hiam?
Deuteronomy1:13 Na minam uh tawh a kizui-in a pil
Deuteronomy1:14 Note in
Deuteronomy1:15 Tua ahih ciangin na minam lutang uh ahi
Deuteronomy1:16 “Tua hun laitakin na thukhente uh ka thuhilh a

Deuteronomy8:3 Mite
Deuteronomy8:4 Hih kum sawmli sung note’ tunga om na puan uh sia loin

Deuteronomy8:6 Tua ahih ciangin ama lampi zuihna le amah zahtakna tawh Topa note Pasian’ thupiakte na zui ding uh hi.

Joshua4:13 mi tul sawmli bang galdo dingin hiam tawi-in a baihsa-in Jerikho zanglei lam Topa’ mai-ah a pai uh hi.
Joshua4:14 Tua ni-in Israel-te khempeuh’ muhna-ah Topa in Joshua liansak hi. Amaute in Moses lamdangsa-in a om uh mah bangin Joshua a nuntak sung tawntung lamdangsa-in a om uh hi.

Joshua4:19 Kha masa a ni sawm ni-in Jordan panin mite paikhia uh a

Joshua5:5 Hong paikhia mite khempeuh vun a ki-at khit hangin Egypt panin hong paikhiat khit uh sehnel gam lamkal a suak mite khempeuh a vun uh ki-at nai lo hi.
Joshua5:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa’ thu a ngaih lohna hangun Egypt panin a hong paikhia minam bup

Joshua6:4 Siampi sagih in Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah tuutal ki peengkul sagih tawi ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni-in khuapi kimkotah sagihvei na pai ding uh a
Joshua6:5 Amaute in tuutal ki sauveipi a ginsak khit uh ciangin
Joshua6:6 Tua ahih ciangin Nun tapa Joshua in siampite samin amaute kiangah
Joshua6:7 Tua ciangin amah in mite kiangah

Joshua6:14 A ni nih ni-in khuapi kimkotah khatvei pai uh a
Joshua6:15 A ni sagih ni-in khuavak tungin tho baih uh a
Joshua6:16 A sagih veina-ah

Joshua6:18 Ahih hangin suksiat dingin a kiseh nate panin nomau mah na kikem ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh tuate na suksiat ding uh ciangin a kisusia ding nate khat peuhpeuh iplahin la kha-in Israel-te’ giahphual sungah siat nading na khat suaksakin haksatna na tun kha ding uh hi.

Joshua23:3 Note’ hangin Topa na Pasian un hih minam dangte khempeuh tungah a bawlnate na mu khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note a dingin hong dosak pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi.

Joshua23:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh na it ding uh hoihtakin ngaihsun un.
