1Samuel1:1 Efraim mi Zuf’ tapa Tohu
1Samuel1:2 Amah in zi nih nei hi. Khat’ min Hannah hi a
1Samuel1:3 Elkanah a kumkumin a khuapi panin
1Samuel1:4 Elkanah in biakna a piak ciangin a zi Peninnah le a tanu le a tapate khempeuh tungah tanh pia hi.
1Samuel1:5 Amah in Hannah a it hangin Topa in amah ta neisak lo ahih manin Hannah tungah tanh khat bek a pia hi.
1Samuel1:6 Topa in amah ta neisak lo ahih manin amah a el a zipih in amah nakpitakin phin zel
1Samuel1:7 Tua ahih ciangin a kumkumin tua bangin hi den uh hi. Topa’ inn-ah a paitoh simin Peninnah in Hannah phin zel hi. Tua ahih ciangin Hannah kapin an ne lo hi.
1Samuel1:8 Tua ciangin ama pasal Elkanah in
1Samuel1:9 Amaute in Shiloh-ah an a nek khit uh ciangin khatvei Hannah ding khia-in biakinn-ah thungen dingin a pai hi. Tua hun laitakin Topa’ biakinn kongkhak khuam pangah siampi Eli na tu hi.
1Samuel1:10 Tua nu nakpitakin lungkhamin Topa’ tungah thu ngenin nakpitakin a kap hi.
1Samuel1:11 Amah in thuciamna khat bawlin
1Samuel1:12 Topa’ mai-ah thungenin a om laitakin Eli in tua nu’ kam na en hi.
1Samuel1:13 Hannah a lungsimah pau hi. A mukte bek lingin a awging kiza lo ahih ciangin Eli in tua numei zukhamin ngaihsun hi.
1Samuel1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Eli in ama kiangah
1Samuel1:15 Ahih hangin Hannah in dawngin
1Samuel1:16 Lungkhamna le gimna tawh a pau ka hih manin numei ginalo bangin na nasemnu hong ngaihsun kei in
1Samuel1:17 Tua ciangin Eli in dawngin
1Samuel1:18 Tua ciangin numei in
1Samuel1:19 Amaute zingsangin tho baihin biakinn-ah Topa a biak khit uh ciangin amaute’ khua Ramah-a a inn uhah a ciahkik uh hi. Tua ciangin Elkanah in a zi Hannah luppih a
1Samuel1:20 A hun ciangin Hannah gai-in tapa khat nei a
1Samuel1:21 Tua ciangin Elkanah le a innkuante khempeuh Topa’ tungah kumsim biakna le a thuciamna a pia dingin paito kik uh hi.
1Samuel1:22 Ahih hangin Hannah paito lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a pasal kiangah
1Samuel1:23 A pasal Elkanah in ama kiangah
1Samuel1:24 Numei in amah nawi tawh a kikhensak khit ciangin kum thum a pha bawngtal khat
1Samuel1:25 Tua ciangin amaute in a bawngtal go-in Eli kiangah a naupang a paipih uh hi.
1Samuel1:26 Tua nu in
1Samuel1:27 Hih naupang ka ngen hi. Topa in ama tungah keima ngetna hong pia hi.
1Samuel1:28 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ tungah amah ka kawm hi. A nuntak laiteng Topa’ tungah amah a kikawm ahi hi
1Samuel2:1 Hannah in zong thu ngenin
1Samuel2:2 “ Topa bangin a siangtho kuamah dang om lo a
1Samuel2:3 Tua bangin kiphatsakna tawh pau nawn kei inla
1Samuel2:4 A thahatte’ thalte kitan a
1Samuel2:5 A gilvahte in an thalawh uh a
1Samuel2:6 Topa in thatin hingsakkik a
1Samuel2:7 Topa in zawngsakin hausak a
1Samuel2:8 Amah in leivui panin mizawngte phongto a
1Samuel2:9 “Amah in a thuman mite’ kalsuanna limtakin cing a
1Samuel2:10 Topa’ langte tamkham ding a
1Samuel2:11 Tua ciangin Ramah-a a inn-ah Elkanah a ciah hi. Ahi zongin naupang in siampi Eli’ omna-ah Topa’ na a sem hi.
1Samuel2:12 Eli’ tapate pen bangmah a man lo mite ahi uh hi. Amaute in Topa zahtakna nei lo uh hi.
1Samuel2:13 Mite’ tungah siampite’ gamtat zia ding ngeinate don lo uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin a sa a huan laitakin siampipa’ nasempa sikkeu-ka-thum nei khat a khutah tawi-in hong pai a
1Samuel2:14 amah in a sikkeu tawh sikbeel daii ahi a
1Samuel2:15 Tua tham loin a thau a kihal ma-in siampipa’ nasempa hong pai-in biakna a pia mipa kiangah
1Samuel2:16 Tua ciangin mipa in ama kiangah
1Samuel2:17 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ muhna-ah tangvalte’ khialhna lian mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa’ tungah biakpiaknate thupi seh lo uh hi.
1Samuel2:18 Samuel pen saihadial siampipuan silhin Topa’ mai-ah na a sem naupang khat ahi hi.
1Samuel2:19 Samuel’ nu a pasal tawh kumsim biakna pia dingin a paitoh ciangin ama a dingin puantual neu khat bawlin kum simin ama kiangah a puak hi.
1Samuel2:20 Tua ciangin Eli in Elkanah le a zi thupha pia-in
1Samuel2:21 Tua ciangin Topa in Hannah thupha pia a
1Samuel2:22 Tu-in Eli teek mahmah a
1Samuel2:23 Amah in amaute kiangah
1Samuel2:24 Hilo hi
1Samuel2:25 Mi khat midang khat tungah a khialh le ama a dingin thukhente in palai sem ding hi. Ahih hangin mi khat Topa’ tungah khial leh ama a dingin kua in va thumsak ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in a pa’ thu ngai lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amaute a thah nadingin Topa’ deihna ahi hi.
1Samuel2:26 Tu-in naupang Samuel a pumpi khangin Topa le mite’ maipha a ngahtoto hi.
1Samuel2:27 Tua ciangin Pasian’ mi khat Eli’ kiangah hong pai-in ama kiangah
1Samuel2:28 Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin amah ka siampi ahi ding
1Samuel2:29 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin keimah hong kibiaknate le ka thupiak ahi keimah hong kipiakte thusim loin
1Samuel2:30 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te’ Pasian
1Samuel2:31 En in
1Samuel2:32 Tua ciangin Israel-te tungah ka piak daupainate khempeuh na lungkham hunin enna mit tawh na en ding a
1Samuel2:33 Ka biakna tau panin ka suksiat loh na suante khat pen mitlawt dongin a kap ding le a lunggim dingin kikoih ding hi. Tua ciangin na innsung panin a khang khempeuh
1Samuel2:34 Na tapa nihte
1Samuel2:35 Tua ciangin ka lungsim sung le ka ngaihsutna bangin a sem ding a citak siampi khat keima a dingin ka khangsak ding hi. Amah
1Samuel2:36 Na suanlekhak a suakta mite khempeuh ngun peek khat ahi a

1Samuel3:6 Tua ciangin Topa in sam kikin

1Samuel3:9 Tua ahih ciangin Eli in Samuel kiangah
1Samuel3:10 Topa hong pai-in hong ding a
1Samuel3:11 Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah

1Samuel3:19 Samuel khang a

1Samuel4:1 Tu-in Filistia mite a sim dingin Israel-te kuankhia uh hi. Amaute in Ebenezer-ah phual sat uh a

1Samuel4:3 Mihonte giahphual ah hong ciah ciangin Israel upate in
1Samuel4:4 Tua ahih ciangin mite in Shiloh-ah mi paisak uh a
1Samuel4:5 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang giahphual sung hong tun ciangin Israel-te khempeuh nakpitakin awng uh a
1Samuel4:6 Filistia mite in otna gamlumna a zak uh ciangin amaute in
1Samuel4:7 Filistia mite lau uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in
1Samuel4:8 Gimna ngah hi ta hang! Kua in hih a thahat pasian-te’ khutsung panin eite hong honkhiazo ding ahi hiam? Hihte pen gimna a tuamtuamte tawh gamlakah Egypt-te a vatgawp pasian-te ahi hi.
1Samuel4:9 Filistia mite aw
1Samuel4:10 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia mite in do uh a
1Samuel4:11 Tua ciangin Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang zong kiman a
1Samuel4:12 Giahphual panin Benjamin mi khat hong tai-in a puan kikeeksa le a lu tungah leivui khu-in Shiloh hong tung hi.
1Samuel4:13 Amah a tun ciangin
1Samuel4:14 Eli in kikona awging a zak ciangin amah in

1Samuel4:17 A thu hong puak pa in dawngin

1Samuel5:4 Ahih hangin a zing ciang zingsang tungin amaute a thawh uh ciangin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai leilakah Dagon na maipuk leuleu a

1Samuel6:9 A bawngte in Bethshemesh khua zuanin a paitoh leh siatna lianpi hong bawl pa pen amah hi ding hi. Ahih hangin a paitoh kei leh eite hong susia pa amah hi lo a

1Samuel6:14 Bethshemesh khuami Joshua’ lo-ah a leeng hong tungin tua munah khawl hi. Tua lai-ah suangtum lianpi khat om hi. Amaute in a leeng singte ekkhamin a bawngpite Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in a pia uh hi.
1Samuel6:15 Levi mite in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang le a gei-a om kham milim a omna singkuang la-in suangtumpi tungah a koih uh hi. Bethshemesh mite in tua ni-in Topa’ tungah meihal biaknate le biakpiaknate a pia uh hi.

1Samuel6:18 Ulian ngate’ uk Filistia mite khuakulh tawh a ki-um khuapite le a ki-um lo khuaneute a dingin a khua phazah tawh kizui-in kham simbengte zong ahi hi. Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a koihna gei uha suangtumpi pen Bethshemesh khuami Joshua’ lo-ah tuni dongin teci ahi hi.

Thupha a piak khit ciangin a kisam mite in ne thei pan uh hi. Tu-in paito un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah na tuakpah ding uh hi

1Samuel10:2 Tuni-in kei kiang panin na paikhiat ciangin Benjamin-te’ gam Rachel’ han kiang Zelzah-ah mihing nih na tuak ding a
1Samuel10:3 Tua ciangin tua lai panin pai lai-in Tabor tawsaw lak na tung ding hi. Tua lai panin Bethel-a Pasian kiangah a paito
1Samuel10:4 Amaute in nang hong hopihin nangmah in amau’ tung panin na san ding anlum nih nang tungah hong pia ding uh hi.
1Samuel10:5 Tua khit ciangin Filistia khuacingte a omna Gibeath-elohim na tung ding hi. Tua khuapi sung na tun ciangin amaute mai-ah
1Samuel10:6 Tua ciangin Topa’ kha in khauhtakin nang hong uk ding a
1Samuel10:7 Hih limte nang tungah hong tun ciangin na tuah peuhpeuh na hih ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh Pasian hong om hi.
1Samuel10:8 Tua ciangin keima mai Gilgal-ah na paisuk ding hi. Meihal biaknate le thunuama biaknate a pia dingin nang kiangah kei zong kong pai ding hi. Nang kiangah kei hong pai-in na hih ding teng kong lah mateng
1Samuel10:9 Samuel nusia dingin a nunghei ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pianzia thak khat a pia hi. Tua ni-in Samuel’ gen limte khempeuh a piang hi.
1Samuel10:10 Gibeah-ah amaute a tun uh ciangin
1Samuel10:11 Tua ciangin kamsangte tawh a gamtat khawmna
1Samuel10:12 Tua ciangin tua lai-a mite khat in dongin
1Samuel10:13 Tua bangin laamin a otna a man ciangin mualtung a biakna tau omna-ah a pai hi.
1Samuel10:14 Saul’ pano in amah le a nasempa a muh ciangin
1Samuel10:15 Tua ciangin Saul’ pano in

1Samuel10:18 Amah in Israel mite kiangah
1Samuel10:19 Ahih hangin note in na tuahsiatnate uh le na lungkhamnate uh panin note a hong honkhia na Pasian uh tuni-in na nial uh a
1Samuel10:20 Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel minamte khempeuh a nai-ah hong paipih a
1Samuel10:21 Amah in Benjamin minamte a behbehin hong paipih a
1Samuel10:22 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topa kiangah dongkik uh a
1Samuel10:23 Tua ciangin amaute tai-in tua lai mun panin amah hong paipih uh hi. Mite’ lakah amah a din ciangin mi khempeuh ama liangko ciang bek pha uh hi.
1Samuel10:24 Tua ciangin Samuel in mi khempeuh tungah
1Samuel10:25 Tua ciangin Samuel in kumpipa’ thuneihna le a nasepte mite kiangah gen a

1Samuel28:18 Nangmah in Topa’ thu ngai loin
1Samuel28:19 Tua tham loin Topa in Israel mite zong nang tawh Filistia-te’ khut sungah hong piakhawm ding hi. Zing ciangin nang le na tapate in zong kei kiang nong zuan ding uh hi. Topa in Israel galkapte zong Filistia-te’ khut sungah pia ding hi
1Samuel28:20 Tua ciangin Samuel’ thugente hangin lau lua-in leilakah Saul tawnpuk pah hi. Amah in sun tawntung le zan tawntung bangmah ne lo ahih manin a tha nem mahmah hi.

1Samuel30:5 David’ zi nihte
1Samuel30:6 David nakpitakin lungkham hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh a tanu a tapate uh hangin lungsimsia uh ahih manin amaute in suang tawh amah den ding gen uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa a Pasian in David thakhauhsak hi.

2Samuel3:4 A lina pen Haggith’ tapa Adonijah ahi hi. A ngana pen Abital’ tapa Shefatiah ahi hi.

2Samuel6:4 
2Samuel6:5 Tua ciangin David le Israel mite khempeuh in Topa’ mai-ah a tha neih zahun la sa-in

2Samuel6:13 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a puate kal guk a suan khit ciangin amah in a puate tawlkhat khawlsakin bawngtal khat le bawngno thau khat biakna-in a pia hi.

2Samuel6:19 Israel mihon buppi
2Samuel6:20 Tua ciangin a innkuante thupha a pia dingin David a ciah hi. Ahih hangin David a dawn dingin Saul’ tanu Mikhal hong paikhia a

2Samuel7:5 “Pai inla ka nasempa David kiangah gen in. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ten nading biakinn khat hong lamsak ding na hi hiam?
2Samuel7:6 Israel mite Egypt panin ka paikhiatpih toh ni a kipan tuni dongin biakinn sungah ka om nai kei a
2Samuel7:7 Israel mite khempeuh tawh ka painasa mun khempeuhah
2Samuel7:8 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka nasempa David kiangah hih bangin na gen ding hi. ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin lonona mun
2Samuel7:9 Na paina peuhpeuhah nang tawh kong om a
2Samuel7:10 Keimah in ka mi Israel-te a dingin mun khat ka seh ding a
2Samuel7:11 ka mi Israel-te tungah thukhente ka koih khit zawh
2Samuel7:12 Na pu na pate’ kiang na zuat ni ciangin

2Samuel7:14 Kei pen ama pa ka hi ding a
2Samuel7:15 Ahih hangin nangma ma-a ka hepkhiat Saul’ tung panin ka lakkhiat bangin ama tung panin ka itna kip ka lakhia kei ding hi.
2Samuel7:16 Na suanlekhakte le na kumpi gam keima mai-ah a kip tawntungin kibawl ding a
2Samuel7:17 Hih thute khempeuh tawh a kizui le hih maangmuhna khempeuh tawh a kizui-in Nathan in David kiangah a gen hi.
2Samuel7:18 Tua ciangin kumpi David sungtumin Topa’ mai-ah tu a
2Samuel7:19 Hih pen nangma mitah thu neuno khat hi lai hi
2Samuel7:20 David in nang tungah bang genthuah nawn ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in na nasempa na thei hi
2Samuel7:21 Nangma thuciamna bang le na lungsim tawh kizui-in na nasempa na theihsak nadingin hih thu lian khempeuh na piangsak hi.
2Samuel7:22 Tua ahih ciangin nang na lian takpi hi
2Samuel7:23 “Ama mite’ mai-ah minam khat le a pasian-te hawlkhiatna tawh ama a dingin min bawlin
2Samuel7:24 Nangmah in nangma mi ahi tawntung dingin na mi Israel-te nangma a dingin na kipsak hi. Topa aw

2Samuel8:1 Hih thu teng khit ciangin David in Filistia-te zo-in amaute nuaisiah a
2Samuel8:2 Tua ciangin amah in Moab mite zo a
2Samuel8:3 Zobah kumpipa Rehob’ tapa Hadadezer in Eufratis gun kiim gamte ngahkik nuamin hong kuan ahih manin David in amah do-in a zo hi.
2Samuel8:4 David in ama tung panin sakol galkap tulkhat le zasagih le khe galkap tul sawmnih la hi. David in leengkai sakol khempeuh a zagui atsat a
2Samuel8:5 Damaskas gam a Syria mite
2Samuel8:6 Tua ciangin David in Damaskas gam Aram-ah khuacingte a koih hi. Syria mite David’ nasem suak uh a
2Samuel8:7 Tua ciangin David in Hadadezer’ nasemte in a puak kham kibawl lumte la-in Jerusalem-ah a paipih hi.
2Samuel8:8 Hadadezer’ khuapite Betah le Berothai panin Kumpi David in sumngo tampi tak a la hi.
2Samuel8:9 Hamath kumpipa Toi in David in Hadadezer’ galkap buppi a zawhna thu a zak ciangin
2Samuel8:10 amah in Hadadezer do-in a zawhna hangin amah va hopihin a lungdampih dingin Toi in Kumpi David kiangah a tapa Joram a sawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Hadadezer pen Toi tawh galin kido ngei zel hi. Joram in ngun

2Samuel8:12

2Samuel8:15 Tua ahih ciangin David in Israel-te khempeuh uk a
2Samuel8:16 Zeruiah’ tapa Joab in galkapte uk hi. Ahilud’ tapa Jehoshafat thu ciamteh pa ahi hi.

2Samuel8:18 Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah in Khereth mite le Peleth mite uk uh hi. David’ tapate pen siampite ahi uh hi.

1Kings4:1 Kumpi Solomon pen Israel mi khempeuh tungah kumpi hi a
1Kings4:2 ama nuai-ah panmunte le a semte hih bang ahi hi: Siampi nasep: Zadok’ tapa Azariah ahi hi.
1Kings4:3 Lai-at nasep: Shisha’ tapa Elihoref le Ahijah ahi uh hi. Thu ciamteh nasep: Ahilud’ tapa Jehoshafat ahi hi.
1Kings4:4 Galkapte a uk nasep: Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah ahi hi. Siampite nasep: Zadok le Abiathar ahi uh hi.
1Kings4:5 Uliante tungah a uk nasep: Nathan’ tapa Azariah ahi hi. Kumpi thu lamlak nasep: Nathan’ tapa Zabud ahi hi.
1Kings4:6 Kumpi inn uk nasep: Ahishar ahi hi. Aana tawh nasemte a uk nasep: Abda’ tapa Adoniram ahi hi.
1Kings4:7 Solomon in Israel khempeuh tungah ulian sawm le nih nei-in tuate in kumpipa le a innkuan a dingin annek tuidawn vaihawmsak uh hi. Mi khat in kum khatin kha khat sung annek tuidawn vaihawmsak ciat uh hi.
1Kings4:8 Tua a vaihawm uliante: Benhur: Efraim mualtung gam sungah;
1Kings4:9 Bendeker: Makaz khua
1Kings4:10 Benhesed: Arubboth khua sungah (Soko le Hefer gam khempeuh ama a’ hi);
1Kings4:11 Benabinadab: Nafathdor gam sung khempeuhah (amah in Solomon’ tanu Tafath zi-in nei hi);
1Kings4:12 Ahilud’ tapa Baana: Taanak khua
1Kings4:13 Bengeber: Ramothgilead gam sungah (amah in Gilead sunga om Manasseh’ tapa Jair’ khuaneute le Bashan sungah a om Argob gam sung
1Kings4:14 Iddo’ tapa Ahinadab: Mahanaim khua sungah;
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaz: Naftali gam sungah (amah in Solomon’ tanu Basemath zi-in la hi);
1Kings4:16 Hushai’ tapa Baana: Asher gam le Bealoth khua sungah;
1Kings4:17 Paruah’ tapa Jehoshafat: Issakhar gam sungah;
1Kings4:18 Ela’ tapa Shimei: Benjamin gam sungah;
1Kings4:19 Uri’ tapa Gebal: Amor mite’ kumpi Sihon le Bashan kumpi Og gam ahi Gilead gam sungah ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih sawm le nihte banah Judah gam sung khempeuh a uk ulian khat omlai hi.

1Kings4:26 Solomon in a leengte a dingin buk a nei ciat sakol tul sawmli le sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm le tulnih zong nei hi.

1Kings5:2 Tua ciangin Solomon in Hiram kiangah kam khak a
1Kings5:3 “ Topa in ama khenuai-ah amaute a koihsak matengin amah a umcih a galte tawh kidona hangin ka pa David in Topa ama Pasian’ min dingin biakinn a lam theih lohna thu na thei hi.
1Kings5:4 Ahih hangin tu-in Topa ka Pasian in na khempeuhah tawlngakna kei tungah hong pia hi. Hong langpang ahi a

1Kings5:7 Hiram in Solomon’ kam a zak ciangin nakpitakin lungdam a
1Kings5:8 Tua ciangin Hiram in Solomon kiangah mi sawlin
1Kings5:9 Ka nasemte in Lebanon panin tuipi-ah tuate hong puaksuk ding uh hi. Nangma cihna munah a pai dingin tuipi a tawn dingin keimah in tuate phongin ka bawl ding a
1Kings5:10 Tua ahih ciangin Hiram in ama deih taamtak le taaksan singte Solomon pia a
1Kings5:11 Solomon in Hiram tungah a mite’ an dingin mangbuh beem tul sawmnih le oliv thau bungpi tul sawmnih dim a pia hi. Solomon in Hiram’ tungah a kum kumin hihte a pia hi.
1Kings5:12 Ama tungah a ciam bangin Topa in Solomon tungah pilna pia hi. Solomon le Hiram kilem uh a
1Kings5:13 Kumpi Solomon in Israel sung panin aana tawh na a sem mite la hi. A lak mite mihing tul sawmthum pha hi.
1Kings5:14 Amah in Lebanon-ah tua mite kha khatin tul sawm a kikhelin puak hi. Amaute Lebanon-ah kha khat omin inn-ah kha nih om ding uh hi. Adoniram in hih a kila mite uk hi.
1Kings5:15 Solomon in vanpua mi tul sawmsagih le mualtung gamah suangseek mi tul sawmgiat zong nei a
1Kings5:16 na a sem mite a uk
1Kings5:17 Suangseeksa tawh biakinn bulpi a phuh theih nadingin kumpipa’ thupiakna tawh amaute in a lian
1Kings5:18 Tua ahih ciangin biakinn lam nadingin Solomon’ mi innlamte le Hiram’ mi innlamte le Gebal mite in sing phuk le singlesuang nasep a sem uh hi.
1Kings6:1 Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat zawh kum zali le kum sawmgiatna
1Kings6:2 Kumpi Solomon in Topa a dingin a lam biakinn
1Kings6:3 Biakinn mai-ah a innliim pen biakinn zaina zahin pi sawmthum sau a
1Kings6:4 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn a dingin a pualam a kihui tawlette a bawl hi.
1Kings6:5 Amah in biakinn pang tuak le a nunglam biakinn kawm kimkotin a kawm tungah zong inn lam a
1Kings6:6 A dawl nuainung pen pi sagih le alang zai-in
1Kings6:7 Biakinn a kilam ciangin a kitawhna mun panin a kibawlsa suangte tawh kilam hi. Tua ahih manin a kilam laitakin hei ahi a
1Kings6:8 A dawl nuainung lut nading pen biakinn leitaw lampangah om hi. A dawl laita-ah kahlei zui-in kipai-in a dawl laita panin a thumna-ah kipai hi.
1Kings6:9 Tua ahih ciangin amah in biakinn lamin a zo hi. Amah in innkamte khungin taamtak peekte tawh inndap a bawl hi.
1Kings6:10 Amah in a inn buppi tungah a lambehte zomin
1Kings6:11 Tu-in Topa’ thu Solomon’ tungah hong tung a
1Kings6:12 “Nangmah in na lam hih biakinn tawh kisai-in
1Kings6:13 Tua ciangin na lam biakinn sung Israel mite lakah ka teng ding a
1Kings6:14 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in biakinn lamin a zo hi.
1Kings6:15 Amah in taamtak peekte tawh biakinn sung kawm dap hi. Sual panin inndap innsunte dongin amah in sing tawh a sunglam tuam hi. Tua ciangin amah in taaksan peekte tawh a sual tuam hi.
1Kings6:16 Amah in sual panin innsun dong inn nunglam pi sawmthum taamtak peekte tawh lam a
1Kings6:17 Biakinn sungnung mai-a innsung
1Kings6:18 Inn sunga om taamtak singte tungah umgah le pakpalh lim kigelh hi. A vekpi-in taamtak a kidap hi a
1Kings6:19 Amah in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang koih nadingin a sungtawng penah biakinn sungnung a bawl hi.
1Kings6:20 Biakinn sungnung
1Kings6:21 Tua ciangin Solomon in kham citak tawh innsung zut a
1Kings6:22 Amah in a inn buppi a zawh dongin kham tawh a zut hi. Biakinn sungnung a biakna tau buppi zong amah in kham tawh a zut hi.
1Kings6:23 Amah in biakinn sungnungah oliv sing tawh kherub nih bawl a
1Kings6:24 Kherub kha langkhat
1Kings6:25 Kherub adang khat zong pi sawm le nga mah sau a
1Kings6:26 Kherub khat a sauna pi sawm le nga hi a
1Kings6:27 Amah in biakinn sung tawngnung penah kherub-te a koih hi. Kherub-te’ khate kizal a
1Kings6:28 Amah in kham tawh tua kherub-te a zut hi.
1Kings6:29 Amah in a sungnung le a puanung inndeite
1Kings6:30 A sungnung le a puanung inndei sung innsualte amah in kham tawh a zut hi.
1Kings6:31 Biakinn sungnung lut nadingin amah in oliv sing kongkhak peekte a bawl hi; a bangtung zawl le kongkhak khuamte in kiu nga piangsak hi.
1Kings6:32 Amah in kherub-te
1Kings6:33 Tua bangmahin amah in kiu li nei-in biakinn sung lutna oliv sing kongkhak khuamte
1Kings6:34 le taaksan sing kongkhak peek nihte a bawl hi. Kongkhak a peek nihte kikhepin
1Kings6:35 Tuate tungah amah in kherub-te le nisuh kungte le pakpalhte bawl a
1Kings6:36 Amah in a kiseek suang gual thum le taamtak sing gual khat tawh a tual sungnung a bawl hi.
1Kings6:37 A kum lina

1Kings7:1 Solomon in ama inn ding zong kum sawm le thum sung lamin a inn buppi a zo hi.
1Kings7:2 Amah in Lebanon Tulak Inn a kici khat a lam hi. A sauna pi zalesawmnga hi a
1Kings7:3 Gual khatah sawm le nga a om khuampi sawmli le nga tunga kilam inndei tung san teng taamtak sing tawh kituam hi.
1Kings7:4 A pang kawm tegel tungah tawlet gual thum tuak om a
1Kings7:5 A kongkhakte le a tawlet khempeuhte a pang kikim kiu li nei vive hi a
1Kings7:6 Tua ciangin amah in Khuampi Innpi a kici khat lam hi. A sauna pi sawmsagih le nga hi a
1Kings7:7 Tua ciangin amah in a thukhen nading mun Thukhenna Innpi ahi Kumpi Tokhom Innpi a kici khat lam a
1Kings7:8 Kumpi Tokhom Innpi nung lamah ama ten nading inn zong tua mah bangin a kilam ahi hi. Solomon in zi-a a lak Faro’ tanu a dingin hih innpi tawh a kibang inn dang khat zong a lam hi.
1Kings7:9 Hihte khempeuh
1Kings7:10 A bulpi pen a manpha suang
1Kings7:11 Tuate’ tung ate pen limtakin tehin a kitan a manpha suang
1Kings7:12 Tual lianpi in a kimkotah a kiseek suang gual thum simin taamtak sing gual khat nei hi. Tua mah bangin Topa’ biakinn tual sungnung le innliim in zong a nei hi.
1Kings7:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon in mi sawlin Taia khua-a om Huram samsak hi.
1Kings7:14 Amah pen Naftali minam meigongnu’ tapa hi a
1Kings7:15 Amah in sumngo khuampi nih sung hi. Khuampi khat a sauna pi sawmnih le sagih hi a
1Kings7:16 Khuampite tungah a bulh dingin amah in a kisung sumngo khuamluzepna nih zong a bawl hi. Khuamluzepna khat a sauna pi sagih le alang hi a
1Kings7:17 Tua ciangin amah in khuampite lu dawna khuamluzepna a dingin khainiang a kihuiheek tawh a kibawl ngen banga kikalh simsiam nih a bawl hi. Ngen khat pen khuamluzepna khat a’ ding hi a
1Kings7:18 Tua mah bangin amah in mang kawlsing gahte a bawl hi. Khuampi lu dawna om khuamluzepna tuam nadingin ngen tawh kibangin a bawl tung kimkotah gual nih bawl a
1Kings7:19 Tua ciangin innlim a om khuampi dawnah a om khuamluzepnate pi guk pha a
1Kings7:20 A khuamluzepnate pen a khuampi nihte tung le ngen tawh kibanga kibawl gei-a a om a bem a dawk tungah om hi. A kimkotah gual nihin mang kawlsing gah zanih om a
1Kings7:21 Amah in biakinn innlimah khuampite a phut hi. Leitaw lamah a khuam khat phutin a min Jakhin phuak a
1Kings7:22 A khuampite dawnah unok pak a kibawl om hi. Tua bangin khuampite a bawl a man khin hi.
1Kings7:23 Tua ciangin amah in a kisung tuikuangpi a bawl hi. Tua tuikuang a bem hi a
1Kings7:24 A geivial nuai pi sawmli le nga sung
1Kings7:25 Bawngtal sawm le nihte tungah tua tuikuangpi kinga a
1Kings7:26 A tuikuang sahna khutpeekmai cia ahi hi. A geivial pen unok pak tawh a kibang hai geivial bangin kibawl hi. Tua sungah tui tambong tulli bang ta thei hi.
1Kings7:27 Amah in sumngo kibawl tuikuang a kingakna sawm zong a bawl hi. Tua a bawlte pi guk sau
1Kings7:28 Tua a kingaknate hih bangin kibawl hi: Tuate in a khawkte nei-in
1Kings7:29 tua ciangin a kungah a kibulh a khawkte tungah humpinelkaite
1Kings7:30 Tua tham loin tua ngaknate in sumngo tawh a kibawl leengpeite le leengpei zawlte nei ciat a
1Kings7:31 A gong pen a kingakna pan pi khat le alang sangto hi. A gong pen kingakna a kibawl bangin bem a
1Kings7:32 A leengpei lite pen a khawkte’ nuai-ah om hi. Leengpei zawlte a kingakna tawh sakhat mah hi a
1Kings7:33 A peite pen sakol leengpei bangin kibawl hi; a pei zawl
1Kings7:34 A kingaknate’ kiu ciatah a nanna li om ciat a
1Kings7:35 Tua ciangin a ngakna dawnah letmat kua a sang vial bem khat om hi. A ngakna dawnah a kipsaknate le a khawkte pen a ngakna tawh sakhat ahi hi.
1Kings7:36 Tua ciangin a kipsaknate le a khawkte tungah a mun awng zah ciat tawh kizui-in amah in kherub-te
1Kings7:37 Tu-a bangin amah in a kingakna sawm bawl hi. A vekpi-in a kibangin kisungin
1Kings7:38 Tua ciangin amah in sumngo tuikuang sawm bawl hi. Tuikuang khatah tui tambong sawmgiat bang ta-in
1Kings7:39 Tua ciangin amah in tua a kingaknate
1Kings7:40 Huram in beelte
1Kings7:41 Khuampi nihte
1Kings7:42 khuampite tungah a om khuamluzepna nihte a tuam dingin ngen tawh a kibanga kibawl khat a dingin mang kawlsing gah gual nih ahi
1Kings7:43 a kingakna sawmte
1Kings7:44 tuikuangpi khat
1Kings7:45 Tu-in beelte

1Kings8:1 Tua ciangin Solomon in Zion a kici David khuapi panin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Biakinn sungah a paipih dingin Jerusalem khuasung ama kiangah Israel upate le minam lutang
1Kings8:2 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh a kha sagihna Ethanim kha sunga pawi hunin Kumpi Solomon kiangah kikhawm uh hi.
1Kings8:3 Israel upate khempeuh hong pai uh a
1Kings8:4 Tua ciangin amaute in kikhopna buk
1Kings8:5 Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah a kikhawm Kumpi Solomon le Israel mihonte khempeuh in biakna-in tuu le bawngtalte tampi tak pia uh ahih manin tuate a phazah kisim zo lo hi.
1Kings8:6 Tua ciangin siampite in a kherub-te’ kha nuai
1Kings8:7 Kherub-te in Thuciamna Singkuang omna mun tungah a kha uh zak ahih manin Thuciamna Singkuang le a zawlte tungah kherub-te in khuhna piangsak uh hi.
1Kings8:8 A zawlte sau mahmah ahih manin biakinn sungnung mai siangtho mun panin a zawl mongte kimu a
1Kings8:9 Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah
1Kings8:10 Siangtho mun panin siampite a paikhiat ciangin meii in Topa’ biakinn tuam a
1Kings8:11 meii hangin siampite nasem dingin om thei lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ minthanna vang in Topa’ biakinn a tuam hi.

1Kings8:13 Keimah in nangma a dingin a kipahtawi mun khat

1Kings8:17 Israel Pasian
1Kings8:18 Ahih hangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah
1Kings8:19 Ahi zongin nangmah in a biakinn na lam kei ding a
1Kings8:20 Tu-in ama bawlsa thuciamna Topa in tungsak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa David’ munah keimah khangin
1Kings8:21 Amah in Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih lai-in amah in i pu i pate tawh a bawl Topa’ thuciamna a omna Thuciamna Singkuang a dingin tua lai-ah mun khat ka bawlsak hi
1Kings8:22 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh a omna Topa’ mai-ah Solomon ding a
1Kings8:23 Amah in
1Kings8:24 Na nasem ka pa David tungah na gensa thu na kipsak hi. Nangmah in na kam tawh na gen a

1Kings8:27 “Ahih hangin leitungah Pasian teng taktak ding ahi hiam? Vantung le vantung a sangpen in nang hong huam zo lo hi. Tua ahih manin keima lamsa hih biakinn in bangzahin nang hong huam zo lo zaw kan ding ahi hiam?
1Kings8:28 Ahi zongin na nasempa’ thungetna le a hong thumna hong don in la
1Kings8:29 ‘Tua lai-ah ka min om ding hi
1Kings8:30 Amaute in hih mun lamah hong nget uh ciangin na mi Israel-te’ hong thumna zong ngai in. Na tenna mun vantung panin hong za inla
1Kings8:31 “Mi khat a vengpa tungah khialin
1Kings8:32 nangmah in vantung panin za-in gamta inla
1Kings8:33 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin galte mai-ah na mi Israel-te a guallelh ciangin
1Kings8:34 vantung panin za-in na mi Israel-te’ khialhna maisak inla
1Kings8:35 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin vantung kikhakcipin guah a zuk loh ciangin
1Kings8:36 vantung panin za-in na mi Israel
1Kings8:37 “Gam sungah kialpi tungin
1Kings8:38 mi khatpeuh ahi a
1Kings8:39 na tenna vantung panin za-in maisak in. Tua ciangin amau’ gamtatna khempeuh tawh kizui-in a lungsim uh na theih bangin amaute tungah pia ciat in (bang hang hiam cih leh nang
1Kings8:40 Tua hileh ka pu ka pate uh tungah na piak leitang tungah a nuntak hun sung khempeuh uh amaute in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi.
1Kings8:41 “Tua mah bangin na mi Israel a hi lo gamdang mi khat nangma min hangin a gamlapi panin hong pai-in
1Kings8:42 (bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lian nangma minthanna le nangma mite a dingin na sepsak na liante’ thu za ding uh hi)
1Kings8:43 na tenna vantung panin za inla
1Kings8:44 “A galte uh a do dingin na mite kuankhia-in
1Kings8:45 amau’ hong thungetna le hong thumna vantung panin za-in amau’ vai huh in.
1Kings8:46 “Amaute nang tungah hong khialin - bang hang hiam cih leh mi a khial lo kuamah om lo hi - amaute tungah nang heh a
1Kings8:47 ahi zongin amaute a kipuak khiatna leitangah amaute in a lungsim uhah thu ngaihsunin kisik kik a
1Kings8:48 amaute manin a puakhia a galte uh leitangah a ngaihsutna khempeuh uh le a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amaute kisik kikin
1Kings8:49 vantung na tenna mun panin amau’ hong thungetna le hong thumna za-in
1Kings8:50 Nang tungah hong khial na mite le nang tunga hong gamtatna uh amau’ thupalsatnate khempeuh maisakin
1Kings8:51 (Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt panin na paikhiatpih
1Kings8:52 Na nasempa’ hong thumna le na mi Israel-te’ hong thumna-ah maipha tawh hong en tawntung inla
1Kings8:53 Egypt panin ka pate uh na paikhiatpih lai-in na nasempa Moses tungtawnin na gen bangin nangma luah ahi dingin leitung mi khempeuh lak panin amaute na tengkhia hi
1Kings8:54 Tu-in Solomon in hih thungetna le thumnate khempeuh Topa’ tungah a bawl khit ciangin
1Kings8:55 Tua ciangin amah dingin awging pha tawh Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha pia-in
1Kings8:56 “Ama hong ciamsa khempeuh tawh kizui-in ama mi Israel-te tungah tawlngakna a pia Topa in thupha ngah ta hen! A nasempa Moses tungtawnin a gensa ama thuciam hoihte khempeuh kam khat zong maimawk lo hi.
1Kings8:57 I pu i pate a ompih mah bangin Topa i Pasian in eite hong ompih hen la
1Kings8:58 Amah in i pu i pate a thupiaksa ahi ama lampi khempeuh a zui ding
1Kings8:59 Topa’ mai-ah ka thumna kammalte sun le zanin Topa i Pasian in hong za hen la
1Kings8:60 Tua hileh mi khempeuh in Topa pen Pasian hi
1Kings8:61 Tua ahih ciangin Topa i Pasian’ tungah na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh thuman unla
1Kings8:62 Tua ciangin kumpipa le amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topa’ mai-ah biakna a pia uh hi.
1Kings8:63 Solomon in thunuama biakna-in Topa’ tungah bawngtal tul sawmnih le tulnih le tuu tul zakhat le tul sawmnih a pia hi. Tua bangin kumpipa le Israel mi khempeuh in Topa’ biakinn a ap uh hi.
1Kings8:64 Tua ni mahin kumpipa in Topa’ biakinn mai-a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le thunuama biakna a thaute a tazo dingin Topa’ mai-a sumngo biakna tau neulua ahih manin tua lai-ah meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le thunuama biakna thaute a pia hi.
1Kings8:65 Tua hi a
1Kings8:66 A ni giat ni-in amah in mite ciahsak hi. Amaute in kumpipa thupha pia uh a

1Kings11:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ muhna-ah Solomon a sia gamta a
1Kings11:7 Tua ciangin Solomon in Jerusalem nisuahna lam mualtungah Moab mite a’ ahi a kihhuai Khemosh le Ammon mite a’ ahi a kihhuai Molek a dingin mualtung a biakna khat a lam hi.
1Kings11:8 Tua mah bangin amah in paknamtui halin a pasian-te uh tungah biakna a pia a gamdang zite khempeuh a dingin hihsak hi.
1Kings11:9 Ama tungah nihvei kilak khinin
1Kings11:10 
1Kings11:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Solomon kiangah
1Kings11:12 Ahi zongin na pa David’ hangin nangma hun sungin ka hih kei ding a
1Kings11:13 Ahi zongin kumpi gam khempeuh ka balkhia kei ding hi. Ka nasempa David hang le ka teelsa Jerusalem hangin na tapa’ tungah minam khat ka pia lai ding hi
1Kings11:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Solomon a langpang ding Edom mi Hadad khangsak hi. Amah pen Edom kumpi innkuansung mi khat ahi hi.
1Kings11:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Edom-ah David a omlai
1Kings11:16 (Bang hang hiam cih leh Joab in Edom sunga pasal khempeuh a suksiat khit matengin amah le Israel-te khempeuh tua lai-ah kha guk sung om uh hi).
1Kings11:17 Ahih hangin Hadad naupangno ahih lai-in
1Kings11:18 Amaute Midian panin dingkhia-in Paran tung uh a
1Kings11:19 Hadad in Faro’ mai-ah maipha lianpi mu a

1Kings11:22 Ahih hangin Faro in ama kiangah
1Kings11:23 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama topa ahi Zobah kumpi Hadadezer kiang panin a tai Eliada tapa Rezon zong Solomon a langpang dingin a khangsak hi.
1Kings11:24 Amah in ama kiimah mi khawmin mite’ na a sut pawl a makai a suak hi. Amaute Damaskas-ah pai-in tua lai munah teng uh a
1Kings11:25 Hadad mah bangin Solomon’ hun sung khempeuh Israel-te a langpangin amah omin siatna a bawl hi. Amah in Israel mite mudah a
1Kings11:26 Solomon’ nasem
1Kings11:27 Amah in kumpipa a lehdona thu hih bang ahi hi: Solomon in Millo lamin a pa David’ khuapi a vangte a hu hi.
1Kings11:28 Jeroboam pen nasep siam mahmah khat hi a
1Kings11:29 Tua hun sungin Jerusalem panin Jeroboam a paikhiat ciangin Shiloh khuami kamsang Ahijah in lampi-ah amah na dawn hi. Ahijah in puan thak khat na silhtawm a
1Kings11:30 Tua ciangin Ahijah in ama tungah a silh a puan thak lenin seh sawm le nih suahin a balkek hi.
1Kings11:31 Tua ciangin amah in Jeroboam kiangah
1Kings11:32 (Ahih hangin ka nasem David le Israel minam khempeuh sung panin ka teelsa khuapi Jerusalem hangin amah in minam khat nei ding hi).
1Kings11:33 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei hong nusia a
1Kings11:34 Ahi zongin ama khutsung panin kumpi gambup ka lakhia kei ding hi. Ka thupiaknate le ka thukhamte a zui
1Kings11:35 Ahih hangin ama tapa’ khutsung panin kumpi gam la-in nangma tungah minam sawm kong pia ding hi.
1Kings11:36 Ahi zongin ka min koih nadingin ka teelsa khuapi Jerusalem-ah ka nasempa David in keima mai-ah suanlekhak a neih tawntung theih nadingin a tapa tungah minam khat ka pia ding hi.
1Kings11:37 Tua ciangin keimah in nang hong la-in na deih khempeuh tungah na uk ding a
1Kings11:38 Ka nasempa David bangin ka thukhamte zuihna tawh nang kong thupiak khempeuh ngai-in
1Kings11:39 Hih thu hangin David’ suanlekhakte ka gimsak ding a
1Kings11:40 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Jeroboam thah dingin zong hi. Ahih hangin Jeroboam dingin Egypt kumpipa Shishak kiangah tai a

1Kings11:42 Jerusalem panin Israel-te khempeuh tungah Solomon in a uk hun kum sawmli sung ahi hi.
1Kings11:43 Tua ciangin Solomon si a
1Kings12:1 Shekhem-ah Rehoboam pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah kumpi a suaksak Israel mi khempeuh Shekhem-ah hong pai uh hi.

1Kings12:3 Tua ciangin amaute in mi sawlin amah sam uh hi. Tua ciangin Jeroboam le a kikhawm khempeuhte hong pai-in Rehoboam kiangah
1Kings12:4 “Na pa in kote hong gimbawlin vangikpi hong suan hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na pa’ nasep haksate le kote tungah a giklua thuhaksate zangsak in. Tua hileh kote in nangma na kong sem ding uh hi

1Kings12:8 Ahih hangin khanghamte in ama tungah ngaihsutna a piakte nusia-in
1Kings12:9 Amah in amaute kiangah
1Kings12:10 Tua ciangin amah tawh a khangkhawm khangnote in ama kiangah
1Kings12:11 Tu-in ka pa in note tungah vangik hong suat banah kong behlap lai ding hi. Ka pa in ciang tawh note hong thuhilh hi. Ahih hangin keimah in ciang lingnei tawh note kong thuhilh ding hi
1Kings12:12 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in
1Kings12:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mite ngawhdawn a
1Kings12:14 khangnote’ ngaihsut piakna tawh kizui-in amaute kiangah thu gen a
1Kings12:15 Tua bangin kumpipa in mite’ deihna zui lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Shiloh khuami Ahijah’ tungtawnin Nebat’ tapa Jeroboam’ tungah a gensa thu a tunsak nadingin Topa in a piansak thu kiheina ahi hi.
1Kings12:16 Kumpipa in amau’ thu a ngaih lohna Israel-te khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin mite in kumpipa dawng uh a
1Kings12:17 Ahih hangin Rehoboam in Judah khuapite sungah a teng Israel mite a uk hi.

1Kings12:19 Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin leilulam Israel-te in David’ suante’ ukna lehdo uh hi.

1Kings15:2 Amah in Jerusalem-ah kum thum sung uk hi. Ama nu’ min Maakah hi a
1Kings15:3 Ama mai-a a pa’ khialhna khempeuh amah in zui hi. A pusawn David a thuman bangin Topa a Pasian’ tungah a lungsim thuman bup lo hi.
1Kings15:4 Ahi zongin David’ hangin Topa a Pasian in Jerusalem-ah amah tapa khat pia a

1Kings15:13 Amah in Asherah milim dingin a kibawl a kihhuai milim khat nei ahih manin kumpinu’ nu hihna panin a pi Maakah zong khinkhia hi. Tua hi a
1Kings15:14 Ahih hangin mualtung a biaknate kilakhia lo hi. Ahi zongin ama hun sung khempeuh Asa’ lungsim Topa’ tungah thuman bup hi.

1Kings17:1 Tu-in Gilead gam sung Tishbe khua panin Tishbe mi Elijah in Ahab kiangah
1Kings17:2 Tua ciangin ama kiangah Topa’ thu hong tung a
1Kings17:3 “Hih lai panin kihemin nisuahna lamah kihei inla
1Kings17:4 Nangmah in lui panin tui na dawn ding hi. Tua lai-ah nangmah a hong vak dingin va-akte thu ka piazo hi

2Kings3:1 Judah kumpi Jehoshafat’ kum sawm le giatna kumin Samaria sung Israel tungah Ahab’ tapa Joram kumpi suak a
2Kings3:2 Ama nu le ama pa zahin a siatloh hangin Topa’ muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi. Amah in a pa’ bawlsa Baal biakna song koihkhia tei a
2Kings3:3 ahi zongin amah in Israel a khialsak Nebat’ tapa Jeroboam’ khialhna mah pomlai hi; tua panin amah kihemkhia lo hi.
2Kings3:4 Moab kumpipa Mesha pen tuu khawi pa ahi hi. Amah in Israel kumpipa tungah kum simin tuuno tul zakhat
2Kings3:5 Ahih hangin Ahab a sih khit ciangin Moab kumpipa in Israel kumpipa lehdo hi.
2Kings3:6 Tua ahih ciangin tua laitakin Samaria panin kumpi Joram kuankhia-in Israel mi khempeuh khawm hi.
2Kings3:7 Tua ciangin amah pai-in Judah kumpi Jehoshafat kiangah thu zasak a
2Kings3:8 Tua ciangin amah in
2Kings3:9 Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpipa le Edom kumpipa tawh Israel kumpipa a kuan hi. Amaute ni sagih sung a kual pai khit uh ciangin galkapte hitaleh amaute a zui ganhingte a’ ding hitaleh tui om lo hi.

2Kings3:11 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in
2Kings3:12 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in
2Kings3:13 Tua ciangin Elisha in Israel kumpipa kiangah
2Kings3:14 Tua ciangin Elisha in
2Kings3:15 Ahi zongin tu-in lasakna a tumsiam khat hong paipih in
2Kings3:16 Tua ciangin amah in
2Kings3:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Huih ahi a
2Kings3:18 Hih pen Topa’ muhna-ah a thuneu khat ahi hi. Amah in Moab mite zong nangma khut sungah hong pia ding a
2Kings3:19 nangmah in kulhpi a nei khuapi khempeuh
2Kings3:20 A zingsang ciangin biakpiak hunin
2Kings3:21 Amaute a sim dingin kumpite a kuantohna thu Moab mite khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin
2Kings3:22 A zing ciang zingsang tungin amaute tho-in
2Kings3:23 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in
2Kings3:24 Ahih hangin Israel-te’ giahphual ah amaute a tun uh ciangin
2Kings3:25 Tua ciangin amaute in khuapite lawnthal uh a
2Kings3:26 Moab kumpipa in a lelhlam a kitheih ciangin
2Kings3:27 Tua ciangin amah in ama tangin a uk ding a ta upa pen la-in kulh tungah meihal biakna-in a pia hi. Israel mite in tua bangin a gamtatna a muh uh ciangin a lungsim uh sukha mahmah a
2Kings4:1 Tu-in kamsang honte sung pan mi khat’ zi Elisha’ tungah kiko-in

2Kings4:3 Tua ciangin amah in
2Kings4:4 Tua ciangin sungtumin
2Kings4:5 Tua ahih ciangin ama kiang panin tua numei paikhia-in amah le a tapate kong kikhaknelh uh hi. Amah in a sun’ laitakin a tapate in ama kiangah a beelte paipih uh hi.
2Kings4:6 Beelte a dim ciangin amah in a tapa khat kiangah
2Kings4:7 Tua nu hong pai-in Pasian’ mipa kiangah a thu teng gen a
2Kings4:8 Ni khat Shunem-ah Elisha paisuak a
2Kings4:9 Tua ciangin tua numei in a pasal kiangah
2Kings4:10 Eite kiangah amah hong pai peuhpeuh ciangin a tuntheih nadingin innkhumzangah kawm a nei inndeineu khat bawlin tua sungah ama a dingin lupna khat
2Kings4:11 Nikhat amah tua lai-ah hong pai-in inndei sungah lutin
2Kings4:12 tua lai-ah tawlnga hi. Tua ciangin amah in a nasempa Gehazi kiangah

2Kings4:15 Amah in
2Kings4:16 Tua ciangin amah in
2Kings4:17 Ahih hangin tua nu in nau paii a
2Kings4:18 Naupang a gol ciangin ni khat a pa kiang anlate lakah a pai hi.
2Kings4:19 Tua ciangin amah in a pa kiangah
2Kings4:20 Amah in domin a nu kiangah a paipih ciangin a ang sungah sun dong naupang tawi a
2Kings4:21 Tua ciangin tua nu paito-in Pasian’ mipa lupna tungah amah koih a
2Kings4:22 Tua ciangin amah in a pasal samin
2Kings4:23 Tua ciangin amah in
2Kings4:24 Tua ciangin amah inla van vawhin a nasempa kiangah
2Kings4:25 Tua ahih ciangin amah ding khia a
2Kings4:26 Amah a dawn dingin thakhatin va tai inla ama kiangah
2Kings4:27 Tua ciangin Pasian’ mipa kiang mualtungah tua nu a tun ciangin tua nu in ama khe len hi. Tua ciangin amah a sawnkhia dingin Gehazi hong pai hi. Ahih hangin Pasian’ mipa in
2Kings4:28 Tua ciangin tua nu in
2Kings4:29 Amah in Gehazi kiangah
2Kings4:30 Tua ciangin naupang’ nu in
2Kings4:31 Gehazi na mapai suakin naupang’ maitang tungah a ciangkhut nga a
2Kings4:32 Inn sungah Elisha hong tun ciangin amah in a lupna tungah a si-in a lum naupang a mu hi.
2Kings4:33 Tua ahih ciangin amah bek lutin kong a kikhaknelh hi. Tua ciangin Topa’ tungah thu ngen hi.
2Kings4:34 Tua ciangin amah paito-in naupang’ tungah bok a
2Kings4:35 Tua ciangin amah dingto kikin inn sungah khatvei vak kawikawi a
2Kings4:36 Tua ciangin amah in Gehazi samin
2Kings4:37 Tua nu hong pai-in ama khe-ah pukin leilakah a kun hi. Tua ciangin a tapa la-in a paikhia hi.
2Kings4:38 Tua gam sungah kialpi a tun laitakin Gilgal-ah Elisha hong paikik hi. Kamsangte ama mai-ah tu-in thu a ngaih laitakin amah in a nasemte kiangah
2Kings4:39 Amaute khat meh zong dingin gamlakah pai a
2Kings4:40 Tua ciangin amaute in mite’ nek dingin hong thukkhia uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in meh a nek laitakun amaute kiko-in
2Kings4:41 Amah in

2Kings4:43 Ahih hangin a nasempa in
2Kings4:44 Tua ciangin amah in amaute mai-ah tua an a lui hi. Tua ciangin amaute in ne uh a
2Kings5:1 Syria kumpipa’ galkap a uk Naaman pen kumpipa’ maipha a ngah ulianpi khat ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama hangin Syria mite gualzawhna pia hi. Amah a thahat a vanglian khat hi a
2Kings5:2 Syria mite in a galsimna khat uhah Israel gam panin numeino khat ciahpih uh a
2Kings5:3 Amah in a tonu kiangah
2Kings5:4 Naaman in hih thu a zak ciangin sungtumin a topa kiangah
2Kings5:5 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa in
2Kings5:6 Amah in Israel kumpipa tungah laikhak keng a
2Kings5:7 Israel kumpipa in a laikhak a sim ciangin amah in a puante balkekin
2Kings5:8 Ahih hangin Israel kumpipa in a puante a balkekna thu Pasian’ mipa Elisha in a zak ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah mi sawlin
2Kings5:9 Tua ahih ciangin a sakolte le a leengte tawh Naaman hong pai-in Elisha’ kongah a khawl hi.
2Kings5:10 Tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah kamtai khat sawlin
2Kings5:11 Ahih hangin Naaman hehin paikhia a
2Kings5:12 Israel tuite khempeuh sangin Damaskas gam a om Abana le Farpar gun tuite hoihzaw hi lo ahi hiam? Tuate’ sungah kisilin siang thei lo ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kihei-in paikhia hi.
2Kings5:13 Ahih hangin a nasemte a nai-ah hong pai-in ama kiangah
2Kings5:14 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian mipa’ kamgen bangin amah paisukin Jordan gun sungah sagihvei kidiah hi. Tua ciangin a cilesa naupangno cilesa bangin a ngei bangkikin amah a siang hi.
2Kings5:15 Tua ciangin Pasian’ mipa kiangah amah le a pawlte khempeuh kileh kikin ama mai-ah ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in
2Kings5:16 Ahih hangin amah in
2Kings5:17 Tua ciangin Naaman in
2Kings5:18 Ahi zongin hih thu-ah Topa in na nasempa a mawhna hong maisak hen: Rimmon biakinn sungah a bia dingin ka topa a pai ciangin zui ding ka hih manin Rimmon biakinn sungah kei ka kunna thu-ah Topa in a nasempa hong maisak hen
2Kings5:19 Amah in ama kiangah
2Kings5:20 Pasian’ mipa Elisha’ nasem Gehazi in
2Kings5:21 Tua ahih ciangin Gehazi in Naaman nungdelh hi. Tua ciangin ama nungah mi khat hong taina Naaman in a muh ciangin amah a dawn dingin a leeng panin kum a

2Kings5:23 Tua ciangin Naaman in

2Kings8:19 Ahi zongin amah in ama tung le a suante tungah ukna a piak ding thu ciam khin ahih manin a nasem David’ hangin Topa in Judah gam susia nuam lo hi.
2Kings8:20 Ama hun sungin Judah gam ukna panin Edom mite lengkhia-in amau a’ ding kumpi khat koih uh hi.

2Kings8:28 Syria kumpipa Hazael tawh gal kido dingin Ahab’ tapa Joram tawh kipawlin Ahaziah a kuan hi. Syria mite in a galkidona mun Ramothgilead-ah Israel kumpi Joram liamsak uh hi.
2Kings8:29 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa Hazael a sim laitakin Syria mite in amah a liamsakna mate Jezreel khua-ah a kidamsak dingin kumpi Joram ciahkik hi. Jezreel-ah Ahab’ tapa Joram a cina-in om ahih manin a veh dingin Judah kumpi Jehoram’ tapa Ahaziah va paisuk hi.

2Kings10:2 “Tu-in hih lai na ngah phetun
2Kings10:3 Na topa uh suante sung pan a hoihpen le a kilawm pen teelin a pa’ kumpi tokhom tungah tusak unla
2Kings10:4 Ahih hangin amaute nakpitakin lau uh a
2Kings10:5 Tua ahih ciangin kumpi inn a ukte le khuapi a ukte in upate le a kemte tawh kigawmin Jehu kiangah mi sawl uh a
2Kings10:6 Tua ciangin Jehu in amaute kiangah laikhak nihna gelhin
2Kings10:7 Amaute kiangah a laikhak a tun ciangin amaute in kumpipa’ suanlekhak tua mihing sawmsagihte that uh a
2Kings10:8 Kamtai pa hong pai-in ama kiangah
2Kings10:9 Zingsangin amah a paikhiat ciangin tua mite khempeuh kiangah
2Kings10:10 Ahab’ innkuan tawh kizomin Topa in a gen thu
2Kings10:11 Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in kuamah a siit nawn loh dongin Jezreel khua sungah Ahab’ innkuan a omlaite

2Kings17:9 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Topa a Pasian uh langpangin a man lo na vaihawm uh hi. Amaute in amau a dingin galvilna bukno a kipan kulh a nei khuapi dongin khuapi khempeuhah mualtung a biakna bawl uh hi.

2Kings17:15 Amaute in ama thukhamte
2Kings17:16 Amaute in Topa a Pasian uh thupiakte khempeuh nusia-in amau a dingin a kisung bawngno lim nih bawl uh hi. Amaute in Asherah milim khat bawl uh a
2Kings17:17 Amaute in biakna-in a tanute uh le a tapate uh halin vankahna le aisanna zang uh a

2Kings17:21 Amah in David suante tung panin Israel gam a balkhiat khit ciangin Israel mite in Nebat’ tapa Jeroboam kumpi-in koih uh hi. Tua ciangin Jeroboam in Topa zuihna panin Israel hawlkhia-in khialhna lianpi amaute bawlsak hi.
2Kings17:22 Israel mite in Jeroboam’ khialhna khempeuh hih uh hi. Kamsangte ahi a nasemte khempeuh tungtawnin a gensa bangin Topa in ama muhna panin Israel a hepkhiat zah dongin tuate panin amaute kihemkhia lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau’ gam panin Assiria-ah tuni dongin Israel-te salin a om uh hi.

1Chronicles5:1 Israel’ tate sung panin Reuben a tacil ahi hi. (Amah in a pa’ zineute khat luppih ahih manin tacil hi napi-in ama innluahza pen Josef’ tungah kipia hi. Tua ahih ciangin innluahza tawh kizui-in khangsimna-ah amah kiciamteh lo hi.
1Chronicles5:2 A sanggamte lakah Judah a thahat suakin ama sung panin ulian khat a om hangin innluahza pen Josef a’ ahi hi.)
1Chronicles5:3 Israel’ tacil Reuben’ tapate: Hanok
1Chronicles5:4 Joel’ suante: A tapa Shemaiah
1Chronicles5:5 a tapa Mikah
1Chronicles5:6 le a tapa Beerah hi a
1Chronicles5:7 Tua ciangin amau’ khangsimna a kiciamteh ciangin a innkuankuanin ama behte: Ukpi Jeiel
1Chronicles5:8 le Joel mite beh sung panin Shema’ tapa Azaz
1Chronicles5:9 Gilead gam sungah amau’ bawngte khangin tampi pha ahih manin Eufratis gun hih lampang sehnel gam lutna ciang dong nisuahna lamah zong a teng uh hi.
1Chronicles5:10 Tua ciangin Saul’ hun lai-in amaute in Hagri mite simin zo uh a

1Chronicles5:12 Ukpi Joel hi-in

1Chronicles5:14 Hihte pen Buz’ tapa Jahdo

1Chronicles5:19 Amaute in Hagri mite

1Chronicles5:21 Amaute in amau’ ganhingte matsak uh hi. A kalaoh uh tul sawmnga
1Chronicles5:22 Tua gal pen Pasian’ gal ahih manin mi tampi tak kithatin puk hi. Tua ciangin amaute sal a suah hun dong uh tua munah teng uh hi.

1Chronicles17:6 Israel mi khempeuh tawh ka painasa mun khempeuhah
1Chronicles17:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka nasempa David kiangah hih bangin na ci ding hi. ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian ahi dingin lonona
1Chronicles17:8 Na paina peuhpeuhah nang tawh kong omkhin a
1Chronicles17:9 Amau’ inn ciatah a ten theih nading le a kinawngkaisak nawn loh nadingin ka mi Israel-te a dingin mun khat sehin amaute ka phut ding hi. Ka mi Israel-te tungah thukhente ka seh a kipanin a nidanga bangin mi ngongtatte in amaute beisak nawn lo ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in na galte khempeuh ka nuaisiah ding hi. 1Chronicles18:5 Zobah kumpi Hadadezer a huh dingin Damaskas a Syria mite hong pai ciangin David in Syria mite tul sawmnih le tulnih that hi.

1Chronicles18:8 Tua ciangin Hadadezer’ khuapite Tibhath le Kun panin David in sumngo tampi tak la hi. Solomon in tuate tawh sumngo tuikuangpi le khuampite le sumngo umlebeelte a bawl hi.

1Chronicles20:3 Tua ciangin amah in tua sunga om mite paikhiatpihin singatnate le tuzumte le heite tawh na a sem dingin a koih hi. Tua bangin Ammon mite’ khuapite khempeuhah David in hih hi. Tua ciangin David le mi khempeuh Jerusalem-ah a ciah uh hi.

1Chronicles27:17 Levi mite a dingin Kemuel’ tapa Hashabiah ahi hi. Aaron mite a dingin Zadok ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:18 Judah mite a dingin David’ sanggamte’ sung panin Elihu ahi hi. Issakhar mite a dingin Mikhael’ tapa Omri ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:19 Zebulun mite a dingin Obadiah’ tapa Ishmaiah ahi hi. Naftali mite a dingin Azriel’ tapa Jeremoth ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:20 Efraim mite a dingin Azariah’ tapa Hoshea ahi hi. Manasseh minam a langte a dingin Pedaiah’ tapa Joel ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:21 Gilead gam sunga Manasseh minam alangte a dingin Zekhariah’ tapa Iddo ahi hi. Benjamin mite a dingin Abner’ tapa Jaasiel ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:22 Dan mite a dingin Jehoram’ tapa Azarel ahi hi. Hihte pen Israel minamte’ makaite ahi uh hi.
1Chronicles27:23 Israel mite vantung aksi zahin a tamin a bawlna ding Topa in thu ciam khin ahih manin David in kum sawmnih le a nuaisiah mite sim lo hi.
1Chronicles27:24 Zeruiah’ tapa Joab in sim ding kipan a
1Chronicles27:25 Kumpipa’ vanmanpha a ukte: Kumpipa’ vanmanpha koihnate-ah Adiel’ tapa Azmaveth ahi hi. Gam sunga vanmanpha koihnate
1Chronicles27:26 Lo khawh nasep a sem mite tungah Khelub’ tapa Ezri ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:27 Leenggui lote tungah Ramah khuami Shimei ahi hi. Leenggui lo panin a piang leenggahzu koihnate tungah Shifmoth khuami Zabdi ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:28 Shefelah gam sunga om oliv le theithek kungte tungah Gederah khuami Baalhanan ahi hi. Sathau koihnate tungah Joash ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:29 Sharon gam sungah a gamta ganhonte tungah Sharon khuami Shitrai ahi hi. Kuam sunga om ganhonte tungah Adlai’ tapa Shafat ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:30 Kalaohte tungah Ishmael mi Obil ahi hi. La a nute tungah Meronoth khuami Jehdeiah ahi hi. Tuuhonte tungah Hagri mi Jaziz ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:31 Hihte khempeuh pen Kumpi David’ neihsa a kemte ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:32 David’ pano Jonathan pen thuthei mi le laithei mi ahih manin thu lamlak pa ahi hi. Amah le Hakmoni’ tapa Jehiel in kumpipa’ tapate cing uh hi.

2Chronicles3:1 Tua ciangin Solomon in Jerusalem sung Moriah Mual tung
2Chronicles3:2 Amah in ama uk a kum lina a kha nihna sungin lam ding kipan hi.
2Chronicles3:3 Pasian’ biakinn lamna ding Solomon’ geelna hih bang ahi hi: A dung pi sawmkua hi a
2Chronicles3:4 Inn mai-a innliim pen inn vai tawh kikimin pi sawmthum sau a
2Chronicles3:5 Amah in taaksan tawh innpi kawm dapin kham hoih tawh zut a
2Chronicles3:6 Amah in suangmanpha phutin a inn zem hi. A kham zatte Parvaim kham ahi hi.
2Chronicles3:7 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a inn
2Chronicles3:8 Tua ciangin amah in siangtho pen mun bawl hi. A dung pen a vai tawh kizui-in pi sawmthum hi a
2Chronicles3:9 A kilhnate a gihna kham shekel sawmnga ahi hi. Tua ciangin amah in a inn dawl tungnungte kham tawh a zut hi.
2Chronicles3:10 Amah in siangtho pen mun sungah sing kherub nih bawlin kham tawh tuate zut hi.
2Chronicles3:11 Tua kherub tegel’ kha a kizalin pi sawmthum ahi hi. A khat’ kha pen pi sagih le alang hi-in inn kawm ban a
2Chronicles3:12 Tua mah bangin a kherub dang khat’ kha langkhat zong pi sagih le alang hi-in inn kawm langkhat ban a
2Chronicles3:13 Hih kherub-te’ khate in pi sawmthum huam hi. Kherub-te amau’ khe-in dingin innpi sunglam nga uh hi.
2Chronicles3:14 Tua ciangin amah in a dum
2Chronicles3:15 Amah in inn mai sanah pi sawmnga le pi nih le alang a sang
2Chronicles3:16 Amah in ngawng a awhte bangin khainiangte bawlin khuampite dawnah khai hi. Tua ciangin amah in mang kawlsing zakhat bawlin khainiangte tungah koih hi.

2Chronicles24:19 Ahi zongin Topa’ lamah amaute a paipih kik dingin amah in amaute lakah kamsangte a puak hi. Hihte in amau’ langkhatah teci pang a
2Chronicles24:20 Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada’ tapa Zekhariah’ sungah Pasian’ kha hong lut hi. Tua ciangin amah dingin mite en sukin mite kiangah
2Chronicles24:21 Ahih hangin amaute in amah sawmsim uh a
2Chronicles24:22 Tua bangin kumpipa Joash in Zekhariah’ pa Jehoiada in ama tungah a lah dikna phawk nawn loin ama tapa thahsak mawk hi. Amah in a sih ding ciangin
2Chronicles24:23 Kum bei ciangin Joash a simin Syria galkapte hong kuanto hi. Judah le Jerusalem-ah amaute hong pai-in mite lak panin ulian khempeuh that uh a

2Chronicles24:25 Amah nakpi tak a liamsa-in nusia-in

2Chronicles25:1 Amaziah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnih le nga pha a
2Chronicles25:2 Topa’ mitah a manin amah gamta a

2Chronicles25:5 Tua ciangin Amaziah in Judah mite khawm a

2Chronicles25:7 Ahih hangin Pasian’ mi khat ama kiangah hong pai-in

2Chronicles26:1 Tua ciangin Judah mi khempeuh in kum sawm le guk a pha Uzziah la-in a pa Amaziah’ tangin kumpi-in a koih uh hi.
2Chronicles26:2 Kumpi ahi ama pa a sih khit ciangin amah in Eloth khua la kikin Judah gam dingin a ngahkik hi.
2Chronicles26:3 Uzziah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm le guk pha a
2Chronicles26:4 A pa Amaziah’ hihsa khempeuh bangin amah in Topa’ mitah a man sem hi.
2Chronicles26:5 Pasian zahtak ding ama tungah a hilh Zekhariah’ hun sungteng amah in Pasian zong hi. Amah in Topa a zon laiteng
2Chronicles26:6 Amah kuankhia-in Filistia mite va sim a
2Chronicles26:7 Filistia mite
2Chronicles26:8 Ammon mite in Uzziah tungah siah puak uh a
2Chronicles26:9 Tua tham loin Uzziah in Jerusalem a Kiu Kongpi le a Kuam Kongpi
2Chronicles26:10 Tua ciangin amah in gamlakah tausangte lam a
2Chronicles26:11 Tua tham loin Uzziah in kumpipa’ khutnuai-ah galkap ukte khat ahi Hananiah’ ukna nuai-ah
2Chronicles26:12 A thahat galkapmang a vekpi-in tulnih le zaguk ahi hi.
2Chronicles26:13 Amaute’ ukna nuai-ah galdona-ah kumpipa a huh dingin thahatna tawh gal a do thei ding galkap tul zanga om hi.
2Chronicles26:14 Uzziah in galkap khempeuh a dingin lumte
2Chronicles26:15 Amah in thaltangte le suang liante lot nadingin tausang omna munte le a kiute-ah koih ding
2Chronicles26:16 Ahih hangin amah a thahat ciangin a siat nadingin a kiphatsakna hong khang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a Pasian tungah amah khial a

2Chronicles26:20 Tua ciangin siampi lian Azariah le siampi khempeuh in amah a et uh ciangin a taltangah phaknatna na nei hi. Tua ciangin amaute in manlang takin amah sawnkhia uh a

2Chronicles28:8 Israel mite in amau’ beh Judah mite lak panin numeite

2Chronicles28:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Edom mite in Judah simkikin zo uh a

2Chronicles29:4 Amah in siampite le Levi mite paipihin nisuahna lam mun awngah amaute khawmin
2Chronicles29:5 amaute kiangah
2Chronicles29:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh i pute i pate citak lo a
2Chronicles29:7 Amaute in innliim kongkhakte zong khakin meivakte sumit uh a

2Chronicles29:11 Ka tate aw
2Chronicles29:12 Tua ciangin Levi mite
2Chronicles29:13 Elizafan’ beh sung panin Shimri le Jeuel; Asaf’ beh sung panin Zekhariah le Mattaniah;
2Chronicles29:14 Heman’ beh sung panin Jehiel le Shimei; Jeduthun’ beh sung panin Shemaiah le Uzziel kipan uh hi.
2Chronicles29:15 Amaute in a sanggamte uh khawmin amau kisiansuah uh a
2Chronicles29:16 A puahsiang dingin Topa’ biakinn sung tawngnungah a siampite lut uh a
2Chronicles29:17 Kha masa a ni masa ni-in amaute in siansuah ding kipan uh a
2Chronicles29:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah kiangah amaute tumin
2Chronicles29:19 Kumpi Ahaz a cihtak loh laitakin ama uk sungin a paihkhiat nazat khempeuh a baihsa-in bawlin ka siansuah uh hi. Topa’ biakna tau mai-ah tu-in tuate om hi
2Chronicles29:20 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah tho baihin khuapi sung zaneite khawmin Topa’ biakinn-ah a paito uh hi.
2Chronicles29:21 Tua ciangin amaute in kumpi gam le biakinn le Judah a dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in bawngtal sagih
2Chronicles29:22 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a bawngtalte go uh a
2Chronicles29:23 Tua ciangin khialhna hanga biakna ding keeltal sagihte kumpipa le a kikhawmte kiangah hong kipaipih a
2Chronicles29:24 tua ciangin Israel khempeuh a dingin pumkhat suahna bawl nadingin siampite in go-in tuate’ sisan tawh biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna a bawl uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel khempeuh a dingin meihal biakna le khialhna hanga biakna a bawl ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi.
2Chronicles29:25 Tua ciangin amah in David le kumpipa’ thumu pa Gad le kamsang Nathan’ thupiakna bangin Topa’ biakinn sungah daltuahte
2Chronicles29:26 David’ lasaknate tawh Levi mite ding uh a
2Chronicles29:27 Tua ciangin biakna tau tungah meihal biakna a kipiakna ding Hezekiah in thu a pia hi. Meihal biakna a kipat ciangin Topa’ tungah lasakna zong kipan a
2Chronicles29:28 A kikhawm khempeuh in Pasian bia-in
2Chronicles29:29 Biakpiakna a kiman ciangin kumpipa le amah tawh a om khempeuhte kunin Pasian a bia uh hi.
2Chronicles29:30 Tua ciangin David’ kammalte le thumu pa Asaf’ kammalte zangin Topa’ tungah phatna la a sak nadingun kumpipa Hezekiah le uliante in Levi mite thu a pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in lungdamna tawh phatna late sa uh a
2Chronicles29:31 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in
2Chronicles29:32 A kikhawmte in a hong paipih meihal biakna a phazah bawngtal sawmsagih
2Chronicles29:33 A ki-ap biaknate bawngtal zaguk le tuu tulthum ahi hi.
2Chronicles29:34 Ahih hangin siampite a mi tawmlua uh ahih manin meihal biaknate khempeuh a vun hawk khin zo lo uh a
2Chronicles29:35 Meihal biakna a tampite banah thunuama biakna thaute
2Chronicles29:36 Pasian in mite a dingin a bawlsak thute hangin Hezekiah le mi khempeuh lungdam uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu thakhatin hong piangvat hi.
2Chronicles30:1 Israel Pasian
2Chronicles30:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa le a uliante le Jerusalem-a a kikhawm khempeuh in Paisan Pawi a kha nihna sungin bawl ding kikum khin uh hi.
2Chronicles30:3 Siampite mi a kicingzah ding amau kisiansuah nai lo uh a
2Chronicles30:4 Hih geelna pen kumpipa le a kikhawm khempeuh a dingin hoih leh kilawm hi.
2Chronicles30:5 Tua ahih ciangin mite hong pai-in Israel Pasian
2Chronicles30:6 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa le a uliante kiang pana laikhakte tawh Israel khempeuh le Judah sungah laikhakte tawh pai uh a
2Chronicles30:7 Note in na theih uh bangin
2Chronicles30:8 Tu-in na pute na pate uh bangin lungkhauh kei unla
2Chronicles30:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uhleh Topa’ lamah note na kilehkik uhleh

2Chronicles30:11 Asher mi
2Chronicles30:12 Topa’ thupiakna tawh kumpipa le uliante’ sawlna a sem dingin Judah mite tungah Pasian in lungsim kikhatna a guan hi.
2Chronicles30:13 Tua ciangin a kha nihna sungin silngo sawh loh anlum pawi a bawl dingin Jerusalem-ah mihon tampi tak hong pai uh hi.
2Chronicles30:14 Amaute nasem dingin kipanin Jerusalem-a biakna taute hemkhia uh a
2Chronicles30:15 Tua ciangin amaute in a kha nihna a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi tuuno go uh hi. Tua ciangin biakna vai-in a siangtho nai lo siampite le Levi mite nakpitakin maizum uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau mah kisiansuahin Topa’ biakinn sungah meihal biaknate hong paipih uh hi.
2Chronicles30:16 Pasian’ mipa Moses’ thukham bangin amaute in amau’ panmun ngei hong la uh a
2Chronicles30:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kikhawm lakah amau mah a kisiansuah nai lo tampi om uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ tungah a siangtho-in a kibawl nadingun a nin khempeuh a dingin Levi mite in Paisan Pawi tuuno a gawh ding uh kisam hi.
2Chronicles30:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi tampi tak
2Chronicles30:19 biakinn sianthona ngeina om bangin lungsim tak tawh nang hong biate khempeuh’ mawhna maisak in
2Chronicles30:20 Tua ciangin Topa in Hezekiah’ thungetna pia-in mite’ mawhna maisak a
2Chronicles30:21 Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah a om Israel mite in lungdamna lianpi tawh ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum pawi a bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite le siampite in a hatna khempeuh uh tawh Topa la sak uh a
2Chronicles30:22 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Topa’ nasepna-ah a siamna hoih uh a lak Levi mite khempeuh tungah hanthotna thu a gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in pawi an ni sagih sung ne uh a
2Chronicles30:23 Tua ciangin adang ni sagih sung mah tua pawi a bawlthuah lai ding uh a kikhawm khempeuh thukim uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in lungdamna tawh adang ni sagih sung mah bawlthuah uh hi.
2Chronicles30:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Hezekiah in biakpiak nadingin a kikhawmte tungah bawngtal tulkhat le tuu tulsagih pia a
2Chronicles30:25 Judah mi a kikhawm khempeuh
2Chronicles30:26 Israel kumpi David’ tapa Solomon hun a kipanin Jerusalem-ah hih bang om ngei lo ahih manin Jerusalem-ah lungdamna lianpi a om hi.
2Chronicles30:27 Tua ahih ciangin siampite le Levi mite dingin mite thupha pia uh a
2Chronicles31:1 Tu-in hihte khempeuh a man ciangin
2Chronicles31:2 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in siampite le Levi mite amau’ nasep ciat tawh kizui-in a khen a khenin seh a
2Chronicles31:3 Kumpipa in ama neihsa sung panin a piakte pen meihal biakna ding ahi hi. Topa’ thukham sungah a kigelh mah bangin zing le nitak a meihal biaknate
2Chronicles31:4 Tua ciangin Topa’ thukham om bangin nasepna-ah siampite le Levi mite a kibuppiak theih nadingun amau’ ngah ding a kilawm nate
2Chronicles31:5 Tua thupiakna a kitheihthang phetin Israel mite in anpalte
2Chronicles31:6 Tua ciangin Judah khuapite sungah a teng Israel mite le Judah mite in zong bawng le tuu sawm-ah-khat le Topa a Pasian uh tungah a kipiasa a ki-ap nate hong paipih uh a
2Chronicles31:7 A kha thumna sungin amaute in tua a lomte cian ding kipan uh a
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiah le uliante hong pai-in a lomte a muh uh ciangin amaute in Topa le ama mi Israel-te thupha a pia uh hi.

2Chronicles31:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Topa’ biakinn sungah inndeite a bawlna ding uh Hezekiah in thu pia a
2Chronicles31:12 Tua ciangin amaute in a piaknate
2Chronicles31:13 Kumpipa Hezekiah le Pasian’ biakinn ukpa Azariah’ sehna tawh Jehiel
2Chronicles31:14 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam kulhkongpi cing pa
2Chronicles31:15 Eden
2Chronicles31:16 Khangsimna-a amau’ kiciamtehna tawh kisai-in a kipia hi tuan loin
2Chronicles31:17 Siampite a beh zui-in nasep kipia hi. Levi mi kum sawmnih le a tungsiahte a khen khenin amau’ panmun tawh kizui-in nasep kipia hi.
2Chronicles31:18 Siampite a naupangte khempeuh
2Chronicles31:19 Amau’ khuapite-a’ ahi taang gam lote-ah a om Aaron’ suan siampite a’ ding ahihleh
2Chronicles31:20 Tua bangin Hezekiah in Judah gam sung khempeuhah hih hi. Amah in Topa a Pasian’ mai-ah a hoih le a manin gamta-in cihtakna tawh a sem hi.
2Chronicles31:21 Amah in Pasian’ biakinn sung nasepna le thukham le thupiaknate tawh kizui-in a hihna-ah ama Pasian zongin
2Chronicles32:1 Hih thute khempeuh le citak a hih banga na a kisep khit ciangin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib hong pai-in Judah simin kulhnei khuapite’ langkhatah phual sat a
2Chronicles32:2 Sennakherib hong pai-in Jerusalem sim ding a sawmna thu Hezekiah in a theih ciangin
2Chronicles32:3 amah in a uliante le a mi thahatte tawh khuapi pualamah a luangkhia tuinakte khakcip ding vaihawm a
2Chronicles32:4 Mi tampi tak kikhawm uh a
2Chronicles32:5 Amah in lungsim khotakin sep ding kipan a
2Chronicles32:6 Amah in mite a uk dingin galdona-ah a ukte koih a
2Chronicles32:7 “Thakhauh unla hang un. Assiria kumpipa le amah tawh a om mihon khempeuh mai-ah lau kei unla
2Chronicles32:8 Amah in mihing thahatna nei a
2Chronicles32:9 Hih thute khit ciangin a galkap khempeuh tawh Lakhish a umcih
2Chronicles32:10 “Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Note in Jerusalem umcihna na nanna ding uh bang suang na hi uh hiam?
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekiah in note kiangah
2Chronicles32:12 Hih Hezekiah mah in mual dawna a biakpiaknate le ama biakna taute lakhia-in Judah le Jerusalem thu pia a
2Chronicles32:13 Keimah le ka pu ka pate in gamdang mi khempeuh tungah ka hihnasate uh thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua gam minamte’ pasian in keima khutsung panin a gam uh honkhiazo ahi uh hiam?
2Chronicles32:14 Na Pasian un keima khutsung panin note hong hotkhiat theih nadingin ka pu ka pate in a suksiatmang tua minamte’ pasian khempeuh lakah kua in a mite honkhiazo ngei ahi hiam?
2Chronicles32:15 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note
2Chronicles32:16 Tua ciangin ama nasemte in Topa Pasian le a nasempa Hezekiah langpangin thu tamzaw gen lai uh hi.
2Chronicles32:17 Tua ciangin amah in Israel Pasian
2Chronicles32:18 Amaute in khuapi a laktheih nadingin khuapi mite lau-in a linglawnsak nadingun kulh tungah a om Jerusalem mite tungah Judah pau tawh nakpitakin kiko uh hi.
2Chronicles32:19 Amaute in
2Chronicles32:20 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah le Amoz’ tapa
2Chronicles32:21 Tua ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa’ giahphual ah a thahat galhang khempeuh le galkap a ukte le uliante a susia vantungmi khat a sawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama gamah maizumna tawh a ciahkik hi. Ama pasian’ inn sungah amah a tun ciangin ama tapate pawlkhat in namsau tawh amah satlum uh hi.
2Chronicles32:22 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib’ khut le ama galte khempeuh panin Hezekiah le Jerusalem-a a tengte honkhia a

Ezra4:10 le a lian a minthang Ashurbanipal in hong puakhia-in Samaria khuapi-ah a hong tensak mite le Eufratis Gun langkhat a kizawhna gam sunga a om mite tung panin lai puak

Ezra4:12 “Nangma kiang panin ko kiangah a hong pai Judah mite
Ezra4:13 Amau’ khuapi kilam kikin kulhte kizo leh amaute in siah ahi a
Ezra4:14 Kote in kumpipa tawh thuciamna kip nei khin ka hih manun kumpipa’ minsiatna ka muh ding uh kilawm lo hi. Tua ahih manin nangma mai-a a semte’ thuciamtehna laibute a ki-etkik theih nadingin kumpipa tungah thu kong zasak uh hi. Thuciamtehna laibu sung en lecin hih khuapi pen a lehdo thei khuapi
Ezra4:15 
Ezra4:16 Hih khuapi kilam kikin a kulhte kizo khin leh Eufratis Gungal gam na uk nawn loh nading thu
Ezra4:17 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a lai uh hih bangin thuk hi: “Menzipipa Rehum
Ezra4:18 “Keima tungah nong khak uh lai pen a kitel takin keima zakna-ah hong kisim khin hi.
Ezra4:19 Keimah in hih thu a kikanna ding thu ka pia a
Ezra4:20 A vanglian kumpite in Jerusalem-ah uk ngei-in
Ezra4:21 Tua ahih ciangin hih mite a nasep uh a khawlna ding thu pia in. Keimah in thu kong piakkik mateng hih khuapi kilamkik lo ding hi.
Ezra4:22 Hih thu tawh kisai-in na sep ding don loin ommawk kei in. Tua hi kei leh kumpi tungah siatna le gimna hong khang ding hi
Ezra4:23 Menzipipa Rehum
Ezra4:24 Tua hun a kipanin Jerusalem-a om Pasian’ biakinn a kisepna a khawl hi. Persia kumpi Darias’ uk a kum nihna dong tua bangin a khawlcip phot hi.
Ezra5:1 Tu-in kamsangte Haggai le Iddo’ suan Zekhariah in Judah gam le Jerusalem-ah a om Judah mite hanthawnin
Ezra5:2 Tua ciangin Shealtiel’ tapa Zerubbabel le Jozadak’ tapa Jeshua
Ezra5:3 Tua laitakin Eufratis Gungal gam sung teng a uk sawn Tattenai
Ezra5:4 Hih biakinn lam nasepna-ah a sem mite’ min zong amaute in dong uh hi.
Ezra5:5 Ahi zongin Pasian in Judah upate huh ahih manin Darias kiangah a thu va tungin ama tung pan thu a kingahkik hun dong a nasep zomna uh kikhaktan lo hi.
Ezra5:6 Eufratis Gungal gam a uk sawn Tattenai
Ezra5:7 Amaute in thuzaksakna lai hih bangin a gelh uh hi: “Kumpi Darias tungah thupha namcin hong tung tahen.
Ezra5:8 “Judah gam
Ezra5:9 “Hih biakinn a kilamkikna ding le a nate a zawh nadingin kua in thu pia hiam
Ezra5:10 Nangmah in a makai teng na theih nadingin amaute’ min zong ka dong uh hi.
Ezra5:11 “Amaute in hih bangin hong dawng uh hi: ‘Kote pen vantung le leitung Pasian’ nasemte ka hi uh a
Ezra5:12 Ahi zongin ka pu ka pate un vantung Pasian hehsakkha uh ahih manin Babylon kumpipa
Ezra5:13 Ahi zongin Babylon kumpipa Sairas’ uk a kum khatna kumin hih Pasian’ biakinn a kilamkikna ding amah in thu pia hi.
Ezra5:14 Tua tham loin Jerusalem-a biakinn sung panin Nebukhadnezzar in la-in Babylon biakinn sunga a koih ahi Pasian’ biakinn sunga om ngeisa kham le ngun kibawl umlebeelte zong kumpi Sairas in Babylon biakinn panin lakhia-in gam ukin a hong koih Sheshbazzar min nei pa tungah ap hi.
Ezra5:15 Kumpipa in ama tungah

Ezra6:4 a kawm pen suang thuap thum le sing thuap khat tawh a kibawl
Ezra6:5 Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinn panin lakhia-in Babylon-ah a hong tunpih Pasian’ biakinn sunga om kham le ngun tawh kibawl umlebeelte zong kipiakik ding hi. Tuate khempeuh Jerusalem biakinn-ah kipuakik ding a

Ezra8:1 Kumpi Artakzaksis’ uk hun sungin Babylon panin kei tawh hong ciahto khawm a behbehin a kiciamteh beh lutangte hih bang ahi hi:
Ezra8:2 Gershom: Finehas-te beh pan ahi hi. Daniel: Ithamar-te beh pan ahi hi. Hattush: David-te beh panin Shekaniah’ tapa ahi hi.
