Nehemiah1:1 Hakaliah’ tapa Nehemiah’ thugen hih bang ahi hi. A kum sawmnihna Khislev kha sungin kumpi khuapi Susa-ah ka om laitakin
Nehemiah1:2 ka sanggampa Hanani le midang pawlkhat Judah gam panin hong tung uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Jerusalem khua thu le sala matna panin a suakta ahi a omsuak Judah mite’ thu tawh kisai amaute kiangah ka dong hi.
Nehemiah1:3 Salsuahna panin a suakta
Nehemiah1:4 Hih thu ka zak ciangin tusukin ka kap niloh a
Nehemiah1:5 Ka thungetna-ah
Nehemiah1:6 Israel mi ahi na nasemte’ tangin sun le zanin kong thunget nilohna a ngai dingin na bil hong ngat inla
Nehemiah1:7 Nangma tungah kong khialkhin uh a
Nehemiah1:8 Na nasem Moses tungah
Nehemiah1:9 Ahi zongin kei kiangah hong ciahkikin ka thupiaknate zui-in na sep uhleh leimong dongah a kithehthangsa na mite uh kaikhawmin keima min om nadingin ka teelnasa munah amaute ka ciahpih ding hi
Nehemiah1:10 Topa aw
Nehemiah1:11 Keima hong thungetna le nangma min a zahtak nuam na nasemte’ thungetna na bil hong ngat in. Tu-in kei tungah maavanna hong pia inla
Nehemiah2:1 Kumpi Artakzaksis’ kum sawmnihna Nisan kha sungin khatvei
Nehemiah2:2 Amah in
Nehemiah2:3 kumpipa ka dawng a
Nehemiah2:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in
Nehemiah2:5 tua khit ciangin kumpipa dawngin
Nehemiah2:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa in (kumpinu a gei-ah tukawmin)
Nehemiah2:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah
Nehemiah2:8 le biakinn hutna ding munmuanhuai kongpi ding
Nehemiah2:9 Tua ahih ciangin Eufratis Gungal gam a uksawn mite kiang ka tung a
Nehemiah2:10 Ahi zongin Israel mite’ phattuamna ding a sem dingin mi khat a paina thu Horonaim khuami Sanballat le Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah in a zak uh ciangin nakpitakin lungkim lo uh hi.
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalem khua ka tun ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga hi.
Nehemiah2:12 Tua ciangin zanin vakkhia-in mi tawmkhat ka tonpih hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem a dingin ka bawlsak ding ka Pasian in ka lungsimah hong suahsak thu kuama kiangah ka gen kei hi. Keima tuanna simloh ganhing dang ka kizuisak kei hi.
Nehemiah2:13 Kuam Kongpi tawnin Gulpi Tuikhuk le Nin Kongpi lamah ka pai a
Nehemiah2:14 Tua ciangin Tuinak Kongpi le Kumpipa’ Bual-ah ka paisuak hi. Ahi zongin ka tuanna ganhing a paisuak theih nading mun om lo hi.
Nehemiah2:15 Tua hi a
Nehemiah2:16 Tua hi a
Nehemiah2:17 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah
Nehemiah2:18 Tua ciangin a dik ka Pasian in kei hong ompihna le kumpipa in kei tungah hong gen thute zong amaute tungah ka gen hi. Tua ciangin amaute in
Nehemiah2:19 Ahi zongin Horonaim khuami Sanballat
Nehemiah2:20 Tua ciangin amaute dawngin
Nehemiah3:1 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa Eliashib le a siampipihte in nasep kipanin Tuu Kongpi a bawl uh hi. Amaute in a khuamte le a zawlte bawlin a kongkhakte bulh uh hi. Amaute in Za Khat Tausang ciang banah Hananel Tausang dong sem uh a
Nehemiah3:2 A zomah Jerikho khua mite in sem uh hi. Amaute’ zomah Imri’ tapa Zakkur in sem hi.
Nehemiah3:3 Tua ciangin Hassenaah’ tapate in Ngasa Kongpi bawl uh hi. Amaute in a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi.
Nehemiah3:4 Amaute’ zomah Hakkoz’ tapa Uriah
Nehemiah3:5 A zom kikah Tekoa khua mite in puah uh a
Nehemiah3:6 Tua ciangin Paseah’ tapa Joiada le Besodeiah’ tapa Meshullam in Jeshanah Kongpi puah uh a
Nehemiah3:7 Amaute’ zomah Gibeon le Mizpah khuami ahi
Nehemiah3:8 Tua zomah khamseek pa Harhaiah’ tapa Uzziel in puah a
Nehemiah3:9 Amaute’ zomah Jerusalem gam phelkhat a uk
Nehemiah3:10 A zomah Harumaf’ tapa Jedaiah in ama inn mai san teng puah hi. Tua ciangin a zomah Hashabneiah’ tapa Hattush in puah hi.
Nehemiah3:11 Harim’ tapa Malkhijah le Pahathmoab’ tapa Hasshub in Meikhuk Tausang a huam khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:12 Amaute’ zomah Jerusalem gam a phelkhat a uk
Nehemiah3:13 Hanun le Zanoah khua-a teng mite in Kuam Kongpi puah uh hi. Amaute in tua kongpi bawlpha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh a
Nehemiah3:14 Bethhakkherem gam a uk
Nehemiah3:15 Mizpah gam a uk
Nehemiah3:16 Ama zomah Bethzur gam phelkhat a uk
Nehemiah3:17 Ama zomah a puah Levi mite: Bani’ tapa Rehum hi a
Nehemiah3:18 Ama zomah a puah a behte: Keilah gam phelkhat a uk
Nehemiah3:19 A zomah Mizpah gam a uk
Nehemiah3:20 Ama zomah Zabbai’ tapa Baruk in a Kiu panin siampi lianpen pa Eliashib’ inn kongkhak ciang dong khawk khat sung puah hi.
Nehemiah3:21 Ama zomah Hakkoz’ tapa Uriah
Nehemiah3:22 Ama zomah Jerusalem kiimnai-a om siampite in puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:23 A zomah Benjamin le Hasshub in amau’ inn mai san puah uh hi. A zomah Ananiah’ tapa Maaseiah
Nehemiah3:24 Ama zomah Henadad’ tapa Binnui in Azariah’ inn panin a Kiu
Nehemiah3:25 le kulh kiu ciang khawk khat sung puah hi. Uzai’ tapa Palal in a Kiu gal san teng le kumpipa’ inn panin hong dawkkhia
Nehemiah3:26 Ama zomah Parosh’ tapa Pedaiah in nisuahna lam manawhin Tui Kongpi gal san ciang le tausang dawk puah hi.
Nehemiah3:27 Ama zomah Tekoa khuamite in a lian tausang dawk panin Ofel mualbo kulh ciang
Nehemiah3:28 Sakol Kongpi tung san teng ahihleh siampite in amau’ inn mai san ciat puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:29 Amaute’ zomah Immer’ tapa Zadok in ama inn mai san puah hi. Ama zomah Nisuahna Kongpi a cing
Nehemiah3:30 Ama zomah Shemaiah’ tapa Hananiah le Zalaf’ tapa gukna Hanun in khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi. Amau zomah Berekhiah’ tapa Meshullam in ama inndei mai san teng puah hi.
Nehemiah3:31 Ama zomah khamseek pa Malkhijah in Kikaihkhopna Kongpi mai sana om biakinn nasemte’ inn le sumbukte’ inn ciang
Nehemiah3:32 Tua ciangin khamseekte le sumbukte in a kiu-a inndei tungnung le Tuu Kongpi kikal a puah uh hi.
Nehemiah4:1 Sanballat in kote’ kulh cianna thu a zak ciangin lungkim loin heh mahmah a
Nehemiah4:2 Amah in a kikholhpihte le Samaria galkapte’ kiangah
Nehemiah4:3 Ama kiangah a om Ammon mi Tobiah in
Nehemiah4:4 Tua ciangin keimah Nehemiah in thu ka ngen a
Nehemiah4:5 Amaute in a langtangin kulh ciangte’ mai-ah nang hong hehsak uh ahih manin amau’ mawhna maisak kei inla
Nehemiah4:6 Tua ahih ciangin kulh ka ciang uh a
Nehemiah4:7 Ahi zongin Sanballat
Nehemiah4:8 Tua hi a
Nehemiah4:9 Tua ahih ciangin ka Pasian uh tungah thu ka ngen uh a
Nehemiah4:10 Tua ciangin Judah gam mite in
Nehemiah4:11 Tua ciangin ka galte un
Nehemiah4:12 Amaute lakah a teng Jew mite khuapi sungah hong pai ciangin
Nehemiah4:13 Tua ahih ciangin kulh nunglam mun niam penna mun awng tengah a namsau uh
Nehemiah4:14 Mite’ launa ka muh ciangin
Nehemiah4:15 Amau’ hong sawmna thu kote in ka phawkna uh le Pasian in amau’ geelna a suksiatna thu ka galte un thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka nasepna ciat uh kulh tungah ka vekpi-un ka kuankik uh hi.
Nehemiah4:16 Tua hun a kipanin ka khutnuai-a om mite kimkhat in na sem a
Nehemiah4:17 Kulh-a cian’ ding na a nawn mite in a khut langkhat uh tawh a van puak uh lenin a khut langkhat uhah galhiam tawi uh hi.
Nehemiah4:18 Kulh ciangte in na a sep kawmun a kawng ciat uhah a namsau uh kuah uh hi. Peengkul tum pa ahihleh keima kiangah om hi.
Nehemiah4:19 Tua ciangin mi liante
Nehemiah4:20 Peengkul kitum na zakna peuhpeuh panun ko kiangah hong kikhawm un. I Pasian in eite a dingin hong dosak ding hi
Nehemiah4:21 Tua hi a
Nehemiah4:22 Tua hun mahin mite kiangah
Nehemiah4:23 Tua ahih ciangin keimah a kipan ka behte
Nehemiah5:1 Tu-in mi nautang numei le pasalte in a Jew mipihte uh tungah lungkim lohna kam hong gingsak uh hi.
Nehemiah5:2 Mi pawlkhatte in an lei nadingin a tanute uh le a tapate uh a piakna thu hong gen uh hi.
Nehemiah5:3 Pawlkhatte in kial tun huhau-in an lei nadingin a lote
Nehemiah5:4 Pawlkhatte in kumpipa tungah siah piak dingin a lote uh le a leenggui lote uh khamin a piakna uh hong gen uh hi.
Nehemiah5:5 Amaute in
Nehemiah5:6 Amaute’ kikona le hih thute ka zak ciangin ka heh mahmah hi.
Nehemiah5:7 Kei zong hih thu limtakin ka ngaihsun a
Nehemiah5:8 “Minam dangte tungah sala kizuaksa i Jew mipihte ahizo zahzahin i tanhkik hi. Tua hinapi-in note in na mipihte uh na zuak uh a
Nehemiah5:9 Tua ciangin keimah in
Nehemiah5:10 Kei le ka behte le ka nasemte in zong an le sum leitawi-in ka piakhia uh hi. Leiba manin mi kilakna phiat ni.
Nehemiah5:11 Tuni mahmahin a lote
Nehemiah5:12 Tua ciangin amaute in
Nehemiah5:13 Tua ciangin kei zong ka puan singin
Nehemiah5:14 Tua tham loin
Nehemiah5:15 Keima hun ma-in a ukte in mite tungah van gikpi suan uh a
Nehemiah5:16 Hih kulh cianna-ah kei mahmah in zong ka sem a
Nehemiah5:17 Kiim le pama minam dangte’ kiang pan hong paite banah
Nehemiah5:18 Nisimin innsung annektawm dinga kibawl bawngtal khat le tuu limci guk ahi hi. Tua mah bangin ak zong kibawl a
Nehemiah5:19 Pasian aw
Nehemiah6:1 Kongpite-ah kongkhak ka bulh nai loh uh hangin
Nehemiah6:2 Sanballat le Geshem zong Ono zanglei sunga om Hakkofirim khua-ah pai-in amaute tawh thu a kikum dingin hong sam uh hi. Hih pen kei hong suksiat nopna uh ahi hi.
Nehemiah6:3 Tua ahih ciangin kei zong amaute kiangah kamtaite ka sawl a
Nehemiah6:4 Amaute in tu-a bangmahin livei tak hong sam uh a
Nehemiah6:5 Tua bangmahin Sanballat in a ngaveina hong sam a
Nehemiah6:6 A laikhak sungah
Nehemiah6:7 Judah gam in kumpi khat nei ta hi
Nehemiah6:8 Tua ciangin keimah in
Nehemiah6:9 Kote in ka hanciamna uh khiamin nasep a kizawh loh nading deihna tawh amaute in kote hong lausak theih nading uh a hanciam uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka hahkat semsem zaw uh hi.
Nehemiah6:10 Mehetabel’ tapa Delaiah
Nehemiah6:11 Ahih hangin keimah in
Nehemiah6:12 Tua ciangin a thusim ka phawkkhia hi. Pasian in tua bang thu a gen dingin amah a sawl hi lo a
Nehemiah6:13 Ama thugen bangin gamta-in mawhna ka bawl theih nadingin keimah hong lausak nadingin a kicial ahi hi. Tua bangin zuikha leng kei hong minsia sakin hong simmawh ding uh hi.
Nehemiah6:14 Ka Pasian aw
Nehemiah6:15 Elul kha ni sawmnih le nga ni-in kulh kizo a
Nehemiah6:16 Ka galte un hih thu za-in
Nehemiah6:17 Hih hun sungteng khempeuh Jew uliante in Tobiah kiangah lai tampi khak uh a
Nehemiah6:18 Tobiah pen Arah’ tapa Shekaniah’ makpa hi a
Nehemiah6:19 Amaute in ama hoihnate zong keima zak-ah hong gen uh a
Nehemiah7:1 Kulh kiciang khinin
Nehemiah7:2 ka sanggampa Hanani le biakinn a uk Hananiah in a et dingin Jerusalem ka pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hananiah pen midang tampi sangin a citakzaw
Nehemiah7:3 Tua hi a
Nehemiah7:4 Khuapi lianin zai a
Nehemiah7:5 Tua ciangin uliante
Nehemiah7:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a zawhna gam panin salin a lak mite sung panin hih mite pen Zerubbabel
Nehemiah7:7 
Nehemiah7:8 Parosh suante - mi tulnih zakhat sawmsagih le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:9 Shefatiah suante - mi zathum sawmsagih le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:10 Arah suante - mi zaguk sawmnga le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:11 Pahathmoab-te beh sung panin Jeshua le Joab suante - mi tulnih zagiat le sawm le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:12 Elam suante - mi tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:13 Zattu suante - mi zagiat sawmli le nga ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:14 Zakkai suante - mi zasagih sawmguk ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:15 Binnui suante - mi zaguk sawmli le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:16 Bebai suante - mi zaguk sawmnih le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:17 Azgad suante - mi tulnih zathum sawmnih le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikam suante - mi zaguk sawmguk le sagih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:19 Bigvai suante - mi tulnih sawmguk le sagih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:20 Adin suante - mi zaguk sawmnga le nga ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:21 Ater a kici Hezekiah’ suante - mi sawmkua le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:22 Hashum suante - mi zathum sawmnih le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:23 Bezai suante - mi zathum sawmnih le li ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:24 Harif suante - mi zakhat sawm le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeon suante - mi sawmkua le nga ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlehem le Netofah khuami - zakhat sawmgiat le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:27 Anathoth khuami - zakhat sawmnih le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:28 Bethazmaveth khuami - sawmli le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriathjearim
Nehemiah7:30 Ramah le Geba khuami - zaguk sawmnih le khat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:31 Mikmash khuami - zakhat sawmnih le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:32 Bethel le Ai khuami - zakhat sawmnih le thum ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo adang khat khuami - sawmnga le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:34 Elam adang khat suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:35 Harim khuami - zathum sawmnih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:36 Jerikho khuami - zathum sawmli le nga ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:37 Lod
Nehemiah7:38 Senaah khuami - tulthum zakua sawmthum ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:39 Siampite sung panin: Jeshua-te beh panin Jedaiah suante - zakua sawmsagih le thum ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:40 Immer suante - mi tulkhat sawmnga le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:41 Pashhur suante - mi tulkhat zanih sawmli le sagih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:42 Harim suante - mi tulkhat sawm le sagih ahi uh hi.
Nehemiah7:43 Levi mite sung panin: Hodevah-te beh panin Jeshua suante le Kadmiel suante - sawmsagih le li ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:44 Lasate sung panin Asaf suante - mi zakhat sawmli le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:45 Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante
Nehemiah7:46 Biakinn nasemte sung panin a hong ciahkikte: Ziha suante

Nehemiah7:58 Jaala suante
Nehemiah7:59 Shefatiah suante
Nehemiah7:60 Biakinn nasemte le Solomon’ nasemte’ suanlekhakte mi a vekpi-in zathum sawmkua le nih a pha uh hi.
Nehemiah7:61 Temelah
Nehemiah7:62 Delaiah suante
Nehemiah7:63 Siampite’ sung panin zong: Hobaiah suante
Nehemiah7:64 Hih mite in khang ciaptehna sungah a kiciamteh mite lakah amau’ min a zon uh hangin mu lo uh ahih manin amaute a siang loin seh uh a
Nehemiah7:65 Tua hi a
Nehemiah7:66 Mi a vekpi-in tul sawmli tulnih zathum sawmguk pha a
Nehemiah7:67 amaute’ nasem numei le pasal tulsagih zathum sawmthum le sagihte kisim lo lai hi. Tua banah amaute in lasa numei le pasal zanih sawmlinga nei uh hi.
Nehemiah7:68 Amau’ sakol zasagih sawmthum guk
Nehemiah7:69 a kalaoh uh zali sawmthum nga
Nehemiah7:70 Beh lutang mi pawlkhat in nasep nadingin nate pia uh hi. Gam ukpa in vanmanpha koihna-ah kham darik tulkhat
Nehemiah7:71 Tua ciangin beh lutang pawlkhatte in vanmanpha koihna-ah kham darik tul sawmnih le ngun mina tulnih zanih a pia uh hi.
Nehemiah7:72 Tua ciangin midangte’ piakte pen kham darik tul sawmnih
Nehemiah7:73 Tua ciangin siampite
Nehemiah8:1 Kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amau’ khuapi ciatah teng khin uh hi. Tua ciangin Tui Kongpi mai tualpi-ah mi khempeuh khekhat khai bangin hong kikhawmtuah diam hi. Tua ciangin Topa in Israel mite tungah a piak ahi Moses thukham laibu pen laithei pa Ezra in hong paipih nadingin a gen uh hi.
Nehemiah8:2 Tua hi a
Nehemiah8:3 Tua ciangin amah in Tui Kongpi mai-a om tualpi lam mai ngatin zingsang tung a kipan sun ciang dong
Nehemiah8:4 Tua ciangin thugenna dinga sing tawh kibawl tau tungah laithei pa Ezra dingto a
Nehemiah8:5 Mi khempeuh sangin a sangzaw munah amah om ahih manin mi khempeuh’ muh theih dingin Ezra in a laibu a hong hi. A laibu a hon ciangin mi khempeuh a ding uh hi.
Nehemiah8:6 Tua ciangin Ezra in a lian Pasian
Nehemiah8:7 Mite amau’ omna san ciatah a om sungun mite in thukham a tel theih nadingun Levi mi Jeshua
Nehemiah8:8 Amaute in Pasian’ thukham laibu sung panin a kitel takin sim uh a
Nehemiah8:9 Tua ciangin a gam ukpa Nehemiah
Nehemiah8:10 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah
Nehemiah8:11 Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in mite gamdaisak a
Nehemiah8:12 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh anne tuidawnin midangte a kholh ding le lungdam a om dingin a ciah uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah a kigen thute amaute in a theitel uh hi.
Nehemiah8:13 A ni nih ni-in thukham sin dingin siampite le Levi mite tawh beh lutang khempeuh laithei pa Ezra kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi.
Nehemiah8:14 Tua ciangin
Nehemiah8:15 
Nehemiah8:16 Tua ahih ciangin mite kuankhia-in tua singhiangte hong pua-in amau’ innkhumzang ciat
Nehemiah8:17 Tua hi a

Nehemiah9:1 Tua kha mah a ni sawmnih le li ni-in an tang dingin Israel mite kikhawm uh a
Nehemiah9:2 Tua hi a
Nehemiah9:3 Tua ciangin amau’ omna mun ciat uhah dingin Topa amau’ Pasian’ thukham laibu nai thum sung sim uh a
Nehemiah9:4 Levi mite’ kahlei tungah Jeshua
Nehemiah9:5 Tua ciangin Levi mi Jeshua
Nehemiah9:6 Nang bek Topa na hi hi. Nangmah in a sang pen vantung le vana om khempeuh
Nehemiah9:7 Nang pen Abram teelin Khaldea gam Ur khuapi panin paikhiatpihin Abraham min a phuak Pasian
Nehemiah9:8 Nangma tungah amah a cihtakna na mu a
Nehemiah9:9 “‘Nangmah in Egypt gam sunga ka pute ka pate uh’ gimna mu-in San Tuipi-ah hong kikona uh na za a
Nehemiah9:10 amaute in ka pu ka pate uh kihihsakna tawh a hih gawpna thei na hih manin Faro le a nasemte le a gammi khempeuh langpangin lim le na lamdang na bawl hi. Tua hi a
Nehemiah9:11 Amaute’ mai-ah tuipi phelkham na hih manin tuipi laizang lei keu tungah amaute paisuak uh a
Nehemiah9:12 Sunin meii khuam khat tawh amaute lam na lak a
Nehemiah9:13 Sinai Mual tungah kumsukin
Nehemiah9:14 na nasempa Moses tungtawnin amaute tungah na Sabbath siangtho na theisak a
Nehemiah9:15 A gilkialna uh a vahsak dingin vantung panin an na pia a
Nehemiah9:16 “‘Ahi zongin kote’ pute pate kihisakin lungkhauh uh a
Nehemiah9:17 Amaute in thu mang nuam lo uh a
Nehemiah9:18 Amaute in a kisung bawngno khat amau mah a dingin bawlin
Nehemiah9:19 nang in na hehpih mahmah manin amaute gamlakah na nusia kei hi. Sunin lam a lak meii khuam in amaute nusia lo a
Nehemiah9:20 Amaute hoihtakin thu na hilh a
Nehemiah9:21 Kum sawmli tawntung gamlakah amaute na vak a
Nehemiah9:22 Nangmah in amaute tungah kumpi gamte le mite na pia a
Nehemiah9:23 Nangmah in amau’ suanlekhakte vana aksi zahin simzawh lohin na tamsak a
Nehemiah9:24 A suan a khakte uh tua gamah lutin a lak uh ciangin
Nehemiah9:25 Tua hi a
Nehemiah9:26 “‘Ahi zongin amaute in demnopna lungsim nei-in nang hong lehdo uh hi. Amaute in na thukham nungngat uh a
Nehemiah9:27 Hih thu hangin a galte uh khut sungah amaute na ap a
Nehemiah9:28 Ahi zongin a tawldam khit uh ciangin nangma muhna-ah a sia gamta zel uh a
Nehemiah9:29 Tua hi a
Nehemiah9:30 Kum tampi sung lungduaina tawh amaute na thuak a
Nehemiah9:31 Ahi ta zongin na hehpihna lian hangin amaute beisak loin
Nehemiah9:32 “‘Tua ahih ciangin tu-in a lian
Nehemiah9:33 Kote tungah hong tungsa thu khempeuhah nang a thutang na hi a
Nehemiah9:34 Ka kumpite uh
Nehemiah9:35 Amaute tungah na piak gamzai lei hoihah omin
Nehemiah9:36 Tu-in kote sal ka hi uh hi. Ka pu ka pate un a leitang pana piangte ne-in a na hoih khempeuhte nuamtakin a ngah nadingun na piak gam hih lai munah kote sal ka hi ta uh hi.
Nehemiah9:37 Tu-in leitang tunga piang khempeuh pen kote’ mawhna hangin kote’ tungah nong koih kumpite tungah tung ta hi. Tua kumpite in kote tungah thu hong nei-in
Nehemiah9:38 Hih thute khempeuh hangin a kip thuciamna khat bawlin lai-in ka gelh uh a

Nehemiah10:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh biakinn umlebeelte a kikoihna inndeite le na a sem siampite

Nehemiah12:36 le ama behte Shemaiah
Nehemiah12:37 Tuinak Kongpi panin kulh kahtohna David khuapi kahlei-ah paito-in
Nehemiah12:38 Lungdamna a ko a pawldang khat pen veilam manawhin pai uh a
Nehemiah12:39 tua panin Efraim Kongpi
Nehemiah12:40 Tua hi a
Nehemiah12:41 Tua ciangin siampi Eliakim
Nehemiah12:42 Maaseiah
Nehemiah12:43 Pasian in nakpitakin amaute lungdamsak ahih manin amaute in tua ni-in biakpiakna lian tampi pia-in lungdam uh a
Nehemiah12:44 Tua ciangin khuapite’ kiimah lo omte panin a golna le a neuna tawh kizui-in siampite le Levi mite a dingin thukham sunga om bangin a kaihkhop ding uh a kipia nate
Nehemiah12:45 Tua hi a
Nehemiah12:46 Bang hang hiam cih leh David’ hun lai-in lasate a ukpi le phatna le lungdamkohna a makai-in Asaf om hi.
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubbabel le Nehemiah’ hun lai-in Israel mite khempeuh in lasate le kongcingte a dingin a nisim tanh uh pia uh a
Nehemiah13:1 Tua ciangin amaute in mipi’ zakin Moses’ laibute sim uh a
Nehemiah13:2 bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in anletui tawh Israel mite na dawn lo uh a
Nehemiah13:3 Mite in hih thukham a zak uh ciangin Israel mite lak panin gamdang suan peuhmah khenkhia uh hi.
Nehemiah13:4 Ahi zongin tua hun ma-in
Nehemiah13:5 Levi mite
Nehemiah13:6 Babylon kumpipa Artakzaksis in a uk kum sawmthum le nihna kumin ama kiangah pai ka hih manin hih thu a pian’ laitakin Jerusalem-ah ka om kei hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin kumpipa kiangah a khuan ka ngen a
Nehemiah13:7 Jerusalem-ah ka ciahkik hi. Tua ciangin Tobiah a dingin Pasian’ biakinn huang sungah inndei khat a vaihawmsakna thu
Nehemiah13:8 Hih thu-ah lungkim het lo ka hih manin inndei sung panin Tobiah’ van teng ka lawnkhia hi.
Nehemiah13:9 Tua ciangin tua inndei a siansakna ding uh
Nehemiah13:10 Levi mite’ ngah dingte amau’ tungah kipia lo ahih manin Levi mite le lasate in a nasep ngeite uh nusia-in a lote uhah na a sepna uh zong ka phawkkhia hi.
Nehemiah13:11 Tua ahih ciangin uliante tungah ka lungkim kei a
Nehemiah13:12 Tua ciangin Judah mite khempeuh in an
Nehemiah13:13 Tua ciangin tua vankoihna innte a kem dingin siampi Shelemiah
Nehemiah13:14 Ka Pasian aw
Nehemiah13:15 Tua hun lai-in Judah gam sungah mite in Sabbath ni-in leenggah sukin
Nehemiah13:16 Jerusalem khuasunga teng Taia khuamite in zong ngasa le van namkim hong paipihin Judah mite tung le Jerusalem khua sungah Sabbath ni-in zuak uh hi.
Nehemiah13:17 Tua ciangin Judah uliante tungah lungkim loin amaute kiangah
Nehemiah13:18 Na pu na pate uh tu-a bang teekin a gamtat manin eite tung le hih khuapi tungah hih bang siatna khempeuh hong tung hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hinapi-in note in Sabbath ni nitsakna tawh Israel tungah hehna tamzaw na tungsak uh hi
Nehemiah13:19 Tua hi a
Nehemiah13:20 Tua ahih manin sumbukte le na nam tuamtuam a zuakte
Nehemiah13:21 Ahi zongin amaute hilhkholin amaute kiangah
Nehemiah13:22 Tua ciangin Sabbath ni a siangtho-in a omsak theih nadingun amaute kisiansuah tawmin kongpite hong cin nadingun Levi mite ka sawl hi. Ka Pasian aw
Nehemiah13:23 Tua hun lai mahin zong Judah mite in Ashdod numei
Nehemiah13:24 le a tate uh kimkhat in Ashdod kampau a zatna
Nehemiah13:25 Amaute taigawpin ka samsia a
Nehemiah13:26 Israel kumpipa Solomon zong tua bang numeite’ hangin khial hi lo ahi hiam? Minam tampite lakah amah tawh a kibang kumpi khat zong om lo a
Nehemiah13:27 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon aw
Nehemiah13:28 Siampi lianpen pa Eliashib’ tapa Jehoiada’ tapate khat pen Horonaim khuami Sanbalat’ makpa na hi hi. Tua ahih manin keima kiang panin amah ka hawlkhia hi.
Nehemiah13:29 Ka Pasian aw
Nehemiah13:30 Tua bangin gamdang tawh a kizom nate khempeuh panin amaute ka siangsak a
Nehemiah13:31 Tua ciangin a kiseh hunin zat dingin cih ding sing tawh biakna le anpal tawh biakna ding ka vaihawmsak hi. Ka Pasian aw
Esther1:1 Hih lai-a kigelh thupiangte pen India gam panin Ethiopia gam dong
Esther1:2 Hih hun laitakin kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi sunga kumpi tokhom tungah amah tu hi.
Esther1:3 Ama uk a kum thumna kumin ama nuai-a a uliante khempeuh le a nasemte a dingin pawi khat bawlsak hi. Ama khutnuai-a om Persia le Media galkapmangte le ama nuai-a uliante le ama nuai-ah gam a uksawnte a om laitakin
Esther1:4 a kumpi gam hauhna le ama thupi ziazuana ni tampi sung
Esther1:5 Hih pawi hun a bei khit ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga om milian mineu mi khempeuh a dingin kumpipa in pawi khat a bawl hi. Tua pawi pen kumpi inn huang sungah kibawl a
Esther1:6 Tua huang sungah suangkang khuamte kiphut a
Esther1:7 Kham hai nam tuamtuamte tawh zu kihawm a
Esther1:8 Tua lai-ah zu nekna zia pen kihah piak cih om lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh in amau’ duh zahzah bek a neksakna ding uh kumpipa in a nuai-a a uliante thu pia hi.
Esther1:9 Tua banah Kumpinu Vashti in zong numeite a dingin Kumpipa Ahasueras’ innsung mahah pawi khat a bawl hi.
Esther1:10 A ni sagih ni
Esther1:11 
Esther1:12 Ahih hangin Kumpinu Vashti in innsungmangte’ thupuak kumpipa’ sapna a nial hi. Hih a nialna thu-ah kumpipa heh mahmah a
Esther1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in upadi siam a mipilte thu dong hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh upadi le biakna lam thutheite khempeuh thu dot pen kumpipa’ zat ngei khat ahi hi.
Esther1:14 Ama gei nai penah a tu mite pen Persia le Media gam ulian sagihte ahi Karshena
Esther1:15 “Innsung mangte’ tungtawnin keimah kumpi Ahasueras’ thupiakna bangin Kumpinu Vashti gamta lo ahih manin Kumpinu Vashti tungah upadi tawh kizui-in bangci kihih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
Esther1:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa le uliante’ zakin Memukan in dawng a
Esther1:17 Kumpinu’ gamtatna thu numei dangte khempeuh in thei ding uh a
Esther1:18 Hih banga kumpinu’ gamtatna thu a za Persia le Media gam numei liante in kumpipa nuai-a uliante tungah tuni mahmahin hih thu gen ding uh a
Esther1:19 Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh
Esther1:20 Tua banga kumpipa’ thupiakna thu kumpi gam sung khempeuhah a kizak ciangin numei khempeuh in a neu a lian amau’ pasal ciat zahtak ding uh hi
Esther1:21 Kumpipa le uliante in hih ngaihsutna hoihsa uh a
Esther1:22 Pasal khempeuh pen ama innsung ukpa ahihna ding le ama kampau a kizuih kim nadingin kumpipa’ ukna gam khempeuhah amau’ lai ciat
Esther2:1 Hih thu teng a pian’ khit
Esther2:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ nasemte in ama kiangah
Esther2:3 Kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi-a numeite’ omna-ah a melhoih nungak khangno khempeuh hong paipih nadingun na ukna gam tuamtuam khempeuhah uliante sawl in. Tua numeite pen numeite a uk
Esther2:4 Tua sung panin kumpipa’ deih bel nungak pen Vashti’ tangin kumpinu suak hen
Esther2:5 Tu-in kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah Benjamin minam Kish
Esther2:6 Amah pen
Esther2:7 Amah in a innlak pate khat’ tanu
Esther2:8 Kumpipa’ thupiakna kithei kimin
Esther2:9 Amah in tua nungak hoihsa-in pakta mahmah ahih manin paknamtuite le a annek ding pia pah a
Esther2:10 Mordekai in kham ahih manin Esther in ama namlephung genkhia lo hi.
Esther2:11 Esther bangci om a
Esther2:12 Numeite a kigin’ hun a vekpi-in kha sawm le nih sung hi a
Esther2:13 Kiginkholhna hun cing a
Esther2:14 Nitakin kumpipa kiangah va pai a
Esther2:15 Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak a innlak pa Abihail’ tanu Esther pen kumpipa kiangah a pai ding hun a tun ciangin
Esther2:16 Ama uk a kum sagihna
Esther2:17 kumpipa in ama numei dangte khempeuh sangin itzaw a
Esther2:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Esther pahtawina-in ama uliante le a nasem khempeuh a dingin pawi lianpi khat a bawl hi. Amah in ama ukna gam khempeuhah tua ni nasep khawlin zum a khakna ding uh zong thu zasak kim a
Esther2:19 Tua hun sungin Mordekai in kumpi nasep a ngah hi.
Esther2:20 Ama hilhna tawh kizui-in Esther in ama minam ahi a
Esther2:21 Ni khat
Esther2:22 Hih thu Mordekai in phawkin Kumpinu Esther kiangah ko a
Esther2:23 A thu kikanin a manna a kitheih ciangin khuampite tungah tua mi nih tegel kikhailum hi. Hih thupiangte khempeuh kumpipa’ theihin Kumpi Gam Tangthu Laibu sungah kiciamteh hi.
Esther3:1 Hih thute khit ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Agag-te beh Hammedatha’ tapa Haman a za khangsak a
Esther3:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpi huang sunga om kumpipa’ nasem khempeuh in Haman zahtak bawlin ama mai-ah kun uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua banga a hih ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi. Ahih hangin Mordekai pen amah zahtakna limin a mai-ah kun lo hi.
Esther3:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ huang sunga om kumpipa’ nasemte in Mordekai kiangah
Esther3:4 Nisimin amaute in Mordekai kiangah gengen uh a
Esther3:5 Ama mai-ah Mordekai a kun lohna
Esther3:6 Amah in Mordekai’ mipihte a theih ciangin amah bek suktaak sa lo a
Esther3:7 Kumpi Ahasueras’ uk a kum sawm le nihna
Esther3:8 Tua ciangin Haman in Kumpipa Ahasueras’ kiangah
Esther3:9 Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh amaute a kisuksiatna ding thu pia-in lai-in gelh in. Tua hileh nangma sumkholna sungah koih dingin na khutnuai-a na uliante tungah ngun talen tul sawm ka pia ding hi
Esther3:10 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ama khutsung panin a minthuhna zungbuh suahin Jew mite’ gal
Esther3:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah
Esther3:12 A kha masa a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipa’ lai-atte khempeuh kisam a
Esther3:13 Tua bangin kumpipa’ ukna gam khempeuhah laitaite kipiasak a
Esther3:14 Tua a ni seh ni-in amaute a baihsa-in a om theih nadingun hih thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuhah dal khat ciat kipuakin tua thu pen a gam sung mi khempeuh tungah a kizasak kim ding ahi hi.
Esther3:15 Kumpipa’ thupiakna tawh laitaite kinawh sawl a
Esther4:1 Mordekai in hih thupiang teng a theih ciangin a puan balkekin puanhampi silhin vut kibuak a
Esther4:2 Puanhampi silh kawmpi-in kongpi-ah kuamah kilutsak lo ahih manin kumpi inn kongpi panin a kimuhna mun ciangah pai hi.
Esther4:3 Kumpipa’ thupiakna a tunna gam Jew mite’ omna khempeuhah nakpi taka thumna le tauna
Esther4:4 Esther’ nasem numeite le a innsungmangte hong pai-in ama kiangah tua thu a gen ciangun kumpinu in lamdangsa mahmah hi. A puanhampi a laih nadingin amah in Mordekai a’ ding puante khak a
Esther4:5 Tua ciangin Esther in ama na a sem dingin a kiseh
Esther4:6 Kumpi inn kongpi mai-a om khuapi kongzing tualpi a om Mordekai kiangah Hathak va pai a
Esther4:7 Mordekai in ama tunga thupiangte khempeuh le Jew mite sukmang nadingin kumpipa’ sumkholna-ah Haman in piak dinga a sum ciamzah thute khempeuh ama kiangah na gen hi.
Esther4:8 Amaute a kisukmang nadingin Susa khua panin a kihawmkhia lai dal khat zong Mordekai in ama tungah pia a
Esther4:9 Hathak zong ciahin Mordekai’ thugen teng Esther kiangah va gen hi.
Esther4:10 Tua ciangin Esther in Hathak mah sawlkikin Mordekai’ tungah thu zasak a
Esther4:11 “Numei ahi a
Esther4:12 Tua hi a
Esther4:13 Tua ciangin Mordekai in Esther a dawnkikna thu amahmah puasakkik a
Esther4:14 Hih bang hunin bangmah hih loin na omcip leh
Esther4:15 Tua ciangin Esther in Mordekai a dawnna lai amah puasak leuleu a
Esther4:16 “Pai-in Susa khua sunga om Jew mi khempeuh khawm inla
Esther4:17 Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai pai-in Esther’ sawl bang teekteekin a gamta hi.

Esther8:1 Tua ni mahin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Jew mite’ gal ahi Haman’ neihsa khempeuh Kumpinu Esther tungah pia hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa’ omna-ah Mordekai hong tung hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah tawh a kinaina zia
Esther8:2 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman’ tung panin a lakkiksa minthuhna zungbuh pen suahkhia-in Mordekai a pia hi. Tua hi a
Esther8:3 Kumpipa’ mai-ah Esther khatvei va paikikin khitui naptui tawh a khe mai-ah va puk a
Esther8:4 Kumpipa in Esther’ lamah a kham ciangkhut na zan a
Esther8:5 tua ciangin Esther thoto-in kumpipa mai-ah dingin
Esther8:6 Ka mipihte tungah hih siatna lianpi a tung ka muh ding bangci thuakzawh ding ka hi hiam? Ahih kei le ka innkuanpih tungah a tung hih siatna ka muh ding bangci thuakzawh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi.

Esther9:1 A kha sawm le nihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipa’ thupiakna bangin sepkhiatna ding hun hong tung hi. Jew mite’ galte in gualzo dinga a ki-up ni teek pen amau a mudah mite’ tungah Jew mite a gualzawh ni ding hong hizaw hi.
Esther9:2 Tua ni-in amaute’ siatna ding a geelte a sugawp dingin Kumpipa Ahasueras’ ukna gam khempeuha amau’ khuapite sungah Jew mite kikhawm uh hi. Mi khempeuh in Jew mite kihta uh ahih manin kuamah in Jew mite nang ngam lo uh hi.
Esther9:3 Mordekai kihta uh ahih manin gam tampi a ukte le gam khat a ukte le gam sunga ulian tuamtuamte le kumpi ulian khempeuh in Jew mite panpih uh hi.
Esther9:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpi inn sungah Mordekai ulianpi khat suak a
Esther9:5 Tua ahih ciangin Jew mite in namsau tawh a galte uh tampi tak thatlum uh a
Esther9:6 Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sung mahmahah Jew mite in mi zanga thatin susia uh hi.
Esther9:7 Tua hi a
Esther9:8 
Esther9:9 
Esther9:10 
Esther9:11 Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga a kithat zah tua ni mahmahin kumpipa kiangah kizasak hi.
Esther9:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Kumpinu Esther kiangah
Esther9:13 Tua ciangin Esther in
Esther9:14 Tua ahih manin tua banga a hih nadingin kumpipa in a sawl hi. Susa khuapi sungah hih thu suakkhiasak a
Esther9:15 Susa khuapi sunga om Jew mite Adar kha a ni sawm le li ni-in kikhawm kikin Susa khua sungah mi zathum that uh hi. Ahi zongin amau’ neihsate suksak lo uh hi.
Esther9:16 Tua mah bangin kumpipa’ ukna gam tuamtuama om Jew mite zong amau’ kihut nadingin kikhawm uh hi. Amaute in zong amau a mudah mihing tul sawmsagih le tulnga thatin a galte uh tungah phu la uh hi. Ahih hangin a neihsate uh suksak lo uh hi.
Esther9:17 Hih banga a hih pen Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni hi a
Esther9:18 Ahih hangin Susa khua sunga om Jew mite ahihleh a ni sawm le thum le sawm le li ni-in kikaikhawm uh a
Esther9:19 Hih thu hangin gam sung khuaneute-a teng Jew mite in Adar kha a ni sawm le li ni pawi bawlna le lungdam ni dingin tawlngak ni-in nei uh a
Esther9:20 Tua ciangin Mordekai in hih thupiangte khempeuh lai-in ciamteh a
Esther9:21 A kumkumin Adar kha ni sawm le li ni le sawm le nga ni a tanna dingun thu a pia hi.
Esther9:22 Tua nite pen Jew mite a galte uh tung panin a suahtak ni
Esther9:23 Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai’ laigelhna tawh kizui-in Jew mite in a patsa uh hih banga a hihnate uh a zom uh hi.
Esther9:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi khempeuh’ gal ahi
Esther9:25 Ahih hangin kumpipa in hih thu a theih ciangin
Esther9:26 Tua ahih ciangin Pur min tamin hih hun sung teng Purim ci-in min a phuak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih lai sunga a kigelh thute khempeuh
Esther9:27 Jew mite amau mahmah
Esther9:28 a khangkhangin innkuan sim
Esther9:29 Tua ciangin Abihail’ tanu Kumpinu Esther in Purim thu tawh kisai hih laikhak nihna a kipsak nadingin Jew mi Mordekai tungah aana a kicingin a piakna lai-in a gelh hi.
Esther9:30 Kumpi Ahasueras’ ukna gam za le sawmnih le sagih sungah a om Jew mite khempeuh tungah kilemna le nopna a omna ding deihsakna laite kikhak a
Esther9:31 Jew mi Mordekai in a gelhsa bangin a kisehsa tawh kizui-in hih Purim nite a tan nadingun thu kipia hi. Tua mah bangin amaute le a suanlekhakte uh a dingin antanna ding le thumna bawlna ding ngeinate a gelh uh hi.
Esther9:32 Kumpinu Esther’ thupiakna in hih Purim bawlna ding ngeinate kipsak a
Esther10:1 Kumpipa Ahasueras in a ukna gam leitung le tuikulh tunga tengte tung panin siah kai hi.
Esther10:2 Ama vangliatna le a sepnate khempeuh
Esther10:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpipa Ahasueras’ zomah Mordekai a lianpen ahi hi. Mordekai in ama mite’ phattuamna ding le a suanlekhakte uh a khantohna ding hanciam ahih manin Jew mite lakah milian khat hi a
Job1:1 Uz gamah Job kici min nei mi khat a om hi. Tua mipa a paubaang lo
Job1:2 Amah in tapa sagih le tanu thum nei hi.
Job1:3 Amah in tuu tulsagih
Job1:4 Ama tapate in inn khat panin inn khatah a ban banin pawi bawlin pai kawikawi uh a
Job1:5 Tua banga a pawi bawl uh gual khat a kikhit ciangin Job in a tapate samin amaute siansuah a
Job1:6 Ni khat ni-in Topa’ omna-ah vantung mite hong pai uh a
Job1:7 Topa in Satan kiangah
Job1:8 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah
Job1:9 Tua ciangin Satan in Topa dawngin
Job1:10 Amah le a innkuan le a neihsate khempeuh na hutna-in a kimkotah daai khan hi lo na hi hiam? Ama hihna khempeuhah thupha na pia a
Job1:11 Ahi zongin na khut zanin ama neihsa khempeuh suksak lecin na maitang mahmahah nang hong samsia pah ding hi
Job1:12 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah
Job1:13 Ni khat

Job1:17 Tua pa in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu-in
Job1:18 Amah in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu a
Job1:19 Tua laitakin sehnel gam panin huihpi pingpei hong nungin a inn mutpai-in na tate denglum hi. Nang kiangah hih thu a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi
Job1:20 Hih thu a zak ciangin Job dahlua-in a puan balkek a
Job1:21 Tua ciangin amah in
Job1:22 Hih thu khempeuhah Job khial lo a

Job3:3 “Ka suah ni

Job3:5 Khuaniim
Job3:6 “Tua zan
Job3:7 Tua zanin ta piang kei hen la
Job3:8 Phuisamna tawh awle a khiim thei
Job3:9 Tua ni zingsang aksite mial hen. A vak ngei lo ding khuavak ngak niloh hen la
Job3:10 bang hang hiam cih leh kei hong kipaiina naugil na khakcip lo a
Job3:11 “Bang hangin a sisa-in suak hoh lo a
Job3:12 Bang hangin ka nu’ khuk tungah hong kitawi se a
Job3:13 Tua hi zenzen kei leh hanah nuamtakin ka lum hithiat khin ding hi. Sihna sungah ihmu-in ka tawlnga khin ding a
Job3:14 inn hoihnono a lam kumpite le uliante
Job3:15 ngun le kham tawh a kidim a hau a liante tawh nuamtakin hanah ka tawlnga khinta ding hi.

Job4:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in thu hong gen a
Job4:2 “Mi khatpeuh in thu hong genpih leh na heh ding hiam? Kua in a kam ipzo nawn ding ahi hiam?
Job4:3 Lunghiang mite na hanthotna
Job4:4 a puk mite na thugenna tawh na kipsakna
Job4:5 Ahi zongin nang tungah tuate hong tung a
Job4:6 Na biakna in hong hehnem zo lo ahi hiam? A paubaang lo
Job4:7 Tu-in ngaihsun in: Midik kimlai kua sia ngei ahi hiam? A thutang mi a kisuksiatna koi-ah mu ngei na hi hiam?
Job4:8 Mawhna bawlin buaina a piangsak mi in a gamtatna bangin a gah a atna ka thei hi.
Job4:9 Pasian’ husanna tawh tua bang mite sia a
Job4:10 Humpinelkai hawk bangin migilote’ hawkna dai ta a

Job4:13 Mi a ihsip hun zankim laitak

Job5:1 “Tu-in na thu ko in: Nang hong huh ding om ahi hiam? A siangthote kua pen’ lam zuan ding na hi hiam?
Job5:2 Mihai pa in a hehna sihlawh a
Job5:3 Mihai pa in limtakin zung kha ngei napi
Job5:4 A tapate suahtaksak zawh ding hi nawn lo hi. Kulhkongpi gei-ah amaute kisugawp a
Job5:5 Midangte in a neihsate liahtumsak uh a
Job5:6 Leilak panin gimna hong piangtawm lo a
Job5:7 Mei-ek a to leen mah bangin mihingte in amau’ lungkhamna ding mah a piangsak uh hi.
Job5:8 “Nang hi leng
Job5:9 Amah in na liante le kuama phawk zawh loh thute sem a
Job5:10 Amah in guah zusak a
Job5:11 Amah in mi niamte sangkoih a
Job5:12 Amah in migilote’ geelna suksiatsak ahih manin amaute in a ngimna uh tangtun thei lo uh hi.
Job5:13 Amah in migilote amau’ gitlohna mahah awksak a
Job5:14 Sunthapai-in khuamial sung kidenna a

Job5:16 Tua ahih manin mizawngte in lametna neikik uh a
Job5:17 “Pasian in a taii mite mi nuamsa hizaw ahih manin

Job5:19 Lungkhamna gukvei dong na tuahna-ah amah in nang hong hon ding a

Job5:21 Gensiatna panin nang hong kihu ding a
Job5:22 Suksiat ding le puksih dingte na nuihsan lel ding a

Job5:25 Na suan na khakte tampi tak pha ding hi

Job9:23 Lauhuai lianpi hong tung pakin sihna a om ciangin mawhbaang lote’ thumna a nuihsan lel hi.
Job9:24 Migilote’ khut sungah leitung kipia a

Job9:26 Pumpeeng gunkuang bangin ka hun nawhpai a

Job9:28 a dikin nong seh loh ding lamtak thei khin ka hih manin ka thuak ding thute hangin kei ka lau mahmah hi.

Job14:2 Amaute paak bangin khangin keu pak uh a
Job14:3 Pasian aw
Job14:4 Mihing banga a ninte sung panin a siang hong piang lo ding hi.
Job14:5 A nuntak tan ding kisehkhol a
Job14:6 Amah en loin tuaci omsak mai inla
Job14:7 “A kiphuk khinsa singkung nangawn in lametna nei buang a
Job14:8 Lei sungah a zungte teek a
Job14:9 guahtui ngahin
Job14:10 Ahi zongin mi si a
Job14:11 “Gun tuite le tuipi tuite a kan’ hun om thei ding hi.
Job14:12 Ahi zongin vanpi a omlaiteng
Job14:13 “Hih gimna tawh ka kipelh theih nadingin nong phawk loh nading mun misite’ gam sungah kei hong busak in. Mi a si khinsate hingkik thei lo ahih manin a hingin hong omsak peuh lecin tua lai-ah ka ut hi. Na hehna a dam ciangin hong phawkkik peuh lecin tua lai-ah ka ngak nuam hi.
Job14:14 
Job14:15 Tua khit ciangin kei na hong sam ding a
Job14:16 Tua hun ciangin ka kalsuanna khempeuh nong en ding a
Job14:17 Ka khialhnate hong maisakin
Job14:18 “Ahi zongin a taktakin
Job14:19 Tui in suangte nawtkhia-in
Job14:20 Nangmah in mi khat zogawpin na hawlkhia a
Job14:21 Amah a pahtawi dingin a tapate hong pai taleh zong amah gimlua ahih manin bangmah phawkzo nawn lo a
Job14:22 A pumpi sunga a natnate le a lungsim gimnate bek a phawkzo lai hi
Job15:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in Job dawng a
Job15:2 “Job aw
Job15:3 bangmah-a kimang lo kampaute pau lo a
Job15:4 Ahi zongin nangmah in Pasian zahtakna na beisak a
Job15:5 Tu-in na mawhna thu na kam pan hong gingkhia a
Job15:6 Na mawhna thu kei’ hong gen kisam lo a
Job15:7 “Mihing a a piang lakah a masa pen kisa na hi hiam? Pasian in mualte a bawl lai-in a piang khin kisa na hi hiam?
Job15:8 Pasian’ vaihawmnate a za simin kingaihsun na hiam? Nang bek in pilna khempeuh a nei-in kingaihsun na hi hiam?
Job15:9 Ko’ theih loh thu bang thei tuan na hi hiam? Ko’ muh loh thu bang mu tuan na hi hiam?
Job15:10 Na pa’ pianma a a piang puteek samkangte’ tung panin kote in ka pilnate uh a ngah ka hi uh hi.
Job15:11 “Pasian in nang hong hehnem hi; bang hangin nialnial na hi hiam? Kam khum kam nem tawh Pasian’ tangin nang tungah thu kong gen uh hi.
Job15:12 Ahih hangin na lung khauhin kote nong heh et hi.
Job15:13 Pasian’ tungah a heh na hi a
Job15:14 “Mihing a a piang peuhmah paubaang hetloin siangtho taktak zo ding ahi hiam? Pasian’ tungah a thumanzo kua om ding ahi hiam?
Job15:15 Pasian in a siangtho vantung mite nangawn muang lo ahihleh
Job15:16 Mihing in tui i dawn bangin siatna i dawndawn a
Job15:17 “Job aw
Job15:18 Amaute tung bekah gam kipia ahih manin
Job15:19 
Job15:20 “Mi a nengniam migilo pa in a khan tawntungin lungkhamna thuak ding hi.
Job15:21 Launa ding awging a bilah za ngitnget ding a
Job15:22 Lungzinna pan suahtakna ding lametna om lo a
Job15:23 amah a ne dingin musanete in a ngak uh hi. A mailam thu lungzinhuai ahihna thei hi.
Job15:24 A thahat kumpi khat bangin lungkhamna le lungzinna in amah a hihgawp dingin a ngak khikhe hi.
Job15:25 “Pasian langpangin a khuttum a lahsan
Job15:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in khauhtakin Pasian langpangin
Job15:27 “A thatang muanhuai-in a pumpi a liat hangin
Job15:28 ama tenna khuapi sia-in
Job15:29 Amah sauvei hau lo ding a
Job15:30 khuamial panin suakta lo ding hi. Amah pen a hiangte mei in a kattumsak
Job15:31 Amah in gitlohna suanin nei ahih manin
Job15:32 A hun a tun ma-in amah bei ding a
Job15:33 A min ma-in a gahte a pulh leenggui bang ding a
Job15:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian a ngaihsun lote mi cimang suak a
Job15:35 Mihingte in siatna ding bek ngaihsunin sem uh a
Job16:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
Job16:2 “Tua bang thute ka zaza khin a
Job16:3 Khawl hun nei loin gengen lai ding na hi uh hiam? Na gen ding uh omom lai ahi hiam?
Job16:4 Note le keimah a kikhek thei hi lehang
Job16:5 Ahi zongin keimah in note hong tua cih loin
Job16:6 Thu gengen taleng ka natna nuamtuam lo a
Job16:7 Pasian aw
Job16:8 Kei na hong mancip a
Job16:9 “Pasian in a hehna tawh hong balnen ngingei a
Job16:10 Mite in kei hong zahko uh a
Job16:11 Pasian in migilote’ khut sungah kei hong pia hi.
Job16:12 Kei nuamtakin a om kimlai
Job16:13 ka kimkot panin a thaltangte tawh hong kap hi. Tua thaltangte in kei hong kha-in hong liamsak a
Job16:14 Amah in hong hehpih hetloin kei hong liamsak thuahthuah a
Job16:15 “Kei thumin puanhampi ka silh a
Job16:16 Ka kahkahna-in ka mai khempeuh san gawp a
Job16:17 Ahi zongin ngongtatna themkhat zong ka zang kei a
Job16:18 “Leitung aw
Job16:19 Kei a dingin a ding ding
Job16:20 Pasian in ka khitui luanna hong mu-in ka thungetna hong za leh ka ut hi.
Job16:21 Mi khat in a lawmpa a’ ding a thumsak mah bangin mi khatpeuh in Pasian’ kiangah kei a dingin hong thuumsak leh ka ut hi.
Job16:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hun nai mahmah ta a
Job17:1 “Ka bei ding hun nai kuan ta a
Job17:2 Ka heina khempeuhah mite in hong zahko uh a
Job17:3 Pasian aw
Job17:4 Nangmah in amaute thuman a mu lo dingin bawl na hih manin amaute a gualzo-in na bawl kei ding hi.
Job17:5 Paunak-ah
Job17:6 Tu-in amaute in kei tungah hih paunak hong bulh uh a
Job17:7 Ka dahna hangin ka mit mial a
Job17:8 Mihoihin a kineite in lamdang hong sa uh a
Job17:9 Mite’ zahtaka a kinei mite in amau’ ngaihsutna uh man mahmah sa semsem uh hi.
Job17:10 Ahi zongin amaute khempeuh hong pai-in ka mai-ah hong ding le-uh amaute’ lakah mipil khat zong ka mu kei ding hi.
Job17:11 “Ka hun beita hi. Ka geelna teng maimang a
Job17:12 Ka lawmte in
Job17:13 Kei’ lamet ding misite’ gam bek omlai a

Job17:15 Kei’ lamet ding tua lai-ah bang om ahi hiam? Tua lai-ah ka lamet ding bang nong muhsak uh hiam?
Job17:16 Misite’ gam Leinuai-ah ka pai ciangin nopsakna in kei hong zui lo ding hi
Job18:1 Tua ciangin Shuah gammi Bildad in dawng a
Job18:2 “Job aw
Job18:3 Bang hangin bawng bang lelin kote hong ngaihsun a
Job18:4 Na hehna tawh nangmah a kigimsak bek na hi hi. Nangma hangin leitung kinusia ding a
Job18:5 “Migilo pa’ meivak kisumit ding a
Job18:6 Ama buk sungah a meivak mit ding a
Job18:7 A khe kip ngei a
Job18:8 Thangsiahna ngen sungah amah bungbu tuk a
Job18:9 Thangah a khetulin awk a
Job18:10 Amah siahna-in leilakah khauzak kitung a
Job18:11 Lauhuaina in amah pang a
Job18:12 A hauh ngei hangin tu-in gilkial ta a
Job18:13 A kihtakhuai natna in a pum khempeuh tuam a
Job18:14 Lungmuang takin a omna a inn panin amah kikaikhia a
Job18:15 Ahih hangin zatui tawh ama inn a kisiansuah khit ciangin tua inn-ah a ut peuhpeuh teng thei pah ding hi.
Job18:16 Lei sunga ama zungte keu-in
Job18:17 Inn le gamah ama minthanna beita a
Job18:18 A nungtate’ gam panin amah kihawlkhia ding a
Job18:19 Amah in suanlekhak nei lo a
Job18:20 Nisuahna pan nitumna dong ama thuakna a za peuhmah kigaihin a ling uh hi.
Job18:21 Migilote
Job19:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
Job19:2 “Bang tanvei thu genin hong gimsak ding na hi hiam?
Job19:3 Kei nong simmawh niloh a
Job19:4 A khial takpi hi taleng zong nang’ lainatna ding bang om ahi hiam?
Job19:5 Keimah sangin a hoihzaw-in nang na kingaihsun a
Job19:6 Hih thu hong piangsak pa Pasian ahihlam mu thei lo na hi hiam? Kei hong mat nadingin amah in thang hong siah hi.
Job19:7 Keimah hong ngongbawlna ka nialnial hangin kuamah in hong don kei hi. Thuman ka deih hangin hong kipia kei hi.
Job19:8 Pasian in ka lampi khaktan a
Job19:9 Amah in ka hauhna khempeuh hong lakkhiatsak a
Job19:10 Amah in ka pumpi khempeuh hong satgawp hi. Ka nopsakna teng hong zunglot sakin
Job19:11 Keima tungah Pasian’ hehna hong sogawp a
Job19:12 Amah in keimah a sim dingin a galkapte hong sawl a
Job19:13 “Pasian in ka sanggamte hong taisansak a
Job19:14 Ka behte le ka lawmte beimang khinta uh hi.
Job19:15 Ka inn-ah a hong tung ngei keima zinte in hong mangngilh ta a
Job19:16 Ka nasemte khatpeuh ka sap ciangin hong dawng nuam lo uh a
Job19:17 Ka zi nangawn in ka gimnam thuak zo lo a
Job19:18 Naupang melmawl nangawn in kei hong simmawh uh a
Job19:19 Ka lawm it pente nangawn in kei hong muhdah et uh a
Job19:20 Ka guh tungah ka vun kol dihdiahin om a
Job19:21 Hong hehpih un! Hong hehpih un! Keima lawmte hi lo na hi uh hiam? Pasian in kei hong satpai ta hi.
Job19:22 Pasian’ hong bawlsiat bangin bang hangin no zong kei hong bawlsia ding na hi uh hiam? Nong gimsakna uh kicing ta hoh hi lo ahi hiam?
Job19:23 “Ka thugente khempeuh mi khatpeuh in ciamteh hen la
Job19:24 Tua ahih kei leh zong
Job19:25 “Ahi zongin a tawpna-ah kei hong panpih ding a nungta tawntung khat vantungah a omna thu ka thei hi.
Job19:26 Natna in ka vun a nektum khit hangin
Job19:27 Keima mit teekteek tawh amah ka mu ding a
Job19:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh
Job19:29 Ahi zongin tu-in namsau kihta un. Tua namsau in a mawhte tungah Pasian’ hehna hong sem ding hi. Tua ciangin thukhen ding khat a omlam na thei ding uh hi

Job20:9 Ama tenna ngei mun panin amah maimang ding a
Job20:10 mizawngte’ na a suhsakte
Job20:11 A pumpi moi suahin a thatang a hat mahmah hangin a sawt loin leivui a suakpak ding ahi hi.
Job20:12 “Ama kam sungah gitlohna lim sa mahmahin
Job20:13 amah in muammuam nuamin siakhia nuam lo a
Job20:14 a gil sung a tun ciangin a kha mahmah an suakin
Job20:15 Migilo pa in a guksa nate luakhia kik a
Job20:16 Migilo pa’ nekte pen gu tawh kibang a
Job20:17 Amah in bawngnawi le khuaizu gun tui bangin a luang mukha lo ding hi.
Job20:18 Amah in a nasep thamante nusia ding a
Job20:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in mizawngte bawlsia-in don lo a
Job20:20 “A huaihamna bei ngei lo a
Job20:21 Amah in a nek ciangin a khamval cih om ngei lo a
Job20:22 A cihtheih pen hun laitakin lungkhamna lianpen a tuak hi.
Job20:23 Amah in a duhduh ne mai hen! Pasian in hehna tawh amah gim pia ngawn ding hi.
Job20:24 Amah in namsau pelhin a taina-ah sumngo thal in kaptuk ding hi.
Job20:25 Thaltang khat in ama pumpi pailet a
Job20:26 A kholsa khempeuh kisusia a
Job20:27 Vantungte in hih mipa’ mawhna pholak uh a
Job20:28 Pasian’ hehna hangin ama hauhna khempeuh a kisusiamang ding ahi hi.
Job20:29 “Migilote’ ngah dingin Pasian in a piak gimna migilote’ ngah pen tu-a bang ahi hi

Job21:7 “Bang hangin Pasian in migilote khantosak a

Job21:11 Tuuno bangin a naupangte uh taikhia-in kimawl uh a

Job21:14 “Migilote in Pasian nawlkhin uh a
Job21:15 Pasian’ na sep ding kisam sa se lo uh a
Job21:16 Amau’ thahatna hang bek tawh a gina kisa uh a
Job21:17 “Migilo pa’ meivak kisukmitsak ngei ahi hiam? Amaute khat beek in lungkhamna tuak ngei ahi uh hiam? Pasian in hehna tawh migilote gim pia ngei ahi hiam?
Job21:18 Huih in a letkhiat buhkungte
Job21:19 “Pasian in a pa’ khialhna hangin a ta gim pia hi
Job21:20 Mawhneite amau’ mawhna hangin gimna thuaksak hen la
Job21:21 Mi khat a nuntakna a bei khit ciangin
Job21:22 Mi khat in Pasian’ tungah thu hilh thei ding ahi hiam? Vanglianpa tungah thu khen thei ding ahi hiam?
Job21:23 “Mi pawlkhatte a cithei mahmahin si a
Job21:24 annek tuidawn a kicingin a nei uh hi.
Job21:25 Mi pawlkhatte ahihleh nopsak cih theikha ngei loin lunggimin a si uh hi.

Job21:28 Siatna a gamta

Job21:30 Pasian hehin
Job21:31 Migilo pa a gamtatna bangin a thukkik ding
Job21:32 Migilo pa a kivui ciangin a hankhuk kicing a
Job21:33 mi tul tampi in amah kha-in hoihtakin lei tawh kivuk hi.
Job21:34 “Tu-in note in a mawknapi tawh hehnep nong sawm uh hi. Na gen uh thu khempeuh zuauthu vive hi lel hi

Job27:2 “Keima dikna a hong seelcipsak Pasian
Job27:3 ka sungah nuntakna a omlaiteng
Job27:4 ka muk tawh thusia peuhmah ka gen het kei ding a
Job27:5 Note a thuman hi
Job27:6 Kei thuman ka kisakna ka khia ngei kei ding hi. Ka lungsimah kisuanna om loin siang mahmah hi.
Job27:7 “Kei a hong langpan’
Job27:8 Pasian in amaute’ nuntakna a laksak hun ciangin
Job27:9 Lungkhamna a thuak uh ciangin Pasian in amau’ kikona awging ngai ding ahi hiam?
Job27:10 Pasian’ piak ding lungdamna a deih ding uh kilawm ahih manin
Job27:11 “Pasian’ vangliatna bangzahin lian mahmah cih hong gensak unla
Job27:12 Ahi zongin tuate khempeuh na theih khitsa uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin mawk pau na hi uh hiam?
Job27:13 “Vanglian Pasian in migilote
Job27:14 Tapa tampi a neih hangun
Job27:15 A nungta laisunte zong pulnatna tawh si ding uh a
Job27:16 Migilote in kuama simzawh loh ngun tampi tak nei ding uh a
Job27:17 Ahi zongin mihoih pawlkhat in tua puante silhin
Job27:18 Migilote’ lam innte kho lo a

Job39:1 “Sathakte a suah hun ding thei ngei na hi hiam? Sakhite a suah laitakin nau va dom ngei na hi hiam?
Job39:2 Tuate a ni ciamtehin
Job39:3 A no suak dingin lei-ah a bawhsuk hun laitak thei na hi hiam?
Job39:4 A note gamlakah khangin

Job39:9 “Gambawngtal in nangma na hong sem ding ahi hiam? Na ganbukah gambawngtal hong giak nuam ding ahi hiam?
Job39:10 Nangmah in khauhual tawh khihzo ding a
Job39:11 Nasem dingin a hat mahmah hangin
Job39:12 Lo a na anpiangte hong kaihkhop sakin
Job39:13 “Vasa-kalaohte in a kha uh bangzah takin nawh zap thei ahi hiam! Ahi zongin gun vapi bangin vasa-kalaoh leng thei lo hi.
Job39:14 Vasa-kalaoh in leilakah a tui nusia a
Job39:15 Mi khatpeuh in a khe tawh a tuite a sikkhap khak ding
Job39:16 A tuite ama a’ bangin ngaihsun khollo a
Job39:17 Amah a hai-in a bawlpa ama tungah pilna a guan lopa keimah ka hi hi.
Job39:18 Ahi zongin a tai ciangin sakol sangin hatzaw hi.

Job42:14 a tanu upa pen Jemimah phuak a

Job42:17 Tua khit ciangin a khankhinin a teeksih ta hi.

Psalms60:4 Thalte panin kihemin a kikaihkhop nadingun nang hong zahtakte a dingin dial khat na koih khin hi.
Psalms60:5 Nangma it mite a suahtak theih nadingin na khut taklam tawh gualzawhna pia inla

Psalms60:7 Gilead gam keima a’ hi a
Psalms60:8 Moab gam ka kisilna kuang hi a

Proverbs30:33 Bawngnawi toktok lehang thawhbat hong suak a

Ecclesiastes5:1 Biakinn-ah na pai ciangin limtakin kingaihsun in. A man le a man lo a khen thei lo mihaite’ biakpiaknate tawh a kibang piakna sangin thu ngai dingin biakinn-a paina hoihzaw hi.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Thu ngaihsun masa-in pau inla
Ecclesiastes5:3 Lunghimawh semsem lecin na mang sia semsem ding a
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pasian’ tungah thu na ciam ciangin manlangin tungsak pah in. Amah in mihaite diksa lo hi. Na thuciamna bangin tungsak in.
Ecclesiastes5:5 Na thuciamna bangin na tunsak kei ding le thu ciam vet kei zaw in.

Ecclesiastes5:11 Hau semsem lecin na vak ding mi tam semsem a

Ecclesiastes5:14 Na a sep khialh manun a neihsa teng uh suplawh uh a

Ecclesiastes11:1 Sumbawl nadingin na sumte zang in. Ni khat ni peuh teh a meet na ngah ding hi.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Na sumbuk vante mun sagih-ah ahi a
Ecclesiastes11:3 Meii sungah tui a tamluat ciangin leitungah guahin hong zusuk a
Ecclesiastes11:4 Huih le guah ngakin khuahun hoih dong a ngak mi in khaici tuh ngei lo ding a
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nupi gai khat sungah nuntakna thak bangci kipat hiam
Ecclesiastes11:6 Zingsang a kipan khaici tuh inla
Ecclesiastes11:7 Khuavak hoih mahmah a
Ecclesiastes11:8 Mi khat sauveipi a nuntak le a nuntak sung nuamtakin om tahen. Sauveipi tak a hing zongin a sih khit hun a sauvei zawkna phawk tahen. Mailamah a lamethuai bangmah a om kei hi.
Ecclesiastes11:9 Khangnote aw
Ecclesiastes11:10 Note kilunggimsak kei unla
Ecclesiastes12:1 Na lungkham hun ding a hong tun ma
Ecclesiastes12:2 Lungkham hun i cih in: Nang a dingin nitaang
Ecclesiastes12:3 na muan na suan a thahat na khut
Ecclesiastes12:4 khuasung gamlumnate na bil in za thei nawn loin
Ecclesiastes12:5 keen sangte-ah pai ngam nawn loin
Ecclesiastes12:6 I ngun meivak khaina a khau kitatin
Ecclesiastes12:7 I pumpi
Ecclesiastes12:8 Thugen Siampa in
Ecclesiastes12:9 Thugen Siampa
Ecclesiastes12:10 Thugen Siampa in a zaknophuai kammal khawm a
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mipilte’ thugente pen tuucingte in tuu hawlna-in a zat ciangkhut hiam tawh kibang hi. Tua thute pen eite khempeuh tuucin bangin a hong Cing Pasian’ piak ahi hi.
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ka ta aw
Ecclesiastes12:13 Hih thute khempeuh banah gen ding thu khat bek om hi. Mihing hong kipiansakna a thu bulpi pen in: Pasian zahtakna le a thupiakte manna ahi hi.
Ecclesiastes12:14 A pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh a simthamin i hih simte nangawn i hihna khempeuhah Pasian in thu hong khen ding hi.

Isaiah1:1 Judah gam kumpi ahi Uzziah
Isaiah1:2 Vantungte aw
Isaiah1:3 Bawng in amah a nei pa thei a
Isaiah1:4 Ah
Isaiah1:5 Bang hangin note hong kisat theih nadingin lehdo teitei na hi uh hiam? Israel aw
Isaiah1:6 Khenuai a kipan luzang dong nangawnin a cidamna mun om lo a
Isaiah1:7 Na gam uh khing a
Isaiah1:8 Jerusalem khuapi bek omlai a
Isaiah1:9 Vanglian Topa in eite tawmno khat a nungta-in hong siit hikeileh
Isaiah1:10 Sodom a uk mangte aw
Isaiah1:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note’ biakpiakna a tampite pen kei’ tungah bang hi leltak ahi hiam? Tuutalte le ganhing thaute’ sathau tawh meihal biaknate ka kham ta hi. Bawngtalte
Isaiah1:12 Kei’ mai-ah a kilaak dingin na hong pai uh ciangin hih bangin ka huangsung na tuatcil gawpna uh kua’n hong deih ding ahi hiam?
Isaiah1:13 Bangmahin a kimang lo piaknate hong paipih nawn kei un. Paknamtui halna ka kih hi. Khadet ni
Isaiah1:14 Note’ Khadet nite le na pawite uh ka mudah hi. Tuate pen kei a dingin vangikpi khat suakkhin a
Isaiah1:15 “Thungenin na khutte uh nong zaak uh ciangin note kong en kei ding a
Isaiah1:16 Note kisil tawm unla
Isaiah1:17 Gamtat hoih ding kisin un. Thumanin gamta unla
Isaiah1:18 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu-in hong pai unla
Isaiah1:19 Note in utna lungsim nei-in thu na man’ nak-uhleh lei pana piang a gah hoihte na ne ding uh hi.
Isaiah1:20 Ahih hangin note in kei hong nialin na hong lehdo uhleh namsau in note hong vatmai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi
Isaiah1:21 A thutak
Isaiah1:22 Jerusalem khuapi aw
Isaiah1:23 Na uliante
Isaiah1:24 Tua ahih ciangin
Isaiah1:25 Note tungah na kong sem ding a
Isaiah1:26 A masa-a bangin na thukhente
Isaiah1:27 Topa thutang ahih manin Jerusalem khuapi honkhia ding a
Isaiah1:28 Ahih hangin a lehdo mite le a khial mite kisusia khawmin Topa a nusiate pen kibeimangsak ding hi.
Isaiah1:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh tawsaw kungte na biakna hangun note na maizum ding uh a
Isaiah1:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen a teh a vul tawsaw kung le tui a ngah lo huan tawh na kibang ding uh hi.
Isaiah1:31 A thahat mipa pen patlom tawh kibang ding a
Isaiah2:1 Judah gam le Jerusalem tawh kisai thu Amoz’ tapa Isaiah’ muhna hih bang ahi hi:

Isaiah2:4 Amah in minamte khatlekhat kikalah thu khenin
Isaiah2:5 Jakob’ suanlekhakte aw
Isaiah2:6 Amaute pen nisuahna lam gam a om khongkhaite le Filistia mite bangin aisante tawh kidim uh a
Isaiah2:7 Amau’ gamah ngun le kham kidim a
Isaiah2:8 Amau’ gam sung milimte tawh kidim a
Isaiah2:9 Tua ahih ciangin mite kiniamkhiat sukin
Isaiah2:10 Topa kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna panin suanghawm sungah lut unla
Isaiah2:11 Mite’ kiliatsakna pen kiniam koih ding a
Isaiah2:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in a kiphasak le a kiliansak khempeuh
Isaiah2:13 a sang
Isaiah2:14 a lian mual sang khempeuh le a sang mualneu khempeuh;
Isaiah2:15 tausang khempeuh le a muanhuai kulhte khempeuh;
Isaiah2:16 Tarshish teembaw khempeuh le teembaw hoih khempeuh a niamkoih hun ding ni khat a nei hi.
Isaiah2:17 Mite’ kiliatsakna kiniamkhiat ding a
Isaiah2:18 Milimte khempeuh mangthang khin ding hi.
Isaiah2:19 Leitung a lingsakgawp dingin Topa a kipat ciangin amah kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna panin suanghawm sung le leihawm sungah mite bu ding uh hi.
Isaiah2:20 Amah pen leitung a lingsakgawp dingin a hong kipat hun ciangin Topa kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna vang panin suanghawmpite sung le keenhawmte sungah a buk theih nadingun amau’ bawltawm ngun le kham milimte

Isaiah3:12 Keima mite ahihleh naupangte in bawlsia uh a

Isaiah3:15 Ka mite sucipin mizawngte na gawina uh bang na cihnopna uh a hiam?” Vanglian Topa Pasian in ci hi.

Isaiah5:1 Ka lawm it pa’ tangin a leenggui lo a itna la ke’n hong sa ning: Ka lawm it pa in leitang a hoih mahmahna mualtung khatah leenggui lo khat a nei hi.

Isaiah5:3 Tu-in
Isaiah5:4 Ka leenggui lo a dingin ka hih nai loh ka hih ding a kilawm bang omlai ahi hiam? Leenggah hoih gah ding ka lamet laitakin bang hangin gam leenggah hong gah mawk ahi hiam?
Isaiah5:5 Tu-in
Isaiah5:6 Lokhulin ka bawl ding hi. Kipuah loin
Isaiah5:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa ’ leenggui lo pen Israel mite hi a

Isaiah5:13 Tua hi a

Isaiah7:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang in a hoih lote nialin a hoihte a teel theih hun ma-in na kihtak uh kumpi nihte’ gam kinusiacip ding hi.

Isaiah7:19 Tuate khempeuh hong pai-in

Isaiah7:21 “Tua ni ciangin mi khat in bawngla khat le tuu nih bang bek suahtakzo ding a
Isaiah7:22 ahi zongin tuate in nawi tampi a piakna hangin amah in bawngnawi thaukhal ne zo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah a omlai mi khempeuh in bawngnawi thaukhal le khuaizu ne ding uh hi.
Isaiah7:23 “Tua ni ciangin nguntang tulkhat a man leenggui tulkhat a omna mun khempeuh pen lingkungte le lingte’ omna suak ding hi.
Isaiah7:24 Gam khempeuh lingkungte le lingte tawh kidim ding ahih manin
Isaiah7:25 Lingkungte le lingte na kihtakna hangin tupeek tawh a kikho ngei mual neute-ah na pai ngam kei ding hi. Tua munte pen bawng khahna le tuute’ gamtatna mun suak ding hi

Isaiah8:10 Note kikhawmin thu na vaihawm uh hangin a mawkna suak ding a

Isaiah15:4 Heshbon khua le Elealeh khua kiko uh a

Jeremiah26:9 Bang hangin

Jeremiah26:21 Kumpi Jehoiakim le a galkapmang khempeuh le kumpi ulian khempeuhte in ama thugente a zak uh ciangin kumpipa in thah dingin a zong hi. Ahih hangin Uriah in tua thu a zak ciangin lau-in Egypt gamah a taisim hi.

Jeremiah26:24 Ahih hangin Shafan’ tapa Ahikam in Jeremiah hu ahih manin thah dingin mite’ khut sungah kipia lo hi.

Jeremiah35:19 Vanglian Topa
Jeremiah36:1 Josiah’ tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in a ukzawh kum li a phakna kumin Topa in kei hong hopih a
Jeremiah36:2 “Laizial khat la inla
Jeremiah36:3 Judah mite in amau’ tungah tunsak dingin ka ngaihsut siatna khempeuh za-in
Jeremiah36:4 Tua ciangin kei zong Neriah’ tapa Baruk ka sam a
Jeremiah36:5 Tua ciangin Baruk ka sawl a
Jeremiah36:6 nang va pai inla
Jeremiah36:7 Topa’ tungah amaute thumin a vekpi-un a hoih lohna uh panin a kihei thei kha ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite’ tungah Topa in tunsak dingin a gensa a hehna le a thangpaihna lian mahmah hi
Jeremiah36:8 Topa’ biakinn sungah laizial sunga Topa’ kammal simkhiat dingin ka sawl bangbangin Neriah’ tapa Baruk in zong a hih hi.

Jeremiah36:21 Kumpipa in zong tua laizial a la dingin Jehudi sawl a

Jeremiah48:10 “ Topa’ na citakin a sem lopa in kamsiatna thuak tahen. Thah nadingin a namsau a dok lopa in hamsiatna thuak tahen.

Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiah kumpi a suahin kum sawmnih le kum khat pha a
Jeremiah52:2 Amah in kumpi Jehoiakim bangmahin Pasian’ hoihsak lohte hong sem hi.
Jeremiah52:3 Topa in Jerusalem khuamite le Judah gam mite ama kiang panin a hawlkhiatna zah dong dingin a hehna a lian hi. Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa langpan’ hi.
Jeremiah52:4 Tua ciangin amah kumpi a suahzawh a kum kua kum
Jeremiah52:5 Zedekiah in a ukzawh kum sawm le kum khat a phak dong khuapi a kisim hi.
Jeremiah52:6 Tua kum a kha lina
Jeremiah52:7 Tua ciangin khuakulhpi kiphulet a
Jeremiah52:8 Ahih hangin Khaldea galkapte in kumpi Zedekiah nungdelh uh a
Jeremiah52:9 Amaute in kumpipa a mat khit uh ciangin Hamath gam Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah puak uh a
Jeremiah52:10 Riblah khua-ah Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah’ muh mahin a tate thahlupsak a
Jeremiah52:11 Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah’ mittangte a khelkhiatsak khit ciangin kol bulh a
Jeremiah52:12 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a ukzawh kum sawm le kum kua a phak kum
Jeremiah52:13 Amah in Topa’ biakinnpi a kipan kumpipa’ inn le Jerusalem khua-a inn lian khempeuh a hal hi.
Jeremiah52:14 Amah tawh a omkhawm a galkap khempeuh in Jerusalem khua kimkota kulh khempeuh a susia hi.
Jeremiah52:15 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in mi zawngpen pawlkhat
Jeremiah52:16 Ahih hangin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in leenggah lo a cing ding le lo a kho dingin gam sunga a zawngpente pawlkhat a nusialai hi.
Jeremiah52:17 Babylon mite in Topa’ biakinnpi sungah a om sumngo khuamte
Jeremiah52:18 Tua banah
Jeremiah52:19 Biakpiakna a kizang keuneute
Jeremiah52:20 Solomon kumpipa in Topa’ biakinn a dingin a bawl khuampi nih
Jeremiah52:21 Tua khuamte khat ciangin pi sawmnih le pi sagih sang a
Jeremiah52:22 A tunglam pi sagih le alang ciang sumngo hi-in
Jeremiah52:23 Mang kawlsing a vekpi-in a kimkotah zakhat om a
Jeremiah52:24 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa in siampi lianpen pa Seraiah
Jeremiah52:25 Tua banah khuapi sung panin galkapte a uk galkapmang khat le khuasunga a kimu kumpipa’ uliante sagih
Jeremiah52:26 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in amaute paipihin Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah a tunpih hi.
Jeremiah52:27 Babylon kumpipa in zong Hamath gam Riblah khua-ah amaute satin a thatlum hi. Tu-a bangin Judah mite a gam panun sal dingin a kilakhia hi.
Jeremiah52:28 Nebukhadnezzar in sal dingin a paipih mi phazah hih bang ahi hi: Kumpi a suahzawh a kum sagih kumin Judah mi tulthum sawmnih thum
Jeremiah52:29 a kum sawm le giat kumin Jerusalem khua panin Nebukhadnezzar in mi zagiat sawmthum nih sal dingin a paipih hi.
Jeremiah52:30 Nebukhadnezzar in a ukzawh a kum sawmnih le thum kumin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in a sal dingin Judah mi zasagih sawmli nga a paikhiatpih hi. A vekpi-in mi tulli le zaguk a pha hi.
Jeremiah52:31 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin sal a suahzawh kum sawmthum le kum sagih a cin ciangin Babylon-ah Evilmerodak kumpi a suak hi. Tua kumpipa in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin hehpih a
Jeremiah52:32 Hoihtakin hopih a
Jeremiah52:33 Tua ahih manin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante a suahkhia hi. A nuntak sungteng khempeuh kumpipa’ sabuai-ah nisimin an a ne hi.
Jeremiah52:34 A sih mateng a nuntak hun sungteng nisimin a kisap khempeuh kumpipa in a pia tawntung hi.
Lamentations1:1 Khatvei lai-in mi a dimtakin a tenna Jerusalem khuapi bangzah takin gamdai ahi hiam? Leitung bup in a zahtak khuapi tu-in meigong tawh a kibang ta hi. Leitung a om khuapi khempeuhte’ lak panin a thupi pen khuapi tu-in salin a kiman khinzo hi.
Lamentations1:2 Amah zan khuavakin kap a
Lamentations1:3 Judah mite
Lamentations1:4 Ni siangtho ni ciangin Pasian a bia dingin Biakinnpi-ah kuamah a pai nawn kei hi. Tua lai-a lasa numeite in gimna thuak uh a
Lamentations1:5 A galte gualzo uh a
Lamentations1:6 Jerusalem a minthanna teng a maimang zota hi. A makaite uh
Lamentations1:7 Tu-in Jerusalem kisiazo ta a
Lamentations1:8 A minthanna teng a beita hi. A guaktangin om ahih manin a maizum hi. Thumin tau a
Lamentations1:9 A kihhuaina teng kimukhia pah hinapi
Lamentations1:10 A galte in a neih a lam khempeuh a laksak khinmang hi. Biakinnpi sungah lut uh a
Lamentations1:11 Amaute
Lamentations1:12 A kiim a pamah a pai mi khempeuh kiangah
Lamentations1:13 Amah in vantung panin meikuang hong khiasuk a
Lamentations1:14 Amah in ka mawhna khempeuh a vekpi-in ciamteh a
Lamentations1:15 Topa in ka galkap a thahat pente nuihsan lel a
Lamentations1:16 Tua ahih manin ka mit pan khitui a dimletin a luang hi. Hong hehnem ding le a hong hanthawn ding kuamah om lo hi. Galte in hong zo khin a
Lamentations1:17 Hong huh un
Lamentations1:18 Topa a thutang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in ama thu a mang lo ka hi hi. Mun khempeuhah a om mite aw
Lamentations1:19 Ka kipawlpihte ka sapsap hangin a hong huh nuam kei uh hi. A nuntakna ding uh an a zonna lamun siampite le makaite kongzing lakah a si uh hi.
Lamentations1:20 Topa aw
Lamentations1:21 Ka tauna hong ngai in; kei a hong hehnem ding kuamah dang om nawn lo hi. Gimna nong thuaksak manin ka galte lungdam lua uh hi. Na ni ciam ni hong tungsak inla
Lamentations1:22 A gitlohna hangun amaute tungah thu khen in. Ka mawhna hangin gim nong piak mah bangin amaute zong gim pia in. Gimna ka thuak manin ka tautau a
Lamentations2:1 Topa in a heh manin Jerusalem khuapi a mialcipsak hi. A vantung minthanna teng uh kisiatna a suaksak hi. Amah in a heh ni-in a Biakinnpi nangawn a susia hi.
Lamentations2:2 Topa in Judah gam a om khuate khempeuh hehpih loin a susia hi. Amah in a galdalna kulhpite khempeuh balzan gawpin a gam le a gam ukte a maizumsak hi.
Lamentations2:3 A hehna tawh Israel-te’ thahatnate hong suksiatsak gawp a
Lamentations2:4 Amah in galte bangin a thalpi tawh hong ngim a
Lamentations2:5 Topa in galte bangin Israel-te a susia hi. Amah in kulhpite le a kumpi innte a siasa-in a nusia hi. Amah in a bei thei lo dahna Judah gam sungah a tungsak hi.

Ezekiel23:45 Amaute in nulepa mawhna bawlin mi thahna tawh zong kipelh lo uh ahih manin midikte in nulepa mawhna bawlna hang le mi thahna hangin a mawhsak ding uh hi.

Ezekiel24:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute a dingin gentehna-in ka gen ahi hih thugentehna pen a lehdo thei ka mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mei tungah beel suang unla a sungah tui a dimin buk un.
Ezekiel24:4 Sa a phei
Ezekiel24:5 Tuu limci pente’ sa zang unla
Ezekiel24:6 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu hih bang ahi hi: Mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi tu-in a sia ding hi ta! Amah pen a kang-op a kinawtkhia ngei lo beel tawh kibang hi. Beel sunga sate khat khatin kilakhia a
Ezekiel24:7 Khuapi sungah mi kithahna om a
Ezekiel24:8 Ka heh suakin a phu a kilak theih nadingin a manthan’ theih loh nading munah a sisante a tua ci-in ka omsak hi.
Ezekiel24:9 “Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima gen thu hih bang ahi hi: Mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi pen tu-in a sia ding hi ta! Kei mahmah in a mei ka cih ding hi.
Ezekiel24:10 Sing hong cih beh un! A mei sem un! A sa huan un! A tui kangsak un! A saguhte kangtumsak un!

Ezekiel40:23 Nisuahna lampang a om bang teek mahin

Ezekiel40:26 Tua kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei cial sagih mah om a
Ezekiel40:27 Hih lai-ah zong tual sungnung paina kongpi lampi khat mah om hi. A mipa in konglekong kikal a teh ciangin pi za le sawmguk giat a pha hi.

Ezekiel42:10 
Ezekiel42:11 Leilu lampang a om mah bangin hih inndeite mai-ah zong lampi khat a om hi. A sauna
Ezekiel42:12 Nisuahna lampang a kulh a kipatna mun a inn leitaw lamah kongkhakte a om hi.
Ezekiel42:13 Tua ciangin a mipa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel42:14 Siampite in Topa tungah biakna pia-in biakinn sungah a lut khit uh ciangin a pualamah a pusuah nop uhleh
Ezekiel42:15 A mipa in biakinn sunglamteng a teh a zawh khit ciangin nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin hong pusuahpih a
Ezekiel42:16 Amah in a tehna piciang la-in nisuahna lampang teh a
Ezekiel42:17 Tua ciangin leilu lampang
Ezekiel42:18 
Ezekiel42:19 
Ezekiel42:20 Tua ahih manin a umna kulh a pang li-in a teh ciangin a pang li mahin kikim a
Ezekiel43:1 Tua khit ciangin a mipa in biakinn nisuahna lama om kongpi-ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel43:2 nisuahna lam panin Israel-te’ Pasian’ minthanna vang hong pai ka mu hi. Pasian’ awging pen tuipi ging tawh kibang a
Ezekiel43:3 Hih ka maangmuhna pen
Ezekiel43:4 Topa’ minthanna vang in nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin biakinn sungah a lut hi.
Ezekiel43:5 Tua ciangin Topa’ kha in hong la-in a tual sungnungah hong paipih a
Ezekiel43:6 Tua lai mun panin kei kiangah a mipa a din laitakin biakinnsung panin Topa in kei hong hopihna ka za a
Ezekiel43:7 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel43:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kumpite un a kongkhuam uh le a kongzawlte uh keima biakinn kongkhuam le kongzawlte tawh kimatin bawl uh a
Ezekiel43:9 Ahi zongin tu-in amaute in pasian dangte bia nawn loin
Ezekiel43:10 Tua ciangin Topa in a thugen hong zomlai a
Ezekiel43:11 Amaute a gamtatnasate uh hangin hong maizum theih uhleh
Ezekiel43:12 Biakinn tawh kisai ngeina in: Mualtung a om biakinn kimkot mun khempeuh pen biakna tawh kisai-in a siangtho ahi hi.
Ezekiel43:13 “Biakna tau golna pen hih bang hi ding hi. A teh nadingin biakinn tehna a kizang ngeite mah hi ding hi. A biakna tau bul kimkot pen letmat sawmnih sangin
Ezekiel43:14 A tau bul panin a tau zawl nuainung ciang pi li hi ding a
Ezekiel43:15 A tungnung pen
Ezekiel43:16 A biakna tau dawnzang pen a dung a vai a kikim hi ding a
Ezekiel43:17 Biakna tau a paito a laizang santeng pen a dung a vai a kikim
Ezekiel43:18 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah
Ezekiel43:19 Zadok’ suanlekhak Levi siampite pen keima na a sem dingin ka omna-ah a hong pai dingte ahi uh hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu kong pia hi. Mawhna hangin biakna-a piak dingin amaute tungah bawngtal khat na pia ding hi.
Ezekiel43:20 Nangmah in a sisan pawlkhat la-in biakna tau kiu li-a om ki lite
Ezekiel43:21 Mawhna hangin biakna-in a kipia bawngtal pen la-in biakinn huang pualam
Ezekiel43:22 A zing ciangin paubaanna a om lo keeltal khat la-in mawhna hangin biakna-in na pia ding hi. Bawngtal si tawh na siansuah mah bangin hih keeltal si tawh zong biakna tau na siansuah ding hi.
Ezekiel43:23 Hih bangin siansuahna na man khit ciangin
Ezekiel43:24 Topa ahi keima kiangah nong paipih ding hi. Siampite in tua ganhingte tungah ci thehin
Ezekiel43:25 Mawhna hangin biakpiakna-in ni sagih sung nisimin
Ezekiel43:26 Siampite in ni sagih sung biakna tau apna bawlin zattheih dingin a baihsa-in omsak ding uh hi.
Ezekiel43:27 Hih bangin ni sagih sung a hih khit uh ciangin
Ezekiel44:1 Tua ciangin a mipa in nisuahna lam biakinn huang kongpi pua-ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel44:2 Topa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel44:3 Ahi zongin hih lai-ah gam uk na a sem laitak ulianpa pen keima omna-ah biakna an siangtho a ne dingin hong pai thei ding hi. Amah hong pai ciangin inndeipi tawnin inndei sungnung kongvangah hong lutin tua lai mahah pusuak ding hi
Ezekiel44:4 Tua ciangin a mipa in leilu lam kongpi tawnin biakinn mai-ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel44:5 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel44:6 A lehdo thei hih Israel mite tungah Topa Pasian keimah in ka gen thute
Ezekiel44:7 Keimah biakna-in sathaute le sasite nong piak uh ciangin
Ezekiel44:8 Ka biakinn sungah biakna ngeinate na zui kei uh a
Ezekiel44:9 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in tu-in kong genin-ah: Vun ki-at lo gamdang mite peuhmah ka biakinn sungah lut lo ding uh a
Ezekiel44:10 No Israel midangte bangin kei hong nusia-in milim a bia Levi mite in zong gim thuak ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:11 Amaute in biakinn kongcin
Ezekiel44:12 Ahi zongin amaute in milim biakna lamah Israel mite makai-in mawhna sungah Israel mite tunpih uh ahih ciangin
Ezekiel44:13 Amaute in keima siampi na sem loin
Ezekiel44:14 Ahi zongin biakinn sunga nasep a kisam dangte a sem dingin amaute ka seh thei ding hi
Ezekiel44:15 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in keima kiangah
Ezekiel44:16 Ka biakinn sungah amaute lutin
Ezekiel44:17 A tual sungnung paina kongpi-ah a lut uh ciangin saihadial puan silh ding uh hi. Tual sungnung sung le biakinn sungah na a sep laitakun samul puan peuhmah silhlo ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:18 Amaute in saiha dial puan khimin
Ezekiel44:19 Midangte a omna biakinntual puanungah a pusuah ma-un
Ezekiel44:20 “Amaute in a sam uh mettol lo ding uh a
Ezekiel44:21 Biakinntual sungnungah a lut ma-un siampite in leenggahzu ne lo ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:22 Meigong numei ahi a
Ezekiel44:23 “Amaute in ka mite tungah
Ezekiel44:24 Thunei khat peuhpeuh a om ciangin
Ezekiel44:25 Siampite pen misi lawnna tawh kininsak lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin
Ezekiel44:26 Amaute a kisiansuah khit uh nipikal khat ciang bekin
Ezekiel44:27 biakinntual sungnungah pai-in biakinn sungah na a sepkik theih nadingun kisiansuahna biakna pia ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi.
Ezekiel44:28 “Israel mite tungah ka piak
Ezekiel44:29 An tawh biakna
Ezekiel44:30 Anpal sung panin a limci penteng le kei tungah hong kipia na khempeuh
Ezekiel44:31 Siampite in vasa ahi a
Ezekiel45:1 “Israel minamte tungah piak dingin leitang a kihawm ciangin
Ezekiel45:2 Hih leitang sung panin biakinn ding tawh kisai-in a dung pi zagiat sawmli
Ezekiel45:3 Hih biakna leitang siangtho sung panin siangtho pen mun le biakinn mun dingin a saulam tai sawm
Ezekiel45:4 Hih a kisehkhia mun sungteng pen biakna leitang siangtho hi ding a
Ezekiel45:5 Hih banah
Ezekiel45:6 Khuapi huangsung dingin a dung tai sawm
Ezekiel45:7 “Gam sung a uk uliante a dingin zong leitang kisehkhia ding hi. A siangtho leitang le khuapi huang panin kipanin nitumna lamah a gamgi ciang
Ezekiel45:8 Hih munteng pen Israel gam sung panin Israel uliante’ neih hi ding hi. Tua ahih manin amaute in Israel mite bawlsia nawn lo ding uh a
Ezekiel45:9 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: No Israel a uk uliante aw
Ezekiel45:10 “Mi khempeuh in tawisuang man le tehna man zang ding uh hi.
Ezekiel45:11 An tehna bung le tui tehna bung kikim ding a
Ezekiel45:12 A gik tehna pen
Ezekiel45:13 “Biakna na piakna ding zia uh pen
Ezekiel45:14 sathau na neihzah uh sung pan seh za-ah khat (bung tawh tehin bung sawm ciangin beem khat-a seh)
Ezekiel45:15 tuu na neih sung uh panin zanih ciangin khat hi ding hi. Hihte pen an tawh biakna
Ezekiel45:16 Israel mi khempeuh in hihte pen biakna-in a piak dingin
Ezekiel45:17 Gam uk ulianpa in biakna-in piak ding ganhingte
Ezekiel45:18 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Kha khatna a ni masa ni-in paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat biakna-in pia-in biakinn a siangsak ding na hi uh hi.
Ezekiel45:19 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakpiakna ganhing si pawlkhat la-in biakinn kongkhuamte
Ezekiel45:20 Tua bangmahin tua kha a ni sagih ni-in zong
Ezekiel45:21 “A kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi na kipan ding uh a
Ezekiel45:22 Tua pawi bawl a kipat ni-in gam uk ulianpa in amah le mi khempeuh a dingin mawhna hanga biakpiakna-in bawngtal khat pia ding hi.
Ezekiel45:23 Tua pawi ni sagih sung nisimin paubaanna a om lo bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih la-in Topa tungah meihal biakna-in pia ding a
Ezekiel45:24 Bawngtal le tuutal a kipiazah tawh kizui-in an tawh biak nadingin an bung khat pai le sathau biing khat pai tawh piakhawm ding hi.
Ezekiel45:25 “A kha sagihna a ni sawm le nga ni-in nipikal khat sung a kibawl ding Buk Pawi kipan ding a
Ezekiel46:1 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nisuahna lama om
Ezekiel46:2 Siampite in meihal biakna le thunuama biakna a piak laitakun
Ezekiel46:3 Sabbath ni le Khadet nisimin mi khempeuh in zong tua kongpi mai-ah Topa bia-in kun ding uh hi.
Ezekiel46:4 Gam uk ulianpa in Sabbath ni-in meihal biak nadingin paubaanna a om lo tuuno guk le tuutal khat pia ding hi.
Ezekiel46:5 Tua ganhingte tawh a piakkhawm ding an tawh biakpiak nadingin zong
Ezekiel46:6 Khadet ni ciangin paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat
Ezekiel46:7 Tuate tawh piakkhop dingin an tawh biakpiak nadingin bawngtal le tuutalte khat ciangin an bung khat pai
Ezekiel46:8 Gam uk ulianpa in a kuanlamin a tot lampiteng mah a ciah ciangin tawnin
Ezekiel46:9 “A kiseh pawi hunte-ah Topa a bia dingin a hong pai mite khempeuh pen a hong lutna kongpi zui-in kileh kik lo ding uh a
Ezekiel46:10 Gam uk ulianpa zong mihonte mah tawh lutin
Ezekiel46:11 Pawi nite le a kiseh pawi hunte-ah an tawh biakna-in piak ding pen
Ezekiel46:12 Gam uk ulianpa in ama utthu-in biakpiakna
Ezekiel46:13 “Gam uk ulianpa in meihal biakna-in piak dingin paubaanna a om lo kum khat a pha tuuno khat
Ezekiel46:14 Mangbuhnel lawh dim khat le a meek khoppih ding sathau hai khat tawh
Ezekiel46:15 Tua bangin tuuno
Ezekiel46:16 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Gam uk ulianpa in ama neihsa leitang mun khat peuhpeuh
Ezekiel46:17 Ahi zongin gam uk ulianpa in ama nasemte khat peuhpeuh tungah leitang a piak leh
Ezekiel46:18 Gam uk ulianpa in midangte’ neihsa leitang laksak ngei lo ding hi. Ama tungah a kipia leitang sung panin a tapate khenkhia bek ding hi. Ka mite’ leitang laksakin
Ezekiel46:19 Tua ciangin a mipa in biakinntual sungnung leitaw lamah a om kongpi gei-a inndeite-ah hong paipih hi. Hih inndeite pen siampite’ zat ding a siangtho inndeite ahi hi. Amah in tua inndeite’ omna nitumna lampang mong hong kawk a
Ezekiel46:20 “Hih mun pen

Ezekiel47:3 A mipa in a tehna piciang tawi-in a tui luanna nisuahna lam pi tulkhat zaguk sawmgiat ciang dong tehsuk a
Ezekiel47:4 Tua ciangin pi tulkhat zaguk sawmgiat ciang tehsuk leuleu a
Ezekiel47:5 Tua ciangin pi tulkhat zaguk sawmgiat ciang mah tehsuk lai leuleu a
Ezekiel47:6 Tua ciangin amah in
Ezekiel47:7 tua lai mun ka tun ciangin a gun lang nih tuakah singkung tampi tak a po ka mu hi.
Ezekiel47:8 Amah in kei kiangah
Ezekiel47:9 Hih tui a luanna mun peuhpeuhah ganhing namkim le ngasa tampi om hi. Hih tui in Si Tuipi tui siangsakkikin
Ezekiel47:10 Engedi khua panin Eneglaim khua ciang dong tuipi dungah ngasa bengte omin
Ezekiel47:11 Ahi zongin tuipi dunga om nawnglakte le bualte-a om tuite siang lo ding a
Ezekiel47:12 Hih gun pang tuakah a gah nek dingin singkung nam khempeuh po ding hi. A tehte pulh ngei lo ding a

Ezekiel47:14 Hih gam na pu na pate uh tanh dingin ka piakna ding thu
Ezekiel47:15 “Leilu lam gamgi pen
Ezekiel47:16 tua panin Berothah le Sibraim khuapite-ah (hih khuate pen Damaskas kumpi gam le Hamath kumpi gam kikalah om hi)
Ezekiel47:17 Leilu lam gamgi pen Mediterranean Tuipi a kipanin nisuahna lam manawhin Damaskas le Hamath gamgi a om Hazarenan khuapi ciang hi ding hi.
Ezekiel47:18 “Nisuahna lam gamgi pen
Ezekiel47:19 “Leitaw lam gamgi pen
Ezekiel47:20 “Nitumna lam gamgi pen
Ezekiel47:21 “Tua ahih ciangin hih gam sungteng
Ezekiel47:22 Note a dingin na neih kip tawntung ding uh gamh hi ding hi. Hih leitang na hawm uh ciangin note lakah hong tengin ta a nei khinsa minam dangte zong note mah bangin tanh na pia ding uh hi. Amaute pen Israel minam taktakte mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a
Ezekiel47:23 Note’ lakah a teng gamdang mite in amau’ tenna minamte tawh leitang ngahkhawm ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi.
