Daniel1:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim kumpi a suahzawh a kum thumna kumin
Daniel1:2 Topa in kumpi Jehoiakim le biakinnpi na manphate kumpi Nebukhadnezzar a mansak hi. Amah in a mi matte Babylon gam ama pasian biakinn-ah paipih a
Daniel1:3 Kumpipa in Israel salte sunga kumpi nam le milian namte lak pan mi pawlkhat a teelkhia dingin innsungmang lian pen Ashpenaz thu a pia hi.
Daniel1:4 Tua mite
Daniel1:5 Amaute pen kumpi innsunga nasem dangte mah bangin nisimin an le leenggahzu tawh a vak dingin kumpipa in thu a pia hi. Tua bangin kum thum sung sinna a neih khit uh ciangin kumpipa mai-ah amaute a kilak kik ding uh ahi hi.
Daniel1:6 Tua bangin a kiteelte
Daniel1:7 Innsungmang lianpen pa in amaute min thak phuah a
Daniel1:8 Daniel in kumpi innsunga an le leenggahzu tawh a pumpi a thanghuaisak loh nadingin a lungsim a khensat hi. Amah in innsungmang lianpen Ashpenaz kiangah tua bang an a kipiak loh nadingin a ngen zaw hi.
Daniel1:9 Tua ciangin Pasian in Daniel tungah Ashpenaz in ngaihsut siamna a neih theih nadingin a bawlsak hi.
Daniel1:10 Ahih hangin Ashpenaz in Daniel kiangah
Daniel1:11 Tua ciangin Daniel zong Ashpenaz in amah le adang thumte a cing dingin a koihpa kiangah a pai hi.
Daniel1:12 Amah in
Daniel1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ an a ne khangnote tawh hong enkak khawm in la
Daniel1:14 Amah in amau’ ngetna bang mangin ni sawm sung ze-et dingin a thukim hi.
Daniel1:15 Ni sawm a cin khit ciangin amaute pen kumpi an nete sangin cidamzaw uh a
Daniel1:16 Tua ciangin a cing pa in kumpi an le leenggahzu pia loin amaute anteh an a pia hi.
Daniel1:17 Pasian in tua khangno lite laitheih siamna le pilna thukte a pia hi. Daniel pen maangmuhna le mangkhiat siamna a pia hi.
Daniel1:18 Kumpipa’ sehsa kum thum a cin khit ciangin Ashpenaz in khangnote khempeuh kumpipa kiangah a paipih hi.
Daniel1:19 Kumpipa in amaute khempeuh hopih a
Daniel1:20 Kumpipa in bangbang thuhaksa nono a dot hangin
Daniel1:21 Sairas
Daniel2:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpi a suahzawh a kum nihna kumin mang khat a man hi. A lungsim pataulua mahmah ahih manin a ihmu thei kei hi.
Daniel2:2 Tua ahih ciangin bang mang man cih a hilh dingin mitphial siamte
Daniel2:3 Amaute hong pai-in kumpipa mai-ah a din uh ciangin kumpipa in
Daniel2:4 Amaute in Aram pau tawh
Daniel2:5 Kumpipa in
Daniel2:6 Ahi zongin ka mangmat le a khiatna nong gen theih uhleh
Daniel2:7 Amaute in
Daniel2:8 Kumpipa in
Daniel2:9 Ka mangmat nong gen theih kei uhleh note khempeuh thukhenna khat bek ka hong pia ding hi. Noteng khempeuh in lungsim kikhatin zuauthu gengen leeng a ngaihsutna hong kikheel ding hi
Daniel2:10 Khongkhai theite in
Daniel2:11 Kumpipa’ thudotna pen haksa lua mahmah ahih manin
Daniel2:12 Tua thu hangin kumpipa heh mahmah a
Daniel2:13 Tua ahih ciangin mipilte khempeuh thahlup khitna ding thu kipia a
Daniel2:14 Tua ciangin Daniel zong Babylon gam sunga mipilteng a thatlum dingin a kisawl kumpi cing a ukpa Ariok kiangah kampau kidawm takin a va pai hi.
Daniel2:15 Amah in Ariok kiangah
Daniel2:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Daniel pai a
Daniel2:17 Tua ciangin Daniel a inn-ah ciah a
Daniel2:18 Amah in
Daniel2:19 Tua ciangin tua zan sungin maangmuhna tawh tua thuthukpi Daniel’ tungah kihilh a
Daniel2:20 “Pasian’ min kiphat tawntung ta hen; amah pilin a vanglian hi.
Daniel2:21 Amah in hun le khuahunte kheel a
Daniel2:22 Amah in thuthukpite le thusimte a lakkhia hi. Amah in khuamial sunga kiseelte thei a
Daniel2:23 Nang pen ka pu ka pate’ Pasian na hi a
Daniel2:24 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Babylon mipilte a that dingin a sawl pa Ariok kiangah Daniel pai a
Daniel2:25 Tua ciangin Ariok in thakhatin kumpipa kiangah Daniel paipih pah a
Daniel2:26 Kumpipa in Belteshazzar a kici Daniel kiangah
Daniel2:27 Daniel in
Daniel2:28 Ahih hangin thusim a lak thei vantungah Pasian khat a om hi. Amah in mai lamah bang thu hong piang ding cih nangmah Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa tungah a hong hilhzo hi.
Daniel2:29 Kumpipa na ihmut laitakin mailam a hong piang ding mang khat na man a
Daniel2:30 Tu-in midangte sangin ka pilzawk manin kei tungah tua thu a hong kilak hi loin
Daniel2:31 “Kumpipa aw
Daniel2:32 Tua milim lutang pen kham hoih mahmah tawh a kibawl ahi hi. A awm le a bante ngun tawh kibawl a
Daniel2:33 A khete sik tawh kibawl a
Daniel2:34 Tua banga na et laitakin mualtung panin suangtumpi khat kuama khuk lohin hong tuk a
Daniel2:35 Thakhatin sik
Daniel2:36 “Na mangmat pen tu-a teng ahi hi. Tu-in a khiatna ka hong gen ding hi.
Daniel2:37 Kumpipa aw
Daniel2:38 Amah in mi’ tenna leitungteng
Daniel2:39 Nang’ khit ciangin nang’ kumpi gam sangin a neuzaw kumpi gam adang khat hong piang ding a
Daniel2:40 Tua khit ciangin kumpi gam lina hong piang ding a
Daniel2:41 A khepek le a khemete khen khat sik le khen khat tungman kigawm ahi na mu hi. Tua pen kumpi gam kikhenthang ding hi
Daniel2:42 A khemete khenkhat sik hi a
Daniel2:43 Sik le tungman kigawm na muh mah bangin tua kumpi gam ukte in kigawm ding hanciamin zileta-in a kimat ding uh hi. Ahih hangin sik le tungman a kimat theih loh mah bangin a kigawm thei kei ding uh hi.

Daniel6:1 Darias in gam sung khempeuh a uksawn dingin gam ukpi za le sawmnih dingin a ngaihsun hi.

Daniel6:3 Gam ukpi dangte le vaihawmpi dangte sangin Daniel nasep siamzaw diak se hi. Tua bangin siamzaw diak se ahih manin kumpipa in gam buppi ukin koih ding a ngaihsun hi.
Daniel6:4 Tua ahih ciangin vaihawmpi dangte le gam ukpite in Daniel’ nasepna encikin a mawhna zon ding a hanciam uh hi. Ahih hangin Daniel pen a thuman le a citak khat ahih manin a mawhna le a simtatna a muzo kei uh hi.

Daniel7:4 A masa pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a

Daniel7:6 Ka et lai leh kamkei tawh a kibang sapi dang khat ka mu hi. A nungzangah vasa kha tawh a kibang kha li a nei hi. Tua sapi in lutang li nei a

Daniel11:1 Israel a cing vantungmi pen kei hong huhpa le a hong dal pa ahi hi
Daniel11:2 Tua ciangin amah in
Daniel11:3 Tua ciangin a minthang kumpi khat a hong kilang ding hi. Amah in gam zaipi tak uk ding a
Daniel11:4 Ahih hangin a thahat pen laitakin a gam hong kitam ding a
Daniel11:5 “Egypt kumpipa a hong thahat ding hi. Ahi zongin a galkapmang lianpente khat thahat pen ding a
Daniel11:6 Kum sauvei sim khit ciangin Egypt kumpipa in a kipawlkhawm theih nadingin Syria kumpipa le ama tanu a kitengsak ding hi. Ahih hangin tua kipawlkhawmna kip lo ding a
Daniel11:7 “A sawt loin tua numei’ behte khat in Syria kumpi sim ding a
Daniel11:8 Amah in amaute’ milim pasian-te le a na manpha ngun le khamte Egypt gamah a pua ding hi. Kum tawmvei sung bek kilemna a om ding hi.
Daniel11:9 Syria kumpipa in Egypt gam sim ding a
Daniel11:10 “Syria kumpipa’ tate
Daniel11:11 Egypt kumpipa zong heh mahmahin Syria kumpipa simgawp ding a
Daniel11:12 A galhatna hang le galkap tampi a thahna hangin kisathei mahmah ding a
Daniel11:13 Syria kumpipa khatvei kuankikin a masa sangin galkap a tamzaw a kaikhawm ding hi. A hun kicingta a sak ciangin galkap tampi le galhiam kicing piikpeek tawh a kuankhia ding hi.
Daniel11:14 “Tua hun ciangin mi tampi tak in Egypt kumpipa a lehdo ding uh hi. Daniel’ mipihte ahi
Daniel11:15 Tua ahih ciangin Syria kumpipa in kulhpi tawh a ki-umcih khuapite luhzo-in a la khin ding hi. Egypt galkapte in gal dosuakzo nawn lo ding uh a
Daniel11:16 Galdo zo ding om nawn lo uh ahih manin a galte uh a ututin a gamta ding uh hi. Thuciam Gamah zong lutin a khut sungah tua gam a om ding hi.
Daniel11:17 “Syria kumpipa in a galkap neih khempeuh zangin galsim ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Olno takin a gualzawh theih nadingin a tanu le a galte tensak ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Ahih hangin a tangtungzo kei veve ding hi.
Daniel11:18 Tua khit ciangin tuipi tungtawnin minam dangte sim ding a
Daniel11:19 Kumpipa a kulhpi a zuankik dingin a gamah hong ciah ding a
Daniel11:20 “Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat in ama nung hong zuikik leuleu ding a
Daniel11:21 “Ama zomah Syria kumpi ding pen migilo
Daniel11:22 Ama thu a nial galkap honpite le Pasian’ siampi liante khempeuh a mangthangsak ding hi.
Daniel11:23 Zuaugen siamna zangin minam dangte tawh kilemna a bawl ding hi. Minam tawmno khat bek a uk hangin a thahatna a khang semsem ding hi.
Daniel11:24 Amah in a pu a pate’ hih ngei loh
Daniel11:25 “Egypt gam hangtakin a sim theih nadingin galkap tampi a kaikhawm ding hi. Egypt-te in zong galkap tampi tawh nasia takin a na do ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Egypt kumpipa in khemna thuak ding ahih manin gal a zo kei ding hi.
Daniel11:26 Ama muan pen a thudot mipilte in amah lehbawlin a siasak ding uh hi. A galkapte tampi tak si ding ahih manin gal a lel ding hi.
Daniel11:27 Tua kumpi tegel in sabuai khat tungah tu-in an a nekhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a ngaihsutna uh a hoih zawsang om tuan lo ahih manin a kikhem tuak ding uh hi. A hun tung nai lo ahih manin a deih bang uh a ngahzo kei uh hi.
Daniel11:28 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa
Daniel11:29 “Tua nung ciangin Egypt gam simkik leuleu ding a
Daniel11:30 Rom mite
Daniel11:31 A galkapte pawlkhat in biakinnpi le biakinnpi huang a ninsak ding uh hi. Amaute in nisim biakpiaknate khawlsak ding uh a
Daniel11:32 Kumpipa in tua biakna a nusia mite a thuzawh theih nadingin zuaugen siamna a zang ding hi. Ahih hangin Pasian’ nung a zui mite ahih uhleh thahatin a gualzo ding uh hi.
Daniel11:33 Pilna a nei mite in a pilna uh midang tampite tawh a neikhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin tawlkhat sung mi pawlkhat in galsung a sihna le meikuang sunga thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Mi pawlkhatte in lawkgawpna le thongkiatna a thuak ding uh hi.
Daniel11:34 Tua bangin thahna a thuak laitakun
Daniel11:35 Mi pawlkhat in thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua bangin a pianna thu pen beina a tun mateng sianthosakna le mipha le misia khentelna
Daniel11:36 “Syria kumpipa a ut bangbangin a gamta ding hi. Amah in
Daniel11:37 Kumpipa in a pu a pate’ biak pasian le numeite in a it pasian a thusim kei ding hi. Pasian a kici peuhmah khat beek a thusim kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate sangin amah a lianzaw-in a kingaihsun hi.
Daniel11:38 Tua pasian-te sangin kulhpi a dal pasian a thupisim zaw ding hi. Amah in kham
Daniel11:39 Amah in a kulhpi a ciang dingin pasian dang a biate a sawl ding hi. Amah in amah kumpi-in a sang mite minphatna
Daniel11:40 “Syria kumpipa’ hun a bei dektak ciangin
Daniel11:41 Amah in Thuciamna Gam zong sim ding a
Daniel11:42 Amah in gam tampi tak sim ding a
Daniel11:43 Amah in Egypt gam sunga kiseel ngun le kham le a neihsa uh na manphateng khempeuh a la ding hi. Amah in Libya le Ethiopia gam zong a zo ding hi.
Daniel11:44 Tua ciangin
Daniel11:45 Amah in a kumpi puanbuk lianpite biakinn dinna mualtung le tuipi kikalah a lam ding hi. Ahih hangin amah a si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a huh ding kuamah a om kei hi
Daniel12:1 Tua ciangin saihadial puan a silh vantungmi in
Daniel12:2 A sisa mi tampite in nuntakna a ngahkik ding uh hi. Pawlkhatte nungta tawntung ding uh a
Daniel12:3 A pilte ahih uhleh vantung khuavak tawh a taangkhawm ding uh hi. A pha-in gamtat ding mi tampi a hilhte pen aksi bangin a taang tawntung ding uh hi.
Daniel12:4 Tu-in Daniel aw
Daniel12:5 Tua ciangin keimah Daniel in gun pang tuak a ding mi nih ka mu hi.
Daniel12:6 Tua mite khat in puanpak silh a
Daniel12:7 Puanpak silhpa in a khut tegel vantung lamah laamto-in
Daniel12:8 A thugen za napi-in teltakin ka thei kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin
Daniel12:9 Amah in
Daniel12:10 Mi tampite kisiansuahin a hoih le a hoih lo a kikhentel ding uh hi. Migilote in bangmah theitel thei lo uh ahih manin a gilo semsem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin mipilte in theihtel theihna a nei ding uh hi.
Daniel12:11 Amaute in nisim biakpiakna a khawlsak
Daniel12:12 Ni tulkhat zathum sawmthum le nga sung muanhuai takin a ngakzo kenkante in thupha a ngah ding uh hi.
Daniel12:13 Nang Daniel na hih leh a tawp dong muanhuai takin om in. Tua ciangin na si ding a

Joel1:5 No zukhamte aw

Joel1:17 Guahtui om lo ahih manin khai kituhte khempeuh lei sungah keucip a
Joel1:18 A gilkial tuu le bawngte cimawhin tau uh a

Joel1:20 Luitui luang khempeuh kangcip khinta a
Joel2:1 Zion mualtungah peengkul tum unla
Joel2:2 Tua ni pen a mial
Joel2:3 A madawkte
Joel2:4 Amaute’ mel sakolte tawh kibang a
Joel2:5 Mualtung tengah a tuan zuazua laitakun sakol leeng ging zuazuate le gamlak a lopa omte kangin a puak ziazua tawh kibang uh a
Joel2:6 Amaute hong pai ciangin mi khempeuh lau uh a
Joel2:7 Galte bangin hong sim uh a
Joel2:8 Amau’ lampi san ciat hong tawn uh a
Joel2:9 Khuapi sung hong kidenna uh a
Joel2:10 Amau’ mai-ah leipi ling a
Joel2:11 Ama mihonpite tam mahmah uh ahih manin amaute thu pia-in a mai uhah Topa awng a
Joel2:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu mahmah nangawnin lungsim tak tawh kisik kikin
Joel2:13 Na dah taktakna uh lungkhamna tawh langsak unla
Joel2:14 Topa

Joel2:16 Mite kaikhawm unla
Joel2:17 Topa’ na a sem siampite

Joel2:19 Topa in ama mite’ thungetna dawng a

Joel2:21 “Lote aw
Joel2:22 Ganhingte aw
Joel2:23 “Zion mite aw

Joel2:31 Topa’ ni
Joel2:32 Ahi zongin Topa’ tungah huhna a ngen khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi. Topa’ gensa bangmahin Zion Mual le Jerusalem khua sungah a suakta mi om ding uh hi. Topa in a teel mite
Joel3:1 “Tua hun ciangin Judah le Jerusalem
Joel3:2 Minam dang khempeuh kaikhawmin Jehoshafat Kuam-ah ka paipih ding hi. Ka mihingte tungah a bawlnasa uh hangin tua munah amaute thu ka khen ding hi. Amaute in Israel mite
Joel3:3 A galmatte uh kua in ngah ding
Joel3:4 “Taia khua
Joel3:5 Ka ngun
Joel3:6 Judah le Jerusalem mite
Joel3:7 Tu-in amaute na zuakna uh mun panin a lakhia kik ding ka hi a
Joel3:8 Na tanute uh le na tapate uh Judah mite tungah ka zuak ding a
Joel3:9 “Minam dangte tungah hih bangin thuzaksakna bawl in: Galhang mite sam unla
Joel3:10 Lokhawhna tute namsau-in seek unla
Joel3:11 Kimkotah a om minam dang khempeuh aw
Joel3:12 “Minam dangte hong kithawi hen la
Joel3:13 Amaute gilo mahmah uh ahih manin anlak huna buhsi bangin at gawp unla
Joel3:14 Thukhenna Kuam-ah a tul a thenin om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai munah Topa’ ni hong tung baih ding hi.

Amos1:1 Tekoa khua-a a teng tuucingte lakah Amos a kici mi khat om hi. Uzziah pen Judah kumpi hi-in Joash’ tapa Jeroboam in Israel kumpi a sep laitak
Amos1:2 Amos in
Amos1:3 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Damaskas khuamite thumvei a khialh khit
Amos1:4 Tua ahih manin Hazael innkuante mei tawh ka hal ding a
Amos1:5 Damaskas khuakulhpi zawlte ka sutan ding a
Amos1:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Gaza khuamite thumvei a khialh khit
Amos1:7 Tua ahih ciangin Gaza khuapikulh ka kangsak ding a
Amos1:8 Ashdod khuapi-ah a teng mite ka lakhia ding a
Amos1:9 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Taia khuamite thumvei a khialh khit
Amos1:10 Tua ahih ciangin Taia khuapikulh ka kangtumsak ding a
Amos1:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Edom mite thumvei a khialh khit
Amos1:12 Tua ahih ciangin Teman gam sung khempeuh ka kangtumsak ding a

Amos1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Rabbah khuapikulh ka haltum ding a
Amos1:15 A kumpipa uhleh a uliante uh salin kiman ding hi.
Amos2:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Moab mite thumvei a khialh khit

Amos2:3 Tuate lakah Moab gam ukte ka sisak ding a

Amos2:5 Tua ahih ciangin Judah gam sung teng ka kangtumsak ding a
Amos2:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite thumvei a khialh khit

Amos2:8 Biakna tau gei khempeuhah amaute lum uh a
Amos2:9 Ahi zongin amaute ka khualna hangin taamtak sing bangin a sang mahmah
Amos2:10 No ka mihingte
Amos2:11 Na tapate uh pawlkhat kamsang dingin ka teel a

Amos3:1 Israel mite aw
Amos3:2 Leitung minam khempeuh lakah note bek hong thei-in
Amos3:3 Mi nih
Amos3:4 A samat ding mu lopi-in
Amos3:5 Thang antah om lopi-in leilaka thangah vasa mawk awk ahi hiam? A su khat om lopi-in
Amos3:6 Khuapi sungah pataukohna gal peengkul a kitum ciangin mite lau loin ommawk thei ahi hiam? Topa’ tunsak lohpi-in khuapi sungah lauhuaina mawk tun ahi hiam?
Amos3:7 Topa Pasian in ama nasem kamsangte tungah ama geelna theisak masa lopi-in bangmah hih het lo hi.
Amos3:8 Humpinelkai a hawk ciangin lau loin ki-om thei ahi hiam? Topa Pasian in thu a gen ciangin kua in ama thu gen loin om thei ding ahi hiam?
Amos3:9 Samaria gam munmuanhuai-ah a om mite le Egypt gam munmuanhuai-ah a om mite tungah thu zasak unla

Amos3:11 Tua ahih ciangin galte in a gam uh umcihin
Amos3:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Humpinelkai’ nek baang tuu khebom nih ahi a

Amos3:14 Amau’ khialhna hangin Israel gim ka piak ni ciangin
Amos3:15 Keimah in phalbi le khuakhal innte ka susia ding a

Amos4:9 Na ankungte uh lung nesakin ka vulsak a

Amos4:11 Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite ka suksiat bangin note pawlkhat kong susia hi. Meikhuk panin a kiteenkhia singkhuah khat tawh na kibang uh hi. Tua bang hinapi-in kei lamah nong kihei kei uh hi

Amos5:2 Nungak Israel puk khin a

Amos5:5 A bia dingin Beersheba-ah pai kei un. Bethel-ah kei hong zong kei un; a mawkna suak ding hi. Gilgal-ah zong lut kei un; Gilgal mite
Amos5:6 Topa zong un; tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi. Amah na zon kei uhleh Josef mite tungah meikuang bangin amah hong kuang ding a
Amos5:7 Thutang lumletin thuman mite lei a denna
Amos5:8 Vana om aksi Seguk le Zawlzawngte bawlin

Amos5:11 Note in mizawngte tuancilin
Amos5:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khialhna tampite uh le na mawhna tampite uh a vekin ka thei khin hi. Thuman mite gimsakin
Amos5:13 Tua ahih manin hih bang hunsiat hun laitakin thu ngaihsun thei mite
Amos5:14 Note na nuntak theih nadingun siatna gamta loin
Amos5:15 Thusia mudahin thupha deih unla
Amos5:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topa
Amos5:17 Note gim a pia dingin hong pai ding ka hih manin leenggui lo khempeuhah kahna aw ging ding hi
Amos5:18 Topa’ ni hong tun ding a ngaklah note a dingin bangzah takin lauhuai ding ahi hiam? Note a dingin tua ni a hoihna hong om ding ahi hiam? Tua ni pen lungzin’ ni hi a
Amos5:19 Humpinelkai kihta-in vompi a tuakpa tawh kibang ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh mi khat a inn-ah hong tai a
Amos5:20 Topa’ ni pen khuavak ni hi loin khuamial ni hi a
Amos5:21 Na biakna pawite uh mudahin ka deih kei a
Amos5:22 Meihal biakna le an tawh biakna nong paipih uh hangin tuate kong sang kei ding hi. Thunuama biakpiak nadingin na hong paipih uh a thau mahmah ganhingte zong et-in ka nei vet kei ding hi.
Amos5:23 La sa-in na gamlumnate uh khawl un; na lasakna uh a gingte ka za nuam kei hi.

Obadiah1:1 Obadiah’ genkholhna: Edom gam tawh kisai-in Topa Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Minamte lakah kamtai khat kisawlzo a
Obadiah1:2 En un
Obadiah1:3 Na lungsim kiphatsakna un note a hong khemzo hi. Note in suang kulhpi beelin mual dawnah na ten manun
Obadiah1:4 Muvanlai bangin sangpi-ah leengin
Obadiah1:5 Zanin na kiangah gutate le misuamte hong pai-in supna tampi na thuak hangin a deihteng bek uh hong guksak ding hi lo ahi hiam? Leenggah late in lolai-ah a sangte nusia laitei hi lo ahi uh hiam?
Obadiah1:6 Ahih hangin Esau kibuluh khinzo a
Obadiah1:7 Na pawl teng in nang hong khemzo uh a
Obadiah1:8 Topa in: “Tua ni ciangin Edom sung pan a mipilte ka susia ding a
Obadiah1:9 Teman khua aw
Obadiah1:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggampa Jakob bawlsia-in na thahna hangin maizumna in nang hong khuh ding a
Obadiah1:11 Namdangte in a neihsateng a puakkhiat ni-in gamdang mite a kongpi sungah a lut ni-in
Obadiah1:12 Na sanggamte uh a tuahsiat ni-in mu nuam dah hoh un. Judah mite a kisiat ni-in lungdamin nuam kei un. A kisiat ni-in lungdam kei un. A cihmawh ni-in nuihsan kei un.
Obadiah1:13 Ka mite in haksatna a tuah ni-in a kongpi sungah tum kei un. A tuahsiat ni-in a thuaknate uh mu nuam kei un. A tuahsiat ni-in a sum a paite uh laksak kei un.
Obadiah1:14 A suakta sunte a khaktan dingin na ding kei ding uh hi. A cihmawh ni-in a hinglai sunteng
Obadiah1:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh minam kimte tungah ka thukhenna ding ni a naizo hi. Nang bawl bangin nangma tungah hong kibawl ding hi. Na hih bangin na lu bukah hong tukik ding hi.
Obadiah1:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mual siangtho tungah na thuak mah bangun
Obadiah1:17 Ahih hangin Zion mualah pawlkhat va tai ding uh a
Obadiah1:18 Tua ciangin Jakob innkuante mei bang ding uh a
Obadiah1:19 Negeb gammite in Esau’ gam luah ding uh a
Obadiah1:20 Israel mi salin a omte in Kanaan gam Zarefat ciang dong luah ding uh a
Obadiah1:21 A gualzo Jerusalem khuamite in Esau’ gam simin uk ding uh a

Micah1:1 Judah gam kumpi Jotham
Micah1:2 No minam khempeuhte aw
Micah1:3 Ama mun siangtho panin Topa hong pai a
Micah1:4 Meikhuk sungah khuainun a kikoih bangin ama khenuai-ah mualliante tuisuak ding a
Micah1:5 Pasian’ tungah Israel-te’ mawhna le a khialhnate uh hangin hih thute khempeuh a piang ahi hi. Israel-te’ khialhna kua ngawh ding ihi hiam? Samaria mite ngawh ding ihi hiam? Judah gam sungah milim bia-in a khial kua ahi hiam? Jerusalem mite ahi hi.
Micah1:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Samaria khuapi

Matthew2:9 Amaute in kumpipa’ vaikhak thuteng a zak khit uh ciangin paikhia uh a
Matthew2:10 Tua aksi a muh uh ciangin a lungdamna uh kigen thei lo hi.
Matthew2:11 Inn sungah amaute lut uh a
Matthew2:12 Herod kiangah a kihilkik loh nadingun a mang sung uhah Pasian in hilh ahih manin
Matthew2:13 Tua mipilte a ciah khit uh ciangin Josef’ mang sungah Topa’ vantungmi khat hong kilang a
Matthew2:14 Josef zong kithawi pah a
Matthew2:15 Herod a sih hun ciang dong tua gamah a va om uh hi. Kamsangpa tungtawnin Topa in
Matthew2:16 Nisuahna lam panin a hong pai mipilte in amah a khem lamtak Herod in a theih ciangin a heh suak mahmah hi. Tua mipilte tung panin aksi a kilat hun a dotna tawh kizui-in
Matthew2:17 Hih bangin thu hong pian’ ciangin kamsangpa Jeremiah in
Matthew2:18 “Nakpi taka kahna awging Ramah gam sungah kiza hi. Rachel in a tate kah a
Matthew2:19 Herod a sih khit ciangin Egypt gam a om Josef kiangah Topa’ vantungmi khat hong kilang a
Matthew2:20 “Naupang a that nuam mite si khinta ahih ciangin kithawi inla
Matthew2:21 Josef zong kithawi-in

Matthew2:23 Nazareth khua-ah a teng uh hi. Kamsangte in

Matthew5:1 Jesuh in tua bangin mihon tampi tak a muh ciangin mualtung lamah kahto-in tusuk a
Matthew5:2 Tua ciangin a kam ka-in amaute tungah thu hilh ding kipan a
Matthew5:3 “Kha thu lamah zawngkhal a kisate sungah vantung ki-ukna thu om ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:4 Dahin a thum a tau mite Pasian in amaute hehnem ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:5 A lungnem mite in Pasian’ ciamsa leitang ngah ding uh ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:6 Pasian’ deihteng sep ding a hanciamte Pasian in lungkimna ngahsak ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:7 Midang a hehpih mite tungah Pasian in hehpihna pia ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:8 Lungsim takpi tawh Pasian a zong mite in Pasian mu ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:9 Kilem nading deihin a hanciam mite in Pasian’ tate cihna ngah ding uh ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:10 Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamtat manin bawlsiatna a thuak mite vantung ki-ukna sungah a omte ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:11 “Midangte in keima hangin a man lopi-in hong simmawhin hong bawlsia a
Matthew5:12 Note a dingin vantungah thaman lianpi hong kikoih kholhsak ahih manin tua bang na tuah uh ciangin nuamin na lungdam un. Note’ hun ma-a kamsangte zong tua bangmahin a na kibawlsia ngei ahi hi.
Matthew5:13 “Note pen leitung mite a dingin ci tawh na kibang uh hi. Ahi zongin ci a alna bei leh i alsakkik theih nading lampi om nawn lo hi. A kizat nading bangmah om nawn lo a
Matthew5:14 “Note pen leitung mite a dingin khuavak tawh na kibang uh hi. Mual dawnah a om khua kiseelcip thei lo hi.
Matthew5:15 Mei a vak khit ciangin kuamah in lawh khuhlo hi. Meivakna mun sangah koihzaw a
Matthew5:16 Midangte in na gamtatna hoihte uh a muh ciangin vantungah a om na Pa uh min a phat theih nadingun mite mai-ah na gamtat hoihna uh khuavak bangin na kilangsak un.
Matthew5:17 “Moses Thukham le kamsangte’ thuhilhnate a phiat dingin hong pai hi
Matthew5:18 Hoihtakin na phawk ding uh thu panin: Van le lei a bei mateng
Matthew5:19 Tua ahih manin hih thukhamte lakpan a neupente khat bek nangawn zuikha loin
Matthew5:20 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ deihna bangin gamtat nading thu-ah Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite sangin na cihtakzawk uhleh vantung ki-ukna sungah a om thei bek ding na hi uh hi.
Matthew5:21 “Tanglai mite tungah
Matthew5:22 Ahi zongin ke’n note kiangah kong genin-ah: A sanggampa tungah a heh mi in thukhenna thuakkha thei ding hi. A sanggampa kiangah
Matthew5:23 Tua ahih manin Pasian tungah biakna a pia dingin biakna tau mai-ah na om laitakin na sanggamte khat peuhpeuh na tungah a lungkim lohna thu na phawk leh
Matthew5:24 Pasian na biak nading nate
Matthew5:25 Nangma tungah mi khatpeuh lungkim loin zumah hong khiat leh
Matthew5:26 A mantakin kong genin-ah: Na liau sum na piak khit dong matengin thong sung panin na suakta ngei kei ding hi.
Matthew5:27 “‘Mi zi tungah na mawh kei ding hi
Matthew5:28 Ahi zongin ke’n kong genin-ah: Mawhpih nopna lungsim tawh numei khat a en mi peuhmah in a lungsimah tua numei tawh a mawh ahi hi.
Matthew5:29 Tua ahih manin na mit taklam in na mawh nading hong piansak leh khelkhia inla paai in. Na pumpi bupin hell khuk sungah hong kikhul sangin na pumpi na khat pelem leh nang a dingin hoihzaw lai hi.
Matthew5:30 Na taklam khut in na mawh nading hong piansak leh sattan inla paai in. Na pumpi bupin hell khuk sungah hong kikhul sangin na pumpi na khat pelem leh nang a dingin hoihzaw lai hi.
Matthew5:31 “‘A zi a ma mi peuhmah in a zi tungah makna lai pia ta hen
Matthew5:32 Ahi zongin ke’n note kiangah kong genin-ah: Mi khat peuhmah in pasal dang tawh a mawhna hang lobuang
Matthew5:33 “Tanglai-in mite tungah
Matthew5:34 Ahi zongin ke’n note kiangah kong genin-ah: Hih ding khat peuhpeuh na neih uh ciangin kiciamna na zang vet kei un. Kiciamna-in vantung na zang kei un - Pasian’ tokhom hi veve hi.
Matthew5:35 Leitung zong kiciamna-in na zang kei un - Pasian’ khengakna mah hi veve hi. Jerusalem khuapi zong kiciamna-in na zang kei un - Kumpi lian ahi Pasian’ khuapi mah hi veve hi.
Matthew5:36 Kiciamna-in na lutang zong na zang kei in. Na lu tunga om samzang khat bek nangawn a kangsa vomsak thei loin
Matthew5:37 Na gen peuhmah ahi ahihleh
Matthew5:38 “Note in
Matthew5:39 Ahi zongin note kiangah ke’n kong genin-ah: A gilote na thukkik kei un. Mi khatpeuh in na paang taklam hong bet leh a langkhat zong na dawh lai zaw in.
Matthew5:40 Mi khatpeuh in na puansungsilh a ngahnop manin zumah hong khia-in hong laksak leh na puantungsilh zong na piathuah lai in.
Matthew5:41 Galkapte khatpeuh in tai khat sung a van pua dingin hong sawl leh a valin tai khat sung mah na puaksak lai in.
Matthew5:42 Mi khat peuhpeuh in na khat peuhpeuh hong nget leh na pia inla
Matthew5:43 “Note in
Matthew5:44 Ahi zongin ke’n note kiangah kong genin-ah: Na galte uh na it unla
Matthew5:45 Tua hileh vantungah a om na Pa uh tate na hi thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in mihoihte le misiate tungah a kibangin ni taangsak khawm a
Matthew5:46 Tua ahih manin no hong itte bek na it uhleh Pasian in bang thaman hong pia zenzen ding ahi hiam? Siahdongte nangawn in amau a itte it thei uh hi.
Matthew5:47 Na lawmte bek uh hopihin thupha na piak uhleh mi mawkmawkte sangin na hoihzawkna uh bang om ahi hiam? Gentail mite nangawn in tua bang ciang lel hih thei uh hi.
Matthew5:48 Tua ahih manin vantungah a om na Pa uh a cingtaak mah bangin note zong lungsim citakin na cingtaak nading uh na hanciam un.
Matthew6:1 “Biakna tawh kizomin na hoih khat peuhpeuh na sep uh ciangin mite’ phat ding deihna tawh a kilang theithei dingin na sepkhak loh nadingun na kingaihsun un. Tua bangin gamta le-uhcin
Matthew6:2 “Tua ahih manin mi cimawhte tungah huhna na piak uh ciangin
Matthew6:3 Ahi zongin note in mi cimawhte citna tawh na huh uh ciangin na lawm naihuai pente uh nangawn in hong theih loh nadingun pia unla
Matthew6:4 kuamah theisak kei un. Tua hileh kuama muh lohin na gamtatna uh a mu na Pa un note tungah thaman hong pia ding hi.
Matthew6:5 “Note in thu na nget uh ciangin mite’ muh theih dingin a kineihkhem mite in kikhopna innsung le kongzing lamka lai-ah a ngetnop se uh bangin na gamta kei un. Tua bangin a gamtate in thaman a ngah khinta ahihna uh limtakin phawk un.
Matthew6:6 Ahi zongin thu na nget uh ciangin na innsung uhah tumin kong khak unla
Matthew6:7 “Thu na nget uh ciangin i thunget sau leh Pasian in hong pia deuh ding hi
Matthew6:8 Tua na thunget ma nangawnun na Pa un note’ kisapna teng hong theikhin ahih manin Gentail mite na bang kei un.
Matthew6:9 Tua ahih manin thu na nget uh ciangin hih bangin na ngen un: ‘Vantunga om kote’ Pa aw
Matthew6:10 Na ukna hun hong tung hen la
Matthew6:11 Nisim khamkhop an hong pia in.
Matthew6:12 Kote tungah a hong mawhte mawh maisakna ka neih bangun ko’ mawhna zong hong maisak in.
Matthew6:13 Ze-etna lian hong thuaksak ke’n. Gilo’ kiang pan hong honkhia in
Matthew6:14 Note in midangte’ hong mawhna na maisak uhleh vantungah a om na Pa un zong note’ mawhna hong maisak ding hi.
Matthew6:15 Ahi zongin note in midangte’ hong mawhna na maisak kei uhleh vantungah a om na Pa un zong note’ mawhna hong maisak lo ding hi.
Matthew6:16 “An na tan’ uh ciangin a kineihkhem mite bangin maikhingin om kei un. Amaute in an a tanlam uh mite in a theih ding uh a ut manun gilkial mai pua-in a om uh hi. Amaute in a antan’ thaman uh a ngah khinta ahih lamtak limtakin thei un.
Matthew6:17 Ahi zongin an na tan’ uh ciangin na mai uh phiatin na sam uh hiat un.
Matthew6:18 Tua hileh midangte in na an tanlam uh a theih loh hangin na muh theih loh na Pa un hong thei veve ding a
Matthew6:19 “Nget in ne-in a kekseu theihna
Matthew6:20 Nget in a nek theih lohna
Matthew6:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sum omna uhah na lungsim uh om tawntung ding hi.
Matthew6:22 “Mittang pen pumpi a dingin meivak tawh kibang hi. Na mit uh ciim leh na pumpi un hoihtakin khua mu thei hi.
Matthew6:23 Ahi zongin na mit uh maang leh na pumpi uh a dingin khua a mial hi. Tua ahih manin note’ sunga a om khuavak pen a mial hileh tua mialna pen nasia mahmah ding hi.
Matthew6:24 “Kuamah
Matthew6:25 “Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Na nuntak nadingun bang ne-in bang dawn ding cih ahi a
Matthew6:26 “Vanah a leeng vasate ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in khai tuh lo
Matthew6:27 Na lunghihmawh manun kua in na khan uh kum bangzah sotto thei na hi uh hiam?
Matthew6:28 Bang hangin puansilh ding lunghimawh na hi uh hiam? Gamlak a om paakte a nuntakzia ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in amau a dingin na lah sem lo
Matthew6:29 a hau mahmah Solomon nangawn a hoihpenin a kizep ciangin zong hih paakte banzo nai lo lai hi.
Matthew6:30 Tua ahih ciangin tuni-in hingin
Matthew6:31 Tua ahih manin bang ne ding a
Matthew6:32 (Gentail mite in lunghihmawh penin a neihte uh hih bangte ahi hi.) Hih nate khempeuh na kisap lamtak uh vantungah a om na Pa un a thei hi.
Matthew6:33 Thudang khempeuh sangin Pasian’ ukna le ama deihna na zuih theih nading uh thupi ngaihsut masazaw un. Tua hileh hih na kisapna dangte khempeuh uh zong hong piathuah veve ding hi.
Matthew6:34 “Tua ahih manin zing ciang huna ding ma lungkham masa kei un. Zing ciang thu ding ama thu-in omsak lel un. Tuni thu pen tuni thu mah tawh beisak unla
Matthew7:1 “Pasian in note hong mawhsak loh nadingin midangte va mawhsaksak nawn kei un.
Matthew7:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte’ thu na khenzia uh tawh kizui-in note tungah hong khen ding a
Matthew7:3 Bang hangin na lawmte’ mit sunga ninthem tang muhsak thei napi-in nangma mit sunga singluang tang phawk thei lo na hi hiam?
Matthew7:4 Nangma mit sungah singluang a tang kimlai
Matthew7:5 No a kineihkhem mite aw
Matthew7:6 “Uite tungah a siangtho nate pia kei un. Pia le-uhcin hong pet zawsop ding hi. Vokte mai-ah na suangmanphate uh lot kei un. Lot le-uh cin sikcip lel ding uh hi.
Matthew7:7 “Ngen un; na nget uhleh hong kipia ding hi. Zong un; na zon uh leh na mu ding uh hi. Kongkhak na kiu un; na kiuh uhleh hong kihon ding hi.
Matthew7:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uhleh a ngente khempeuh in ngah ding uh a
Matthew7:9 Pa ahi note khatpeuh in na tate un anlum hong ngen leh suangtum pia ding na hi uh hiam?
Matthew7:10 Ngasa hong ngen leh gul pia ding na hi uh hiam?
Matthew7:11 Note mihoih lo hinapi-in na tate uh tungah na hoih piak ding ngaihsun thei na hih uhleh vantungah a om na Pa un a ngen mite tungah na hoihte hong piazaw mahmah ding hi lo ahi hiam?
Matthew7:12 Tua ahih manin note tungah hong kibawl ding na deih bangun midangte tungah na bawl un. Moses Thukhamte le kamsangte’ thuhilhnate pen hih mah a deihna ahi hi.
Matthew7:13 “Kong kawcik bek tawnin lut un. Hell khuk tun nading kongvang pen lianin a lampi baih a
Matthew7:14 Ahi zongin nuntak tawntungna tun nading kong kawcikin a lampi haksa a
Matthew7:15 “Kamsang taktak a hilote na muh uh ciangin limtakin kikem un. Amaute in a tungthamah tuu lim hong pua-in
Matthew7:16 Amaute’ gamtatna tawh amau’ pianzia na thei ding uh hi. Lingvom kung panin leenggah kilo ngei a
Matthew7:17 Tua ahih manin singkung cidamte in gah limci gah a
Matthew7:18 Singkung cidamte in gah ginalo gah ngei lo a
Matthew7:19 Gah limci a gah lo singkungte kiphukin meikhuk sungah kikhul hi.
Matthew7:20 Tua ahih manin amau’ gamtatna tawh amau’ pianzia na thei ding uh hi.
Matthew7:21 “Kei kiangah
Matthew7:22 Tua ni ciangin mi tampi in kei kiangah
Matthew7:23 Tua ciangin keimah in amaute kiangah

Matthew9:1 Tua lai panin gunkuangah tuang leuleu-in tuili galkhat lama om ama khua-ah a va tungkik hi.
Matthew9:2 Mi pawlkhat in khutlekhezaw mi khat
Matthew9:3 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat in a lungsim uhah
Matthew9:4 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute’ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin
Matthew9:5 ‘Na mawhna hong kimaisak hi
Matthew9:6 Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in leitungah mawhmaisak theih nading thu nei hi
Matthew9:7 Amah zong tho-in a inn-ah a ciahpah hi.
Matthew9:8 Mihonte in hih thu a theih uh ciangin lau mahmah uh a
Matthew9:9 Tua lai mun panin Jesuh a paikhiat ciangin siahdongpa Matthai a zumah tu-in a om mu a
Matthew9:10 Jesuh in Matthai’ inn-ah nitak an a nek laitakin siahdong dangte le thukham a khial midang tampite in zong Jesuh le a nungzuite tawh an a nekhawm uh hi.
Matthew9:11 Farisi mite in hih thu a muh uh ciangin Jesuh nungzuite kiangah
Matthew9:12 Jesuh in hih thu a zak ciangin
Matthew9:13 Lai Siangtho sungah
Matthew9:14 Tua ciangin Jesuh kiangah Tuiphumpa Johan’ nungzuite hong pai uh a
Matthew9:15 Jesuh in amaute kiangah
Matthew9:16 Kuamah in a ton nai lo puanbek thak tawh puan lui a phop kei hi. Tua bangin phop leh puanbek thak a ton ciangin a lui kaigawmin a vang a gol semsem ding hi.
Matthew9:17 Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu thak thun lo hi. Kithun leh a savun um phukham ding a
Matthew9:18 Tua bangin Jesuh in thu genin a om laitakin Jesuh kiangah Jew mi ulian khat hong pai-in ama mai-ah hong khukdin a
Matthew9:19 Jesuh zong dingpah a
Matthew9:20 Tua laitakin kum sawm le nih tawntung a si a luang numei khat Jesuh’ nungah hong pai-in a puan mongteep a lawngsim hi.
Matthew9:21 Tua numei in
Matthew9:22 Jesuh zong hong kihei a
Matthew9:23 Jew mi ulianpa’ inn-ah Jesuh a tun ciangin tamngai tum mite le mihonpi a gamlum henhan a muh ciangin
Matthew9:24 “Na vekpi-un paikhia un. Hih numeino a si hi lo a
Matthew9:25 Ahi zongin mihonpite a pualamah a kipaikhiatsak khit ciangin tua numeino omna-ah Jesuh tumin a khut a va let ciangin tua numeino hong tho hi.
Matthew9:26 Hih thupiang tua gam khempeuhah a kizel hi.
Matthew9:27 Tua lai panin Jesuh a paikhiat ciangin mittaw mi nih in a nungah hong zui-in nakpitakin kiko uh a
Matthew9:28 Inn-ah Jesuh a lut ciangin mittaw mi nihte in zong hong zui uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in
Matthew9:29 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute’ mit lawnsak a
Matthew9:30 Tua ciangin amaute in khua mukik uh a
Matthew9:31 Ahi zongin amaute paikhia uh a
Matthew9:32 Tua mi nihte a paikhiat laitakun mi pawlkhat in dawi a veina hangin a pauthei lo mi khat
Matthew9:33 Ama sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit phetin tua mipa hong pautheikik pah hi. Mihonpite in lamdangsa mahmah uh a
Matthew9:34 Ahi zongin Farisi mite in
Matthew9:35 Tua bangin khuapite le khuaneute-ah Jesuh pai kawikawi a

Matthew10:1 Jesuh in a nungzui sawm le nihte sam a
Matthew10:2 Tua sawltak sawm le nihte’ min in: A masa-in Simon (Peter zong a kici pa) le a naupa Andru
Matthew10:3 Filip le Bartholomew
Matthew10:4 Simon (gam khual pa)
Matthew10:5 Jesuh in hih mi sawm le nihte sawl a
Matthew10:6 Tuu bangin a mangthang Israel mite lakah va paizaw un.
Matthew10:7 Na paina peuh uhah
Matthew10:8 Cinate damsakin
Matthew10:9 Kham ahi a
Matthew10:10 Khualzinna-ah an ngenin puak nading ip ahi a
Matthew10:11 “Khuapi ahi a
Matthew10:12 Inn khat peuhpeuhah na lut uh ciangin a mite hopihin thupha na pia un.
Matthew10:13 Tua na hopihna uh innsunga mite in note hong tunsaknop leh na hopihna thupha uh amaute tungah kip ding a
Matthew10:14 Inn khat peuhpeuh in ahi a
Matthew10:15 Thukhen ni ciangin tua khuamite’ thuakna sangin Sodom khua le Gomorrah khuamite’ thuakna olzaw lai ding ahihna thu hoihtakin phawk un.
Matthew10:16 “Ngiahon lakah tuu a kikhah bangin note hong sawlkhia ka hih manin gul bangin pilvang unla
Matthew10:17 Mi pawlkhatte in note hong manin zumah hong paipih ding uh a
Matthew10:18 Keima hangin gam ukte le kumpite mai-ah thu hong kisit ding hi. Hih bang na tuah uh ciangin thu hong sit mite le Gentail mite tungah Lungdamna Thu gentheih nading hunhoih a nei na hi uh hi.
Matthew10:19 Tua bangin thusitna a thuak dingin hong kipaipih ciangin
Matthew10:20 Thu na gen uh ciangin note’ gen hi loin
Matthew10:21 Unau le unau
Matthew10:22 Keima hangin Gentail mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh hi. Ahi zongin a tawp dongin a thuakzo mite in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi.
Matthew10:23 Khua khatah note hong kibawlsiat leh khuadang khatah tai un. Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Israel khua khempeuh na khit ma-un Mihing Tapa hong pai ding hi.
Matthew10:24 “A siapa sangin a sang naupangte lianzaw ngei lo a
Matthew10:25 Tua ahih manin sang naupangte pen a siapa uh tawh a kibat uhleh a lungkim ding uh hi a
Matthew10:26 “Tua ahih manin kuamah kihta kei un. A kiseelte khatvei teitei kimu ding a
Matthew10:27 Zan khuamial sunga kong gente
Matthew10:28 Pumpi a thah khit ciangin kha a that thei lote na kihta kei un. Hell khuk sungah pumpi le kha a nihin a susia thei pa na kihtazaw un.
Matthew10:29 Gitta nih ciangin mat khatin kizuak lel hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hinapi-in na Pa uh’ thukim lohin tua gittate khat nangawn lei-ah mawkkiat lo hi.
Matthew10:30 Note ahihleh na lu tung uha na sammal phazah nangawn uh hong kiciamtehsak hi.
Matthew10:31 Tua ahih manin lau kei un. Gitta tampi sangin note na manphazaw uh hi.
Matthew10:32 “Keima mi ahihna thu mite’ theihin a genkhia mite
Matthew10:33 Ahi zongin keima mi ahihna thu mite’ theihin a genkhia nuam lote
Matthew10:34 “Leitungah kilemna a omsak dingin hong pai hi
Matthew10:35 Tate le pate a kidosak ding
Matthew10:36 Mi khat a dingin a gal lian penpen ama innkuanpih mite mah hong hi ding hi.
Matthew10:37 “Kei sangin a nu a pa a itzawte kei tawh kilawm lo a
Matthew10:38 Ama singlamteh mah puatawm lopi-in ka nung hong zuite kei tawh kilawm lo hi.
Matthew10:39 Hih leitung nuntakna a hon nuamte in a nuntakna taktak taanlawh ding a
Matthew10:40 “Na thugen uh a hong sangte in kei’ thu a hong sang hi a

Matthew11:1 Jesuh in a nungzui sawm le nihte a vaikhakna a man khit ciangin tua kiimnai-a om khuate-ah thuhilh ding le thugen dingin tua mun panin a paikhia hi.
Matthew11:2 Tuiphumpa Johan in thong sung panin Jesuh’ nasepnate a zak ciangin Jesuh kiangah a nungzuite sawl a
Matthew11:3 “Nang pen a hong pai ding pa na hi hiam
Matthew11:4 Jesuh in amaute kiangah
Matthew11:5 Mittawte in khua mukik a
Matthew11:6 Kei hong umte pen a lungdamhuai mahmah ahi hi
Matthew11:7 Tua thudong mite a ciahkhiat khit ciangin Jesuh in mihonte kiangah Johan’ thu gen a
Matthew11:8 Tua hi lo ahihleh bang a mu dingin kilamen na hi uh hiam? Puan hoihnono a silhpa a mu dingin kilamen maw? A taktakin ci lehang
Matthew11:9 Tua ahih kei leh bang a en dingin pai na hi uh hiam? Kamsangpa a en ding maw? Hi hi; kamsangpa a en dingin na pai uh a
Matthew11:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in Johan’ thu a genna-ah
Matthew11:11 Leitung mi khempeuh sung pan Tuiphumpa Johan a lianpen ahi hi. Ahi zongin vantung ki-ukna sungah a neupen i cihte nangawn Johan sangin lianzaw lai hi.
Matthew11:12 Tuiphumpa Johan’ thuhilh hun a kipan tu ciang dong
Matthew11:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tuiphumpa Johan thuhilh a kipat hun ciang dong
Matthew11:14 Tua thu kigensa na upnop uhleh
Matthew11:15 Tua ahih manin bil neite in na za ta un.
Matthew11:16 “Ahi zongin tuhun mite bang tawh genteh ding ka hi hiam cih leh: Mihon omna lamkabomah a tu naupang a kimawlte tawh kibang uh hi. Naupang honkhat in a lawmte kiangah
Matthew11:17 ‘Lam nading khuang kong tumsak uh hangin na lam nuam kei uh a
Matthew11:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tuiphumpa Johan hong pai a
Matthew11:19 Mihing Tapa hong pai leuleu a
Matthew11:20 Tua ciangin Jesuh in nalamdang tampi a bawlna mun khuapi mite kisik nuam lo uh ahih manin taiibawl ding kipan a

Matthew12:1 Tua zawh a sawt loin Sabbath ni khatin mangbuh lo nawkin Jesuh a pai hi. A nungzuite a gil uh kial ahih manin mangbuhvuite zutin a ne uh hi.
Matthew12:2 Farisi mite in a muh uh ciangin Jesuh kiangah
Matthew12:3 Jesuh in amaute kiangah
Matthew12:4 Pasian’ inn sungah amah lut a
Matthew12:5 Tua ahih kei leh zong siampite in Sabbath sim mahin biakinn sungah Sabbath thukham khial napi-in mawhsakna a ngah tuan lohna thu uh
Matthew12:6 Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Tua biakinn sangin a lianzaw khat hih lai-ah hong om hi.
Matthew12:7 Lai Siangtho sungah
Matthew12:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni a ukpa ahi hi
Matthew12:9 Tua lai panin Jesuh paisuakin amau kikhopna inn sungah a lut hi.
Matthew12:10 Tua lai-ah a khut langkhat a zaw mi khat a na om hi. Jesuh gamta khial hi
Matthew12:11 Jesuh in amaute kiangah
Matthew12:12 Mi pen tuu sangin nakpitakin manphazaw ahih manin Sabbath ni-in a hoih sep ding a kilawm ahi hi
Matthew12:13 a mipa kiangah
Matthew12:14 Ahi zongin Farisi mite paikhia uh a
Matthew12:15 Jesuh in amah a kisawmna thu a theih ciangin tua mun panin a paikhia hi. Mi tampi in amah hong zui uh hi. Amah in cina mi khempeuh damsak a
Matthew12:16 Pasian in kamsang Isaiah tungtawnin a gen thu a tuntheih nadingin
Matthew12:17 
Matthew12:18 “Keimah in ka teelsa ka nasempa
Matthew12:19 Amah in thu seel loin
Matthew12:20 Amah in a zawngkhal mite dopbawl ding a
Matthew12:21 Gentail mite in amah bek mah lametin nei ding uh hi
Matthew12:22 Tua ciangin mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah mittawt le pau theih loh a thuah dawivei mi khat hong paipih uh hi. Jesuh in amah damsak ahih manin amah hong pauthei-in khua zong hong muthei hi.
Matthew12:23 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh a
Matthew12:24 Ahi zongin Farisi mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin
Matthew12:25 Jesuh in amaute’ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin amaute kiangah
Matthew12:26 Tua mah bangin Satan le Satan kihawlkhia le-uh a ukna bangci kip theih ding ahi hiam?
Matthew12:27 Keimah in Beelzebul vangliatna tawh dawite hawlkhia ka hih leh na mipihte un a kua’ vangliatna tawh hawlkhia ahi uh hiam? Na mipihte un na ngaihsut khialhna uh hong kilangsak hi.
Matthew12:28 Note’ ngaihsut bang hi loin
Matthew12:29 Mi khatpeuh in mi thahat khat pa’ inn sungah lutin a neihsate a laksak theih nadingin tua inn nei a thahatpa a hencip masak phot ding kisam hi. A hencip zawh khit ciang bekin a inn-ah lutin a neihsate lathei pan hi.
Matthew12:30 Kei hong pawlpih lo peuhmah keima lang hi uh a
Matthew12:31 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Mihingte’ kampau khialhna le gamtat khialhnate kimaisak thei ding a
Matthew12:32 Mihing Tapa langpangin a gensiate a mawhna uh kimaisak thei ding a
Matthew12:33 “Singgah limci a gahtheih nadingin a kung a cidam phot ding kisam a
Matthew12:34 Gul bangin ngian a zang note aw
Matthew12:35 Mihoihte in a hoih a kholteng suahkhia a
Matthew12:36 Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Thukhen ni ciangin mi khempeuh in phattuamna a om lo a kampaunate uh khempeuh bangin thusitna a thuak ding uh hi.
Matthew12:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh nomau kampauna tawh kizui-in thu hong kikhen ding a
Matthew12:38 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah
Matthew12:39 Ahi zongin Jesuh in
Matthew12:40 Ngasa gilpi sungah sun thum le zan thum sung Jonah a om mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong sun thum le zan thum sung mah lei sungah om ding hi.
Matthew12:41 Jonah in amaute kiangah thu a hilh ciangin a mawhna panun kisikkik uh ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin Nineveh khuamite in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Tu mahmahin note kiangah Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat a om hi.
Matthew12:42 Leitaw lam gam kumpinu in Solomon’ pilna thu a ngai dingin leitung phelkhat kantanin hong pai ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin amah in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding hi. Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Tu mahmahin hih lai-ah Solomon sangin a lianzaw khat a om hi.
Matthew12:43 “Mi khatpeuh sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit ciangin a ten nading mun keuna zongin a vak kawikawi hi. Ahi zongin a ten nading mun a muh zawh loh ciangin

Matthew13:13 Amaute in enen napi-in mu thei lo uh a
Matthew13:14 Kamsang Isaiah’ thugenkholhna
Matthew13:15 Hih mite’ lungsim mawl mahmah hi; a bil uh bingsak uh a
Matthew13:16 Ahi zongin note’ mit in mu-in na bil un za ahih manin a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi.
Matthew13:17 Ahi taktakin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Kamsangte le Pasian’ mi tampite in note’ muhte munuam mahmah napi-in mu lo uh a
Matthew13:18 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in khaici vawhpa thugentehna thu na ngai un.
Matthew13:19 Mi pawlkhat in Pasian’ hong ukna tawh kisai a lungdamhuai thu za napi-in a thu theitel lo uh ahih manin Dawimangpa hong pai-in amau lungsim sunga a kivawh thu a lakkhiatsak hi. Hih bangte pen lolai lampi dung a tu khaicite tawh kibang hi.
Matthew13:20 Suang kitawphah leilak a tu khaicite pen Pasian’ thu a zak ciangun lungdam takin a sangpahte a cihnopna ahi hi.
Matthew13:21 Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktum zo lo ahih manin tawlkhat sung bek um uh hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian’ thu hangin haksatna ahi a
Matthew13:22 Lingbulsum omna leilakah a tu khaicite pen Pasian’ thu za napi-in amau nuntakna sung uhah leitung lunghihmawhna le hauh nopnate in Pasian’ thu vuknelh ahih manin bangmah a suakkhia zo lote a cihnopna ahi hi.
Matthew13:23 Lei hoihna munah a tu khaicite pen Pasian’ thu a zak ciangin a tel mite a cihnopna ahi hi. Tua bang mite a dingin Pasian’ thu in man nei a
Matthew13:24 Tua ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna dang khat gen a
Matthew13:25 Ahi zongin zan khat
Matthew13:26 Taangte hong po-in a vuih hun ding ciangin tahum kungte zong hong lianin hong kilang hi.

Matthew13:28 amah in

Matthew13:31 Tua ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna dang khat gen leuleu a

Matthew13:33 Tua ciangin thugentehna khat mah gen leuleu a
Matthew13:34 Jesuh in hih thute khempeuh
Matthew13:35 Hih bangin thugentehna a zatna pen kamsang Isaiah in

Matthew13:37 Jesuh in
Matthew13:38 Lolai pen leitung hi a
Matthew13:39 tahum tang a vawh gal pa pen Dawimangpa ahi hi. Anlak hun pen leitung bei nading hun hi a
Matthew13:40 Tahumte kikaikhawmin meikhuk sungah a kikhultum mah bangin leitung bei hun ciangin tua bangmahin kihih ding hi.
Matthew13:41 Mihing Tapa in a vantung mite hong sawl ding a
Matthew13:42 meikhukpi sungah tua bang mite lawn ding uh a

Matthew13:44 “Vantung ki-ukna pen lolai-ah a kiseel sum tawh kibang hi. Mi khat in a muh ciangin limtakin a seelpha hi. Amah lungdam mahmahin a inn-ah ciahpah a
Matthew13:45 “Vantung ki-ukna pen sumbawlpa in a zon kep hoihpente tawh zong kibang hi.
Matthew13:46 Sumbawlpa in a manpha diak pawl kep khat a muh ciangin ciahpahin a neih khempeuh a zuak khit ciangin tua kep a lei hi.
Matthew13:47 “Vantung ki-ukna pen tui sungah kipaai-in ngasa namkim a awkna ngen tawh zong kibang hi.
Matthew13:48 Ngasa tampi tak a awk ciangin ngabengte in tui gei-ah a ngen uh kaikhia-in tusuk uh a
Matthew13:49 Leitung hun bei ciangin zong tua bangmah hi ding hi. Vantung mite hong pai-in mihoihte lak panin migilote lakhia-in
Matthew13:50 meikhukpi sungah tua migilote a khul ding uh hi. Tua lai-ah kapin a hagawi ding uh hi.
Matthew13:51 “Hih ka thugente khempeuh a khiatna na thei uh hiam?” ci-in Jesuh in a dot ciangin amaute in
Matthew13:52 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah

Matthew13:54 ama khua-ah pai a
Matthew13:55 Khutsiam pa’ tapa hi lel a
Matthew13:56 A nau numeite zong hih lai mah a om hi lo ahi uh hiam? Tua bang hinapi-in hih mipa in koi lai panin hih bang thuteng ngahthei ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
Matthew13:57 Tua ahih manin amah a sangzo kei uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah

Matthew14:7 “Na hong nget peuhpeuh ka hong pia ding hi

Luke3:19 Ahi zongin

Luke4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in

Luke4:12 Jesuh in

Luke4:14 Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh a kidimin Galilee gamah Jesuh a ciahkik hi. Tua kiima om gam khempeuhah ama thu kizakim hi.

Luke4:17 a nget bangin a sim dingin kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho bu a kipia hi. A laibu lemin a simnopna mun a zon ciangin a nuai-a bangin a kigelhna mun mu-in a sim hi. Tua munah
Luke4:18 “Gimna a thuak mite tungah Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Topa in kei hong sehkhin ahih manin keima sungah Topa’ kha hong om hi. Salin a kimante tungah suahtakna thu a gen ding
Luke4:19 Topa in a mite a hotkhiat ding kum a pulak dingin kei hong sawl hi
Luke4:20 Hih thu a kigelhna munteng a simkhit ciangin a laibu khupin biakinn nasempa tungah pia kikin a tu hi. Kikhopna inn sungah a om mi khempeuh in limtakin amah a en uh hi.
Luke4:21 Tua ciangin amaute tungah thugen ding kipan a
Luke4:22 Amaute khempeuh in Jesuh thupi sa mahmah uh a

Luke4:29 Amaute dingin khuanawlah Jesuh paipih uh a
Luke4:30 Ahi zongin amaute’ lak nawkin Jesuh a paikhia hiau hi.
Luke4:31 Tua ciangin Galilee gam Kapernaum khua-ah paisuk a

Luke6:16 James’ tapa Judas

Luke6:19 Jesuh’ tung panin vangliatna paikhia-in mi khempeuh damsak ahih manin mi khempeuh in amah lawn’ ding a hanciam uh hi.
Luke6:20 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite en a
Luke6:21 Tuhunin a gilkial note nidang ciangin na gil uh a vah ding hi. Tuhunin a dah note nidang ciangin na nuam ding uh hi.
Luke6:22 “Mihing Tapa’ hangin mite in hong mudahin hong tuamkoih a
Luke6:23 Vantungah na thaman ding uh lian mahmah ahih manin tua bang na tuah uh ciangin nuamin lungdamin na diang un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsangte tungah a bawl uh hi.
Luke6:24 “Ahi zongin tuhunin a hau note in nopsakna ngahkhin na hih manun gimna na thuak ding uh hi.
Luke6:25 Tuhunin a gilvah note in gilkial gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Tuhunin a lungdam note dahin na kap ding uh hi.
Luke6:26 “Mi khempeuh in note hong pahtakbawl ciangin gimna a thuak ding na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsang zuaute a pahtakbawl uh hi.
Luke6:27 “Ahi zongin ka thugen a za note kiangah kong cihin-ah: Na galte uh na it unla
Luke6:28 No hong phuisamte thupha na pia unla
Luke6:29 Na paang langkhat a hong bengte
Luke6:30 A hong ngente peuhmah na pia unla
Luke6:31 Note tungah a hong kibawl ding na deih uh bangin midangte tungah na bawl un.
Luke6:32 “No hong itte bek it le-uhcin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhnei mite nangawn in amau a itte a it uh hi.
Luke6:33 No tungah a hoihin a hong gamtate tung bekah a hoihin gamta le-uh cin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn tua bangmahin gamta uh hi.
Luke6:34 Ngahkik ding na lametna uh mite tung bekah leitawi na piak uhleh bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn in zong a piakzah mah uh a ngahkik dingin khatlekhat kileitawi uh hi.
Luke6:35 Tua bang lelin note na gamta kei ding uh hi. Na galte uh itin amaute tungah thupha bawl unla
Luke6:36 Tua ahih manin na Pa un hehpihna a neih bangin note in zong hehpihna lungsim nei ta un.
Luke6:37 “Midangte’ thu khen kei un. Tua hileh no tungah zong Pasian in thu hong khen lo ding hi. Midangte mawhsak kei un. Tua hileh Pasian in note zong hong mawhsak lo ding hi. Midangte’ mawhna maisak un. Tua hi leh Pasian in note’ mawhna zong hong maisak ding hi.
Luke6:38 Midangte tungah pia un. Tua hileh Pasian in note tungah zong hong pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte na piakna uh tawh kizui-in a henhen
Luke6:39 Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat zong gen a
Luke6:40 Sang naupang khat a siapa sangin lianzaw ngei lo hi; a sin ding khempeuh a theihkhit ciangin a siapa tawh kikim pan bek ding hi.”
Luke6:41 “Bang hangin na mit sungah singluang a tang phawkkha loin na lawmte’ mit sunga ninthem tang etsak na hi hiam?
Luke6:42 Na mit sunga singluang hong tang nangawn mu lo napi-in
Luke6:43 “A cidam singkung in gah ginalo gah ngei lo a

Luke6:45 Mihoih pa in a lungsim sunga thuhoih omteng hong suahkhia a
Luke6:46 “Bang hangin

Luke21:13 Hih hun sung pen note in Lungdamna Thu na gentheih nading uh hunhoih ahi hi.
Luke21:14 Tua hun ciangin eite in bangci gen ding cih lunghihmawhin nei kei un.

Luke21:18 Ahi zongin na samzang khat nangawn uh mangthang lo ding hi.

John3:13 Vantung panin a hong paisuk Mihing Tapa keimah simloh vantungah a paito ding kuamah om lo hi
John3:14 Moses in gamlak khuam tungah sumngo gul a khai mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong hong kikhai ding a
John3:15 amah a um mi khempeuh nungta tawntung ding hi.

John3:17 Pasian in leitungah a Tapa hong sawlna pen mawhsakna thukhen dingin a hong paisak hi loin
John3:18 Amah a um mite in mawhsak thukhenna thuak lo ding uh hi. Amah a um lote pen Pasian’ Tapa neihsun um lo uh ahih manin mawhsak thukhenna a thuak khinta uh ahi hi.
John3:19 Tua bangin mawhsak thukhenna a thuakna uh a hang in: Leitungah khuavak hong tungkhin napi-in a gamtatna uh hoih lo ahih manin leitung mite in khuavak sangin khuamial deihzaw uh hi.
John3:20 A gamtat hoih lo mite in a siatna uh a kilatkhak ding ut lo uh ahih manin khuavak deih lo uh a

John3:22 Hih thute khit ciangin Jesuh le a nungzuite Judea gamah pai uh a
John3:23 Tuiphumpa Johan zong thong kia nai lo hi. Tua hi a
John3:24

John3:27 Johan in

John3:30 Amah lian semsem ding a

John3:33 Ama thugen a umte pen

John4:1 Jesuh in Johan sangin mi tam ngahzaw in a tuiphumna thu Farisi mite in a za uh hi.
John4:2 (A taktakin Jesuh mahmah in tui phum loin a nungzuite bek in a phum ahi hi.)
John4:3 Jesuh in tua thu a phawk ciangin Judea gam panin paikhia-in Galilee gamah a paikik hi.
John4:4 Tua a paina-ah Samaria gam a nawk ding kisam hi.
John4:5 Tua bangin a nawk ciangin Samaria gam sungah Saikhar a kici khua khat a tung hi. Tua khua gei-ah Jakob in a tapa Josef a piak lo khat om hi.

John5:1 Tua khit ciangin
John5:2 Jerusalem khuasung Tuu Kongpi a kici gei-ah Hebru pau-in Bethzatha a kici bual khat om a
John5:3 Hih talapte sungah a mittaw
John5:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ vantungmi khat in tua bual tui lok thei zel a
John5:5 Tua talapte sung khatah kum le kum giat sung a cina khin mi khat a om hi.

John5:7 cina pa in

John5:15 Tua ciangin amah zong pusuak a
John5:16 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in Sabbath ni-in cina a damsakna hangin amaute in Jesuh bawlsiat ding a kipan uh hi.
John5:17 Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute kiangah
John5:18 Hih bangin ama kampauna hangin amaute in Jesuh thatnuam semsem uh hi. Amah in Sabbath thukham a palsat bek hi loin
John5:19 Tua ahih manin Jesuh in amaute kiangah
John5:20 Pa in a Tapa itin
John5:21 Pa in mi sisate nangawn thosakin a nuntaksak mah bangin Tapa in zong a ut peuhpeuh nungtasak thei hi.
John5:22 Pa in kuama tungah thukhen nasep sem lo hi. Mi khempeuh in Pa a zahtak mah bangin Tapa a zahtak theih nadingun Pa in thukhen nasep khempeuh a Tapa tungah a pia hi. Tua ahih manin Tapa a zahtak lo mi khempeuh pen Tapa a sawl Pa Pasian zong a zahtak lo ahi uh hi.
John5:23 
John5:24 “A mantakin kong genin-ah: Ka thugennate za-in kei hong sawl pa a um khempeuh a nungta paisuak ding hita hi. Mawhsak thukhenna ngah nawn loin
John5:25 A taktakin ci lehang: A si mite in Pasian’ Tapa’ aw a zak hun uh hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hun hong tungkhin hita a
John5:26 Pa in nuntakna a piaktheih mah bangin Tapa in zong a piaktheih nadingin Pa in a bawl hi.
John5:27 Amah pen Mihing Tapa ahih manin thu khentheih nading aana ama tungah a pia hi.
John5:28 Hih thu ka hong gen ciangin lamdangsa kei un. Han sungah a om misi khempeuh in ama aw za-in
John5:29 han sung panin a hong paikhiat uh hun hong tung ding hi. A gamtat hoih mite pen a nungta tawntung dingin hong thokik ding uh a
John5:30 “Keima thu guak tawh ka hihtheih bangmah om lo hi. Pasian’ hong genna bang bekin thu ka khen hi. Keima ut bangin sem loin kei hong sawl pa’ deih bangin sem ka hih manin ka thukhenna thuman hi.
John5:31 “Keima thu tawh kisai-ah kei mahmah in teci pang leng kuamah in a thumanin sang thei lo ding hi.
John5:32 Tua ahih manin keima a’ ding teci a pang ding mi khat om a
John5:33 Note in Johan kiangah thu a dong dingin mi na sawl uh a
John5:34 Keimah in mihingte’ teci panna a kisam ka hi kei a
John5:35 Johan pen meivak bangin kuangin a taang hi a
John5:36 Ahi zongin Johan’ teci panna sangin a lianzaw teci khat ka nei a
John5:37 Tua ban panin kei a hong sawl Pasian in zong keima a dingin teci a pang hi. Note in Pasian’ sawl pa’ thu um lo na hih manun Pasian’ aw lah za ngei lo
John5:38 
John5:39 Nuntak tawntung ngahtheih nading lametna tawh Lai Siangtho sung na lim sim mahmah uh a
John5:40 na nuntak theih nadingun kei kiangah nong painuam kei veve uh hi.
John5:41 “Hih bangin kong gen ciangin mihingte in hong pahtak ding ka deihna hi lo a
John5:42 note’ lungsim sungah Pasian itna na neih hetlohna uh ka theihna hang hizaw hi.
John5:43 Ka Pa’ thu tawh kei hong pai napi-in na hong sangnuam kei uh hi. Tua hinapi-in midang khatpeuh ama thu tawh hong paitawm leh na sang ding uh hi.
John5:44 Pasian’ pahtak theih nading hanciam nuam loin
John5:45 Hih bangin ka hong gen ciangin ka Pa kiangah note a hong mawhsak ding pa hi
John5:46 Moses in keima thu gen belin nei ahih manin Moses um taktak hi le-uhcin kei zong na hong um ding uh hi.
John5:47 Ahi zongin Moses’ laigelh thute um lo na hih manun kei hong bangci uptheih mah ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi.
John6:1 Tua khit ciangin Tiberias zong a kici Galilee Tuili galkhat lamah Jesuh a pai hi.
John6:2 Jesuh in cinate damsakin nalamdang lianpipi a bawlte mi tampi in mukhin uh ahih manin mi tampi tak in Jesuh nung a zui uh hi.
John6:3 Jesuh zong a mualtung lamah kahto-in a nungzuite tawh a tukhawm hi.
John6:4 Jew mite’ Paisan Pawi hun nai mahmah ta hi.
John6:5 Jesuh khuadak a
John6:6 (Jesuh in a hih ding thei napi-in Filip a ze-etna-in hih bangin a dong lel ahi hi.)
John6:7 Filip in
John6:8 Tua laitakin a nungzuite sung panin Simon Peter’ nau Andru in Jesuh kiangah
John6:9 “Hih lai-ah mangbuhham kibawl anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih sun-an a pua tangval khat om sam hi; tuate lah mihing hi zah lakah cihtaak ding ahi hiam?” ci hi.
John6:10 Ahi zongin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah
John6:11 Jesuh in anlum la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin mihon a tute lakah a hawm hi. Tua mah bangin ngasa zong hih a
John6:12 Mi khempeuh in a khamkhit uh ciangin a nungzuite kiangah

John6:14 Jesuh’ nalamdang bawl a muh uh ciangin tua lai-a om mihonpite in
John6:15 Mihonte in thatanghat thu tawh kumpi-in amah a koih sawmna thu Jesuh in a theih ciangin mualtung lamah amah guak a kihemkhia hi.
John6:16 A nitak ciangin tui gei-ah a nungzuite paisuk uh a

John6:18 Huih nakpi-in hong nung ahih manin tui hong kilokgawp hi.

John6:20 Jesuh in amaute kiangah
John6:21 Tua ciangin amaute nuam mahmah uh a
John6:22 A zing ciangin tui galkhatah a omlai mihonte in tui gei-ah gunkuang khat a omlai mu uh a
John6:23 Ahi zongin Tiberias khua panin gunkuang dang tampi hong pai a

John6:38 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima ut bangin a sem ding hi loin kei hong sawl pa’ deihna bangin a sem dingin vantung panin a hong pai ka hi hi.

John11:40 Jesuh in

John11:47 Tua ahih manin siampi liante le Farisi mite in thu vaihawm uliante tawh kikupna khat nei uh a
John11:48 Hih bangin omom sak lehang mi khempeuh in amah um ding uh a

John11:50 I minambup in siatna a thuak sangin i minambup tangin mi khat si leh a hoihzawkna thu phawk lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi.

John14:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah
John14:2 Note’ om nading mun a bawlkhol dingin a pai ding ka hi hi. Ka Pa’ inn sungah om nading mun tampi om hi. A om lo ding hileh hih bangin thu ka hong gen kei ding hi.
John14:3 Kei va pai-in note’ om nading mun ka va bawlkholh khit ciangin keima omna munah note na hong om theih nadingun note a hong la dingin ka hong paikik ding hi.
John14:4 Ka pai nading mun tuntheih nading lampi na thei uh hi
John14:5 Tua laitakin Thomas in
John14:6 Jesuh in ama kiangah
John14:7 Note in kei na hong theih nak-uhleh ka Pa zong a thei na hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu a kipanin Pa thei-in a mu khinta na hi uh hi
John14:8 Tua ciangin Filip in
John14:9 Jesuh in
John14:10 Kei pen Pa tawh pumkhat ka hih lamtak um lo na hi hiam? Note tungah ka hong gen thute keima thu bek tawh a hong gen ka hi kei a
John14:11 Pa tawh pumkhat ka hihna thu hoihtakin hong um un. Na hong up nai kei uhleh zong ka nalamdang bawlnate hangin hong um beek un.
John14:12 A mantakin ka hong genin-ah
John14:13 Tapa’ hangin Pasian’ pianzia a kilat theih nadingin keima min paulamin na hong nget khempeuh uh ka hong pia ding hi.
John14:14 Keima min paulamin na hong nget nak-uhleh ka hong pia ding hi
John14:15 Tua ciangin Jesuh in
John14:16 Keimah in Pa kiangah ka ngen ding a
John14:17 Leitung mite in tua Kha Siangtho mu thei lo
John14:18 “Note a cimawh dingin ka hong nusia kei ding hi. Note kiangah ka hong paikik ding hi.
John14:19 Tawlkhat khit ciangin leitung mite in kei hong mu nawn lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kei ka nuntak mah bangin note zong nungta ding na hih manun note in kei na hong mu ding uh hi.
John14:20 Tua hun ciangin Pa sungah kei ka omna thu
John14:21 Keima thupiakte sangin a zuite in keimah hong it ahi uh hi. Kei hong it mite pen ka Pa in zong it ding a
John14:22 Tua ciangin Judas Iskariot ahi lo Judas dang khat in
John14:23 Jesuh in
John14:24 Kei hong it lote in ka thugente zui lo ding uh hi. Tu-a na zak uh thute pen keima thu hi lo a
John14:25 “Note tawh ka hong omkhawm hun sungin hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi.
John14:26 Ahi zongin Pa in keima tangin a hong sawl ding Huhpa Kha Siangtho a hong tun ciangin note tungah thu khempeuh hong hilh ding a
John14:27 Note tungah keima neih bang lungnopna ka hong pia ding hi. Tua ka hong piak ding lungnopna pen leitung mite in a piaktheih a kip lo lungnopnate pawl hi lo hi. Tua ahih manin lau kei unla
John14:28 ‘Ka va paikhia ding a
John14:29 A thu hong pian’ taktak ciangin ka thugente na uptheih nadingun a pian’ ma-in a hong genkhol ka hi hi.
John14:30 Tu-in hih leitung a ukpa hong tungta ahih manin note kiangah thu kong gen man nawn kei ding hi. Amah in keima tungah aana nei lo hi.
John14:31 Ahi zongin leitung mite in Pa Pasian ka itna thu a theih nadingun Pa’ vaihawmna bangbangin a gamta ding ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin kithawi un; hih lai mun panin paikhia ta ni
John15:1 Tua ciangin Jesuh in
John15:2 Amah in gah a nei lo ka hiang khempeuh satkhia a
John15:3 Note tungah ka hong thugennate hangin note a siang na suak khinzo uh hi.
John15:4 Kei tawh hong kizom paisuak le-uhcin kei zong note tawh a kizom paisuak ka hi ding hi. A hiang pen a gui tawh kizom kei leh gah a gah theih loh mah bangin note zong kei tawh na kizop kei uhleh gah na gah thei kei ding uh hi.
John15:5 “Kei pen leenggui ka hi a
John15:6 Kei tawh a kizom lo mite pen leenggui hiang bangin kipaai khia-in keutum hi. Tua bang hiangte meikhuk sungah kilawnin a kangtum hi.
John15:7 Kei tawh na hong kizop uh a
John15:8 Gah tampi gah le-uhcin ka Pa’ minthanna a kilangsak na hi ding uh a
John15:9 Ka Pa in kei hong it zahin note hong it ka hih manin keima hong itna sungah om un.
John15:10 Ka Pa’ hong thupiakte zui-in ama itna sungah ka om mah bangin note in zong ka thupiaknate na hong zuih uhleh ka itna sungah a om na hi ding uh hi.
John15:11 Note hangin kei ka lungdam theih nading le note’ lungdamna a cingtaak a suahtheih nadingin hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi.
John15:12 “Note tungah ka hong piak thu in: Note ka hong it zahin note khatlekhat na ki-it un.
John15:13 Lawmte’ tang ding sih ngamna sangin lawmte itna a lianzaw om nawn lo hi.
John15:14 Ka hong thupiak bangin na gamtat uhleh ka lawmte na hi uh hi.
John15:15 Nasemte in a tote’ nasepna bangmah thei lo ahih manin note pen nasemte ka hong ci nawn kei ding hi. Ka Pa’ tung panin ka zak thu khempeuh note kiangah hong genkhin ka hih manin note
John15:16 Note in kei na hong teel kei uh a
John15:17 Tua hi a
John15:18 “Leitung mite in note hong muhdah leh kei a hong mudah masa ahihna thu na thei un.
John15:19 Hih leitung mite tawh a kipawl hi le-uhcin leitung mite in amau pawlte hong it ding hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung mite lak panin note ka hong teelkhia a
John15:20 ‘Sila pen a topa sangin lianzaw lo hi
John15:21 Ahi zongin amaute in kei hong sawl pa thei lo uh ahih manin keima mi na hihna uh hangin amaute in hih bangin hong bawl ding uh ahi hi.
John15:22 Kei hong pai kei-in amaute tungah thu a gen lo hi leng amaute in mawh pualo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin tu-in ahihleh a mawhna thu uhah kiphel nading a paulap ding uh bangmah om nawn lo hi.
John15:23 Kei hong mudahte in ka Pa zong a mudah ahi hi.
John15:24 Kuamah in a bawl ngei loh na lamdangte amaute lakah a bawl lo hi leng amaute in mawh pualo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ka nalamdang bawlte mu khin uh ahih manin kei le ka Pa a hong mudah khawm uh ahi hi.
John15:25 Amaute’ Thukham sungah
John15:26 “Ahi zongin Thuman a hong lak ding Huhpa ahi Kha Siangtho ka Pa kiang panin ka hong sawl ding hi. Amah hong tun ciangin keima thu hong gen ding hi.
John15:27 A kipat cil a kipanin kei tawh omkhawm na hih manun note in zong keima thu na gen ding uh hi.
John16:1 “Note na pukkhak loh nadingun hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi.
John16:2 Amaute in a kikhopna uh innte panin note hong hawlkhia ding uh hi. Note hong that mite pen Pasian’ nasemin a kingaihsut ding uh hun hong tung ding hi.
John16:3 Amaute in ka Pa ahi a
John16:4 Hih bangin a hong gamtat hun uh hong tun ciangin ka hong gen thute na phawk theih nadingun a hong genkhol ka hi hi. “Note tawh hong omkhawm ngawn ka hih manin a kipattung lamin hih thute ka hong gen kei hi.
John16:5 Tu-in ahihleh kei hong sawl pa kiangah a ciahkik ding ka hi hi. Tua hinapi-in
John16:6 Ahi zongin hih thute ka hong gen ciangin na lungsim uh dah mahmah hi.
John16:7 A taktakin ci lehang
John16:8 Amah hong tun ciangin leitung mite tungah mawhna thu
John16:9 Amaute in kei hong uploh manun a mawhna uh lak ding a
John16:10 Pa kiangah pai ding ka hih manin kei na hong mu nawn kei ding uh hi
John16:11 hih leitung a ukpa pen thukhenna a thuakkhin ahihna thu zong lak ding hi.
John16:12 “Ka hong gen ding tampi tak omlai hi; ahi zongin hong gen lai leng note a dingin tamlua ding hi.
John16:13 Tua ahih manin thuman hong lak ding Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin thu khempeuh a manin hong hilh ding hi. Ama ngaihsuttawm thu hong gen ding hi lo a
John16:14 Amah in keima gen ding thute note tungah hong gen ding ahih manin Pasian’ pianzia ka neihna hong kilangsak ding hi.
John16:15 Ka Pa’ neihsa khempeuh keima-a’ suakkhin ahih manin keima gen ding thute le a gen dingin ka sawlteng Kha Siangtho in note kiangah hong gen ding hi
John16:16 “Tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a
John16:17 a nungzuite pawlkhat kidong uh a
John16:18 Tawlkhat a cihcih pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam
John16:19 Jesuh in amaute’ theihnop lamtak phawk ahih manin amaute kiangah
John16:20 A taktakin ka hong genin-ah
John16:21 Numei in a ta a suahhun a tun ciangin na sa ahih manin a dah hi. Ahi zongin a ta a suahkhit ciangin leitungah naungek khat a piangsak khin ahihna hangin lungdamin a natna teng a mangngilh ta hi.
John16:22 Note zong tua mah tawh na kibang ding uh hi. Note zong tu-in na dah uh hangin note tawh kimukik ding ihih manin na lung uh dam mahmah ding a
John16:23 “Tua hun ciangin kei kiangah bangmah nong ngen nawn kei ding uh hi. A mantakin kong genin-ah
John16:24 Tuni ciang dong keima min suangin bangmah na ngen nai kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin ngen le-uhcin hong kipia ding ahih manin na lungdamna uh hong cingtaak ding hi.
John16:25 “Tuhun ciang dong hih thute thugentehna zangin ka hong gen hi. Ahi zongin thugentehna ka hong zat nawn loh hun hong tung ding a
John16:26 Tua hun hong tun ciangin
John16:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in kei hong itin
John16:28 Pa kiang panin hong pai-in leitung a hong tung ka hi a

John16:30 Tu-in na khempeuh na theihkhitna thu ka phawk uh a
John16:31 Jesuh in
John16:32 Note khempeuh kithehthangin na inn ciat uh zuanin kei bek na hong nusiat ding uh hun a hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hong tung hita hi. Ahi zongin kei guak a hong kinusia hi lo a
John16:33 Keimah tawh na hong kipawlna uh hangin lungnopna na neihtheihna dingun hih thu a hong gen ka hi hi. Leitung gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Ahi zongin keimah in leitung nate zo khinta ka hih manin lungnuamin om un
John17:1 Jesuh in hih thute a genkhit ciangin vantung lam ento-in
John17:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tapa tungah na piak mi khempeuh tungah Tapa in nuntak tawntungna a piaktheih nadingin mi khempeuh tungah ukna aana a neih nadingin Tapa tungah na hong piaksa ahi hi.
John17:3 Nang bek a man Pasian na hihna thu le nangmah in na hong sawl Jesuh Khrih hong theihna pen amaute a dingin nuntak tawntung ngah nading lampi ahi hi.
John17:4 Nangmah in sep dingin na hong piak nasep khempeuh sem khinta ka hih manin leitungah na min a thangsak ka hi hi.
John17:5 Pa aw
John17:6 “Leitung mite sung panin keima khut sungah na hong piak mite tungah nangma min ka pulak khinzo ta hi. Tua mite in nangma thu mangin nangma mi hi uh a
John17:7 Tu-in amaute in keima neih khempeuh nangma hong piak ahihna thu a thei uh hi.
John17:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh gen dingin na hong sawl thu khempeuh amaute kiangah ka gen ciangin um uh a
John17:9 “Amaute a dingin thu ka hong ngetsak hi. Leitung mite a dingin a hong ngetsak hi loin keima khut sungah na hong piak mite nangma mi ahih manin tua mite a dingin a hong ngetsak ka hi hi.
John17:10 Keima neih khempeuh nangma a’ hi a
John17:11 Tu-in nangma kiangah kei a hong paita ding ka hih manin leitungah ka om nawn kei ding a
John17:12 Amaute tawh ka omkhawm hun lai-in nangma hong piak na min vangliatna tawh amaute ka kem hi. Amaute ka hu a
John17:13 Tu-in nangma kiangah a hong paita ding ka hih manin keimah bangin amaute in lungdamna cingtaak a neihtheih nadingun leitungah ka om lai-in hih thute a gen ka hi hi.
John17:14 Amaute tungah na thu ka gen khin hi. Ahi zongin keimah bangin amaute zong hih leitung mite tawh kipawl lo uh ahih manin leitung mite in a mudah uh hi.
John17:15 Leitung panin amaute na lakkhiat ding a hong ngetsak ka hi kei a
John17:16 Hih leitung tawh kei ka kipawl loh mah bangin amaute zong a kipawl lo uh ahi hi.
John17:17 Nangma thuman hilhna tawh amaute a siangtho nangma zat dingin na bawl in.
John17:18 Leitungah kei na hong sawl mah bangin kei zong leitung mahah amaute ka sawl hi.
John17:19 Nangma tungah thuman takin amaute zong hong ki-ap theih nadingun amaute ka khualna-in nangma tungah kei ka hong ki-ap hi.
John17:20 “Hih mite a’ ding bek thu a hong ngetsak ka hi kei a
John17:21 Pa aw
John17:22 Nang le kei pumkhat ihih mah bangin amaute zong pumkhat a suah theih nadingun keima tungah na hong piak pianzia mah amaute tungah ka pia hi.
John17:23 Leitung mite in kei na hong sawlna thu a theih nading le kei na hong it mah bangin amaute na itna thu a theihna hangun amaute pumkhat a suah taktak theih nadingun amaute lakah kei ka om a

Acts2:2 Tua laitakin huihpi nung bangin huging khat hong tungvat a
Acts2:3 Tua ciangin leii tawh a kibang meikuang bang pian amaute lakah hong kithehthang a
Acts2:4 Amaute khempeuh Kha Siangtho tawh kidim uh a
Acts2:5 Tua laitakin biakna pawi siim dingin gam tuamtuam panin a hong pai Jew mi biakna hahkat mi tampi tak
Acts2:6 Hih huging a zak uh ciangin mihon tampi tak hong kikhawm uh a
Acts2:7 Amaute in hih thu lamdangsa mahmah uh ahih manin
Acts2:8 Tua hinapi-in bang hangin amaute’ thugen pen eima pau ciatin za ihi hiam?
Acts2:9 Eite pen Parthia gam
Acts2:10 Frigia gam
Acts2:11 Jew mite le Gentail mi Jew biakna a zuite ihi a
Acts2:12 Amaute in lamdangsa-in lungmang mahmah uh a
Acts2:13 Ahi zongin mi pawlkhatte in hih Jesuh a umte simmawhbawl uh a
Acts2:14 Tua ciangin sawltak sawm le khatte tawh a omkhawm Peter hong dingto-in
Acts2:15 Tuhun pen zingsang nai kua hi pan ahih manin
Acts2:16 Hih thupiang pen kamsang Joel in a gensa thu hi a
Acts2:17 ‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Nitawp ni ciangin
Acts2:18 Tua ni ciangin ka nasem numeite le ka nasem pasalte’ tung nangawnah ka Kha ka sung ding a
Acts2:19 Tua ciangin vantung le leitungah hilhkholhna lim le nalamdang ka bawl ding hi. Sisan kiluansakna
Acts2:20 Topa’ ni

Acts2:22 “Ka mipih Israel-te aw

Acts2:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in misite lak panin amah hingkiksak a
Acts2:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh David in ama thu a genna-ah
Acts2:26 Tua ahih manin ka lungdam a

Acts2:38 Tua ciangin Peter in amaute kiangah
Acts2:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama kamciamna pen note tung
Acts2:40 Tua ciangin Peter in amaute tungah thu tampi genthuahin hanthawn a
Acts2:41 Mi tampi in ama thugen umin tui kiphum uh a
Acts2:42 Amaute in sawltakte tung panin thu sinin amaute tawh kikhawl uh a

Acts3:1 Nikhat
Acts3:2 Kongpi Hoih a kici gei-ah a suahtung a kipan a khebai mi khat na om hi. Biakinn-ah a pai mite tung panin sum a ngen dingin nisimin hih kongpi gei-ah amah hong kikoih zel hi.
Acts3:3 Peter le Johan
Acts3:4 Amau tegel in tua mipa limtakin en uh a
Acts3:5 Bang khat peuhpeuh ngah ding
Acts3:6 Peter in ama kiangah
Acts3:7 a taklam khutin lenin kaito a
Acts3:8 Tua ciangin amah hong diangin dingto a
Acts3:9 Mi khempeuh in amah lam pai-in Pasian a phatna mu uh a
Acts3:10 biakinn Kongpi Hoih gei-ah sum ngenin a tupa hi
Acts3:11 Tua mipa in Peter le Johan beel cinten a
Acts3:12 Peter in hih mite a muh ciangin amaute kiangah
Acts3:13 I pupite Abraham
Acts3:14 Amah mi hoih mi siangtho hinapi-in
Acts3:15 Tua ahih ciangin mite tungah nuntakna a piapa na that uh a
Acts3:16 Hih Jesuh min’ vangliatna in hih khebai mipa tungah thahatna a pia ahi hi. Note khempeuh in na theih uh mah bangin hih mipa bangzah takin khebai ahih hangin Jesuh upna le ama min hangin hih mipa in dam sianthona a ngah ahi hi.
Acts3:17 “Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
Acts3:18 Ama Khrih in a thuak nading thu
Acts3:19 Tua ahih ciangin na mawhnate uh hong sawpsiangsak theih nading

Acts4:1 Peter le Johan omkhawmin
Acts4:2 Hih sawltak nihte in misite thokik ding hi
Acts4:3 Tua ahih manin amau tegel man uh a
Acts4:4 Ahi zongin amaute’ thugen a za mi tampi in um uh a
Acts4:5 A zing ciangin Jew mi makaite
Acts4:6 Siampi lianpen a semngei Annas
Acts4:7 Amaute’ mai-ah sawltak tegel dingsak uh a
Acts4:8 Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin Peter in dawng a
Acts4:9 hih khebai mipa tungah thuhoih a kibawlna le ama damna thu tawh kisai-in kote thu hong sit na hih uhleh
Acts4:10 note in singlamteh tungah na thah uh
Acts4:11 Lai Siangtho in
Acts4:12 Ama hang bek tawh hotkhiatna kingah thei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in hotkhiatna i ngahtheih nadingin leitung khempeuhah Pasian in hong piak min dang khat zong om lo hi
Acts4:13 Uliante in Peter le Johan a han’ mahmahna thu le amaute pilna sang a nei lo mi mawkmawk ahihna thu a theih uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh tawh a kikhawl khin ngeite ahihna uh a phawk uh hi.
Acts4:14 Ahi zongin a kidamsak mipa pen Peter le Johan-te gei-ah om gige ahih manin a nial nading uh thu mu zo lo uh hi.
Acts4:15 Tua ahih manin tua innsung panin amaute pusuaksak phot uh a
Acts4:16 “Hih mite bangcih ding ihi hiam? Jerusalem khuasunga om mi khempeuh in hih mite’ bawl a lamdang mahmah nate thei ciat uh a
Acts4:17 Ahi zongin mite lakah hih thute a kitheihthang thuah loh nadingin
Acts4:18 Tua ciangin sawltakte samkik uh a
Acts4:19 Ahi zongin Peter le Johan in
Acts4:20 Tua ahih manin kote in ka muhsa uh le ka zaksa uh thute gen loin ka om thei kei ding uh hi
Acts4:21 Ahi zongin uliante in a khauhzaw-in thu a gen khit uh ciangin a khah uh hi. Hih thupiang hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian phat uh ahih manin hih mite gim a piak nading uh a thu mu thei lo uh hi.
Acts4:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih nalamdang a kibawlna mipa pen a khan kum sawmli val a pha khinsa mi khat ahi hi.
Acts4:23 Peter le Johan a kikhahkhiat khit phetin a lawmte uh kiangah pai-in siampi liante le upate in amaute tungah a thugente khempeuh a zasak uh hi.
Acts4:24 A lawmte un hih thu a zak uh ciangin a vekpi-un lungsim kikhatin Pasian’ kiangah thu ngen uh a
Acts4:25 kote’ pupi
Acts4:26 Topa le ama Khrih a do dingin leitung kumpite kithawi uh a
Acts4:27 A cih mah bangin Herod le Pontias Pilat in hih khuapi sung teek mahah Gentail mite le Israel mite tawh kikupna nei uh a
Acts4:28 Nangmah in na deihna bangin a piang dingin na vangliatna tawh na khensatsa thu khempeuh a sem dingin amaute kikhawm uh hi.
Acts4:29 Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw
Acts4:30 Cinate damsak theih nading vangliatna hong pia inla

Acts4:32 Thu um mi khempeuh a lungsim uh le a ngaihsutna uh kikhat uh a
