Acts5:1 Ahi zongin Ananias a kici pasal khat le a zi Sapfira a kici
Acts5:2 ahi zongin a zi tawh thukimin a sumte pawlkhat im-in
Acts5:3 Peter in
Acts5:4 Tua lo na zuakma-in nangma a’ hi a
Acts5:5 Ananias in hih thu a zak phetin thakhatin si-in puksukpah a
Acts5:6 Tua ciangin tangvalte hong kipanin puan tawh a luang tun uh a
Acts5:7 Tua khit nai thum bang ding ciangin a zi hong pai a
Acts5:8 Peter in tua nu kiangah
Acts5:9 Tua ciangin Peter in tua nu kiangah
Acts5:10 Amah zong thakhat thu-in si-in Peter khe kiangah a puksuk hi. Tua ciangin tangvalte hong lut uh a
Acts5:11 Pawlpi mi khempeuh le hih thu a za mi khempeuhte nakpitakin a lau uh hi.
Acts5:12 Sawltakte in mite lakah lim le nalamdang tampi a bawl uh hi. Thu um mi khempeuh Solomon’ Talap-ah kikhawmin a om uh hi.
Acts5:13 Midangte in thupi sa-in hoihsa mahmah uh a
Acts5:14 Topa’ thu a um numei pasal tampi tak hong kibehlaplap uh hi.
Acts5:15 Hih bangin sawltakte’ nasepna hangin kongzingah cinate hong kipua a
Acts5:16 Jerusalem khua kiima om khuapite panin mite hong pai-in
Acts5:17 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa le amah tawh a kipawl tua lai-a Saddusi mite in sawltakte haza-in thangpai uh ahih manin thu bawl ding a ngaihsun uh hi.
Acts5:18 Tua ahih manin sawltakte manin thong sungah a khum uh hi.
Acts5:19 Ahi zongin tua zanin Topa’ vantungmi khat in thong kongkhakte hong a
Acts5:20 “Biakinn-ah pai unla
Acts5:21 Ama gen mah bangin sawltakte zong zingsang ciangin biakinn-ah pai-in thuhilh ding a kipan uh hi. Siampi lianpen pa le ama kikholhpihte in ulian kikhopna a cingtaak khat a omtheih nadingin Jew mi upa khempeuh a kikhop nadingun a sam uh hi. Tua khit ciangin thong panin sawltakte va kai-in uliante mai-ah a hong paipih nadingun palikte a sawl uh hi.
Acts5:22 Ahi zongin thongah palikte a va tun uh ciangin sawltakte na om lo hi. Tua ahih manin uliante kiangah kileh kikin
Acts5:23 “Thongah ka tun uh ciangin a kongkhakte limtak mahin tawh kikalh a
Acts5:24 Biakinn ukpa le siampi liante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hih sawltakte a bangci thu hi ding hiam
Acts5:25 Tua laitakin mi khat hong pai-in amaute kiangah
Acts5:26 Tua ciangin biakinn ukpa le a mite va pai-in sawltakte hong paipih kik uh hi. Mihonte in suang tawh amaute a dengawp khak ding lau uh ahih manin sawltakte ngongbawl loin thudam tawh a paipih uh hi.
Acts5:27 Tua ciangin uliante mai-ah sawltakte dingsak uh a
Acts5:28 “Hih mipa’ min tawh thu na hilh nawn loh nadingun khauhtakin thu kong pia uh hi. Tu-in na gamtatnasate uh thei un. Jerusalem khuasung khempeuhah thu na genthang uh a
Acts5:29 Ahi zongin Peter le sawltak dangte in
Acts5:30 Note in singlamteh tungah Jesuh khai-in na thah khit uh ciangin i pu i pate’ Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak khinzo hi.
Acts5:31 Israel mite kisik kikin Pasian in a mawhna uh a maisak theih nadingin Ukpi le Honpa-in tua Jesuh bawlin ama taklamah a tusak hi.
Acts5:32 Hih thute thei-in teci a pangte pen ko sawltakte bek hi loin Kha Siangtho tawh zong ka hi uh a
Acts5:33 Uliante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh ahih manin sawltakte thah dingin a ngaihsun uh hi.
Acts5:34 Ahi zongin amaute sung panin Farisi mi Gamaliel
Acts5:35 tua khit ciangin a lawm uliante kiangah
Acts5:36 Tuma lam tawlkhat lai-in Thudas a kici mi khat hong khang hi. Mi lian khat ka hi hi
Acts5:37 Hih thu a pian’ khit ciangin
Acts5:38 Tu-in zong tua bangmahin thu hong piang leuleu hi. Note kiangah kong gennop thu in: Hih mite bangmah cih kei unla
Acts5:39 Ahi zongin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahihleh na zo zo ngei kei ding uh hi. Pasian tawh a kido na hi ding uh hi
Acts5:40 Tua ahih manin uliante in Gamaliel’ thugen a mang uh hi. Sawltakte samkik sak uh a
Acts5:41 Uliante omna panin sawltakte paikhia uh a
Acts5:42 Nisimin biakinn sung le mite inn-ah thu hilh uh a

Acts6:6 Amaute in sawltakte kiangah hih mite paipih uh a

Acts7:1 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in Stefen kiangah
Acts7:2 Stefen in
Acts7:3 ‘Na gam na lei
Acts7:4 Amah zong Khaldea gam panin paikhia-in Haran khua-ah teng hi. A pa a sih khit ciangin Pasian in tu-a na tenna uh hih gamah amah na lalsak leuleu hi.
Acts7:5 Pasian in Abraham tungah ama aituam dingin leitang khutpeek cia nangawn pia lo napi-in
Acts7:6 Tua bang hinapi-in
Acts7:7 Ahi zongin sila-in a nei gam mite tungah thu ka khen ding a
Acts7:8 Tua ciangin Pasian in Abraham tungah kiciamna limin vun-atna ngeina na pia hi. Tua ahih manin Abraham in a tapa Isaac a suahzawh nipikal khat khit ciangin a vun at a
Acts7:9 “I pupi dangte in Josef na haza uh a
Acts7:10 a thuakna khempeuh panin na honkhia hi. Egypt kumpipa Faro’ mai-ah Josef a tun ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pilna le a deihhuai gamtat hoih na guan hi. Tua ahih manin Faro in ama khutnuai-ah a gam a uksawn ding le a kumpi innsung khempeuh a van dingin a koih hi.
Acts7:11 Tua ciangin Egypt gam le Kanaan gam khempeuhah kialpi tung a
Acts7:12 Tua ahih manin Egypt gamah an om hi
Acts7:13 A nihveina a pai uh ciangin a sanggamte tungah i pupi Josef na kipulak a
Acts7:14 Tua ciangin Josef in a pa Jakob kiangah mi sawl a
Acts7:15 Tua ahih manin Jakob zong Egypt gamah pai a
Acts7:16 Amau’ luanghawmte
Acts7:17 “Pasian in Abraham tungah a thuciamna a tunsak ding a nai kuan ciangin Egypt gamah ei mite tampi tak na pha ta uh hi.
Acts7:18 A tawpna-ah Josef a thei lo kumpi dang khat
Acts7:19 I mipihte na khemgawpin na khelbawl a
Acts7:20 Hih hunin naungek melhoih mahmah khat na suak hi. Inn-ah kha thum sung kikem a
Acts7:21 inn panin a kikoihkhiat ciangin Faro’ tanu in a ta dingin la a
Acts7:22 Egypt gam sunga pilna om khempeuh ama tungah kihilh a
Acts7:23 “Amah kum sawmli a phak ciangin Israel’ suan a mipihte lakah painopna lungsim a nei hi.
Acts7:24 Tua bangin a mipihte lakah a va pai ciangin Egypt mite khat in a Israel mipihte khat a bawlsiatna mu a
Acts7:25 Amah pen eite hong honkhia dingin Pasian in a zat ding mipa hi
Acts7:26 A zing ciangin Israel mi nih a kilai mu leuleu a
Acts7:27 A lawmpa a bawlsia pa in Moses sawnkhia-in
Acts7:28 Zan-a Egypt mipa na thah bangin kei zong a hong thatnuam na hi hiam?’ a na ci hi.
Acts7:29 Moses in hih thu a zak ciangin Egypt gam panin taikhia-in Midian gamah ten ding kipan a
Acts7:30 “Tua gamah kum sawmli a ten khit ciangin
Acts7:31 Moses in a muh ciangin lamdangsa a
Acts7:32 ‘Kei pen na pu na pate uh ahi Abraham
Acts7:33 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah
Acts7:34 Ka mite in Egypt gamah bawlsiatna a thuaknate teltakin ka mukhin hi. Amaute’ tauna awging ka za a
Acts7:35 “Moses pen Israel mite in deih loin
Acts7:36 Amah in Egypt gam le San Tuipi-ah lim le na lamdangte bawlin
Acts7:37 Hih Moses pen Israel mite tungah
Acts7:38 Amah pen Israel mite tawh gamlakah a om pa hi a
Acts7:39 “Ahi zongin i pute in ama thu na mang nuam loin
Acts7:40 Tua ahih manin amaute in Aaron kiangah
Acts7:41 Tua ahih manin amaute in bawngno tawh a kibang lim khat bawl uh a

Acts7:43

Acts7:46 David in Pasian’ maipha ngah ahih manin
Acts7:47 Ahi zongin Pasian a dingin biakinn a lamsak pen David hi loin a tapa Solomon ahi hi.

Acts7:51 “Na lungsim uh khauh mahmah a
Acts7:52 I pu i pate in kamsang a bawlsiat loh khat beek om lo hi. Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamta a Nasempa a hong pai nading thu a genkhol Pasian’ kamtaite na that uh a
Acts7:53 Note in vantungmi tungtawnin Pasian’ hong piak thukham ngah napi-in na mang nuam kei uh hi
Acts7:54 A kikhawm uliante in Stefen’ thugen a zak uh ciangin nakpitakin heh uh a
Acts7:55 Ahi zongin Stefen ahihleh Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin vantung lam ento a
Acts7:56 “En un! Vantung kihong a
Acts7:57 Ahi zongin amaute in a bil uh humsanin nakpitakin kiko-in Stefen bawhhuan uh a
Acts7:58 khua pualamah kaikhia-in suang gol pipi a khiat uh hi. Hih thu-ah teci pangin Stefen a deng mite in a puantungsilh uh suahin Saul a kici tangval khat kiangah lawnin a kemsak uh hi.
Acts7:59 Tua bangin suang a khiat thuahthuah laitakun Stefen in thu ngen a
Acts7:60 Tua ciangin amah kunin nakpitakin kiko a
Acts8:1 Hih Stefen thahna thu-ah Saul in zong thukimpih hi. Tua ni a kipanin Jerusalem khua-a om pawlpite in nakpitakin bawlsiatna thuak ding kipan uh hi. Sawltakte simloh
Acts8:2 Thu um mi pawlkhat in Stefen vui uh a
Acts8:3 Ahi zongin Saul in pawlpi suksiat ding hanciam a
Acts8:4 Tua bangin a kithehthang mite pai kawikawi-in thu a hilh uh hi.
Acts8:5 Filip zong Samaria gam khuapi-ah pai-in Khrih thu a hilh hi.
Acts8:6 Mihonte in Filip’ thugen le a nalamdang bawlte a muh uh ciangin a thugen khempeuh limtakin a ngai uh hi.
Acts8:7 Mi tampite sung panin dawite nakpitakin kiko-in paikhia uh a
Acts8:8 Tua ahih manin tua khuapi sunga om mite lungdam mahmah uh hi.
Acts8:9 Tua khua sungah Simon a kici mi khat om a
Acts8:10 tua khuasunga om milian mineu a om khempeuh in a thu limtakin ngai-in
Acts8:11 Amah in sauveipi sung mitphial bawl a
Acts8:12 Ahi zongin Pasian’ Ukna Lungdamna Thu le Jesuh Khrih thu
Acts8:13 Simon mahmah in zong um a
Acts8:14 Samaria mite in Pasian’ thu a sankhitna uh
Acts8:15 Amaute a tun uh ciangin tua lai-a om thu um mite in Kha Siangtho a ngah nadingun thu a ngetsak uh hi.
Acts8:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Topa Jesuh min tawh a kituiphum hi pan bek uh a
Acts8:17 Peter le Johan in amaute lu tungah a khut uh a ngak khit uh ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngah uh hi.
Acts8:18 Sawltakte in amaute tungah a khut uh a ngak ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngahna uh mu ahih manin Simon in Peter le Johan kiangah sum pia a
Acts8:19 “Kei zong ka khut ka ngakna mi peuhpeuh in Kha Siangtho a ngahtheih nadingin hih bang vangliatna kei zong hong pia un
Acts8:20 Ahi zongin Peter in
Acts8:21 Pasian in na lungsim man hong sa lo ahih manin kote’ nasepna-ah nang nong kihel thei kei ding hi.
Acts8:22 Tua ahih manin na ngaihsut hoih lohna panin kisikkik inla

Acts8:26 Topa’ vantungmi khat in Filip kiangah
Acts8:27 Filip zong kithawi-in a pai hi. Lampi-ah Ethiopia mi mang lian khat tawh kituak hi. Tua mangpa pen Ethiopia kumpinu Kandeis khutnuai-a mang lian khat hi a

Acts13:41

Acts14:1 Ikonium khua a tun uh ciangin Paul le Barnabas zong Jew mite kikhopna inn-ah pai uh a
Acts14:2 Ahi zongin thu um lo Jew mite in Gentail mite holhthawh uh a
Acts14:3 Tua lai-ah sawltakte sauveipi tam uh a
Acts14:4 Tua khuasunga om mite pawl nih pha uh a
Acts14:5 Gentail mi le Jew mite in a uliante uh tawh kopin sawltakte bawlsia-in suang tawh den ding a vaihawm uh hi.
Acts14:6 Sawltakte in tua thu a theih uh ciangin Likaonia gam sunga om Lystra khua
Acts14:7 tua a taina uh khuate-ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi.
Acts14:8 A suahtung a kipanin lam a pai thei lo khezaw mi khat Lystra khua-ah a om hi.
Acts14:9 Amah in Paul’ thuhilhte limtakin a ngai hi. Tua mipa in damna a ngahzawh nading zahin upna nei hi
Acts14:10 “Na khe-in dingto in!” nakpitakin a ci hi. Tua mipa zong dingin lam pai kawikawi dingin a kipan hi.

Acts14:12 Barnabas pen Zeus ci-in min phuah uh a

Acts17:5 Tua bangin mi tampi in Paul’ thugen a up uh ciangin Jew mite thangpai uh a
Acts17:6 Tua inn-ah Paul le Silas a muh loh uh ciangin a innteek pa Jason le midang pawlkhat kaikhia-in uliante kiangah paipih uh a
Acts17:7 Jason in a inn-ah amaute tungsak hi. Amaute in gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa’ thu palsat uh a
Acts17:8 Hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihonte le khuasung uliante heh mahmah uh a
Acts17:9 Jason le a lawmte a kitat nading uh sum a piaksak khit uh ciangin tua khuasung uliante in amaute a khah pan uh hi.
Acts17:10 Tua zan ciangin thu um mite in Berea khua-ah Paul le Silas a paisak uh hi. Tua khua a tun uh ciangin Jew mite kikhopna inn-ah a pai uh hi.

Acts17:12 Mi tampi in Pasian’ thu um a
Acts17:13 Berea khua-ah zong Paul in Pasian thu a hilhna a zak uh ciangin Thesalonika khua panin Jew mite hong pai-in Berea khua-ah zong mite hong holhthawh gawp uh hi.

Acts17:15 Tuipi gei-ah Paul a paipih thu um mite in Athen khua ciang dong a va zui uh hi. Athen khua panin Berea khua-ah hong ciahkik uh ciangin

Acts17:23 Na khuasung uhah ka pai kawmin na biakna munte uh ka et ciangin
Acts17:24 Tua Pasian pen leitung buppi le a tunga om khempeuh a piangsak Pasian hi a
Acts17:25 Amah pen mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna le na khempeuh a piapa ahih manin mihingte in ama a dingin na khat peuhpeuh a sepsak ding a kisam ahi kei hi.

Acts20:26 Tua ahih ciangin tuni mahmahin note tungah limtakin kong gennop thu in: Note khat peuhpeuh Pasian tawh kikhenin siatna na tuah uhleh kei’ tavuan hi nawn lo hi.
Acts20:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tungah Pasian’ thu kong gen loh khat zong om nawn lo hi.
Acts20:28 Kha Siangtho in note’ khut sungah a hong koih pawlpi mite le nomau pumpi mahmah limtakin na kem un. Pasian in a Tapa a sihna tawh a ngah a pawlpi hoihtakin a kemte na hi ta un.
Acts20:29 Kei ka om nawn loh ciangin
Acts20:30 Note sung mahmah panin zong mi pawlkhat in thu um mite khemin a zolkhiat hun hong tung ding hi.
Acts20:31 Tua ahih ciangin limtakin kiging unla
Acts20:32 “Tu-in Pasian’ khutsung le ama dikna thu sungah note ka hong ap hi. Amah in note hong khangtosak thei-in
Acts20:33 Kuama neihsa
Acts20:34 Kei le ka kithuahpihte’ kisapna khempeuh ka ngahtheih nadingin keima khut mahmah tawh na ka sepna thu note in na thei uh hi.

Acts20:38 Paul in

Acts27:35 Hih bangin thu a gen khit ciangin Paul in anlum la a
Acts27:36 Amaute khempeuh zong a lungsim uh hong nuam a
Acts27:37 Tua teembaw sunga om mi a vekpi-in zanih le sawmsagih le guk ka pha uh hi.
Acts27:38 Mi khempeuh in an a kinek khit ciangin teembaw a zan nadingin a sunga mangbuhte a lawnkhia uh hi.
Acts27:39 Khua hong vak ciangin koi lai gam hiam
Acts27:40 Tua ahih ciangin teembaw khihna sikkawipi khaute sattatin tui sungah khiasuk uh a
Acts27:41 Ahi zongin teembaw in sehnel hong phukha-in a tum hi. Teembaw mailam lei sungah tumin taang thei nawn lo a
Acts27:42 Thongkia mi khempeuh tui peekin a taimang ding uh lau uh ahih manin galkapte in thongkiate thah a sawm uh hi.
Acts27:43 Ahi zongin galkap bupa in Paul suaktasak nuam ahih manin tua bangin a thah ding uh a kham hi. Tua ahih manin tuipeek thei khempeuh in teembaw panin a nawlah tui va peekin
Acts27:44 adangte in teembaw sing kitamte lenin a om nadingin thu a pia zaw hi. Tua bangin ka vekpi-un tui gei-ah ka suakta uh hi.
Acts28:1 Leilak ka tunkim khit uh ciangin tua mun pen Malta tuikulh ahihna thu ka thei uh hi.
Acts28:2 Tua lai-a teng mite ko tungah hong nuam mahmah uh hi. Guahzu-in khua dam mahmah ahih manin meiphualpi hong cihsak uh a
Acts28:3 Paul in singkang pawlkhat khawmin meipi tungah hong koih a
Acts28:4 Tua lai-a teng mite in Paul’ khut tunga gul kivial a muh uh ciangin
Acts28:5 Ahi zongin Paul in meikhuk sungah tua gul singkhia a
Acts28:6 Paul pen a ci hong bawkgawp ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong hong si-in pukgawp ding hi
Acts28:7 Tua lai panin a gamla lo mun khatah tua tuikulh hausa pa Publias’ lo a om hi. Amah in limtakin kote zin hong do a
Acts28:8 Publias’ pa cisa nat leh gilsan thuahin cina-in lupna tungah a lum hi. Paul zong ama lupna-ah va pai-in thu ngetsak a
Acts28:9 Hih bangin a damsak khit ciangin tua tuikulh tunga om cina dang khempeuh zong hong paipih uh a
Acts28:10 Amaute in na tampi tak hong pia uh a
Acts28:11 Tua lai-ah kha thum ka omkhit uh ciangin Alexandria khua panin a hong pai
Acts28:12 Sirakus khua ka tun uh ciangin tua lai-ah ni thum sung ka taam uh hi.
Acts28:13 Tua panin pai leuleu-in Regium khua ka tung uh hi. A zing ciangin leitaw lam panin huih nun ding hong kipan a
Acts28:14 Tua khua-ah thu um mi pawlkhat tawh ka kimu uh a
Acts28:15 Rom khua-a om ulenaute in kote’ thu na za uh ahih manin pawlkhat in
Acts28:16 Rom khua ka tun khit uh ciangin Paul pen ama ututna-ah a om theih nadingin thu kipia a
Acts28:17 A tunzawh ni thum khit ciangin Paul in Jew makaite sam a
Acts28:18 Kei thu hong sit uh ciangin sihna ka thuak nading thu bangmah om lo ahih manin hong khahkhia nuam uh hi.
Acts28:19 Ahi zongin kei hong kikhah ding thu-ah i Jew mipihte a lungkim loh uh ciangin i mipihte tungah mawhsak nading thu bangmah ka neih loh hangin gam uk kumpipa Sisar tungah a zu ka khan loh hong phamawh hi.
Acts28:20 Israel mite in a lamet uh mipa’ hangin sikkhau khihna thuakin thongkia mi ka suak hi. Hih thute khempeuh note kiangah hong gennuam ka hih manin a hong samsak ka hi hi
Acts28:21 Tua ciangin amaute in
Acts28:22 Ahi zongin tu-a nangma kipawlna mite’ thu pen a koimah peuhah mi khempeuh in gensia uh ahih manin nangma ngaihsutna taktak ka zanuam uh hi
Acts28:23 Tua ahih manin Paul tawh a kimuh nading uh a ni khat seh uh a
Acts28:24 Pawlkhatte in Paul’ thugente um uh a

Acts28:31 Amah in Pasian’ Ukna thu le Topa Jesuh Khrih’ thu
Romans1:1 Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Pasian’ teelna tawh sawltak ahi
Romans1:2 Pasian in kamsangte tungtawnin hih Lungdamna Thu a gensa hi a
Romans1:3 Tua thu pen eite’ Topa Jesuh Khrih ahi ama Tapa’ thu ahi hi. Tua Tapa pen leitung silesa lam panin David’ suan hi a
Romans1:4 Kha Siangtho thu lamsangah ci lehang misite lak panin vangliatna tawh a thawhsakkikna hangin Pasian’ Tapa ahihna thu Pasian in a kilangsak hi.
Romans1:5 Minam khempeuh in ama thu umin a zuihtheih nadingun Khrih hangin sawltak nasep sep theih nading hamphatna thu Pasian in Khrih’ na sep nadingin kote a hong pia hi.
Romans1:6 Pasian’ sapna za-in Jesuh Khrih tawh a kipawl Rom khua-a a om note khempeuh zong tua minamte sungah a kihel na hi uh hi.
Romans1:7 Tua ahih manin Pasian in hong it a
Romans1:8 Jesuh na upna thu uh leitung mi khempeuh in gen belin nei uh ahih manin tua Jesuh hangin Pasian tungah ka lungdamna thu koh belin ka nei hi.
Romans1:9 Ama Tapa hangin Lungdamna Thu ka lungsim khempeuh tawh hilhin a na ka sep Pasian in hih ka thugente a man taktak ahihna thu hong thei hi.
Romans1:10 Thu ka nget simin note ka hong phawk tawntungna le ama deihna ahih nakleh khatvei teitei ciangin note kiangah ka hong paitheih nading ka utna thu Pasian in a thei hi.
Romans1:11 Kha thu-ah note na thahat theih nadingun Pasian in a hong piak thuphate hong genpih nuam ka hih manin note tawh kimuh ding ka ut mahmah hi.
Romans1:12 Tua bang ka cih ciangin kei’ upna in note hong thakhauh sakin
Romans1:13 Khrih sungah sanggamte aw
Romans1:14 Nuntakna sang mite le nuntakna niam mite
Romans1:15 Rom khua-a a om note tungah zong Lungdamna Thu hilh ding ka lawp mahmah hi.
Romans1:16 Lungdamna Thu ka muang mahmah hi. Tua thu pen a masa-in Jew mi
Romans1:17 Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans1:18 Mihingte in a mawhna le a gitlohna hangun Pasian’ thuman seelcip uh ahih manin van panin a hehna hong kilang sakin a gimpiakna dingzia hong kilangsak hi.
Romans1:19 Pasian mahmah in amaute tungah limtakin laktel ahih manin Pasian’ thu teltakin a theih khit uh ciangin a gamtatna uh ahih manin Pasian in gim a pia ahi hi.
Romans1:20 Pasian in leitung a piansak cil a kipanin a kimu thei lo ama pianzia ahi tawntung vanglianpa le Pasian ahihna thute ama bawlsa nate tung panin teltakin hong kilang hi. Tua ahih manin
Romans1:21 Amaute in Pasian thei napi-in a zahtak dingun a kilawm bangin zahtak loin
Romans1:22 Amaute pil a kisak mahmah uh hangin a hai mahmah uh ahi hi.
Romans1:23 A hing tawntung Pasian bia loin
Romans1:24 Mihingte tua zahta-in hailua uh ahih manin amau ututin a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in khahkhong vet a
Romans1:25 Amaute in a man ahi Pasian’ thu um nuam lo uh a
Romans1:26 Tua ahih manin amau utna bangin a zumhuaipi-in a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in a khahkhong hi. A numeite un pasal tawh lupkhop ngeina zang loin a numeipihte mah uh lunggulhin lumkhawm uh a
Romans1:27 a pasalte uh zong numei tawh lumkhawm loin pasalte mah lunggulhin lumkhawm uh a
Romans1:28 Mite in a man ahi Pasian’ thu ngaihsutin nei nuam lo uh ahih manin amaute’ ngaihsut hoih lo bangin a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in a khahkhia hi. Tua ahih manin a gamtat dingun a kilawm lopipi-in a gamta uh hi.
Romans1:29 Siatna nam khempeuh ahi
Romans1:30 mi gensiatna
Romans1:31 gamtatsiatna
Romans1:32 Tua bangin a gamtate in sihna thuak ding hi
Romans2:1 Tua ahih ciangin midangte’ thu a khen note pen kuakua hita le-uh cin na suakta tuan kei ding uh hi. Midangte na mawhsakna uh thute mah note zong gamta veve na hih manun
Romans2:2 Tua bang mawhna a gamtate
Romans2:3 Midangte a mawhna hangin thu khenin
Romans2:4 Pasian migi-in thu a diah hithiatna pen na kisikkik theih nading uh a deihna ahih lamtak phawkkha loin
Romans2:5 Lungsim khauhin na kisik nop lohna hangun Pasian’ hehna le a manin a thukhenna a hong kilat Ni ding ciangin na gimthuak ding uh a nasia semsem dingin a bawl na hi uh hi.
Romans2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh a gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in thukkik ding hi.
Romans2:7 Pahtakna
Romans2:8 ahi zongin ama deihna bek zui-in
Romans2:9 Jew mi a kipan Gentail mi dongin a gamtat sia mi khempeuh in gimna le lungkhamna thuak ding uh hi.
Romans2:10 Tua mah bangin Jew mi a kipanin Gentail mi dongin a gamtat hoih mi khempeuh in minthanna
Romans2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kuamah deidan loin mi khempeuh tungah a kibangin thu a khen hi.
Romans2:12 Moses Thukham a nei lo Gentail mite a khialh uh ciangin thukham nei lopi mahin siatna thuak uh a
Romans2:13 Thukham zakna bek hangin Pasian tawh kipawlna a piang hi lo a
Romans2:14 Gentail mite in thukham a neih loh uh hangin amau’ ngaihsut tawmna tawh thukham’ deihna bang a gamtat uh ciangin tua thukham’ deihna a zui uh hi a
Romans2:15 Amau’ lungsim sungah thukham’ deihnate omkhin ahihna thu a gamtatna un hong kilangsak hi. Amau mahmah zong khat veivei hoih kisa
Romans2:16 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in mihingte lungsim sunga a ngaihsutnate uh
Romans2:17 Tu-in Jew mi ka hi uh
Romans2:18 Thukham thei na hih manun Pasian’ deihnate na thei uh a
Romans2:19 Mittawte lam a lak ding
Romans2:20 mihaite a hilh ding
Romans2:21 Midangte a hilh note in
Romans2:22 “Numei tawh mawh kei un
Romans2:23 Note in thukham kisaktheihpih napi-in thukham palsatin Pasian’ min na daisak uh hi.
Romans2:24 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans2:25 Thukham zui le-uhcin na vun atna uh man nei takpi mah hi. Ahi zongin thukham na zuih kei uhleh na vun atna uh a mawkna a suak ahi hi.
Romans2:26 Tua ahih manin vun ki-at lo Gentail mite in thukham a zuih nak-uhleh Pasian in vun at mah bangin ngaihsun ding hi lo ahi hiam?
Romans2:27 Tua ahih manin thukham nei-in vun ki-at napi-in tua thukham a zui lo no Jew mite pen vun ki-at lo thukham a zui Gentail mite in thu hong khen ding hi lo ahi uh hiam?
Romans2:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pualam beka Jew mi hihna le a pualam vun ki-atna lel bek in Jew mi taktak suaksak zo lo hi.
Romans2:29 Jew mi taktak i cihte pen
Romans3:1 Tua ahihleh Jew mite in Gentail mite sangin bang hamphatna neizaw a
Romans3:2 Lam tampi-ah a phattuamna a om hi. A masa penin
Romans3:3 Ahi zongin Jew mi pawlkhatte in Pasian’ thuciamna zui lo uh hi. Hih mi pawlkhatte’ thu palsatna hangin Pasian in a thuciamna maimangsak dingin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?
Romans3:4 Tua bang hi het lo hi. Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans3:5 Pasian a manin gamta ahihna eite’ gamtat khialhna in kilangsak semsem ahih ciangin eite in bang gen ding nei nawn ihi hiam? Pasian in eite gim a hong piak ciangin a thuman lo ahi hiam? (Hih bangin thu ka gen ciangin leitung mihingte’ kammal zat ngeite a zang ka hi hi.)
Romans3:6 Gim hong piakna-ah a thuman lo hi het lo hi. A thuman lo hi zenzen leh bangci-in leitung mi khempeuh’ thu khenthei ding ahi hiam?
Romans3:7 Keima zuautatna in Pasian a thumanna kilangsakin a min thangsak semsem ahihleh bang hangin mawhnei-in kei hong kiseh lailai ahi hiam?
Romans3:8 Thupha a pian nadingin gamtat sia gamta ni
Romans3:9 Tua ahihleh Gentail mite sangin ko Jew mite hamphazaw ka hi uh hiam? Bangmah hamphatna nei tuan lo hi ung. Jew mite le Gentail mite a kibangin mawhna khut sungah om uh hi
Romans3:10 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
Romans3:11 a man a thei kuamah om lo a
Romans3:12 Kuamah in Pasian ngaihsutna nei lo uh a
Romans3:13 A kam uh tawh mi that uh a
Romans3:14 A kam uh tawh mi samsia uh a
Romans3:15 Mi that pakpak uh a
Romans3:16 a paina khempeuh uhah lungkhamna a piangsak uh hi.
Romans3:17 Nopna a pian nadingin gamta ngei lo uh a
Romans3:18 Pasian zahtak ding ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi
Romans3:19 Tua ahih manin kuamah in paulap a zon theih loh nading le mi khempeuh in Pasian’ thukhenna a thuak theih nadingin Thukham a nei mite khempeuh in tua Thukham a zuih ding uh ahihna thu i thei hi.
Romans3:20 Thukham in mihingte a mawhna kilangsak thei bek ahih manin thukham zuihna hangin kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah zo lo hi.
Romans3:21 Ahi zongin tu-in thukham zuihna hang hi loin thudang khat hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading lampi hong kilangzo a
Romans3:22 Tua thu in: Jew mi le Gentail mi kuamah a kilamdanna om loin Jesuh Khrih upna hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah hi.
Romans3:23 Mi khempeuh mawh ciat uh a
Romans3:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong hehpihna hangin Khrih Jesuh tawh hong tatkhiat manin amah tawh i kipawlthei kik hi.
Romans3:25 Ama hong sihna hangin mawhna a kimaisak theih nadingin Pasian in Jesuh hong pia a
Romans3:26 Ahi zongin tuhun ciangin Jesuh a um mi khempeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nading le amah thuman ahihna a kilatsak nadingin mihingte’ mawhna tawh kisai-in na hong sem hi.
Romans3:27 Tua ahihleh mihingte in i kisialhpih ding bang om ahi hiam? Bangmah om lo hi. Bang bulphuh ding ihi hiam? Thukham zuihna bulphuh ding ihi hiam? Hi lo hi. I upna a bulphuh ding ihi hi.
Romans3:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theihna pen Thukham zuihzawhna hang hi loin upna hang hi

Romans3:30 Pasian khat bek hi a
Romans3:31 Tua ahihleh hih upna thu i gen ciangin Thukham a phiat ihi hiam? Hi lo hi; a kipsak semsem ihi hi.
Romans4:1 Tu-in eite’ pianna i pupi Abraham’ thu ngaihsun ni. Ama tunga thupiang hih bang ahi hi:
Romans4:2 Abraham in a sepna hangin amah tawh a kipawl dingin Pasian in sang hileh Abraham in kisialhpih ding thu a nei ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasian’ mai-ah Abraham a kisialh nading bangmah thu om lo hi.
Romans4:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans4:4 Na a sem mipa a sep thaman kipia hi. Tua a nasepna thaman pen a thalawhsa ahih manin piakkhongin kingaihsutsak lo hi.
Romans4:5 Ahi zongin Pasian’ maipha ngah nadingin nasepna suang loin upna a suang mipa pen Pasian in mimawh kimlai midik hi
Romans4:6 Tua ahih manin nasepna hang tawh hi loin Pasian in mi khat midikin a sanna hangin David in zong a lungdamna thu na gen a
Romans4:7 “Pasian in a mawhnate maisakin a khialhnate a seelcipsak mite thupha ngah ahi uh hi.
Romans4:8 Topa in a mawhnate a ciamtehsak loh mipa
Romans4:9 David in a gen hih thupha pen vun ki-atte bek in ngahthei ahi hiam? Hi lo hi; vun ki-at lote in zong ngahthei uh hi. Lai Siangtho in
Romans4:10 Hih mihoihin a san bang hun ahi hiam? Abraham a vun a ki-at ma ahi hiam
Romans4:11 Abraham a vun a ki-at ma-in a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sanna lahtel nadingin a vun a kinung-at ahi hi. Tua ahih manin vun a ki-at loh hangin a upna uh hangin mihoihin a kisang mite khempeuh a dingin Abraham pen kha thu lamah pupi ahi hi.
Romans4:12 A vun a ki-at ma-in i pupi Abraham a upna hangin a gamtat mah bangin a gamta
Romans4:13 Abraham le a suan a khakte in leitung luah ding hi
Romans4:14 Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian’ thuciamnate a kingah ding hileh mite’ upna pen a kimanna om loin
Romans4:15 Thukham in Pasian’ heh nading piangsak hi. Ahi zongin thukham om kei leh thukham zui lo cih zong om thei lo hi.
Romans4:16 Tua ahih manin Abraham’ suanlekhakte khempeuh tungah Pasian’ hehpihna piakkhong a suahtheih nadingin Thukham a zuite bek in ngah loin
Romans4:17 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
Romans4:18 Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans4:19 Abraham kum zakhat bang pha dektak ta a
Romans4:20 Amah in Pasian’ thuciamna muanlah dingin ngaihsun lo a
Romans4:21 Pasian in a thuciamsa tungsakzo taktak ding hi
Romans4:22 Tua ahih manin
Romans4:23 “A upna pen hoihna-in kisang
Romans4:24 Sihna panin i Topa Jesuh a hingsak pa a um eite khempeuh zong i upna hangin mihoihin hong kisang ding hi
Romans4:25 Eite’ mawhna hangin a si dingin Jesuh kipia a
Romans5:1 Tu-in upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl khinta ihih manin i Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin Pasian tawh a kilemkik ta ihi hi.
Romans5:2 Ama hangin upna tawh tu-a i omna Pasian hehpihna sungah a tung ihi a
Romans5:3 Haksatna i thuak laitak nangawnin i lungdam veve hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh haksatna in thuakzawh hatna piangsak a
Romans5:4 thuakzawh hatna in Pasian’ pahtakna hong ngahsak a
Romans5:5 Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak a Kha Siangtho tawh eite sungah ama itna hong guang ahih manin hih lametna in eite hong lungkiasak ngei lo hi.
Romans5:6 Eite cimawhin i om laitakin Pasian’ hoihsak hunin ei mi gilote a dingin Khrih hong si hi.
Romans5:7 Mihoih khat a dingin a si ngam a omkha ahi zongin thukham zuizo mipa a dingin sih ngam nading a thu haksa mahmah khat ahi hi.
Romans5:8 Ahi zongin eite mawhna nei ihih laitakin eite a dingin Khrih hong si ahih manin Pasian in eite hong it mahmahna thu hong lak khin hi.
Romans5:9 Ama sihna hangin tu-in Pasian tawh kipawlthei ihih manin Pasian’ hehna hangin gimna panin zong hong suaktasak zaw kan lai ding hi.
Romans5:10 Pasian tawh eite i kilangneih laitakin ama Tapa’ sihna hangin amah tawh hong kilemsak ahihleh tu-in Pasian tawh kipawl khinta ihih manin Khrih nuntakna in eite hong honkhiazo zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?
Romans5:11 Tuateng bek hi lo lai a
Romans5:12 Mi khat hangin leitungah mawhna hong om a
Romans5:13 Thukham a om mapekin leitungah mawhna na omkhin a
Romans5:14 Ahi zongin Adam hun a kipan Moses hun dongin sihna in mite uk a
Romans5:15 Ahi zongin Pasian’ hong piak letsong pen Adam’ mawhna tawh kibang lo ahih manin tua tegel tehkak theih ding hi lo hi. Tua mi khat a khialhna hangin mi tampi a sihna pen a man mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasian’ hong itna le hong hehpihna nakpitakin lianzaw lai a
Romans5:16 Pasian’ letsong le mi khat’ mawhna a hatna zia kilamdang hi. Khialhna khat a om khit ciangin
Romans5:17 Mi khat bek’ mawhna hangin sihna in hong uk ahihleh mi khat mah ahi Jesuh Khrih hangin nakpitakin a lian Pasian’ hehpihna le mihoih-a sanna a ngah mite nungta-in thahatzaw kan ding uh hi.
Romans5:18 Tua hi a
Romans5:19 Mi khat in thu a man loh manin mi tampi mimawh a suahsak mah bangin mi khat in thu a manna hangin mi tampi in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah ding uh ahi hi.
Romans5:20 Khialhna a tam semsem nadingin thukham hong kipia hi. Ahi zongin khialhna a tamna munah Pasian’ hehpihna hong lianzaw zel hi.
Romans5:21 Tua ahih manin mawhna thahatin hong sihsak mah bangin
Romans6:1 Tua ahihleh Pasian’ hehpihna a liattheih nadingin mawhna bawlbawl ding ihi hiam?
Romans6:2 Tua bang hi dek lo ding hi. Mawhna thu-ah a si eite in bangci-in mawhna bawl thei nawn ding ihi hiam?
Romans6:3 Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawl theih nadingin ama sungah a kiphum eite pen ama sihna mahah zong a sikhawm ihihlam thei lo na hi uh hiam?
Romans6:4 I Pa’ vangliatna tawh sihna panin Khrih a kithawhkiksak mah bangin eite zong nuntakna thak i nuntak theih nadingin tui i kiphum ciangin amah tawh kiphum khawmin a sikhawm ihi hi.
Romans6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama sihna-ah sikhawmin pawlkhat i suah leh amah a thawhkikna-ah zong pawlkhat suakin i thokhawm ding hi.
Romans6:6 Mawhna khutnuai-ah eite i om nawn loh nadingin mawhnopna lungsim i neihnateng i sucip a
Romans6:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat a sih ciangin mawhna vangliatna panin a suakta ahi hi.
Romans6:8 Ahi zongin Khrih tawh i sihkhawm leh amah tawh ei zong i hingkhawm ding hi
Romans6:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin Khrih kihingkiksak khin a
Romans6:10 Ama sihna pen mawhna thu tawh kisai-a sihna hi a
Romans6:11 Tua mah bangin note zong Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin mawhna thu-ah si-in
Romans6:12 Tua ahih ciangin na pumpi uh deihna na zuih loh nadingun na pumpi uh
Romans6:13 Mawhna gamtat nadingin na pumpi nate uh khat beek na zang nawn kei ding uh hi. Note pen misi hinapi-in a kihingkiksak mite bang na hih manun
Romans6:14 Note pen thukham’ sawlna hangin nasem hi loin Pasian’ hong lah thuhoihte’ hangin nasem na hih uh manin mawhna’ sawlna mangin na gamta nawn kei un.
Romans6:15 Eite pen thukham’ uk hi loin Pasian’ hehpihna in hong uk ahih manin mawhna i gamta kei ding hi.
Romans6:16 Mi khatpeuh’ thu a mang dingin ama khut sungah na kipiak uh ciangin a thu na mante uh’ sila na hi uh hi. Mawhna na bawl uhleh sihna a thuak ding na hi uh a
Romans6:17 Nidangin silate bangin mawhna’ thu a mang hinapi-in
Romans6:18 Mawhna’ vangliatna panin na suakta khinta uh a
Romans6:19 Note’ theihtheih nadingin nisim nuntakna ziate tawh a hong genteh ka hi hi. Nidang lai-in hoih lohna le gitlohna a gamta dingin na pumpi uh na buppiak uh mah bangin
Romans6:20 Mawhna khut sungah na om laitakun Pasian’ deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh kisam lo hi.
Romans6:21 Ahi zongin
Romans6:22 Ahi zongin tu-in mawhna bawlnopna panin suakta-in Pasian’ khutsung mi na hita uh hi. Tua thu hangin na ngah uh na pen Pasian a dingin a kipia khin nuntakna hi a
Romans6:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna in thaman hong piak pen sihna hi a
Romans7:1 Lawmte aw
Romans7:2 Gentehna-in
Romans7:3 Tua ahih manin a pasal a nuntak hun sungin pasal dang tawh a lupkhop leh mi tawh a mawh kici hi. Ahi zongin a pasal a si hileh thukham tawh kisai-in a suakta hi a
Romans7:4 Sanggamte aw
Romans7:5 I leitung lungsim tawh i nuntak laiteng
Romans7:6 Ahi zongin nidangin a hong lencip thukham panin Pasian in eite hong suaktasak khin ahih manin tua thukham tawh kisai-ah eite a sikhin ihi hi. Lai sungah a kigelh thukham lui sungah nungta nawn loin
Romans7:7 Tua ahihleh Thukham mahmah pen a siahuai ahi hiam? A sia hi lo hi. Mawhna bang hiam cih Thukham in hong theitel sak hi. Thukham in
Romans7:8 Thukham a omna hangin mawhna in nuamtak sa-in hazatna a tuamtuam ka neihtheih nading hong piangsak hi. Thukham om kei leh mawhna in bangmah sem thei lo hi.
Romans7:9 Thukham ka theih ma-in mi nungta ka hi ngei a
Romans7:10 Nuntak ngah nadingin a kibawl thukham pen keima a dingin sihna hong hi zawsop hi.
Romans7:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham a om manin mawhna in nuamtaksa a
Romans7:12 Tua ahih ciangin Thukham mahmah hitaleh thupiaknate hitaleh hoihin man a
Romans7:13 Tua ahihleh a hoih na khat in kei’ sih nading hong piangsak ahi hiam? Hi lo hi. Tua sihna pen mawhna’ nasepna hi a
Romans7:14 Thukham pen i kha thu tawh kisai hi
Romans7:15 Ka hihnopteng hihkha loin ka hih nop loh tengkeek mah hih zawsop ka hih manin keima gamtatna mahmah zong ka tel thei kei hi.
Romans7:16 Ka hih nop lohteng ka hih veve ciangin Thukham a deihhuai khat hi
Romans7:17 Tua ahih manin tua bangin a gamta taktak pen kei hi loin ka sunga om mawhna hizaw hi.
Romans7:18 Ka leitung pumpi sungah a hoih na khat beek om lo hi
Romans7:19 A hoih ka gamtatnop teng gamta loin
Romans7:20 Ka gamtat nop lohteng ka gamtat veve ciangin tua a gamta pen kei hi nawn loin ka sunga om mawhna a gamta ahihna a hong kilang hi.
Romans7:21 Tua ahih ciangin a hoih gamta nuam hinapi-in a sia bekbek a gamtakha ka hihna ka thei hi.
Romans7:22 Ka lungsim tawng taktakah Pasian’ thukham hoih ka sa hi.
Romans7:23 Ahi zongin kei’ deih loh thudang khat in ka lungsimah na hong sem hi. Tua ka sunga na hong sem pen in mawhna thu-ah kei hong mancip hi.
Romans7:24 Kei pen a lungkham mi ka hita hi. Kei a hong sisak ding hih lungsim lui panin kua in kei hong honkhiazo ding ahi hiam?
Romans7:25 I Topa Jesuh Khrih in hong honkhiazo ding ahih manin Pasian tungah ka lung a dam hi. Kei’ omzia taktak ahihleh: Ka lungsim tawh Pasian’ thu ka zui a
Romans8:1 Ahi zongin tu-in ahihleh Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin a nungta mite pen mawhna thukhenna tawh kipelh hi.
Romans8:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih Jesuh tawh a hong kipawlsak Kha Siangtho in mawhna le sihna a piangsak thukham panin kei hong suaktasak khinta hi.
Romans8:3 Mihingte thahat lo ihih manin Thukham in ahih zawh loh thute Pasian in a hihzo hi. Mawhna a beisak theih nadingin mihingte sunga om mawhna tungah thu a khenna-in ama Tapa hong sawl a
Romans8:4 Eite’ deihna bangin nungta loin Pasian’ Kha Siangtho’ deihna bangin a nungta eite sungah Thukham’ deihna teng a kicin theih nadingin Pasian in a Tapa a hong sawl ahi hi.
Romans8:5 Amau pumpi deihna bangin a nungtate
Romans8:6 I ngaihsutna
Romans8:7 Mi khatpeuh in ama pumpi deihna a ki-uksak ciangin Pasian’ thukhamte zui lo ahih manin Pasian’ gal suak a
Romans8:8 Amau pumpi deihna bangin a gamtate in Pasian lungdamsak thei lo uh hi.
Romans8:9 Note sungah Pasian’ Kha Siangtho hong om nakleh nomau pumpi deihna bangin gamta loin Kha Siangtho deihna bangin na gamta ding uh hi. Khrih lungsim a nei lote Khrih tawh kipawl lo hi.
Romans8:10 Ahi zongin note sungah Khrih hong om leh mawhna hangin na pumpi uh a si veve ding ahi zongin
Romans8:11 Sihna panin Jesuh a thokiksak Pasian’ Kha Siangtho note sungah hong om leh sihna panin Khrih a hingkik sakpa mah in note sungah a om ama Kha Siangtho mah tawh a sithei pumpi a hong nungtasak ding hi.
Romans8:12 Tua ahih ciangin lawmte aw
Romans8:13 Na pumpi uh deihna zui-in na gamtat uhleh na si ding uh a
Romans8:14 Pasian’ Kha Siangtho in a makaih mite
Romans8:15 Note tungah Pasian in a hong piak a Kha Siangtho in note na lau nadingun sila-in a hong bawl hi lo a
Romans8:16 Eite
Romans8:17 Eite pen ama ta ihih manin mite a dingin a koih thuphate i ngah banah Khrih a dingin a koihte zong i ngahkhawm lai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih in a thuak mah bangin i thuak nakleh amah a minthan’ mah bangin ei zong i minthang ding hi.
Romans8:18 Tuhuna i thuaknate pen Pasian in a hong piak ding minthanna tawh ka ngaihsut khawm ciangin gentham ka sa het kei hi.
Romans8:19 Pasian’ bawlsa khempeuh in Pasian’ tate a hong kilahkhiat hun ding lawp mahmahin a ngak uh hi.
Romans8:20 Pasian’ bawlsate
Romans8:21 Pasian’ bawlsate
Romans8:22 Tuhun ciang dong Pasian’ bawlsa khempeuh nupi nausuak ding bangin na sa-in a tauna uh i thei hi.
Romans8:23 Pasian’ bawlsa nate bek hi lo a
Romans8:24 Hih bangin lamenin i upna in eite hong honkhia khin hi. Ahi zongin i lamet pen i muh ciangin tua pen lamet hi nawn lo hi. Kua in a muhsa nate lamen nawn ahi hiam?
Romans8:25 I muh lohte i lamet ciangin lungduaitakin i ngak thei hi.
Romans8:26 Tua ahih manin eite bangzahin ginalo hitalehang eite a hong huh dingin Kha Siangtho a hong pai hi. Eite in a kilawm bangin thunget ding nangawn i thei kei a
Romans8:27 Kha Siangtho in Pasian’ deihna tawh kizui-in Pasian’ mite a dingin hong thumsak ahih manin mihingte’ lungsimtawng thu a thei Pasian in Kha Siangtho’ ngaihsutna a thei hi.
Romans8:28 Ama deihna bang a sem dingin Pasian in a hong sap
Romans8:29 Pasian’ Tapa mi khempeuh lakah a upa pen a suahtheih nadingin Pasian in a teelkholhsa mite
Romans8:30 Tua ahih manin ama sap mite a sehsa hi a
Romans8:31 Hih teng bang ahih khit ciangin bang gen ding om nawn ahi hiam? Pasian in eite hong koppih peuh leh kua in eite hong zozo ding ahi hiam?
Romans8:32 Ama Tapa nangawn siit loin eite khempeuh a dingin hong piakhia ahih manin
Romans8:33 Pasian in mawh lo hi
Romans8:34 Tua ahih manin kua in amaute tungah thu khenthei nawn ding ahi hiam? Eite a dingin a hong thumsak pa pen Pasian’ taklamah a tu

Romans11:1 Tua ahihleh Pasian in ama mi Israel-te nialin nusia mangkhin ahi hiam? Tua bang hi dek lo hi. Kei mahmah zong Abraham’ suan Israel mite ka hi a
Romans11:2 Pasian in tanglai panin a teelsa mite nusia lo hi. Elijah in Israel mite mawhsakin Pasian kiangah nakpitakin thu a genna Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thei lo na hi uh hiam?
Romans11:3 Tua sungah
Romans11:4 Ahi zongin Pasian in
Romans11:5 Tua mah bangin tuhunin zong Pasian in ama hehpihna tawh a teelsa mi tawmkhat omlai hi.
Romans11:6 A teelna ah mite’ nasepna bulphuhin a teel hi loin ama dikna hangin a teel hizaw hi. Pasian in mihingte’ nasepna bulphuhin a teel hileh Pasian’ dikna pen dikna kici thei lo ding hi.
Romans11:7 A thu omzia taktak hih bang ahi hi. Israel mi a tamzaw in a hanciamciam uh ngah lo uh hi. Pasian’ teel mi tawmkhat bek in ngah uh a
Romans11:8 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans11:9 Tua ciangin David in zong
Romans11:10 Khua a muh loh nadingun a mit uh taw hen la
Romans11:11 Jew mite a puk uh ciangin sia paisuak ahi uh hiam? Sia paisuak lo uh hi. Amau’ mawhna hangin Gentail mite in hotkhiatna ngah uh hi. Gentail mite in hotkhiatna a ngah pen Jew mite in enna lungsim a neihtheih nading uh deihna ahi hi.
Romans11:12 Jew mite’ mawhna pen leitung khempeuh thupha ngahna suak a
Romans11:13 Tu-in no Gentail mite tungah thu ka hong gennuam hi: No Gentail mite a dingin sawltak ka sep sungteng ka nasep a thupi mahmahin ka ngaihsun ding hi.
Romans11:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mipihte in note hong entheih nading uh piangsak thei-in
Romans11:15 Amaute a kinialna hangin Pasian tawh leitung mi khempeuh kipawl theihna piang ahihleh amaute a kisan’ hun ciangin a sisate nangawn a hinkikna hong hita ding hi.
Romans11:16 Anlum a ki-em masa sung panin a themkhat Pasian biakna-in a kipiak ciangin a anlum buppi zong Pasian-a’ mah hi pah a
Romans11:17 A kiciing oliv kung a hiangte kisatkhia-in gamlak oliv hiangte tawh kipeh hi. No Gentail-te pen tua gamlak oliv hiangte tawh a kibang na hi uh a
Romans11:18 Tua ahih manin oliv hiang a kisatkhia tawh a kibang Jew mite simmawhbawl kha kei un. Note na kiphatsak theih nading uh a thu om lo hi. Note pen a hiang tawh a kibang lel na hi uh a
Romans11:19 Note in
Romans11:20 Tua pen thuman ahi hi. Amaute in a up lohna hangun a kisatkhia hi a
Romans11:21 Pasian in oliv hiang ngeite dawm lo ahihleh note hong dawm tuan lo ding hi.
Romans11:22 Hih thu-ah Pasian a migit mahmahna le a khauh mahmahna i mu hi. A khial mite tungah khauh mahmah a
Romans11:23 Tua ciangin Jew mite in zong a lungsim uh kheelin Pasian a up uhleh Pasian in a pehkik theih nading vangliatna nei ahih manin amaute zong amau’ mun ngei mahah pehkik ding hi.
Romans11:24 Note pen na pianngei uh gamlak oliv kung panin hong kisatkhia-in note’ pianngei ahi lo a kiciing oliv kung tungah hong kipehthei ahihleh a kiciing oliv kung panin a kisatkhia tawh a kibang Jew mite pen Pasian in amau omna ngei-ah a pehkik ding olzaw mahmah lai ding hi.
Romans11:25 Sanggamte aw
Romans11:26 Tua hi a
Romans11:27 Amaute’ mawhna ka maisak ciangin hih ka thuciamna ka pia ding hi
Romans11:28 Jew mite in Lungdamna Thu um loin Pasian’ gal ahihna pen no Gentail mite’ hamphat nading hi a
Romans11:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in a teel mite le thupha a piak mite tawh kisai-in a thu dokkik lo hi.
Romans11:30 No Gentail mite in a beisa hunah Pasian’ thu na mang kei uh a
Romans11:31 Tua mah bangin amaute’ thuman lohna hangin note in Pasian’ hehpihna na ngahna uh pen Jew mite in zong Pasian’ hehpihna a ngahkik theih nading uh ahi hi.
Romans11:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna a piaktheih nadingin a thuman lohna hangun mi khempeuh thongkia a bangsak hi.
Romans11:33 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ hong hehpihna nakliat mahmah a
Romans11:34 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in
Romans11:35 Amah in hong thukkik theih nadingin kuamah in ama tungah thupha va bawl ngei lo hi
Romans11:36 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh ama piansak hi a
Romans12:1 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
Romans12:2 Leitung mihingte’ gamtat bangin gamta kei unla
Romans12:3 Pasian in kei tungah hehpihna hong piakkhongna hangin note tungah kong gennop thu in: Note tawh a kituakzah valin kilian ngaihsutzaw kha kei un. Pasian in note tungah upna hong piakzah tawh kizui-in kingaihsun bek zaw unla
Romans12:4 I pumpi tungah zong na tampi i nei a
Romans12:5 Tua mah bangin eite mi tampi ihih hangin pumkhat ihi a
Romans12:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian in hehpihna hong piakkhongna tawh kizui-in i siamna a tuamtuamte zang ciat ni. I siamna pen Pasian’ thu gentheih nading siamna ahih leh i upna neihzah tawh kizui-in gen ni.
Romans12:7 Nasep nading siamna a nei ihih leh na sem ni. Hilh nading siamna a nei ihih leh hilh ni.
Romans12:8 Midangte hanthot theih nading siamna a nei ihih leh midangte hanthawn ni. Midangte hop theih nading a nei ihih leh citna taktak tawh hawm ni. Makaih theih nading siamna a nei ihih leh hoihtakin na sem ni. Midangte hehpih theih nading a nei ihih leh maitai takin hih ni.
Romans12:9 Na ki-itnate uh lungsim takpi tawh hi sak unla
Romans12:10 Unau ki-itna lungsim nei unla
Romans12:11 Thadah kei unla
Romans12:12 Lamet na neihna hangun lungdamin om tawntung unla
Romans12:13 Na Khristian pihte uh a kisapna bangin na neihsate uh na hawm unla
Romans12:14 No a hong bawlsia mite
Romans12:15 A lungdam mite lungdampih unla
Romans12:16 Mi deidan loin a kibangin en un. Kiphasak loin mineute tawh kikhawlthei unla
Romans12:17 Midangte’ gitlohnate thukkik kei unla
Romans12:18 Ahih theih laiteng mi khempeuh tawh na kilem nadingun hanciam un.
Romans12:19 Lawmte aw
Romans12:20 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans12:21 Tua ahih manin gitlohna kizosak kei unla
Romans13:1 A kuamah peuh in hong ukte’ thu na mang ciat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ thukimpih lohin kuamah in ukna thu nei lo hi; ukna thu nei i cih mite pen Pasian’ koih mite ahi hi.
Romans13:2 Tua ahih manin ukna thuneite a nialte pen Pasian’ koihsa mite a nial suak a
Romans13:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh gam uk mite pen a gamtat hoih mite’ kihtak ding hi lo a
Romans13:4 Ukna thuneite pen note’ hoih nadingin Pasian’ nasemte ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin a sia-in na gamtat uhleh gim hong pia taktak ding uh ahih manin na lau ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Pasian’ nasemte hi a
Romans13:5 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ gimpiak ding kihtakna hang bek hi loin
Romans13:6 Ukna thu a neite in amau’ sep dingteng a kimtakin a sep uh ciangin Pasian a dingin na a semte hi uh ahih manin tua thu hang mahin zong mangmu a pia na hi uh hi.
Romans13:7 Tua ahih manin phiangsiah piak dingte tungah pia-in
Romans13:8 Khatlekhat ki-it ding cih lohbuang
Romans13:9 Thukham sungah
Romans13:10 Midangte a it mi peuhmah in amaute tungah siatna bawl het lo ahih manin itna i neih ciangin Thukham buppi a zui khinta ihi hi.
Romans13:11 Tuhun pen bang hun hita ahi hiam
Romans13:12 Zan khuamial bei dektak a
Romans13:13 Sun khuavak sunga om mite bangin a kilawmin gamta ni. Gualnopna le zukhamna
Romans13:14 Kidal nadingin
Romans14:1 Upna neu mite pawlbawl unla
Romans14:2 Mi pawlkhat in na khempeuh ka nektheih ding hi
Romans14:3 Tua ahih manin a ne mite in a tang mite simmawhbawl kei hen la
Romans14:4 Mi khat’ nasemte tungah kua in thu khen thei ding na hi uh hiam? A gina le a ginalo a khen ding pa pen amau’ Topa ahi hi. A Topa un hoih hi
Romans14:5 Mi pawlkhatte in ni khatpeuh adang sangin thupi zaw hi
Romans14:6 Ni khatpeuh thupi diak hi
Romans14:7 Ama a’ ding bekin kuamah nungta lo a
Romans14:8 I nuntak leh Topa a dingin a nungta ihi a
Romans14:9 Hih thu hangin Khrih pen a site le a hingte’ Topa ahih theih nadingin hong si-in hong nungtakik hi.
Romans14:10 Tua ahihleh bang hangin na Khristianpihte uh tungah thu khen a
Romans14:11 Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans14:12 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in i gamtatna ciat Pasian’ mai-ah a va kigentel ciat ding ihi hi.
Romans14:13 Tua ahih manin khatlekhat kimawhsakin thu kikhen kei unla
Romans14:14 Topa Jesuh tawh kipawlin a lungsim ka theihna tawh
Romans14:15 An khatpeuh na nekna uh hangin na Khristianpihte’ lungnopmawhna na piansak uhleh itna lungsim tawh a gamta na hi nawn kei uh hi. Na an nekna uh tawh
Romans14:16 Tua ciangin note in hoih na sak uh thute
Romans14:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ Ukna pen nekledawn tawh a kisai thu hi lo a
Romans14:18 Hih bang danin Khrih’ na a sem mite in Pasian lungdamsak a
Romans14:19 Tua ahih ciangin mi tawh kilem theih nading le kha thu-ah khatlekhat thahatna i kipiak theih nading thute hanciam ciat ni.
Romans14:20 Annek huhau-in Pasian’ sepsa thute susia kei ni. An khempeuh a kine thei ding ahi hi; ahi zongin tua nekna hangin mi khat peuhpeuh a pukding ahihleh a khial ihi hi.
Romans14:21 Midangte in a puklawh theih annekna
Romans14:22 Hih thu-ah no’ upna le no’ ngaihsutnate
Romans14:23 Ahi zongin lunghimawh pipi-in a ne a om leh
Romans15:1 Upna lamah a thahat eite in upna zawngkhalte’ ginat lohna i thuakpih ding kilawm hi; eima ut bangin i gamta kei ding hi.
Romans15:2 Midangte a upna uh hong khangin
Romans15:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih zong ama nopsak theih nadingin gamta lo zaw hi. Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans15:4 Lai Siangtho sungah a om thu khempeuh pen eite hilh nading
Romans15:5 Note in lungsim kikhatin i Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pa ahi Pasian na phatkhawm theih nadingun Pasian in thuakzawhna le thahatna hong pia hen la

Romans15:7 Tua ahih ciangin Khrih in note hong san mah bangin midangte in Pasian a phattheih nadingun note khatlekhat na kisang un.
Romans15:8 Hih banga kong genna pen
Romans15:9 le Gentail mite in zong ama hehpihna hangin Pasian a phattheih nadingun Khrih a hong paina hang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah

Romans15:16 Gentail mite tungah na a sem dingin Khrih Jesuh sawltak hih theih nading hamphatna lianpi Pasian in kei a hong piakna hang ahi hi. Gentail mite pen Kha Siangtho in Pasian’ tungah a piak

Romans15:21 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
Romans15:22 Note kiangah ka hong paipak theih lohna pen tu-a kong genna thu hang ahi hi.
Romans15:23 Ahi zongin hih gam kiimteng a ka nasepna man khinta ing a
Romans15:24 tu-in note tawh kimu theita dingin ka kilamen hi. Spain gam ka paikawmin note kiang ka hong nawk nuam a
Romans15:25 Ahi zongin tu laitakin ahihleh Jerusalem khua-a Pasian mite a kihuhna a puak dingin ka va pai masa ding hi.
Romans15:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Masedonia gam le Grik gam sunga om pawlpite in Jerusalem khua-a om Pasian’ mi a zawngte huh nadingin sum piak ding amau thu-in a vaihawmtawm uh hi.
Romans15:27 Hih pen amau ngaihsut tawmna tawh lawptakin a huh uh ahi hi. A taktakin ci lehang hih mizawngte a huh dingun a kilawm mah ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mite in kha thu tawh kisai nate Gentail mite hawm uh ahih manin Gentail mite in zong leitung nate tawh Jew mite a huh dingun a kilawm khat ahi hi.
Romans15:28 Amaute a dingin a kikaikhawm hih sumte a cingin amaute tungah apin
Romans15:29 Note kiang ka hong tun ciangin Khrih kiang panin thupha tampi tak ka hong puak ding lamtak ka thei hi.
Romans15:30 Lawmte aw
Romans15:31 Judea gam sunga a om thu um lo mite in kei hong gimsakkhak loh nading le Jerusalem khua-a a om Pasian mite a dingin nasepnate lungdam takin a hong santheih nadingun thu hong ngetsak un.
Romans15:32 Tua bangin thu hong ngetsak le-uhcin
Romans15:33 Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in note khempeuh hong ompih tahen. Amen.
Romans16:1 Kenkhrea khua-a om pawlpite lakah na a sem
Romans16:2 Amah pen keimah a kipan mi tampi a dingin lawm hoih mahmah khat ahih manin
Romans16:3 Khrih Jesuh sungah na ka sepkhoppih Prisilla le Aquila na hopih sak un.
Romans16:4 Amaute pen kei a dingin a si ngam uh ahi hi. Amaute tungah a lungdam kei guak bek zong hi loin
Romans16:5 Amau’ inn-a kikhawm pawlpi mi khempeuh zong na hopih sak un. Asia gam sungah Khrih thu a um masa pen pa ahi ka lawm it mahmah Epainetas zong na hopih sak un.
Romans16:6 Note a dingin nakpitakin na a sem Mary zong na hopih sak un.
Romans16:7 Jew mipih ahih banah ka thongkiatpih ahi Andronikas le Junias zong na hopih sak un. Amaute pen kei’ Khristian suahma pekin a na suak khinsate na hi uh a
Romans16:8 Topa thu sungah ka lawm it mahmah ahi Ampliatas zong na hopih sak un.
Romans16:9 Khrih nasepna sungah na ka sepkhoppih uh ahi Urbanas
Romans16:10 Khrih tungah mi citak mahmah ahi Apelles zong na hopih sak un. Aristobulas innkuanpih mite zong na hopih sak un.
Romans16:11 Jew mipih Herodion le Narsissas innkuan sunga i Khristian sanggamte zong na hopih sak un.
Romans16:12 Topa’ na a sem Trifana le Trifosa
Romans16:13 Topa’ nasepna sungah a kikhai mahmah Rufas
Romans16:14 Asinkritas
Romans16:15 Filologas le Julia
Romans16:16 Sanggam ki-itna taktak tawh note khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khrih pawlpi khempeuh in zong hopihna kam hong khak uh hi.
Romans16:17 Lawmte aw
Romans16:18 Tua bang mite in i Topa Khrih’ na a sem hi loin
Romans16:19 Lungdamna thu tawh kisai-ah na cihtakna uh mi khempeuh in thei ahih manin hih thu-ah kong lungdampih mahmah hi. A hoih bang hiam
Romans16:20 Tua hileh eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Pasian in Satan tuancilin note’ khenuai mi hong hisak baih ding hi. I Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna thupha
Romans16:21 Ka naseppih Timoti in note hong hopih a
Romans16:22 Hih lai a gelhsak keimah Tertias in zong upna kikhat ihihna tawh ka hong hopih hi.
Romans16:23 Keima zintunna pa le pawlpite’ kikhopna inn nei pa zong ahi Gaias in zong hong hopih hi. Ka omna khuapi sumkem pa Erastas le i Khristian sanggam Kuartas in zong hong hopih uh hi.
Romans16:24 (I Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong om tahen. Amen.)
Romans16:25 Eite khempeuh in Pasian phat ni. Keima hilh Jesuh Khrih thu ahi Lungdamna Thu le tanglai-in a ki-imcip
Romans16:26 Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in Pasian umin a zuihtheih nadingin tu-in kamsangte’ laigelhnate le a nungta tawntung Pasian’ thupiakna tawh tua thu ki-imcip pen a hong kipholak ta ahi hi.
Romans16:27 Thu khempeuhah pilna a nei

1Corinthians3:15 Ahi zongin mi khat in a lam nate a kattum leh amah a sum hi ding hi. Tua nate a lam pa ahihleh meikat nading panin a suakta bang keekin a suakta bek ding hi.

1Corinthians4:7 Note in bang kisaktheihpih na hi uh hiam? Tu-a na neih khempeuh uh Pasian’ hong piak hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahihleh hong kipiasa bek ahih manin a bang kisaktheihpih na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians4:8 Na deih khempeuh uh neikhin na kisa uh a
1Corinthians4:9 Ko sawltakte pen vantungmi le leitung mi khempeuh in a et dingin mipi’ mai-ah thahna a thuak dingin thukhenna a kipia mi bangin Pasian in a zaneu penin hong koih tawntung tawh kibang ka sa hi.
1Corinthians4:10 Khrih hangin mite mai-ah kote mihai ka suak uh a
1Corinthians4:11 Tuni ciang dong gilkial dangtakin puansilh ding nangawn nei loin ka om uh hi. Inn le lo zong nei loin hong kinotsuk hong kinotto kawikawi hi.
1Corinthians4:12 Kote’ nektawm ding ka thatang mahmah uh tawh nakpitakin ka sem uh hi. Hong kisamsiat ciangin thupha ka lehpiak uh a
1Corinthians4:13 Zahpihna kam tawh hong kihopih ciangin kamkhum tawh ka dawng uh hi. Mite’ muhna-ah tuni ciang dong ninbulom le leivuithem bang bek ka hi uh hi.
1Corinthians4:14 Hih bangin lai ka hong gelh ciangin na maizum nading uh ka deihna hi lo a
1Corinthians4:15 Khrih thu hong hilh ding mi a tul a za-in na nei uh ahi zongin pa-a na neih ding uh kei bek a om ka hihna thu na phawk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah lungdamna thu ka hong hilhna hangin Jesuh Khrih sungah nomau’ pa ka suak hi.
1Corinthians4:16 Tua ahih manin keima gamtatzia na hong zuih nadingun ka hong thum hi.

1Corinthians6:1 Note khatlekhat thu na kineih uh ciangin Pasian’ mi siangthote khensakzaw loin lawki thukhente’ mai na kitun ngam uh hi.
1Corinthians6:2 Pasian’ mite in leitung mite’ thu a khensakzaw ding ahihlam thei lo na hi uh hiam? Note pen leitung mite’ thu a khensak ding na hih uh ciangin tua bang thu neute khen thei lo lawmlawm na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians6:3 Eite pen vantung mite’ thu nangawn a khensak ding ihih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih manin hih leitung a no’ thu neuneute leltak na khentheih zawk kan ding uh ahi hi.
1Corinthians6:4 Tua bang hinapi-in hih bang thu themthem hong pian ciangin pawlpi sungah bangmahin a kisim lo mite’ mai kitun ding na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians6:5 Note a dingin zumhuai mahmah hi. Note khatlekhat na kithuneihnate uh a khenthei ding note lakah mipil khat beek om buang ding hi.
1Corinthians6:6 Tua hinapi
1Corinthians6:7 Note khatlekhat zum na kitut mahmah uh zong a gina het lo na hihna uh hong kilangsak hi. Bang hangin thuakzaw mai lo a

1Corinthians6:15 Na pumpi uh

1Corinthians6:19 Na pumpi uh
1Corinthians6:20 Note pen Pasian in a hong leisa na hih manun na pumpi uh Pasian’ minthan nadingin na zang un.
1Corinthians7:1 Tu-in nong laigelhna uh thu tawh kisai-in: Pasal in zi nei kei leh hoihzaw lo ding ahi hiam
1Corinthians7:2 Ahi zongin numei tawh paktatna tamlua ahih manin pasal in ama zi tuam nei hen la
1Corinthians7:3 Pasal in a zi a luppih dingin a kilawm zahin luppih ding a
1Corinthians7:4 Zi in ama pumpi a ut bangin zangthei nawn loin a pasal’ zat ding hi a
1Corinthians7:5 Thungetna-in hun na zattheih nadingun tawlkhat sung tuam om ding thukim khawm masa lopi-in lupkhop ding kinialkha kei un. Tua bangin tawlkhat sung na tuam om khit uh ciangin note’ pumpi’ deihna hangin Satan’ ze-etna sungah na pukkhak loh nadingun a ngeina bangin lupkhop ding kipan kik un.
1Corinthians7:6 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin a hoihpen hi
1Corinthians7:7 Mi khempeuh keimah bangin om ciat le-uh hoih ka sa hi. Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in Pasian’ piak hihzawhna a tuamtuam nei a
1Corinthians7:8 Pasal nei nai lote le meigongte pen keimah bangin tanggawl om paisuak le-uh hoih ka sa hi.
1Corinthians7:9 Ahi zongin a pumpi uh a ki-ukzawh kei ding uhleh pasal nei le-uh hoihzaw hi. Nei nuampipi a neih loh tentan sangin pasal neih hoihzaw hi.
1Corinthians7:10 A neisate tungah
1Corinthians7:11 A ciahsan leh zong pasal nei loin om paisuak hen. A om paisuakzawh kei leh a pasal ngei mah zuankik hen. Pasal in a zi ma kei tahen.
1Corinthians7:12 Adangte tungah
1Corinthians7:13 Numei khat in thu um lo mi khat pasalin a neih leh
1Corinthians7:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu um lo pasal pen a zi’ hangin thu um mi suakthei ding a
1Corinthians7:15 Ahi zongin thu um lo zi in ahi a
1Corinthians7:16 Thu um zi in
1Corinthians7:17 Mi khempeuh
1Corinthians7:18 Vun ki-atsa mi khat Pasian in a sap leh
1Corinthians7:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh vun atna le vun at lohna a thupi hi lo a
1Corinthians7:20 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh
1Corinthians7:21 Sila ahi mi khat Pasian in a sap leh phamawh lo hi; sila mahin ki-om thei veve hi. Ahi zongin suahtak theih nading lampi a om leh tua hunhoih hamphatna zang tahen.
1Corinthians7:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a sap sila ahi mi pen Topa a dingin mi suakta hi a
1Corinthians7:23 Note pen Pasian’ hong leisa na hih manun mite’ sila suak kei un.
1Corinthians7:24 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw
1Corinthians7:25 Tu-in a nungak lai a tangval laite thu tawh kisai-in: Topa kiang panin thu ngahna ka neih loh hangin Topa’ hehpihna tawh a muantaak ahi keima ngaihsutna ka hong gen ding hi.
1Corinthians7:26 Tu laitakin a om bangun om paisuak leh hoihzaw ding hi
1Corinthians7:27 Ahi zongin zineite in kikhen ding ngaihsutin nei kei tahen. Nungak lai tangval laite in lawm zong kei tahen.
1Corinthians7:28 Ahi zongin pasal in zi a neih hangin a khial hi lo a
1Corinthians7:29 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians7:30 a dahte pen a dah lo mah bangin kingaihsun uh hen la
1Corinthians7:31 leitung na nuamtakin a zangte pen a zang lo mah bangin kingaihsun ta uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih leitung pen sauveipi kip nawn lo ding hi.
1Corinthians7:32 Note
1Corinthians7:33 Ahi zongin zi neite in a zi a lungdamsak theih nadingun hih leitung vai kinin nei uh a
1Corinthians7:34 a ngaihsutna uh khen nih pha hi. Pasal a nei lo numeite in a lungsim le a pumpi uh Topa a dingin zangnuam uh ahih manin Topa’ nasep bek kinin nei uh hi. Ahi zongin pasal a nei numeite in a pasal uh a lungdamsak theih nadingun hih leitung vai kinin nei uh hi.
1Corinthians7:35 Hih bangin ka hong gen ciangin note’ haksat nading deihna hi loin note’ hoih nading ka deihna ahi hi. Note a kilawm a kituakin gamta-in
1Corinthians7:36 Tenpih dingin lawm dongkhin napi-in kiten nawn loh ding a ngaihsunte’ thu panin: Tenpih kei leng a numei tungah a thuman lo hi ding cihna ahi a
1Corinthians7:37 Ahi zongin kuama sawl hi loin zi nei lo dingin a lungsimah khauhtakin khentatin
1Corinthians7:38 Tua ahih manin a neite zong hoih a
1Corinthians7:39 Pasal a nei numei pen a pasal a nuntak laiteng suakta lo hi. A pasal a sih leh a deih peuhpeuh tawh kitengthei ding a
1Corinthians7:40 Ahi zongin keima ngaihsutna-ah pasal a neihse sangin tuaci om leh lungdamzaw dingin ka um a
1Corinthians8:1 Tu-in milim biakna sa tawh kisai thu panin: Amaute in
1Corinthians8:2 Mi khat in thu a thei-in a kingaihsut leh a taktakin a theih dingin a kilawmzah a thei nai lo ahi hi.
1Corinthians8:3 Mi khat in Pasian a it leh Pasian in tua mipa a na thei hi.
1Corinthians8:4 Tua ahih manin biakna sa tawh kisai thu panin: Milim i cih pen bangmah a om lopi khat lim dingin a kibawl na hi a
1Corinthians8:5 Leitung le vantungah pasian le topa a kici tampi a om ahi zongin
1Corinthians8:6 eite a dingin Pasian khat bek
1Corinthians8:7 Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in hih thu theikim lo uh hi. Mi pawlkhatte
1Corinthians8:8 Ahi zongin tua i nek ante in Pasian tawh i kizopna hong hoihsak tuan lo hi. I nekloh hangin siatna om tuan lo a
1Corinthians8:9 Ahi zongin note’ utbangin gamtat theih nading thu na neihna uh hangin upna a neu laite a puksak na suahkhak loh nadingun hoihtakin kidawm un.
1Corinthians8:10 No thuthei-a a kineite
1Corinthians8:11 Tua ahih manin note’ thutheihna hangin
1Corinthians8:12 Tua bangin lungsim thaneemte gimsakin
1Corinthians8:13 Tua ahih manin nekna in thu upna sungah ka sanggamte khat a khialsak ding ahihleh
1Corinthians9:1 Kei pen sawltak ka hi a
1Corinthians9:2 Midangte in sawltakin hong ngaihsun ta kei le-uh
1Corinthians9:3 Mite in kei hong mawhsak uh ciangin ka gen thu in:
1Corinthians9:4 Ka nasepna hangin annek tuidawn hong kipiak ding mah ahi hi.
1Corinthians9:5 Sawltak dangte
1Corinthians9:6 Kei le Barnabas bek
1Corinthians9:7 Kuamah in ama sum bei-in galkap na sem lo uh hi. Leenggui suan napi-in a leenggah a ne lo kuamah om lo hi. Tuu cing napi-in a tuunawi a ne lo kuamah om lo hi.
1Corinthians9:8 Hih ka hong gente pen mihingte’ zat ngeina hi a
1Corinthians9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses Thukham sungah
1Corinthians9:10 Hih bang a gen ciangin ei mihingte hong cihnopna hi a
1Corinthians9:11 Note lakah kha thu tawh kisai khaici hong vawh ka hih manun
1Corinthians9:12 Midangte in note tung panin ngahtheih nading thu nei uh ahihleh ko ka nei phazaw lai uh hi. Ahi zongin note tung panin ngahtheih nading thu a om hangin bangmah ka hong la kei uh a
1Corinthians9:13 Biakinn-ah nasem dingin a kicial mite in biakinn mah panin an ngah uh a
1Corinthians9:14 Tua mah bangin lungdamna thu a hilhte in tua nasepna mah panin nuntakna a ngah nading uh Topa’ thupiak ahi hi.
1Corinthians9:15 Ahi zongin hih ngahtheih ding hamphatnate khempeuh ka la kei a
1Corinthians9:16 Lungdamna thu ka hilh hangin kisialh nading thu bangmah om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu a hilh ding mahin a hong kisawl ahi hi. Tua ahih manin lungdamna thu hilh kei leng kei a dingin a dahhuai mahmah ahi hi.
1Corinthians9:17 Keima utthu tawh a sem hi leng sep thaman ka lamen ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in a sem dingin hong sawl ahih manin ka sep ding nasep a sem ka hi hi.
1Corinthians9:18 Tua ahihleh ka sep thaman bang ahi hiam? Ka thaman pen
1Corinthians9:19 Kei pen kuama khutnuai mi hi loin a suakta mi hinapi-in
1Corinthians9:20 Jew mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngahzawh nadingin Jew mite khat mah bangin ka gamta a
1Corinthians9:21 Tua mah bangin Jew mite’ Thukham in a huam loh Gentail mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngahzawh nadingin Gentail mite bangmahin ka gamta hi. Hih bangin ka gen ciangin Pasian’ thukham a zui lo
1Corinthians9:22 Upna neu mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngahzawh nadingin amaute mah bangin ka gamta hi. Tua ahih manin ahih theihna lam peuhpeuhah mite ka ngahzawh nadingin mi khempeuh’ ngeina ka zui hi.
1Corinthians9:23 Hih bangin ka gamtatna pen amaute tungah Lungdamna Thu ka tuttheih nading le keima nasep hoihtakin ka septheih nading ka deihna ahi hi.
1Corinthians9:24 Tai kidemna-ah mi khat bek in thaman a ngah ding hinapi-in a vekpi-un tai veve uh hi. Tua ahih manin thaman na ngahzawh nadingun na tai un.
1Corinthians9:25 Kimawlna sungah a kihel mi khempeuh in thu khempeuhah a pumpi uh uk ciat uh hi. Amaute pen a kisiathei pak a ngah nadingun a hanciam uh hi a
1Corinthians9:26 Tua ahih manin ngimna nei lopi-in a mawktai ka hi kei a
1Corinthians9:27 Kimawlna sungah midangte a kihel dingin a sam hinapi-in tua kimawlna-ah a kihel zo lo mi ka suahkhak loh nadingin ka pumpi seekin hoihtakin ka ki-uk hi.
1Corinthians10:1 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians10:2 Meiipi sung le tuipi sungah ama nungzui a suak dingin Moses sungah amaute na kiphum uh hi.
1Corinthians10:3 A vekpi-un kha tawh kisai an ne uh a
1Corinthians10:4 a vekpi mahun kha tawh kisai tui na dawn uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a tonpih
1Corinthians10:5 Ahi zongin amaute a tamzaw tungah Pasian lungkim lo ahih manin gam sung tengah amaute’ luanghawm kithehzak hi.
1Corinthians10:6 Amaute tungah a piangte khempeuh
1Corinthians10:7 amaute pawlkhat in a biak bangin milim i bia kei ding hi. Lai Siangtho in
1Corinthians10:8 Amaute pawlkhat bangin numei tawh paktatna i gamta kei ding hi. Nikhat thu-in mi tul sawmnih le tulthum a si uh hi.
1Corinthians10:9 Amaute pawlkhat bangin Topa i ze-et kei ding hi. Gul in amaute na tulum hi.
1Corinthians10:10 Amaute pawlkhat bangin Pasian i phunsan kei ding hi. Vantung mite in amaute na sulum hi.
1Corinthians10:11 Leitung beikuan hun sungah a om eite a dingin hih thupiangte i etteh ding thu hi a
1Corinthians10:12 Lungkip takin ka omzo hi
1Corinthians10:13 Na tuah uh ze-etnate khempeuh pen mite’ tuah ngeingeite mah ahi hi. Pasian in citakin a thuciamna lenkip ahih manin note’ thuak zawh loh ding ze-etna hong tuaksak lo ding hi. Ze-etna na tuah hun uh ciangin zong na thuakzawh nading uh thahatna hong guan ding ahih manin na suahtak zawh nading uh lampi hong honsak ding hi.
1Corinthians10:14 Tua ahih manin lawm itte aw
1Corinthians10:15 Thu ngaihsun thei mite tungah thugen bangin a hong gen ka hi hi. Ka thugente nomau mah in na ngaihsun tawm un.
1Corinthians10:16 Nekkhawm bawlna-ah leenggahzu hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko-in i dawn ciangin Khrih sisan hangin thuphate eite in zong a ngahkhawm cihna hi lo ahi hiam? I balnen anlum i nek ciangin zong Khrih pumpi hangin thuphate mah a ngahkhawm cihna hi lo ahi hiam?
1Corinthians10:17 Anlum khat bek hi a
1Corinthians10:18 Israel mite’ thu ngaihsun dih un. Biakna sa a ne khempeuh pen biakna tau tungah Pasian biakna thu-ah a kipawl hi lo ahi uh hiam?
1Corinthians10:19 Hih bang ka cih ciangin bang ka cihnopna ahi hiam? Milim ahi a
1Corinthians10:20 Ka cihnopna pen
1Corinthians10:21 Note in Topa tawh nekkhawmna hai sung pan le dawi tawh nekkhawmna hai sung panin na dawnkhawm thei kei ding uh hi. Topa tawh nekkhawmna an leh dawi tawh nekkhawmna an zong na nekhawm thei kei ding uh hi.
1Corinthians10:22 A nih tuakah kihelkhawm lehang Topa a heh nadingin a gamta ihi ding a
1Corinthians10:23 “Ka ut peuhpeuh ka hihtheihna ding thu om hi
1Corinthians10:24 A kuamah peuh in note’ angsung ding bek zong kei unla
1Corinthians10:25 Na lungsim uhah kisuanna a om loh nadingin sa zuakna-ah a kizuak sa peuhpeuh bang sa ahi hiam
1Corinthians10:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in
1Corinthians10:27 Thu um lo mi khat in an nekpih dingin hong samin tua an ne dingin na pai leh
1Corinthians10:28 Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in
1Corinthians10:29 Nangma lungsim nuam lo ding cihna hi loin a hong gen pa’ lungsim nuam lo ding ahih manin ne kei in
1Corinthians10:30 Keimah in Topa tungah lungdamna ko-in ne ka hih manin tua ka lungdamkohna thu-ah bang hangin hong kimawhsak thei ding ahi hiam?” cithei kha ding hi.
1Corinthians10:31 Tua ahih manin keimah in ka hong gennop thu in: Na hihna khempeuh uh
1Corinthians10:32 Jew mi ahi a
1Corinthians10:33 Mite in hotkhiatna a ngahtheih nadingin ka sepna khempeuhah keima angsung ngaihsun loin mi khempeuh phattuam nading hanciamin
1Corinthians11:1 Keimah in Khrih gamtatzia ka zuih mah bangin note in zong keima gamtatzia hong zui ta un.
1Corinthians11:2 Note in kei hong phawk tawntungin ka hong hilh thu khempeuh zui na hih manun ka hong phat mahmah hi.
1Corinthians11:3 Ahi zongin na theih ding uh ka deih thu in: Mi khempeuh’ lutang pen Khrih hi a
1Corinthians11:4 Pasal khatpeuh in mihon biakna sungah a lukhu lakhia lopi-in thungen ahi a
1Corinthians11:5 Tua mah bangin mihon biakna sungah numei khatpeuh in a lu khuh lopi-in thungen ahi a
1Corinthians11:6 Numeite in a lu a khuh kei ding uhleh a sam uh met vet uh hen. Tua ahih manin numeite in a sam uh a met ding a zumhuai mahmah khat ahih mah bangin a lu uh khuh ta uh hen.
1Corinthians11:7 Pasalte pen Pasian’ lim le a minthanna a kilangsak ahih manin a lu uh a khuh ding uh kilawm lo hi. Ahi zongin numeite pen pasalte’ minthanna a kilangsak ahi hi.
1Corinthians11:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh numei tung panin pasal kipiangsak lo a
1Corinthians11:9 Numei hangin pasal a kipiangsak hi lo a
1Corinthians11:10 Tua ahih ciangin a pasalte uh ukna nuai-ah a om ahihna a lah nadingun vantung mite’ muhna-ah numeite in a lu uh a khuh ding uh kilawm hi.
1Corinthians11:11 Ahi zongin Topa thu sunga i nuntakna-ah numeite pen pasal tawh loin a tangdinzo hi lo a
1Corinthians11:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh numei pen pasal tung panin a kipiangsak hi a
1Corinthians11:13 Hih thu nomau mah in ngaihsun tawm un. Numeite in a lu uh khuh lopi-in mihon biakna lakah Pasian kiangah thu a nget ding uh kilawm ahi hiam?
1Corinthians11:14 I pianpih ngeina mahmahah zong pasalte in sam sau a khawi pen amau a dingin a zumhuai thu ahihna
1Corinthians11:15 le numeite in samsau a neih pen a minthanna uh ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi lo ahi hiam? Numeite’ samsau pen a lu uh a tuam nadingin a kipia ahi hi.
1Corinthians11:16 Hih thu a nialnuam a omkhak zenzen leh eite a kipan Pasian pawlpi mi a kuamah peuh in tu-a ka hong gen ngeina lobuang adang a thei om lo hi
1Corinthians11:17 Ahi zongin a nuai-a thu tawh kisai-in note ka hong pakta kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh pawlpi kikhopna na neih uh ciangin phatna sangin siatna na piangsakzaw uh hi.
1Corinthians11:18 A masa penin
1Corinthians11:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh kuateng pawlpi mi citak ahi hiam
1Corinthians11:20 Nekkhawmna a bawl dingin note na kikhop uh ciangin Topa’ Nekkhawmna a ne dingin na pai kei uh hi.
1Corinthians11:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh nekkhawmna ne dingin na pai uh ciangin pawlkhatte amau’ an tawh na tung masa-in ne pah uh ahih manin
1Corinthians11:22 Hih bangin na gamtat uh
1Corinthians11:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka hong gen thu pen Topa kiang panin ka ngah thu hi a
1Corinthians11:24 Pasian tungah lungdam a kohkhit ciangin balnen a
1Corinthians11:25 Tua mah bangin nitak an a nekkhit uh ciangin hai la a
1Corinthians11:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin anlum ne-in hai sung panin leenggahzu na dawn simun
1Corinthians11:27 Tua ahih manin a kilawm lopi-in Topa’ anlum ne-in
1Corinthians11:28 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh ki-entel masa phot uh hen la
1Corinthians11:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ pumpi a khiatna thei lopi-in anlum ne-in hai panin leenggahzu a dawn mi pen amahmah mawhsak thukhenna a kipiatawm ahi hi.
1Corinthians11:30 Tua bang mawhna hangin note tampi tak cina-in na zawngkhal uh a
1Corinthians11:31 Eite hoihtakin ki-entel masa peuh lehang Pasian’ mawhsak thukhenna i thuak kei ding hi.
1Corinthians11:32 Ahi zongin eite in hih leitung mite tawh mawhsakna i thuakkhawm loh nadingin Topa in eite hong thuhilhin gim hong pia hi.
1Corinthians11:33 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
1Corinthians11:34 Tua bangin na kikhop uh ciangin Pasian’ thukhenna na thuakkhak loh nadingun a gilkial na om uhleh zong na inn uhah an ne masa un. Thu dangdangte ahihleh ka hong pai ciangin ka hong gen ding hi.

1Corinthians12:9 Adang khat tungah upna hong guan a
1Corinthians12:10 Adang khat tungah nalamdang bawl theihna

1Corinthians12:14 Pumpi in na khat bek nei loin nam tampi tak a nei hi.
1Corinthians12:15 Khe in
1Corinthians12:16 Bil in

1Corinthians12:18 Ahi zongin tu-a i neih bang tektekin
1Corinthians12:19 A vekpi-in pumpi na nam khat bek hi khin leh a pumpi ding koi-ah om nawn ding ahi hiam?
1Corinthians12:20 Ahi zongin tu-a i neih bangin pumpi khat bek om a
1Corinthians12:21 Tua ahih manin mit in khut kiangah
1Corinthians12:22 Pumpi na a ginalo tawh a kibangte a kimanna lian mahmah zawsop a

1Corinthians12:24 pumpi na hoih i sakte i lim et ding a kisap kholloh bang hi loin
1Corinthians12:25 Tua ahih manin i pumpi nate khatlekhat kithutuak lo cih om loin a vekpi-in a kilemkim uh hi.
1Corinthians12:26 Khat in natna ngah leh a vekpi-un thuakkhawm uh a
1Corinthians12:27 Tu-in note khempeuh pen Khrih pumpi na hi uh a

1Corinthians12:30 A vekpi-un cina damsak nading siamna nei lo uh a

1Corinthians13:1 Keimah in mihingte pau a tuamtuamte le vantung mite’ pau nangawn ka pautheih hangin itna ka neih kei leh a bil-aphuai zam le daltuah kitum tawh a kibang lel ka hi hi.
1Corinthians13:2 Thuhilh siamna nei-in
1Corinthians13:3 Ka neih khempeuh midangte tungah pia-in
1Corinthians13:4 Itna neite a lungduai-in migi hi. Itna neite in hazatna lungsim nei loin
1Corinthians13:5 Itna neite a kilawm loin gamta lo
1Corinthians13:6 Thuman lote-ah lungdam ngei lo uh a
1Corinthians13:7 Itna neite lungkia cih om ngei lo hi; a upna
1Corinthians13:8 Itna pen a tawntungin a kip ahi hi. Thuhilh siamna a om tei hangin tawlkhat sung bek kimangin
1Corinthians13:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite’ neih thutheih siamnate le i thuhilh siamnate a kicing hi lo hi.
1Corinthians13:10 Ahi zongin a kicing thu hong tun ciangin a kicingtaak lo thuteng maimang ding hi.
1Corinthians13:11 Naupang ka hih hun lai-in naupang mah bangin kampau-in
1Corinthians13:12 Dal limlang sunga et bangin tu laitakin a kitel pha loin i mu milmial a
1Corinthians13:13 Tu laitakin a omlai thu thumte pen upna
1Corinthians14:1 Na deih lianpen uh ki-itna na hisak un. Kha Siangtho’ hong piak siamna a tuamtuamte sung panin thuhilh siamna neih ding na hanciam phapen un.
1Corinthians14:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh pau lamdang a paute pen mite’ tungah thugen hi loin Pasian’ tungah thugen ahi hi. Amaute’ pau kuamah in thei lo a
1Corinthians14:3 Ahi zongin Pasian’ thu a hilhte pen mite tungah thugen hi a
1Corinthians14:4 Pau lamdang a paute pen amau mahmah a phattuam nadingin a pau hi a
1Corinthians14:5 Note khempeuh pau lamdang na pautheih ding uh kong deihsak hangin Pasian’ thu hilh ding siamna na neih ding uh ka hong deihsakzaw hi. Pawlpi in phattuamna a ngahtheih nadingin note lakah a khiatna a genthei pah ding om ahih kei buang leh
1Corinthians14:6 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians14:7 Nuntakna a nei lo tamngai le harp lasaknate nangawn
1Corinthians14:8 Galdo nading peengkul a tum pa in a aw a kitelin tum kei leh galdo dingin kua kithawi thei ding ahi hiam?
1Corinthians14:9 Tua mah bangin na thugenna uh kammal kitel sinsen kei leh kua in note’ thugen theithei ding ahi hiam? Na thugen uh huihlakah a maimang suak lel ding hi.
1Corinthians14:10 Leitungah pau nam tampi om a
1Corinthians14:11 Ahi zongin a kipau paunam thei kei leng
1Corinthians14:12 Note in zong Kha Siangtho’ hong piak siamnate deih belin nei na hih manun pawlpi a dingin phattuamna taktak a piangsak ding siamnate mah nget belin na nei ta un.
1Corinthians14:13 Tua ahih manin pau lamdang a paute in
1Corinthians14:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh pau lamdang tawh thu ka nget ciangin lungsim takpi tawh thungen ka hih tei hangin bang ngen ka hi hiam cih ka ngaihsun thei kei hi.
1Corinthians14:15 Tua ahihleh bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam? Ka lungsim tawh thu ka ngen ding a
1Corinthians14:16 Na lungsim bek tawh Pasian tungah lungdamna na koh ciangin kikhopna sungah a om midangte in bangci-in nang’ thungetna
1Corinthians14:17 Pasian tungah lungdam ko-in na thungetna a hoih mahmah hangin midangte in bangmah phattuamna ngah het lo hi.
1Corinthians14:18 Note khempeuh sangin pau lamdang pau theizaw ka hih manin Pasian tungah ka lungdam hi.
1Corinthians14:19 Ahi ta zongin pawlpite’ biak kikhopna sungah pau lamdang kam tul sawm bang ka pau sangin midangte’ phattuam nadingin a theih ding uh kammal nga bek ka pauzaw ding hi.
1Corinthians14:20 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians14:21 Lai Siangtho sungah
1Corinthians14:22 Tua ahih manin pau lamdang pen thu um mite a’ ding hi loin
1Corinthians14:23 Tua ahih manin pawlpi mi khempeuh na kikhopna uhah na vekpi-un pau lamdangin pau-in
1Corinthians14:24 Ahi zongin na vekpi-un hoihtakin Pasian’ thu na gen laitakun mi mawkmawkte ahih kei leh thu um lote hong pai leh
1Corinthians14:25 A lungsim sung uhah a ipcipte uh kipholak ding a
1Corinthians14:26 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
1Corinthians14:27 Pau lamdang tawh thugen nuam a om leh zong
1Corinthians14:28 Ahi zongin a khiatna a genthei ding a om kei leh zong
1Corinthians14:29 Pasian thu gen ding a neite sung panin nih le thum bang bek in a banbanin gen ding uh a
1Corinthians14:30 A kikhawm mite sung panin mi khatpeuh in Pasian thu gen ding hong neih leh tua a thugen lai pa khawl phot ding hi.
1Corinthians14:31 Na vekpi-un a thu thei-in thahatna na ngahtheih nadingun no thugen ding a neite khempeuh in khatkhatin thu na ban gen ding uh hi.
1Corinthians14:32 Pasian in eite ahi zelzul dingin a hong sam hi lo a

1Corinthians16:1 Tu-in Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading sum kaihkhop nading thu tawh kisai-in: Galatia gam a pawlpite in a hih ding zia uh ka gen bangin note in zong na hih un.
1Corinthians16:2 Kei ka hong pai ciangin sumpi kaihkhop tawm a om loh nadingin na ngahna uh tawh kizui-in Nipi simin na tuamkoih unla
1Corinthians16:3 Kei ka hong tun ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah na huhna uh sumte a puak dingin hoih na sak uh mite sawlin
1Corinthians16:4 Kei mahmah zong ka va pai ding hoih i sak leh amaute tawh ka va paikhawm ding hi.
1Corinthians16:5 Masedonia gam nawkin khualzin sawm ka hih manin tua gam sung ka zin khit ciangin no kiangah ka hong pai ding hi.
1Corinthians16:6 Note kiang panin mundang ka zin nading peuhpeuhah kei na hong huh theih nadingun note kiangah tomno sung bek hi loin phalbi hun sung tawntung bang ka hong taamthei kha ding hi.
1Corinthians16:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong thukimpih nakleh khualzin kawmin a hong nawk bek hi loin
1Corinthians16:8 Ahi zongin hih Efesa khua mahah Pentekos Pawi hun ciang dong ka om ding hi.
1Corinthians16:9 Hong langpang tampi a om tei hangin limtakin na septheih nading lam tampi tak a om hi.
1Corinthians16:10 Note kiangah Timoti hong pai zenzen khak leh
1Corinthians16:11 Kuamah in na simmawhbawl kha kei unla
1Corinthians16:12 I sanggam Apollos ahihleh
1Corinthians16:13 Kiging tawntungin na upna uhah kip unla
1Corinthians16:14 Na sepna khempeuh uhah ki-itna tawh na gamta un.
1Corinthians16:15 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians16:16 Tua bang mite le amaute tawh tua bangmahin na a semkhawm mite’ thu na man nadingun ka hong thum hi.
1Corinthians16:17 Stefanas
1Corinthians16:18 note hong lungnopsak mah bangin kei zong ka lung hong nuamsak hi. Hih bang mite
1Corinthians16:19 Asia gam a om pawlpi a tuamtuamte in note hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. Aquila le Prisilla-te in zong amau’ inn-a kikhawm pawlpite tawh Topa’ hangin lungsim taktak tawh hopihna kam hong khak uh hi.
1Corinthians16:20 Hih lai-ah a om thu upna sungah i sanggamte khempeuh in zong hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. A siangtho kinapna tawh note khatlekhat na kihopih un.
