2Corinthians1:1 Jesuh Khrih’ sawltak ahi dingin Pasian in a hong seh keimah Paul le thu upna sungah i sanggam Timoti in
2Corinthians1:2 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note khempeuh tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
2Corinthians1:3 Eite’ Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pa ahi
2Corinthians1:4 Amah in kote’ haksatna khempeuhah hong huh ahih manin
2Corinthians1:5 Khrih hangin gimna tampi ka thuak uh mah bangin amah in zong kote tungah huhna tampi mah a hong pia hi.
2Corinthians1:6 Kote in gimna ka thuak uhleh note’ phattuam nading le hotkhiatna na ngah nading uh ahi hi. Kote in huhna ka ngah uhleh zong
2Corinthians1:7 Note ka hong muanna uh kiam tuan lo hi. Kote’ thuak bangin na thuak uhleh Pasian in kote hong huh mah bangin note zong hong huh ding hi.
2Corinthians1:8 Sanggamte aw
2Corinthians1:9 A si ding taktak hi ta hang
2Corinthians1:10 Tua zahin a lauhuai sih nading panin hong honkhia khinzo a
2Corinthians1:11 Kote a dingin thu hong ngetsak un. Tua hileh mi tampi in kote a dingin thu a hong ngetsaknate uh Pasian in a hong piakna hangin mi tampi mah in kote’ tang dingin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko thei ding uh hi.
2Corinthians1:12 Kote’ kisialhpih thu in: hih leitung a ka gamtatnate uh le a diakdiakin note tungah kong gamtatnate uhah
2Corinthians1:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in simthei-in a thu na theihtheih dingte bek uh a hong gelh ka hi uh hi. Tuhunin a cingin na theih lohte uh zong
2Corinthians1:14 Topa Jesuh hong paikik Ni ciangin a cingtakin thei ding na hih manun note hangin ka kisialh uh mah bangin note zong kote hangin na kisial ding uh hi.
2Corinthians1:15 Tu-a bangin piang taktak ding ci-in teltheih ka hih manin note in hamphatna nihvei na ngah nadingun ka geel a
2Corinthians1:16 Masedonia gam ka pai ciangin hong nawk masa-in
2Corinthians1:17 Hih bangin ka ngaihsutna pen a mawkkheel themthum hong sa na hi uh hiam? Leitung mihingte bangin angsung phattuam nading a om kei leh a gensa thu a kheel themthumte bang hong sa na hi uh hiam?
2Corinthians1:18 Pasian a thuman a citak ahih mah bangin note tungah ka hong gente uh zong a kheel themthum ka hi kei uh hi.
2Corinthians1:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh Silvanas
2Corinthians1:20 Pasian’ thuciamte khempeuh a hih pa pen amah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh Khrih hangin Pasian phatin
2Corinthians1:21 Khrih sungah kote le note a hong kipsak pa
2Corinthians1:22 Amah in eite pen ama a’ ihihna ciaptehna eite tungah hong bawl a
2Corinthians1:23 Note kiangah kong pai lohna pen note ka hong dopna hizaw hi. Hih thu hong theihpih ka teci pen Pasian ahi hi.
2Corinthians1:24 Hih bangin um un
2Corinthians2:1 Tua ahih manin hong pai leng note’ dah nading hong piang ding ahih manin ka hong pai loh nadingin ka lungsim ka khensat hi.
2Corinthians2:2 Kei a hong lungdamsak ding note ke’n hong dahsak leng
2Corinthians2:3 Kei lungdam leng note khempeuh zong a lungdam ding na hihna uh teltakin thei ka hih manin
2Corinthians2:4 Tua lai ka gelh laitakin
2Corinthians2:5 Mi khatpeuh in heh nading a piansak ciangin kei bek a hong hehsak hi loin note khempeuh zong a hong hehsak ahi hi. Tua ahih manin tua bang mi tungah khauhtat lua nawn kei un.
2Corinthians2:6 Note’ gimpiaknasa pen kicing khinzo ka sa hi.
2Corinthians2:7 Tua ahih manin a mawhna maisak ta unla hehnemzaw un. Tua hikeileh dahlua-in siatlawh kha ding hi.
2Corinthians2:8 Amah na itkik ding uh ka hong thumna thu zong amah na theisak un.
2Corinthians2:9 Note in ze-etna bangzah ciang thuakzo-in
2Corinthians2:10 Note in mawhna na maisak uh ciangin kei zong a maisak ka hi hi. Mawhna maisak ding om ahihleh zong
2Corinthians2:11 Mawhna maisak kei lehang Satan in nuamtaksa-in eite tungah hong gualzo kha ding ahih manin mawhna a maisak ihi hi. Satan’ nasepna zia a thei lo ihi kei hi.
2Corinthians2:12 Khrih hangin lungdamna thu a hilh dingin Troas khua ka tun ciangin tua lai-ah nasep theih nadingin Topa in lampi hong honsakna thu ka mu hi.
2Corinthians2:13 Ahi zongin tua lai-ah i sanggampa Titus na om lo ahih manin ka lungsim om thei nawn lo hi. Tua ahih manin tua lai-a om mite nusia-in Masedonia gamah ka paisuak hi.
2Corinthians2:14 Ahi zongin Pasian tungah lungdam mahmah nading thu a om hi. Khrih tawh ka kipawlna hangun gualzawhna tawh Khrih a paina khempeuhah Pasian in kote hong zuisak hi. Mun khempeuhah paknamtui a kizelh bangin Khrih thu theihna a kizelsak dingin Pasian in kote hong zang hi.
2Corinthians2:15 Hotkhiatna a ngah mite le a ngah lo mite lakah kote pen Khrih in Pasian tungah a piak paknamtui tawh ka kibang uh hi.
2Corinthians2:16 Tua a nam pen
2Corinthians2:17 Ahi zongin kote pen

2Corinthians4:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kimuthei nate a mitsuan ka hi kei uh a
2Corinthians5:1 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ka tenna ka leitung pumpi uh a sih ciangin mihingte bawl ahi lo
2Corinthians5:2 Tu laitakin ka vantung inn uhah ka omnopna uh lianlua mahmah ahih manin ngaklahin ka khuisasa uh hi.
2Corinthians5:3 Vantung inn-ah ka om uh ciangin pumpi nei loin guak om ding ka hi kei uh hi.
2Corinthians5:4 Hih leitung pumpi tawh ka om uh laitakin lungkhamin ka khuisasa uh hi. Hih ka leitung pumpi uh ka nusiat nopna hang uh hi loin a sithei pumpi pen a sithei nawn lo pumpi tawh a kilaih theih nadingin ka vantung pumpi uh ka deihna hang uh ahi hi.
2Corinthians5:5 Hih kikheel nading a hong vaihawmsak pa pen Pasian hi a
2Corinthians5:6 Tua ahih manin lungmuang takin ka om tawntung uh hi. Hih ka leitung pumpi uhah ka om laiteng uh Topa’ hong piak ding pumpi tawh a omkhawm nai lo ka hi uh hi.
2Corinthians5:7 Muhna hang tawh lungmuangin a om hi loin upna hang tawh lungmuang takin a om ka hi uh hi.
2Corinthians5:8 Lungmuang takin a ki-om hithiat hi a
2Corinthians5:9 Tua ahih manin hih lai inn-ah a ki-om ahi a
2Corinthians5:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih mai-ah thusitna a thuak dingin eite khempeuh a kilak ding ihi a
2Corinthians5:11 Pasian zahtak nading thu ka lungsim uhah om tawntung ahih manin mite ka zolzawh nadingun ka hanciam uh hi. Pasian in kote’ lungsim teltakin hong thei a
2Corinthians5:12 Note in na hong thupi ngaihsut theih nadingun koleko a hong kiphattawm zel ka hi kei uh a
2Corinthians5:13 Mihai ka hih uhleh zong Pasian’ minthan nading hi a
2Corinthians5:14 Mi khempeuh a dingin mi khat si khin ahih manin mi khempeuh zong a ngeina lui uhah si khinta hi
2Corinthians5:15 Ama hangin a nungtate
2Corinthians5:16 Tua ahih manin kote in mihingte’ ngeina zia tawh kuamah ka en nawn kei uh hi. Khrih mahmah zong mihing lungsim ngaihsutna zia tawh ka et ngei uh hangin tu-in tua bangin ka ngaihsun nawn kei uh hi.
2Corinthians5:17 Tua ahih manin mi khatpeuh
2Corinthians5:18 Hih thu khempeuh Pasian’ vaihawm hi a
2Corinthians5:19 Tua ahih manin kote’ thugen bulpi in: Pasian in mite’ mawhnate ngaihsun nawn loin
2Corinthians5:20 Tua ahih ciangin kote pen Khrih tangin nasem ka hi uh a
2Corinthians5:21 Khrih tawh i kipawlna hangin eite zong Pasian tawh a kibangin midik i suahtheih nadingin mawhna a nei lo Khrih pen eite’ tang dingin Pasian in mawhnei mi a suaksak hi.
2Corinthians6:1 Tua bangin Pasian tawh na semkhawmin om ka hih manun Pasian’ hong hehpihna thu a mawkna na suahsakkhak loh nadingun ka hong thum uh hi.
2Corinthians6:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in
2Corinthians6:3 Ka nasepna uhah mite in mawhna hong zon ding uh ut lo ka hih manun kuamah ka nawngkaisak khak loh nadingun ka hanciam uh hi.
2Corinthians6:4 Tua ahih manin ka sepna khempeuh uhah Pasian’ nasemte ka hihna uh ka kilangsak uh a
2Corinthians6:5 Kote hong kisatin
2Corinthians6:6 Siangtho takin nuntakna
2Corinthians6:7 thuman genna
2Corinthians6:8 Kote hong kipahtawi-in hong kimindaisak zel a
2Corinthians6:9 mi khempeuh in hong theih hinapi-in theih loh mi bangin hong kibawl a
2Corinthians6:10 Dahna ka thuak uh hangin ka lungdam uh a
2Corinthians6:11 Korin khua-a om lawmte aw
2Corinthians6:12 Kote in ka lungsim uh a hong pia lo hi loin note in na lungsim uh a hong pia lo na hizaw uh hi.
2Corinthians6:13 Tua ahih manin tate tungah thugen bangin thu ka hong gen hi. Kote’ ngaihsut bangin note in zong hong ngaihsun unla
2Corinthians6:14 Thu um lo mite tawh na na semkhawm kei un. Midik le mimawh bangci-in kipawlthei ding a
2Corinthians6:15 Khrih le Dawimangpa bangci-in kithutuak thei ding a
2Corinthians6:16 Pasian’ biakinn le lawkite’ milim bangci kilem theih ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in
2Corinthians6:17 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa keimah in kong genin-ah: Amaute tawh kikhenin amaute kiang panin paikhia unla
2Corinthians6:18 Kei pen note’ Pa hong hi-in
2Corinthians7:1 Tua ahih manin ka hong it lawmte aw
2Corinthians7:2 Kuama tungah kote hong khial lo
2Corinthians7:3 Hih bang ka hong cih ciangin note mawhsak nopna tawh thu a hong gen ka hi kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hong gensa mah bangin note hong it mahmah ka hih manun note na hin uhleh hingkhawm
2Corinthians7:4 Note hong muang mahmahin note hangin ka kisathei a
2Corinthians7:5 Masedonia gam ka tunkhit uh ciang nangawnin tawldam cih om thei tuan lo a
2Corinthians7:6 Ahi zongin a lungkia mite a hanthawn Pasian in Titus hong tunna tawh kote hong thakhauhsak hi.
2Corinthians7:7 Ama hong tunna hang bek zong hi loin ama lungsim a thahat nadingin note’ gamtatna zong a hong zasak hi. Note in kei na hong muhnopna thu uh
2Corinthians7:8 Ka hong laigelhna in note tawlkhat sung a hong dahsak manin ka lungsim nuam lo ahi tei ta zongin tua ka hong laigelhna hangin ka kisik kei hi.
2Corinthians7:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in ka lung a dam hi. Note ka hong dahsak khakna hangin a lungdam hi loin note na dahna hangun na ngaihsutna uh kheel thei na hih manun a nuam ka hi hi. Tua na dahna uh Pasian in a hoihlamin hong zang ahih manin note a dingin siatna a hong piangsak ka hi kei zaw uh hi.
2Corinthians7:10 Tua na dahna uh hotkhiatna ngahtheih nadingin na lungsim uh na kheel nadingun Pasian in hong zang ahih manin dah nading bangmah om lo hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung dahna lelte in ahihleh sihna piangsak hi.
2Corinthians7:11 Hih note’ dahna pen Pasian in a hoihlamin hong zatsak ahih manin mawk om nawn loin lungsim takpi tawh kinna na nei uh a
2Corinthians7:12 Tua bangin lai ka hong gelh hangin a khial pa ahih kei leh a thuak pa ngaihsutna tawh hong gelh hi lo zaw-in
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahih manin tu-in ka lung uh nuam mahmah hi. Kote’ lungsim hong nuamsak bek hi loin
2Corinthians7:14 Titus mai-ah note ka hong kisialhpih ngei a
2Corinthians7:15 Note in ama thu mangin
2Corinthians7:16 Note hong muang mahmah ka hih manin ka lungsim a nuam hi.
2Corinthians8:1 Sanggamte aw
2Corinthians8:2 Amaute in haksatna a tuamtuam phukha-in nakpitakin ze-etna thuakin
2Corinthians8:3 Amaute in amau ngahna tawh kituak bekin a pia hi loin
2Corinthians8:4 Judea gam a Pasian mite
2Corinthians8:5 Hih bangin a gamtatna uh kote’ lamet sangin sangzaw pek hi. Amaute pen Topa tungah kipia masa uh a
2Corinthians8:6 Tua mah bangin Titus in zong hih bang nasep nading hong pat khit ahih mah bangin midang huh nading na sepnate uh note lakah hong zawhpih vet dingin ka hanthawn uh hi.
2Corinthians8:7 Note pen thu upna
2Corinthians8:8 Hih bang ka hong gen ciangin thupiakna tawh a hong gen hi loin
2Corinthians8:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa Jesuh zong hau mahmah napi-in ama zawnna tawh note mihau na suahtheih nadingun note’ hangin mizawngin hong kibawl ahih manin i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong itna bangzah takin lian hiam
2Corinthians8:10 Hih thu tawh kisai-in keima ngaihsutna panin: Note in ni kumin hih bang nasep ding utna lungsim a nei bek hi loin a pankhia masate na hih uh mah bangin na tangtut ding uh hoihpen hi.
2Corinthians8:11 Tua ahih manin na patsa uh thu a bei dongin zomsuak unla
2Corinthians8:12 Piaknopna lungsim na neih nak-uhleh na neih lohnate uh siksan hi loin na neihna uh tawh kizui-in na piak uh Pasian in hong sang ding hi.
2Corinthians8:13 Hih bangin ka hong gen ciangin midangte in noptuamna a ngah nadingin note in haksapi-in tuam gimpih ding ka cihna hi lo hi.
2Corinthians8:14 Tu laitakin note cithei na hih manun amau cihmawhnate-ah huh le-uhcin
2Corinthians8:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in zong
2Corinthians8:16 Kote’ hong kin zahin Titus in note hong kin nadingin Pasian in lungsim guan ahih manin Pasian tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi.
2Corinthians8:17 Amah in kote hong sawlna a hong mang ciang bek hi loin
2Corinthians8:18 Lungdamna thuhilh nasepna-ah pawlpi khempeuh in a zahtak mahmah
2Corinthians8:19 Tua tham loin
2Corinthians8:20 Citna tawh mi huh nadingin a kipia hih sum ka zeekna uh tawh kisai-in mi a phunkhak loh nadingun a kidawm mahmah ka hi uh hi.
2Corinthians8:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ hoihsak ding bek hi loin mite in zong hoih a sak ding bangin na a semnuam ka hi uh hi.
2Corinthians8:22 Amau tegel tawh hong kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggam uh adang khat tawh zong ka hong tonsak uh hi. Amah pen na khempeuhah thuman mahmah hi
2Corinthians8:23 Titus ahihleh note a’ ding ka nasepna-ah ka kikholhpih ka naseppih mi hi a
2Corinthians8:24 Tua ahih manin note ka hong kisialhpihna uhah a kisial khial ka suah loh nading uh le pawlpi khempeuh in a theihtel nadingun hih ka sanggamte uh limtakin na limbawl un.
2Corinthians9:1 Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading tawh kisai-in lai kong gelh ding kisam nawn lo hi.
2Corinthians9:2 Note’ huhnopna thu ka theih khitsa hi a
2Corinthians9:3 Ahi zongin note ka hong kisialhpihna uh a mawkna a suahkhak loh nadingin na huh nading uh na kiging khol un
2Corinthians9:4 Tua bang hikeileh kei ka hong pai ciangin Masedonia gam a ka lawmte in hong zuikha zenzen hen la
2Corinthians9:5 Tua ahih manin piak dingin na kamciamsa uh huhna sumte a baihsa-in a omtheih nadingin hih ka sanggamte a hong mapai ding kisam ka sa hi. Tua hileh kei ka hong tun ciangin a baihsa-in na om ding a
2Corinthians9:6 Note in na phawk ding uh thu panin: Khaici tawm a vawhte in tawm mah la ding a
2Corinthians9:7 Pasian in piaknopna lungsim tawh a pia mite bek deih ahih manin
2Corinthians9:8 Note in na kisap khempeuh uh na neihtheih nading uh le midangte huh nading zong na neihthuah theih nadingun Pasian in hong pia thei hi.
2Corinthians9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in
2Corinthians9:10 Tua ahih manin vawh ding khaici le nek ding an hong pia Pasian in note’ cit piakna hangin nopsakna lian tampi na ngahtheih nadingun note tungah a kisam khaici hong guanin a pungsak ding hi.
2Corinthians9:11 Kote tungtawnin note’ huhna sumte a ngahna uh hangin mi tampi in Pasian a phattheih nadingin note na cit gamtatzawh tawntung nadingun Pasian in hong hausak tawntung ding hi.
2Corinthians9:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ huhna sumte in Pasian’ mi a cimawhte’ dong a hu bek hi loin
2Corinthians9:13 Note in na up uh Jesuh hangin lungdamna thu-ah na cihtakna uh le amaute le midang khempeuh tungah na cit piakna hangun mi tampite in Pasian’ min phat ding uh hi.
2Corinthians9:14 Note tungah Pasian in hehpihna thupha a val a kanin hong piakna hangin amaute in note hong munuam mahmahin thu zong hong ngetsak ding uh hi.
2Corinthians9:15 A manphatna a kigen zo lo Pasian’ hong piak hih thupha hangin Pasian tungah i lungdamna ko ciat ni.
2Corinthians10:1 Keimah Paul in Khrih migitna le lungduaina tawh note kiangah ka hong thum hi. Kei pen note tawh ka hong omkhawm laitakin a meidawi
2Corinthians10:2 Note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong hangsankhak loh nadingin na om nadingun ka hong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung ngaihsutna tawh nasem hi
2Corinthians10:3 Kote pen leitungah a teng mi ka hi mah uh hi; ahi zongin leitung lungsim ngimna tawh galdo ka hi kei uh hi.
2Corinthians10:4 Kote’ zat galdona hiam pen leitung galhiam lelte hi lo a
2Corinthians10:5 Mite’ ngaihsutna a man lote ka thalnial gawpzo uh a
2Corinthians10:6 Note thumanin na cihtakna uh a kitheihtel khit ciangin a thuman lo a citak lo khempeuh gimpiak ding ka kipan ta ding uh hi.
2Corinthians10:7 Note in na khatpeuh na ngaihsut uh ciangin a tungthamah a kimu theiteng na siksankha thei uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in Khrih tawh ka kipawl hi
2Corinthians10:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ siat nading hi loin note’ hoihna dingin Topa in kote tungah hong piak thuneihna hong nakzat lua-in ka kisialhpih hangin themkhat zong ka maizum kei hi.
2Corinthians10:9 Hih bangin lai ka hong gelhna tawh note a hong laugawpsak nuam ka hi kei hi.
2Corinthians10:10 Mi pawlkhat in
2Corinthians10:11 Tua ahih manin lai ka hong gelhna sung uhah ka thugente uh le note kiangah ka hong pai uh ciangin ka sepna dingte uh bangmah a kilamdang het lo ding ahihna thu tua mite in teltakin thei ta uh hen.
2Corinthians10:12 Kote ahihleh tua bangin a kiliansak mahmah mite tawh a kikimin ka kingaihsun ngam buang kei ding uh hi. Amaute khatlekhat ki-en kakin thupi kisa mahmah uh ahih manin mihai taktak ahi uh hi.
2Corinthians10:13 Ahi zongin kote ka kisialh nading uh kiciangtan a
2Corinthians10:14 Note kiangah Khrih hangin lungdamna thu a hong hilh masate ka hih manun note kiangah thu ka hong hici gen uh ciangin a ciangtan khengvalin a gamta ka hi kei uh hi.
2Corinthians10:15 Tua ahih manin Pasian in kote a dingin a hong sehsaksa khengvalin midangte’ nasepna-ah a kisial ka hi kei uh a
2Corinthians10:16 Tua hileh note’ gam banah gam dangah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh thei ding uh a
2Corinthians10:17 Lai Siangtho in
2Corinthians10:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat peuhpeuh amah a kiphattawm ciangin a kipakta hi lo a
2Corinthians11:1 Ka hai ahi phial zongin ka haina mah hong thuakpih le-uhcin ka ut hi. Hong thuakpih taktak ta un.
2Corinthians11:2 Pasian in hong aam mahmah bangin note ka hong aam mahmah hi. Nungak le tangval nupa dingin a kigawm mah bangin khat bek ahi Khrih tawh a kigawm dingin nungak siangtho bang na hi uh hi.
2Corinthians11:3 Ahi zongin gulpi in ama zuau ngian tawh Eve a khemzawh bangin na lungsim uh kihei-in Khrih tungah na kipiaknate uh na nusiatkhak ding uh ka lunghimawh hi.
2Corinthians11:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kote’ hilh a hi lo adang Jesuh’ thu a hilh hong pai ciangin lungdam takin na sang pahpah uh a
2Corinthians11:5 Note in sawltak thupi mahmahte hi
2Corinthians11:6 Thugen siamna le pilna thuk ka nei kei kha mah ding hi. Hih thu tawh kisai-in ahihleh
2Corinthians11:7 Note kiangah Pasian hangin Lungdamna Thu ka hong hilh ciangin note tung panin thaman bangmah ka hong ngen het kei a
2Corinthians11:8 Note kiangah na ka sep laitakin pawlpi dangte in kei hong vak uh ahih manin
2Corinthians11:9 Note lakah na ka sep laitakin Masedonia gam panin a hong pai pawlpi mite in ka sapna khempeuh hong puak uh ahih manin note khat beek ka hong gimsak kei hi. A beisa hunah note ka hong gimsakkhak loh mah bangin mailam hunah zong ka hong gimsakkha het kei ding hi.
2Corinthians11:10 Khrih thuman keima sungah om ahih mah bangin no Akhaia gam sungah hih ka kisialhna thu mah kizom paisuak ding hi
2Corinthians11:11 Hih bangin kam ka pau ciangin note ka hong it loh man ahi hiam? Note ka hong itna hang hizaw hi. Hih thu Pasian in thei hi.
2Corinthians11:12 Tua sawltak dangte in
2Corinthians11:13 Amaute pen sawltak taktak hi loin
2Corinthians11:14 Tua pen lamdangsak ding hi lo hi. Satan nangawn Pasian’ vantungmi tawh a kibangin kibawltawm thei hi.
2Corinthians11:15 Tua ahih manin Satan’ sawltakte pen thuman nasem bangin a kibawl manin lamdangsak ding hi lo hi. Hun bei ni ciangin amau gamtatna bangun thuak ngawn ding uh hi.
2Corinthians11:16 Kuamah in mihai-in hong ngaihsun kei hen
2Corinthians11:17 Tu-in ka hong gen ding thute pen Topa’ hong sawl hi lo hi. Tu-a kisialhna kam ka hong pau ciangin mihai taktak mah bangin a pau ka hi hi.
2Corinthians11:18 Mi tampi in hih leitung ngeinate kisialhpih thei uh ahih manin kei zong ka hong kisial ding hi.
2Corinthians11:19 Note pil kisa mahmah na hih manun lungdam takin mihaite na sang pahpah uh hi.
2Corinthians11:20 Note
2Corinthians11:21 Tua bangin na om uh zumhuai mahmah hi. Kote ahihleh note tungah ka hong tuaci gamtat ngam kei uh hi. Ahi zongin a kisial ngam om ahihleh kei zong mihai bangin ka hong kisial ngam ding hi.
2Corinthians11:22 Amaute Hebru mi ahihleh kei zong Hebru mi mah ka hi hi. Amaute Abraham’ suan Israel mite ahihleh kei zong Abraham’ suan Israel mi mah ka hi hi.
2Corinthians11:23 Amaute Khrih nasem ahihleh kei zong hong hai pau mai ning. Khrih nasem a hoihzaw pekpek ka hi hi. Amaute sangin na ka nak sepzaw a
2Corinthians11:24 Jew mite’ khut sungah sawmthum le kua vei satna nga vei tak ka thuak hi.
2Corinthians11:25 Rom mite in thumvei hong sat a
2Corinthians11:26 Khual ka zinzinna lamin tuikhang lauhuaina
2Corinthians11:27 Nasem silbawlin ki-om tawntung a
2Corinthians11:28 Tua bang haksatna a tuamtuam ka thuak banah nisimin pawlpi a tuamtuamte a dingin lunghimawhin ka lunggimpih lai hi.
2Corinthians11:29 A thaneem a om ciangin lungkhampihin kei zong ka thaneem a
2Corinthians11:30 Ka kisialh leh zong ka ginat lohna hong kilangsak nate hangin ka kisial bek hi.
2Corinthians11:31 Topa Jesuh’ Pa Pasian in thupha ngah tawntung tahen. Amah in ka zuau hetloh lamtak a hong thei hi.
2Corinthians11:32 Damaskas khuapi sungah ka om laitakin Kumpi Aretas khutnuai-a gam ukpa in kei hong mattheih nadingin Damaskas khuakulh kongpi cingsak a
2Corinthians11:33 ahi zongin kulh tawlet vang panin hong kikhaikhia suk ahih manin ama khutsung panin ka suakta hi.
2Corinthians12:1 Bangmah phattuamnapi a om khollo ahi zongin ka kisialsial lai ding hi. Tu-in Topa in maang hong muhsakna le ka muhte ka hong gen ding hi.
2Corinthians12:2 Tuma kum sawm le li hun lai-in vantung a dawl tungnung penah Khristian khat kilato hi. A pumpi taktak hiam
2Corinthians12:3 Tua mipa pen Paradais-ah a om ahi hi. A pumpi taktak tawh ahi hiam
2Corinthians12:4 Mite kiangah genkhiatsawn dingin a kiphal lo a lamdang mahmah thu a za hi.
2Corinthians12:5 Tua bang thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hinapi-in ka kisialhpih kei hi. Kei a ginalo hinapi ama minthan nadingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hinapi-in ka kisialhpih kei hi. Kei a ginalo hinapi ama minthan nadingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu ka kisialhpih bek hi.
2Corinthians12:6 Hih ka muh thu pen thuman ahih manin a kisialhpih hita leng zong mihai ka hi kei hi. Ahi zongin mite in keima sepna le keima genna a muh a zak banah a valin hong thupi ngaihsutkhak ding uh ut lo ka hih manin hih thu ka kisialhpih nuam kei hi.
2Corinthians12:7 Ahi zongin hih a lamdang na tampite ka muhna hangin kisialin ka kisaktheih khak loh nadingin Satan’ sawltak bangin na a sem
2Corinthians12:8 Tua natna tawh ka kipelh theih nadingin Topa kiangah thumvei tak thu ka ngen hi.
2Corinthians12:9 Ahi zongin Topa in kei kiangah
2Corinthians12:10 Kei ka thaneem mahmah laitakin a thahat mahmah suak ka hih manin Khrih hangin ka thaneemna
2Corinthians12:11 Note in kei a hong pakta ding hinapi-in hong pakta lo na hih manun note’ bawlin mihai bangin kisialin ka gamta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen bangmahpi ka hihloh hangin sawltak thupi mahmahin na ngaihsutte uh sangin themkhat zong ka neuzaw tuan het kei hi.
2Corinthians12:12 Sawltak man taktak ka hihna lim a kilangsak nate
2Corinthians12:13 Note lakah na ka sepna hangin huhna bangmah kong nget loh cih simloh
2Corinthians12:14 Tu-in kong hawh nading pen a thumvei nading hita a
2Corinthians12:15 Note ka hong huhtheih nadingin lungdamtakin ka neih khempeuh kong piaknop banah keima pumpi mahmah zong ka hong kipia nuam hi. Tuazah takin ka hong itna pen it lohna tengin hong nei zawsop ding na hi uh hiam?
2Corinthians12:16 Sumlepai vai-in note themkhat zong ka hong gimsak hetlohna na theihsa uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin mi pawlkhatte in
2Corinthians12:17 Note kiangah ka hong paisak mite tungtawnin note kiang panin keima hamphat nading bang la ka hi hiam?
2Corinthians12:18 Note kiangah Titus a hong pai nading ka hahsawl a
2Corinthians12:19 Note mai-ah ka mawhna uh a kiphelphel bang khatin na hong ngaihsut khak uhleh tua bang hi lo hi. Lawmte aw
2Corinthians12:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka hong tun ciangin note’ omzia ding ka deih bangin na om loh khak ding uh le note in keima maisuah na muhnopzia bangun na hong muh loh khak ding uh ka lunghimawh hi. Note lakah kitotna
2Corinthians12:21 Note kiangah ka hong tun ciangin a beisa hunah note tampi tak thangtatin
2Corinthians13:1 Tu-a ka hong pai nading pen a thumveina hita hi. Lai Siangtho sungah
2Corinthians13:2 A beisa hunah mawhna a gamtate le adangte khempeuh kiangah
2Corinthians13:3 Khrih in keima tungtawnin thu hong gen taktak mah ahi hiam
2Corinthians13:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh thaneemna hangin singlamteh tungah a kikhai ahi zongin a hinkikna pen Pasian’ vangliatna hang ahi hi. Amah tawh ka kipawl manun kote zong ka tha uh nem a
2Corinthians13:5 Thu um taktak mah ihi hiam
2Corinthians13:6 Na ki-ettel uh ciangin a cingtaak mi hikim dingin ka hong lamen hi.
2Corinthians13:7 Kote in ka nasepna uh a tangtun zo lo tawh ka kibangkha uh ahi zongin
2Corinthians13:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh kote pen thuman nasepna a khaktan thei dingte hi loin a khan nadingin nasemte ka hi uh hi.
2Corinthians13:9 Kote’ deih bulpi pen note na cingtaak theih nading uh ahih manin note’ thahat laitakin kote ka thaneemna uh zong ka nuam veve uh hi.
2Corinthians13:10 Note’ siat nading hi loin note’ phattuam nadingin Topa in kei tungah a hong piak thuneihna pen note tungah khauhtakin ka hong zatkhak loh nadingin lai a hong gelh ka hi hi.

2Corinthians13:12 Unau ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kihopihin na kinam un.

Galatians1:1 Mihingte’ hong sehna le hong sawlna tawh sawltak na a sem hi loin
Galatians1:2 Kei tawh a omkhawm i Khristianpihte in zong note hong hopih uh hi.
Galatians1:3 Eite’ Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note khempeuh tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
Galatians1:4 A siahuai tuhun sung panin eite a hong suahtaksak nadingin eite’ Pa Pasian’ deihna tawh kizui-in i mawhna hangin tua Jesuh Khrih amahmah a hong kipiatawm ahi hi.
Galatians1:5 Pasian’ min thang tawntung ta hen! Amen.

Galatians1:9 Ka hong gen ngeisa mah bangin ka hong gen kikin-ah: Note’ sansa lungdamna thu tawh a kilehngatin thudang a hong hilh mi peuhpeuh hell khuksung tung ta hen!
Galatians1:10 Hih bangin thu ka gen ciangin mite’ hong pahtak theih nading a zong tawh kibang na hong sa uh hiam? Mite’ pahtak ding a ut ka hi kei a

Galatians1:14 le ka khangualte lakah Jew biakna lamah a makai pen ka hihna thu
Galatians1:15 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong hehpihna tawh ka suahma pekin kei hong teelin ama na a sem dingin hong sam khin hi. Keimah in ama Tapa hanga lungdamna thu

Galatians2:3 Kei tawh a kithuah Titus nangawn Grik mi hinapi-in a vun ki-atsak tuan lo hi.
Galatians2:4 Ahi zongin mi pawlkhat in atsak nuam sam uh hi. Khrih Jesuh tawh ka kipawlna hangun suahtakna ka ngahna thu uh a kansim dingin amaute thu um mi kineihkhemin kote lakah hong kihel uh hi. Amaute in kote pen sila hong suaksak nuam uh ahi hi.
Galatians2:5 Lungdamna thuman taktak pelem hetloin note a dingin a kipsuak theih nadingin amaute’ deihna themkhat zong ka zui het kei uh hi.
Galatians2:6 Jerusalem khua-a om makai lian a kinei mite in kei’ nasepna tawh kisai thu-ah bangmah genthuah ding nei lo uh hi. (Pasian in maitang zahtak tuam nei tuan lo ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ngam ka hi hi.)

Ephesians2:1 A beisa hunah na thuman lohna uh le na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh kisai-ah a si na hi uh hi.
Ephesians2:2 Tuahun lai-in leitung gitloh gamtatnate na zui uh a
Ephesians2:3 A taktakin eite khempeuh zong amaute mah i bang ngei a
Ephesians2:4 Tua bang hinapi-in Pasian’ hong hehpihna le eite hong itna lian mahmah ahih manin
Ephesians2:5 i mawhna hangin kha thu tawh kisai-in misi ihih laitakin Khrih tawh eite hong nungtasak hi. Pasian’ hehpihna hangin hotkhiatna a ngah thei ihi hi.
Ephesians2:6 Khrih Jesuh tawh eite i kipawlna hangin vantungah amah tawh i ukkhawm theih nadingin sihna panin Pasian in a hong thokhawmsak hi.
Ephesians2:7 Khrih Jesuh tungtawnin a hong lah ama hehpihna le a hong itna bangzah takin lianin lamdang ahi hiam
Ephesians2:8 Note’ upna hangin Pasian’ hong hehpihna tawh hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi. Note’ thalawhna hangin a ngah hi loin Pasian’ hong piakkhong ahi hi.
Ephesians2:9 Note’ hanciamna tawh a ngah hi lo na hih manun na kisialh nading uh a thu om lo hi.
Ephesians2:10 Eite a hong bawlpa pen Pasian hi a
Ephesians2:11 Amau mahmah in amau pumpi tungah a hihna uh tawh vun a ki-at mite ka hi uh a ci Jew mite in
Ephesians2:12 Tuahun lai-in Khrih tawh na kikhen uh a
Ephesians2:13 Ahi zongin a gamlapi-ah a om ngei hinapi-in tu-in Khrih Jesuh tawh na kipawlna hangun ama sihna in Pasian kiang hong tunpih hi.
Ephesians2:14 Khrih mahmah in Gentail mite le Jew mite pawlkhatin hong bawl ahih manin eite tungah nopsakna a hong piapa ahi hi. Hih minam nihte khenin gal a piangsak dalna pen Khrih in ama pumpi tawh a satkham hi.
Ephesians2:15 Amah tawh kipawlna hangin minam nihte pawlkhat a suahtheih nadingin minam a dei Jew Thukham le a ngeinate khempeuh phiatin

Ephesians2:20 Note zong
Ephesians2:21 Tua inn sutpi Khrih pen inn-a a kilam khempeuh a puapi pen hi a
Ephesians2:22 Note zong midangte tawh kigawmin ama tungah na kilam uh a
Ephesians3:1 No Gentail mite hangin Jesuh Khrih thu tawh kisai-in thongkia keimah Paul in Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi.
Ephesians3:2 Note’ phattuam nadingin Pasian in hong hehpihna tawh hih nasep a sem dingin a hong sawlna thu na theihsa uh ahi hi.
Ephesians3:3 Lai ka hong khaksate sungah a tomno-in kong gensa bangin Pasian in ama thusim kei tungah hong hilh khinzo hi.
Ephesians3:4 Tua ka laigelh na sim le-uhcin Khrih tawh kisai a thusim ka theihna thu na phawk ding uh hi.
Ephesians3:5 A beisa hunah tua thusim pen kuama tungah kigen lo a
Ephesians3:6 Tua thusim pen: Lungdamna thu a kihilhna hangin Gentail mite in Jew mite tawh Pasian’ thupha ngahkhawm thei a
Ephesians3:7 Tua lungdamna thuhilh a sem dingin Pasian in a tuam vilvelin ama vangliatna tawh kei a hong seh hi.
Ephesians3:8 Pasian’ mi khempeuh lakah kei a neupen hinapi-in
Ephesians3:9 le Pasian in a geelsim thute a kisep khiatna thu mi khempeuh a musak dingin Pasian in kei tungah hih hamphatna hong pia hi. Tuhun laitakin vantung a uk van mite in pawlpi’ hangin Pasian’ pilna a nam tuamtuamin a muhtheih nadingun na khempeuh a bawl Pasian in a beisa hunah hih thu khempeuh a imcip hi.
Ephesians3:10 
Ephesians3:11 Pasian in a tawntungin a ngimna a omsa bangin i Topa Khrih Jesuh nasepna tawh a ngimna a hong tungsak hi.
Ephesians3:12 Amah tawh i kipawlna le amah i muanna hangin kimuang takin Pasian kiangah paitheih nading hun i nei hi.
Ephesians3:13 Tua ahih manin note hangin ka thuakna pen note’ phattuam nading ahih manin tua ka thuakna thu hangin lungkiatna-in na nei kei un.
Ephesians3:14 Hih ama geelna teng ka ngaihsut ciangin
Ephesians3:15 
Ephesians3:16 note’ lungsim a thahat nadingin Pasian in a kicing ama vangliatna sung panin a Kha Siangtho tawh note hong thakhauh sakin
Ephesians3:17 na upna hangun note lungsim sungah Khrih hong tengin
Ephesians3:18 Tua hileh note in Pasian mi ahi midangte khempeuh tawh Khrih hong itna bangzah takin sau-in zai a
Ephesians3:19 Khrih hong itna a kicing takin theihkhit zawh loh ding ahi ta zongin note in thei-in
Ephesians3:20 Eite a dingin na a hong sepsak
Ephesians3:21 eite’ Pasian pen
Ephesians4:1 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ na ka sepna hangin thong a kia keimah in note’ nuntakzia dingin a hong deihna tawh a kilawm a kituakin na nuntak nadingun ka hong hanthawn hi.
Ephesians4:2 Kiniamkhiatin
Ephesians4:3 Kha Siangtho kimakai sakin
Ephesians4:4 A kibang lametna khat bek a ngahkhawm dingin Pasian in note hong sap mah bangin eite khempeuh pumkhat bek hi-in Kha Siangtho zong khat bek mah a neikhawm ihi hi.
Ephesians4:5 Topa khat bek
Ephesians4:6 Mi khempeuh’ Pa ahi Pasian khat bek om a
Ephesians4:7 Ahi zongin eite khempeuh in Khrih hong piakna tawh kizui-in siamna a tuam khat ciat i ngah hi.
Ephesians4:8 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
Ephesians4:9 “Paito
Ephesians4:10 Tua ahih manin mun khempeuhah a omkim khit theih nadingin a paisuk mipa pen mah vantung a sangpen dawn nangawn khengto-in na paito hi.
Ephesians4:11 Amah in mite tungah siamna a tuamtuam hong pia a
Ephesians4:12 Hih nasep a tuamtuamte khempeuh a sem dingin Pasian’ mi khempeuh kigingkhol sakin Khrih a dingin na semin Khrih pumpi a khansak theihna ding deihna ahi hi.
Ephesians4:13 Tua hileh Pasian’ Tapa i theihna le i thu upna-ah kithukhatin
Ephesians4:14 Tuahun ciangin thu upna lamah naupang ihi nawn kei ding a
Ephesians4:15 itna lungsim tawh thutak genin
Ephesians4:16 Ama ukna mangin pumpi na a tuamtuamte a kituak takin kizom a
Ephesians4:17 Tu-in Topa’ min tawh limtakin note kiangah ka hong gennop thu in: Thu um lo dawibiate bangin gamta nawn kei un. Amaute’ thu ngaihsutte a kimang bangmah om lo a
Ephesians4:18 a ngaihsutnate uh khuamial tawh kibang hi. Amaute’ lungsim khauhin bangmah thei het lo uh ahih manin Pasian’ hong piak nuntakna neikha het lo uh hi.
Ephesians4:19 Amaute in maizumna mel thei nawn lo uh a
Ephesians4:20 Tua bang gamtatnate pen Khrih thu panin na theihkhak uh hi lo hi.
Ephesians4:21 Note in Khrih thu na zaksa uh hi a
Ephesians4:22 Zuauna lungsim in a suksiat khitsa
Ephesians4:23 na lungsim uh le na ngaihsutna uh thaksuak sak un.
Ephesians4:24 A thutang a siangtho ahihna thu
Ephesians4:25 Tua ahih manin zuau gen nawn kei unla
Ephesians4:26 Na heh uh ciangin
Ephesians4:27 Dawimangpa in hong suksiat theih nading hun omsak kei un.
Ephesians4:28 Guta ngeite in gu nawn loin
Ephesians4:29 Na kiho uh ciangin kamguh zang kei unla
Ephesians4:30 Ni khat ni ciangin Pasian in note hong tatkhiat taktak nading thu a ciantakin hong lahna le Pasian’ neihsa na hihna uh hong ciamtehna-in Kha Siangtho hong pia ahih manin
Ephesians4:31 Kimuhdahna
Ephesians4:32 khatlekhat kihehpihin
Ephesians5:1 Note pen Pasian in a hong it a tate na hih manun amah tawh na kibat nadingun hanciam un.
Ephesians5:2 Khrih in eite a hong it manin Pasian in eite’ mawhna hong maisak theih nadingin a namtui biakna-in Pasian kiangah a kipiak mah bangin note zong itna tawh na gamta un.
Ephesians5:3 Note pen Pasian’ mi na hih manun note lakah nulepa khialhna
Ephesians5:4 A kilawm lo-a kampauna
Ephesians5:5 Nulepa khialhna a gamta mi
Ephesians5:6 Hih bang mawhnate i bawl hangin phamawh kei
Ephesians5:7 Tua ahih manin tua bangin a gamta mite tawh kisukha vet kei un.
Ephesians5:8 Note pen khuamial sungah a omngei hinapi-in
Ephesians5:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh khuavak sunga omna in a hoih
Ephesians5:10 Bangteng in Topa lungkimsak ahi hiam
Ephesians5:11 Khuamial gamtatna
Ephesians5:12 Kuama theih lohin a simthamin a hihte uh gen ding nangawnin zong zumhuai lua hi.
Ephesians5:13 Na khat peuhpeuh khuavakah pusuah lehang a pianzia man taktak hong kilang hi.
Ephesians5:14 Tua ahih manin la sungah
Ephesians5:15 Tua ahih ciangin hoihtakin kingaihsunin gamta unla
Ephesians5:16 Tuhun pen hun hoih lo hun ahih manin na hun neih khempeuh uh a hoih lamin zang un.
Ephesians5:17 Tua ahih manin hai ommawk kei unla
Ephesians5:18 Zu in mi siasak thei ahih manin zu ne kei unla
Ephesians5:19 La a tuamtuamte genin sakna tawh Topa’ thu gen belin nei unla
Ephesians5:20 I Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin thu khempeuhah Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna ko ta un.
Ephesians5:21 Khrih na zahtakna uh hangin na thu uh na kimang tuak un.
Ephesians5:22 Zite aw
Ephesians5:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih pen ama pumpi ahi pawlpi a honkhia pa hi-in
Ephesians5:24 Pawlpi pen Khrih’ khutnuai ahih mah bangin zite zong thu khempeuhah a pasalte uh khutnuai hi ding uh hi.
Ephesians5:25 Pasalte aw
Ephesians5:26 Pawlpi pen paubaanna a om het lo
Ephesians5:27 
Ephesians5:28 Tua mah bangin pasalte in zong amau pumpi zah mah bangin a zite uh a it ding uh ahi hi. A zi a it mi pen amah a ki-it mi ahi hi.
Ephesians5:29 Eite pen ama pumpi nate ihihna hangin Khrih in hong it mah bangin kuamah in ama pumpi mudah ngei lo a

Ephesians6:1 Tate aw
Ephesians6:2 Thupiakna a lian khat in
Ephesians6:3 
Ephesians6:4 Pate aw
Ephesians6:5 Silate aw
Ephesians6:6 A hong pahtak ding uh deihna tawh amaute’ muhsung bekin tuaci gamtat kei unla
Ephesians6:7 Mihingte’ na a sem bang lelin kingaihsun loin Topa’ na a sem bangin kingaihsun unla
Ephesians6:8 Salte ahi a
Ephesians6:9 Tote aw
Ephesians6:10 Tu a kipanin Topa tawh na kipawlna uh le ama vangliatna hangin na tha uh khauhsak ta un.
Ephesians6:11 Dawimangpa’ hong hih nading khempeuh na dalzawh nadingun Pasian’ galvan namkim na zang un.
Ephesians6:12 Eite’ do pen leitung mite hi lo a
Ephesians6:13 Tua ahih manin hun haksat hun hong tun ciangin galte’ hong suknateng khempeuh nangzo-in
Ephesians6:14 Tua ahih ciangin kawnggak gak bangin thutak zang unla
Ephesians6:15 kithawi a khedap bulh bangin Lungdamna Thu a hilhkhia dingin kiging un.
Ephesians6:16 Tua banah
Ephesians6:17 Siklukhu khuk bangin hotkhiatna nei unla
Ephesians6:18 Kha Siangtho tawh kopin a tawntungin Pasian kiangah na kisapna khempeuh uh ngenin na thum unla
Ephesians6:19 Thu ka hilhtheih hun ding ciangin lungdamna thusim hangtakin ka hilhkhiat theih nadingin Pasian in ka thugen ding hong hilh nadingin kei a dingin zong thu na ngetsak ta un.
Ephesians6:20 Pasian’ thu genin taangmi ka sepna hang mahin sikkhau khihna thuakin thongkia ka hih manin ka hilh dingin a kilawm bangin hangtakin ka gen ngam nadingin thu hong ngetsak ta un.
Ephesians6:21 Ka septe le ka omzia khempeuh na theih nadingun Topa thu sungah i sanggam
Ephesians6:22 Kote’ omzia na theih nading uh le amah in note’ lungsim hong thahatsak theih nadingin amah a hong paisak ka hi hi.
Ephesians6:23 Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in ulenaute khempeuh tungah nopsakna le itna
Ephesians6:24 Tatsat loin i Topa Jesuh Khrih a it tawntung mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen.
Philippians1:1 Jesuh Khrih’ sila keimah Paul le Timoti in Filippi khua-a om Khrih tawh a kipawl Pasian’ mite
Philippians1:2 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong pia tahen.
Philippians1:3 Note ka hong phawk simin ka biak Pasian tungah ka lungdamna ka ko hi.
Philippians1:4 Note in lungdamna thu na zak ni uh a kipanin tuni ciang dong
Philippians1:5 
Philippians1:6 Note sungah hih nasep hoih a hong pankhia Pasian in Jesuh Khrih hong paikik hun ciang dong
Philippians1:7 Lungdamna thu hangin ka thongkiatna le lungdamna thu man hi
Philippians1:8 Jesuh Khrih lungsimzah mahin note ka hong it taktakna thu Pasian in a hong thei hi.
Philippians1:9 Note a’ ding deihsakna tawh thu ka hong ngetsak thu in: Note’ lungsimah itna khang semsemin
Philippians1:10 Tua hileh Khrih hong paikik ni ciangin paubaanna om loin a siangtho na hi ding uh hi.
Philippians1:11 Jesuh Khrih in note mihoih a hong suahsak theihna le mite in Pasian pahtawi-in a phattheihna thu
Philippians1:12 Sanggamte aw
Philippians1:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih nasem ka hihna hangin thongkia ka hihna thu
Philippians1:14 Tua banah keima thongkiatna hangin hih lai-a om Khristiante a tamzaw in Topa muanna-in nei uh a
Philippians1:15 Mi pawlkhatte in ahihleh hong hazatna le hong langpan’ nopna tawh Khrih thu hilh uh a
Philippians1:16 Hih bang mite in
Philippians1:17 Pawlkhatte in ahihleh lungsim hoih tawh hi loin ka thongkiatna-ah na ka sak semsem theih nadingin kei hong demna-in Khrih thu a hilh uh hi.
Philippians1:18 Ahi zongin phamawh ka sa kei hi. Lungsim hoih tawh a kihilh a
Philippians1:19 Note hong thungetsakna le Jesuh Khrih Kha Siangtho huhna tawh suakta ding hi ing
Philippians1:20 Ka si a
Philippians1:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih a’ ding bekin a nungta ka hi a
Philippians1:22 Leitung pumpi nungta lai hi leng na a manpha tampi semthei ding ka hih manin
Philippians1:23 Hih thu nih khentat hak ka sa mahmah hi. Kei a dingin hoihzaw thampek ahih manin leitung pumpi si-in Khrih tawh omkhawm ding ka ut hi.
Philippians1:24 Ahi zongin note a dingin kei ka hin lai ding kisam phazaw hi.
Philippians1:25 Hih thu a hoihpen ding hi
Philippians1:26 Tua ahih manin note kiangah ka hong hawhkik ciangin Jesuh Khrih tawh kipawlin na nuntakna uhah kei nong kisialhpih nading uh thu tampi hong omlai ding hi.
Philippians1:27 Note tawh a omkhawm dingin ka hong paithei a
Philippians1:28 Note a hong gualzosak ding pa pen Pasian ahih manin na galte uh na kihta kei un. Hangtakin om tawntung le-uhcin
Philippians1:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih’ na sep nading hunpha zong note tungah a hong kipia hi a
Philippians1:30 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in na hong muh uh ka galdona le tu mahmahin ka do lailai na zak uh thute-ah kei na hong dopih thei ding uh hi.
Philippians2:1 Note
Philippians2:2 Tua ahih manin kei tawh ngaihsutna kibangin note khatlekhat ki-itin
Philippians2:3 Huaihamna lungsim le kisialh nopna lungsim tawh bangmah gamta kei un. Kiniamkhiat ciat unla
Philippians2:4 Note’ phattuam nading bek ngaihsun kei unla
Philippians2:5 Note in Jesuh Khrih lungsim puakzia na nei un. Tua lungsim puak zia in:
Philippians2:6 Jesuh Khrih in Pasian’ pianzia nei napi-in
Philippians2:7 Amah kiniamkhiat tawm zaw a
Philippians2:8 Amah hong kiniamkhiat tawm a
Philippians2:9 Hih thu hangin Pasian in a lianpenin amah koih a
Philippians2:10 Tua ahih manin vantung
Philippians2:11 Jesuh Khrih in Topa ahi hi
Philippians2:12 Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it sanggamte aw
Philippians2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in utna lungsim na neih nading uh le ama deihna na zuihzawh nadingun note sungah Pasian in a tawntungin na a hong sem ahi hi.
Philippians2:14 Na khempeuh phun lo
Philippians2:15 Tua hileh a lungsim kawi
Philippians2:16 Tua hileh a beisa hunah ka sepna le ka hanciamnate a mawkna suak lo ding ahih manin Khrih hong paikik ni ciangin kei ka kisial thei ding hi.
Philippians2:17 Note’ upna hangin biakpiakna-in keimah hong kigo hitaleh zong
Philippians2:18 Tua mah bangin note in zong hong lungdampih ta un.
Philippians2:19 Note kiang panin thu ka zakna hangin ka lung a noptheih nadingin note kiangah Timoti ka hong paisak baih nadingin Topa Jesuh in hong huh ding hi
Philippians2:20 Note ka hong lunghihmawh zahin amah bek mah in note hong lunghihmawhpih hi.
Philippians2:21 Adangte in ahihleh Jesuh Khrih thu kinloin
Philippians2:22 Ahi zongin Timoti ahihleh lungdamna thu nasepna-ah pata bang ka hih manun manpha mahmah hi.
Philippians2:23 Keima pianzia ding ka theihkhit phetin note kiangah Timoti ka hong paisak pah ding hi.
Philippians2:24 A sawt loin kei mahmah zong ka hong paitheih nadingin Topa in hong huh ding hi
Philippians2:25 Note in kamtai ding le keimah hong huh dingin na hong sawl uh
Philippians2:26 Amah in note hong munuam mahmah a
Philippians2:27 Amah a ci na takpi a
Philippians2:28 Tua ahih manin amah na muh uh ciangin na lungdam theih nading uh le kei’ lunghihmawhna a kiam nadingin amah ka hong ciahsak ding ka kin semsem hi.
Philippians2:29 Khrih nasepna-ah note in pumpi tawh na hong huhkim theih loh manun note’ tangin amah in kei a hong huh manin a nuntakna hong pia-in sihlawh dektak hi. Tua ahih manin hih bang mite na zahtakbawl mahmah unla

Philippians3:4 Kei mahmah zong
Philippians3:5 Ka suahzawh a ni giat ni-in ka vun a ki-at hi. Kei pen Hebru minam citak ka hi a
Philippians3:6 nak hahkatlua kisa-in pawlpite nangawn ka bawlsia hi. Thukham zuihna tawh midik kitang ding hileh paubaanna mahmah ka nei kei hi.

Philippians3:8 Hih bang nate bek hi loin

Philippians3:16 Bangbang hitaleh ang

Philippians4:1 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw
Philippians4:2 Euodia le Sintikhe
Philippians4:3 Hih numei nihte in Klement le a nungta mite a kikhumna Pasian’ laibu sungah a kikhum
Philippians4:4 Topa sungah lungdam tawntung un
Philippians4:5 Mi khempeuh tungah na dik un. Topa hong pai baih ta ding hi.
Philippians4:6 Thu khat peuhpeuhah lunghimawh lua kei unla
Philippians4:7 Mihingte in a theihtel zawh loh Pasian’ hong piak lungsim nopna in
Philippians4:8 Sanggamte aw
Philippians4:9 Keima genna le ka gamtatna panin thei-in na san uh thute
Philippians4:10 Topa’ hangin ka lungdamna lian mahmah hi. Hun sauveipi khit ciangin kei na hong phawkna uh na hong langsakkik thei uh hi. Kei hong kin loin omngei uh teh
Philippians4:11 Bangbangin om taleng a lungkim thei dingin a kisinsa ka hih manin hih bang ka hong gen ciangin ka kitangsapna a hong pulak nuam ka hi kei hi.
Philippians4:12 Cihmawhna le cihtheihna a sinsa ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin ka hau a ka zawng zongin
Philippians4:13 Khrih in a hong piak vangliatna tawh hihte khempeuh nawkzawh nading thahatna a nei ka hi hi.
Philippians4:14 Ahi zongin ka lungkham laitakin na hong huh manun hoih mahmah hi.
Philippians4:15 Na theihsa uh mah bangin Lungdamna Thu ka hilh cil lai-in note’ gam Masedonia panin ka paikhiat hunin no Filippi pawlpite bek mah in kei na hong huh uh a
Philippians4:16 Thesalonika khua-ah cimawhin ka om lai-in huhna nong puak uh khatvei bek hi lo hi.
Philippians4:17 Note tung panin na tampi ka ngahnop man hi lo a
Philippians4:18 Note’ hong piak nate kicing piikpeek hi. Epafroditas in note’ hong na khakte hong tunpih ahih manin ka kitangsapna khempeuh kicingkim hi. Hih nate pen Pasian biakna-in na piak uh
Philippians4:19 A na ka sep i Topa Pasian in ama hauhna tawh kizui-in Khrih Jesuh hangin note’ kitangsapna khempeuh hong pia ding hi.
Philippians4:20 I Pa Pasian in a tawntungin minthanna ngah tahen. Amen.
Philippians4:21 Khrih Jesuh sungah a om mi siangthote khempeuh na na hopihsak un. Kei tawh a omkhawm kamsangte khempeuh in zong note hong hopih uh hi.
Philippians4:22 Hih lai-a om Khristian khempeuh
Philippians4:23 Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha
Colossians1:1 Pasian’ deihna tawh Jesuh Khrih’ sawltak dingin a hong kiseh keimah Paul le i sanggam Timoti in
Colossians1:2 Kolose khua-ah a om Pasian’ mi ahi
Colossians1:3 Note in Khrih Jesuh na muanna uh le Pasian’ mite khempeuh na itna thu uh za ka hih manun note a’ ding thu ka hong ngetsak uh ciangin i Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi.
Colossians1:4 
Colossians1:5 Thu dang na zakma un
Colossians1:6 Note in Pasian hong hehpihna thu za-in
Colossians1:7 Hih thu pen
Colossians1:8 Amah in
Colossians1:9 Tua bangin note’ thu ka zak uh hun a kipanin Pasian kiangah thu ka hong ngetsak uh a
Colossians1:10 Tua bang hileh Topa’ deihna bangin nungta-in
Colossians1:11 Note in lungduai maitai takin thuakzo-in
Colossians1:12 
Colossians1:13 Amah in khuamial vangliatna panin eite hong honkhia-in
Colossians1:14 tua a Tapa in eite hong khahkhia a
Colossians1:15 Khrih pen a kimu thei lo Pasian’ lim hi a
Colossians1:16 Vantung le leitungah a om na khempeuh
Colossians1:17 Na khempeuh khat beek a om ma-in amah om khinta a
Colossians1:18 Na khempeuhah amah a lianpen ahih theih nadingin
Colossians1:19 Tua Tapa in Pasian’ pianzia a kimin a neih nading
Colossians1:20 Pasian in a Tapa zangin na khempeuh ama kiangah a kaihkik ding a sehsa ahi hi. Tua ahih manin singlamteh tungah a Tapa a sihna hangin amah tawh kilemkik theih nading hong omsak ahih manin
Colossians1:21 A beisa hunah note’ lungsim gitlohna le gamtatsiatna hangin Pasian tawh kigamla-in Pasian’ gal na hi uh hi.
Colossians1:22 Ahi zongin
Colossians1:23 Ahi zongin note in lungdamna thu na zak cil lai-un na neih uh lametna panin ling hetloin
Colossians1:24 Tu-in ka pumpi-in ka thuakna tawh Khrih in ama pumpi ahi pawlpi a dingin a thuak ding a kisam laiteng a kitangcingsak suak ka hih manin note a dingin ka thuakna thu-ah ka lung a dam hi.
Colossians1:25 Pasian’ thu a kicing takin note’ phattuam nadingin a hilh dingin pawlpi nasem dingin Pasian in kei a hong bawl hi.
Colossians1:26 Tua thuhilh ding pen a beisa hunah a ki-imcip thu hi a
Colossians1:27 Pasian in mi khempeuh a dingin a koihcing hih a thupi a deihhuai a thusim pen ama mite tungah pholak ding a sawm ahi hi. Tua thusim in: Khrih tawh a kipawlte in Pasian tawh minthanna ngahkhawm ding hi
Colossians1:28 Tua ahih manin a milip tungah Khrih’ thu ka hilh uh a
Colossians1:29 Hih bang a tangtun theih nadingin Khrih in kei tungah a hong piak ka thahatna khempeuh zangin
Colossians2:1 Note a kipan Laodisia khuamite le kei a hong thei ngei nai lo mi khempeuhte a’ ding nangawnin hahkat takin na ka sem hi.
Colossians2:2 Note
Colossians2:3 Khrih pen Pasian’ pilna le a thuthuk khempeuh a kitheihtheih nading ahi hi.
Colossians2:4 Kuamah in note a hong khem zawh loh nadingin hih bang thu a hong gen ka hi hi.
Colossians2:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh ka hong omkhawm loh hangin ka lungsimin note tawh ka hong omkhawm a
Colossians2:6 Note hong honpa dingin Topa Khrih na sansa uh ahih mah bangin amah tawh hoihtakin kipawlin nungta un.
Colossians2:7 Note tungah a hong kihilhsa bangin ama sungah zungthuk kha unla
Colossians2:8 Khrih thu tawh a kituak lopi-in
Colossians2:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihing hong suahna sungah Khrih in Pasian’ pianzia khempeuh a kimtakin nei a
Colossians2:10 Khrih tawh na kipawlna hangun nuntakna kicing na nei uh hi. Huihlak a ukte le aana neite khempeuh tungah amah a lutangpi hi lai hi.
Colossians2:11 Amah tawh na kipawlna uh hangin mihingte in pumpi vun a at uh bang hi loin
Colossians2:12 Note tui na kiphum uh ciangin Jesuh tawh kiphum khawmin
Colossians2:13 A beisa hunah na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh kisai-in misi na hi uh a
Colossians2:14 Eite a dingin a hoih lo
Colossians2:15 Amah in huihlak a ukte le vangliatna a nei khempeuh
Colossians2:16 Tua ahih manin annek tuidawn
Colossians2:17 Hihte pen mailam ah a hong piang ding nate’ lim hi lel a
Colossians2:18 Maang a muhna hangun a thupi diakin kingaihsunin
Colossians2:19 lutang ahi Khrih a len nawn lo uh ahi hi. Lutang ahi Khrih’ ukna tawh pumpi na khempeuh kizom dimdiam uh ahih manin pumpi in thahatna ngah a
Colossians2:20 Khrih tawh sikhawm khin na hih manun huihlak a ukte’ khutsung panin a suakta khin na hi uh hi. Tua hinapi-in

Colossians3:1 Note pen Khrih tawh a thokik khinte na hih manun
Colossians3:2 Vantungah a om thute ngaihsutin nei unla
Colossians3:3 Note a sikhin na hi uh a
Colossians3:4 Note’ nuntakna taktak Khrih ahih manin amah hong kilat ciangin note zong amah tawh hong kilang khawmin amah tawh na minthang khawm ding uh hi.
Colossians3:5 Tua ahih manin nulepa mawhna
Colossians3:6 Ama thu a mang lo mite tungah hih bang gamtatna hangin Pasian’ hehna hong tung ding hi.
Colossians3:7 Note pen hih bangin gamta-in a nungta ngeite na hi uh hi.
Colossians3:8 Ahi zongin tu-in hehna
Colossians3:9 Ngeina lui le gamtatna lui khempeuh a beisakkhin na hihna uh kithei-in khatlekhat tungah zuauthu kigen nawn kei unla
Colossians3:10 ngeina thak tawh kituakin gamta un. Eite a hong piangsak Pasian a kicing takin i theih semsem nadingin amah a sun dingin a hong thakbawl tawntung ahi hi.
Colossians3:11 Tua ahih manin Gentail mi le Jew mi
Colossians3:12 Pasian in note hong itin
Colossians3:13 Note lakah khatlekhat a kilungkim lo na om uh ciangin khatlekhat na mawhna uh kimaisakin na kihuh ciat un. Topa in note’ mawhna hong maisak bangin note zong khatlekhat na mawhna uh na kimaisak ding uh hi.
Colossians3:14 Hihte khempeuh banah
Colossians3:15 Note pumkhat suakin a lungdam khawm dingin Pasian in a hong sap ahih mah bangin Khrih hong piak nopsakna in note’ lungsim hong uk ta hen la
Colossians3:16 Khrih thu a cingtakin note lungsimah hong om hen la

Colossians3:18 Zite aw

Colossians3:20 Tate aw
Colossians3:21 Pate aw
Colossians3:22 Silate aw
Colossians3:23 Mite’ nasem bangin kingaihsun loin
Colossians3:24 Topa in note tungah thaman a hong piak ding lamtak phawk gige un. Tua bangin na sepna uhah Khrih Topa’ na a semsem na hi uh hi.
Colossians3:25 A man loin a gamtate in ahihleh a gamtatna bangun thuak ding uh hi. Pasian in kuamah deidan loin amau’ gamtatna bang ciatin thu a khen ahi hi.
Colossians4:1 Tote aw
Colossians4:2 Lungsim takpi tawh thu ngen tawntung unla
Colossians4:3 Mite kiangah Khrih’ thusim hilhtheih nadingin Pasian in kote tungah hunpha hong piaktheih nadingin thu hong ngetsak un. Ka thongkiatna pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi.
Colossians4:4 Mite’ teltheih dingin a kitel takin ka gentheih nadingin thu hong ngetsak un.
Colossians4:5 A pualam mite tungah a kilawm a kituakin gamta unla
Colossians4:6 Kam na pau uh ciangin mi’ zaknop
Colossians4:7 Topa’ nasepna-ah citakin a manpha mahmah ka naseppih uh ka sanggam uh Tikhikas in kei’ thu a kicing takin note kiangah hong gen ding hi.
Colossians4:8 Hih lai-a kote’ omzia hong gen ciangin note’ lungsim a noptheih nadingin amah a hong paisak ka hi hi.
Colossians4:9 Note’ khuapih mi
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kiakhawm Aristarkhas in note hong hopih hi. Barnabas’ sanggamnu’ tapa Marka in zong hong hopih hi (amah hong pai ciangin hoihtakin na pawlbawl un
Colossians4:11 Justas zong a kici zel Jesuh in zong note hong hopih hi. Vun-atna a zang Jew mi Khristian a hong suakte lak panin hih mi thumte bek
Colossians4:12 Jesuh Khrih nasem
Colossians4:13 Amah in note-a’ ding a kipan Laodisia khua le Hierapolis khua mite a dingin nakpitakin na a sepna thu ka thei hi.
Colossians4:14 I it siavuanpa Luka le Demas in zong hong hopih uh hi.
Colossians4:15 Laodisia khua-a om i sanggamte le Nymfas le ama inn-a a kikhawm pawlpi mite na hopihsak un.

Colossians4:18 Keimah Paul’ khut mahmah tawh

1Thessalonians1:2 Note khempeuh hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko tawntungin
1Thessalonians1:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh i Pa Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simun note’ upna hangin na nuntakziate uh
1Thessalonians1:4 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah Lungdamna Thu ka hong hilh lai-un kam bek tawh a hong gen hi loin
1Thessalonians1:6 Kote le Topa’ gamtat bangin note na gamta uh a
1Thessalonians1:7 Tua ahih manin Masedonia gam le Akhaia gam sung khempeuhah thu um mi khempeuhte a dingin etteh hoih na suak uh hi.
1Thessalonians1:8 Note’ gamtatna ziate’ hangin Masedonia le Akhaia gam sungteng bekah Topa’ thu a kithei hi loin
1Thessalonians1:9 Note kiangah ka hong pai lai-un kote na hong limbawlna thu uh
1Thessalonians1:10 a hong tung ding Pasian’ hehna panin eite a hong honkhia
1Thessalonians2:1 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians2:2 Note in na theihsa uh mah bangin Thesalonika khua ka hong tun ma-un Filippi khua-ah simmawh bawlna le maizumna ka thuak uh hi. Tua bangin nakpitakin hong kilangbawlna hangin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu note kiangah gen ngam nadingin i Pasian in kote sungah lungsim hanna a hong guan hi.
1Thessalonians2:3 Kote in thu ka hong hilh uh ciangin thuman lo
1Thessalonians2:4 Pasian in kote hong thei-in Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin kilawm hong sa ahih mah bangin mite’ lungdam theih nadingin thu a hilh hi loin kote’ lungsim ngimna a hong thei Pasian’ lungkim nadingin thu a hilh ka hizaw uh hi.
1Thessalonians2:5 Tua ahih manin note in na theih uh mah bangin mite’ lungdam theih nading phatna kamte ka zang kei uh a
1Thessalonians2:6 Khrih sawltakte ka hihna uh hangin phatna ka ngah ding uh a kilawm hinapi-in note le midangte
1Thessalonians2:7 Note kiangah ka hong om lai-un nupite in a tate uh itna tawh a bawl bangin note ka hong bawl uh hi.
1Thessalonians2:8 Note hong it mahmah ka hih manun Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu bek hong gen loin
1Thessalonians2:9 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians2:10 Note in hih thu na theih uh mah bangin Pasian in zong hong thei hi. Thu um note tungah kong gamtatnate uh siangtho-in thuman a
1Thessalonians2:11 Pa in a tate a bawl bangin note ka hong bawlna uh na thei uh hi.
1Thessalonians2:12 Note hong hehnemin ka hong hanthawn uh a
1Thessalonians2:13 Note kiangah Pasian’ thu ka hong gen uh ciangin no thu um mite sungah ama thu tawh kisai-in Pasian in na hong sem ahih manin kote’ thugente pen Pasian’ thu taktak ahih mah bangin kote’ thugenna na zak uh ciangin mihing’ thu bangin ngaihsun loin Pasian’ thu taktak mahin hong sang na hih manun

1Thessalonians2:15 Tua Jew mite in Topa Jesuh le kamsangte that uh a
1Thessalonians2:16 Gentail mite tungah hotkhiatna thu ka gen ding uh hong khaktan uh ahih manin amau’ mawhnasate a behlap niloh a suak uh hi. Ahi zongin a tawpna-ah Pasian’ hehna amaute tungah a tungta hi.
1Thessalonians2:17 Sanggamte aw

1Thessalonians3:3 hih bawlsiatna hangin note khat beek na puk loh nading uh deihna tawh a hong paisak ka hi uh hi. Hih bang bawlsiatna pen i thuak ding mah hi

1Thessalonians3:5 Tua ahih manin ka thuakzawh nawn loh ciangin note’ upna zia a thei dingin Timoti ka hong sawl hi. Dawimangpa’ ze-etna in note hong puksakkha-in

1Thessalonians3:12 Kote in note ka hong it zahun

2Thessalonians1:5 Tu-a na thuaknate uh hangin Pasian’ Ukna sungah a om dingin a kilawm mi suak na hih manun Pasian’ thukhenna a man ahihna hong kilangsak hi.

2Thessalonians2:4 Tua A Gilopa in mite’ biak pasian a kici khempeuh le na khempeuh nialgawp ding hi. Tuate khempeuh sangin a lianzaw-in a kingaihsut banah
2Thessalonians2:5 Note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-in hih thute khempeuh hong genkhin ka hih manin na phawk lai ding uh hi.
2Thessalonians2:6 Ahi zongin tu laitakin tua bang a pian loh nadingin a kham khat om ahihna thu na thei uh hi. A hun a tun ciangin A Gilopa hong kilang ding hi.
2Thessalonians2:7 Kuamah kim in a phawk loh Gitloh Gamtatna kigamta khinta a
2Thessalonians2:8 A khamcip pa a kilakkhiat khit ciangin A Gilopa hong kilang ding a
2Thessalonians2:9 Satan’ vangliatna tawh A Gilopa hong pai-in
2Thessalonians2:10 gitloh khemna a nam tuamtuam zangin
2Thessalonians2:11 Tua ahih manin Pasian in amaute lakah nasem dingin zuau thahatna paisak ahih manin amaute in a man lo thu um uh hi.
2Thessalonians2:12 Tua ahih manin thuman um loin
2Thessalonians2:13 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw

2Thessalonians3:1 Sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians3:2 Mi khempeuh in thu um nai lo uh ahih manin a gilo a siahuai mite panin Pasian in kote hong hotkhiat nadingin zong hong ngetsak un.
2Thessalonians3:3 Note ahihleh
2Thessalonians3:4 Note kiangah ka hong gen uh thute a kipat cil a kipanin na zuih uh mah bangin zui paisuak taktak ding
2Thessalonians3:5 Pasian bangin itna nei-in Khrih thuak bangin na thuakzawh nadingun Topa in note lungsim hong bawlsak tahen.
2Thessalonians3:6 Sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians3:7 Kote’ gamtatzia bangin a gamta ding na hihna uh teltakin na thei uh hi. Note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-un ka thadah om kei uh hi.
2Thessalonians3:8 Kuama an a khongin ka ne kei uh hi. Note khat peuhpeuh in nong suplawhkhak loh nadingun a sun a zanin hahkat takin na ka sem uh hi.
2Thessalonians3:9 Hih bangin ka gamtatna uh pen note’ hong piakte a khongin ne-in a zang dingin a kilawm mah hinapi-in
2Thessalonians3:10 Note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-un
2Thessalonians3:11 Hih bangin thu ka hong genna uh pen note lakah mi pawlkhatte thadahin na sem nuam lo uh a
2Thessalonians3:12 Tu-in tua bang mite in kuamah nawngkaisak nawn loin man manin na sem hiathiatin amau’ nuntak nadingun na a sep nadingun Topa Jesuh Khrih min tawh hanthawnin thu ka hong pia uh hi.
2Thessalonians3:13 Sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians3:14 Hih lai sunga ka hong gente uh a zui nuam lo mi khatpeuh a om leh tua mipa limtakin ciamteh unla
2Thessalonians3:15 Ahi zongin amah galbawl kei unla
2Thessalonians3:16 Eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Topa in note tungah a tawntungin nopsakna hong pia hen la
2Thessalonians3:17 Keimah Paul in kong hopih hi
2Thessalonians3:18 I Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong tung tahen.
1Timothy1:1 Eite a hong Hon Pasian le eite’ lamet Khrih Jesuh’ thupiakna tawh Khrih Jesuh’ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in
1Timothy1:2 Thu upna sungah ka tapa taktak ahi Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le eite’ Topa Khrih Jesuh in dikna
1Timothy1:3 Masedonia gam lam manawhin ka pai lai-in Efesa khua-ah na om ding ka hong sawl mah bangin tu-in zong tua khua mahah na omlai inla
1Timothy1:4 Phuahtawm tangthute le min tampipi kizom deudau-a khangsimnate in upna tawh i ngahtheih Pasian’ vaihawmnate tangtungsak loin
1Timothy1:5 Hih bangin thupiakna pen
1Timothy1:6 Mi pawlkhatte
1Timothy1:7 Thei kisa ngelin a gen kankan uh thute le amau kampauna mahmah zong bang gen ka hi hiam cih a thei het lo hinapi-in amaute pen Pasian’ thukhamte a hilh dingin utzaw lai uh hi.
1Timothy1:8 Thukham pen a kizat nading a kilawm ciang ah zangthei lehang a hoih thu khat hi
1Timothy1:9 Ahi zongin i phawk dingah
1Timothy1:10 nulepa mawhna a gamtate
1Timothy1:11 Thuman ka cih pen thupha tawh kidimin a minthang Pasian in ka hilh dingin kei tungah a hong piak Lungdamna Thu ahi hi.
1Timothy1:12 Hih bangin na sepzawh nadingin thatang hatna a hong pia i Topa Khrih Jesuh tungah ka lungdam hi. Ama nasem dingin kei hong muangin hong seh ahih manin ka nuam hi.
1Timothy1:13 A beisa hunah amah gensia-in
1Timothy1:14 Pasian in genzawh lohin kei hong hehpih a
1Timothy1:15 Khrih Jesuh
1Timothy1:16 A mawhnei pha bel ka hihna thu hang mahin
1Timothy1:17 Amah bek Pasian ahi
1Timothy1:18 Ka ta Timoti aw
1Timothy1:19 na upna le lungsim kisuang loin na omna thu kiptakin len paisuak in. Mi pawlkhatte in a lungsim kitheihna uhah man a kisakna bangun gamta lo uh ahih manin a thu upna uh a mawkna a suah uh hi.
1Timothy1:20 Tua bang mite lakah Hymenaias le Alexander kihel uh a
1Timothy2:1 A masa penin kong gennop thu in: Mi khempeuh a dingin Pasian tungah ngetna
1Timothy2:2 Eite nuamtakin omthei-in

1Timothy2:7 Hih ka gen thu pen zuau ahi lo
1Timothy2:8 Mun khempeuhah a om pasal khempeuh in kuamah tawh kitotna le lungsim kinopmawhna nei hetloin
1Timothy2:9 Tua mah bangin numeite zong a kilawm a kituak bekin kizemin kipuahin
1Timothy2:10 biakna lungsim neite a dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin gamtat hoih a neih ding uh ka deih hi.

1Timothy2:12 Numeite in pasalte tungah aana nei-in thu a hilh ding ka phalkei hi. Gamdai takin a om ding uh ahi hi.

2Timothy1:1 Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawlna hangin hong kipia ding nuntakna thu a gen dingin Pasian’ deihna tawh Khrih Jesuh’ sawltak nasep a sem dingin a hong kisawl keimah Paul in
2Timothy1:2 Ka it ka ta Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le i Topa Khrih Jesuh in dikna
2Timothy1:3 A sun a zanin ka thungetna-ah nang ka hong phawk tawntung a
2Timothy1:4 Na khitui luannate phawk ka hih manin ka lung a dam theih nadingin nang tawh kimu nuamin a sun a zanin ka ngaihsun tawntung hi.
2Timothy1:5 Na pi Lois le na nu Eunis in a neih upna bangte pawl mah
2Timothy1:6 Tua ahih manin nang tungah ka khut nga-in thu ka hong ngetsak lai-in nangma tungah Pasian in hong piak siamna na sosuah nadingin ka hong phawksak hi.
2Timothy1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite tungah meidawina lungsim hong guan lo a
2Timothy1:8 Tua ahih manin i Topa’ thu gen nading thu-ah ahi a
2Timothy1:9 Eite’ sepzawhna hang hi loin ama ngimnasa bang leh a dikna hangin Pasian in eite hong honkhia-in ama mi dingin a hong sam hi. Pasian in leitung a pianma pekin Khrih Jesuh tungtawnin tua dikna a hong piak hi a
2Timothy1:10 tuhun ciangin eite hong Honpa Khrih Jesuh tungtawnin a dikna hong langsak ta hi. Tua Jesuh in sihna beisak a
2Timothy1:11 Hih a thak Lungdamna Thu hilhin a taangko ding le sawltak na a sem dingin kei a hong kikoih ahi hi.
2Timothy1:12 Tua ahih manin hih bangteng a thuak ka hi hi. Ahi zongin ka up pa ka thei a
2Timothy1:13 Keima tung panin na zaksa a man thute zui inla
2Timothy1:14 Eite sungah a hong teng Kha Siangtho in a hong ap thuhoihte limtakin kem in.
2Timothy1:15 Na theihsa bangin Asia gam sunga om mi khempeuh in kei hong nusia uh a
2Timothy1:16 Onesiforas in tamveipi kei hong lungnuamsak ahih manin Pasian in a innkuan bupun hehpihna thupha pia tahen. Ka thongkiatna hangin amah maizum lo a
2Timothy1:17 Rom khua hong tun ciangin kei hong muh matengin hong zong pah hi.
2Timothy1:18 Topa in tua Ni ciangin ama tungah hehpihna thupha pia tahen. Efesa khua-ah ka omlai-in nakpitakin kei a hong huhnate khempeuh na theihsa ahi hi.
2Timothy2:1 Ka ta aw
2Timothy2:2 Mi tampite’ theihin ka thuhilh
2Timothy2:3 Khrih Jesuh’ galkap hoih hihna tawh thuak dingin a kisam khempeuh na na thuak in.
2Timothy2:4 Galkap a semlai mipa in ama tungah a om bupa a lungkimsak theih nadingin na sem ahih manin tualsung mite’ nasep tawh thuahkhawm lo hi.
2Timothy2:5 Kimawl kidemna-ah a kihel mi khatpeuh in kimawlna ngeina zui lopi-in gualzawh pahtawina ngah thei lo hi.
2Timothy2:6 Hahkat takin lo a khopa in anlak hun ciangin a tampen a ngah dingin a kilawm ahi hi.
2Timothy2:7 Topa in thu khempeuh na theih nadingin hong huh ding ahih manin hih ka thugente khempeuh limtakin na ngaihsun in.
2Timothy2:8 Lungdamna Thu ka hilhna sungah ka gen mah bangin David’ suan
2Timothy2:9 Ama hangin a kingah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh manin gimna ka thuak a
2Timothy2:10 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ teel mite in zong Khrih Jesuh hangin hotkhiatna le tawntung minthanna a ngahkhawm theih nadingun amaute’ hangin na khempeuh ka thuak hi.
2Timothy2:11 Tua ahih manin
2Timothy2:12 Eite in gimna i thuak paisuakzawh leh amah tawh i ukkhawm ding hi. Amah i nial leh amah in zong eite hong nial ding hi.
2Timothy2:13 Amah le amah kikhem thei lo ahih manin eite i citak kei zongin amah citak veve ding hi
2Timothy2:14 Na mite thu kinialin a kitot loh nadingun Pasian’ mai-ah thupi takin na hilhkhol in. Tua bang thu kinialna in a za mite phattuamna ngahsak loin a siasak bek ahi hi.
2Timothy2:15 Pasian’ thuman a mantakin hilhin
2Timothy2:16 Pasian tawh mite a kigamlasak semsem thei thu ginalo
2Timothy2:17 Tua bangin amau’ thugennate in mite siasak a
2Timothy2:18 Thuman lampi panin amaute pialkhin uh a
2Timothy2:19 Ahi zongin Pasian in a phuhsa sutpi kilokzo ngei lo ding hi. Tua sutpi tungah
2Timothy2:20 Inn lian khat peuhpeuh sungah umlebeel a nam tuamtuam a om hi. Pawlkhatte ngun tawh kibawl a
2Timothy2:21 Mi khatpeuh a hoih lo na khempeuh panin kikemin a siangtho takin a om nakleh na hoih nam khempeuh a sem dingin a Topa tungah ki-apin
2Timothy2:22 Tua ahih manin khangno lunggulhna hoih lote pelh inla
2Timothy2:23 Thu kihai seelna
2Timothy2:24 Topa’ na a sem mite
2Timothy2:25 thunem tawh a langte’ hoih lohna a puahtheite hi ding hi. Tua bang hileh Pasian in amaute kisiksak thei ding a
2Timothy2:26 Dawimangpa in ama deihna bangin a gamta dingin a mat khit hangin ama thang panin amaute suakta khathei ding uh hi.

2Timothy3:2 Tuahun ciangin mite in amau angsung ding bek ngaihsunin
2Timothy3:3 mi khual loin
2Timothy3:4 ciampelin
2Timothy3:5 biakna thu a puathamteng zui napi-in biakna hangin vangliatna thu a omte deih lo ding uh hi. Tua bangin a gamta mite na pelh in.
2Timothy3:6 Tua bang mite pawlkhat
2Timothy3:7 Tua bang numeite in thu a zakzak uh hangin a man le a man lo khen thei lo uh ahih manin thuman thutak thei zo lo uh hi.
2Timothy3:8 Jannes le Jambres-te in Moses thu a nial mah bangin upna paizia a man lo hih thuhilh mite in zong thuman thutak a nial uh hi.
2Timothy3:9 Ahi zongin Jannes le Jambres-te tungah a piangsa thu mah bangin mi khempeuh in amaute’ haina mu ding uh ahih manin a nasepna uh sau tung khollo ding hi.
2Timothy3:10 Ahi zongin nangmah in ahihleh ka thuhilhna
2Timothy3:11 bawlsiatna ka thuakna

2Timothy3:13 migilote le thuthei kineihin mi khem theite zong siattat semsemin
2Timothy3:14 Ahi zongin nang na hih leh na theihsa na upsa thute ah kip paisuak in. Nang tungah thu hong hilhte kua mi ahi hiam cih na theihsa hi a
2Timothy3:15 Khrih Jesuh upna hangin hotkhiatna a hong ngahsak thei ding pilna a hong pia Lai Siangtho pen na neutung a kipanin a theisa na hihna thu zong na theihsa thu mah ahi hi.

2Timothy4:3 Mite in thuman a ngaih nop loh hun
2Timothy4:4 Amaute in thuman thutak ngainuam nawn loin tangthu phuahtawm peuh ngaihsutpi-in nei ding uh hi.
2Timothy4:5 Ahi zongin nang na hih leh thu khempeuhah na lungsim ki-ukin haksatnate na thuak inla
2Timothy4:6 Kei ka hih leh Pasian biakna-in hong kipiak ding hun hong tungta hi. Hih leitung nuntakna ka nusiat ding hun hita hi.
2Timothy4:7 Kidemna-ah ka hat tawpin ka hih khin a
2Timothy4:8 Thu a manin a khen Topa in tua Ni ciangin kei a hong piak ding thuman lukhu ahi gualzawhna thaman in tu-in kei hong ngak gige hi. Kei tung bekah a hong pia ding hi lo a
2Timothy4:9 Kei kiangah na hong pai baih theih nadingin hong hanciam in.
2Timothy4:10 Demas in hih leitung thu kinzaw ahih manin kei hong nusia-in Thesalonika khua-ah a pai hi. Kresen
2Timothy4:11 Luka bek kei kiangah om hi. Marka in nasepna-ah nakpitakin hong huhthei ahih manin na hong pai ciangin amah hong tonpih in.
2Timothy4:12 Tikhikas ahihleh Efesa khua-ah ka paisak khin hi.
2Timothy4:13 Na hong pai ciangin Troas khua-ah Karpas kianga ka nusiat ka puantualpi hong pua inla
2Timothy4:14 Sikseekpa Alexander in kei tungah siatna lianpi hong bawl hi. Ama gamtatna tawh kizui-in Topa in thuk ding hi.
2Timothy4:15 Amah in i thuhilhna nakpitakin nial ahih manin amah tawh kisai-ah nangma pumpi kidawm mahmah in.
2Timothy4:16 Keimah kihut nading thu ka gen masak ni-in kuamah in hong koppih loin hong taisanmang uh hi. Tua thu hangin mawhsakna thuak kei beek uh hen!

Titus1:4 Thu upna-ah ka ta taktak ahi Titus tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le eite hong Hon Khrih Jesuh in nangma tungah hehpihna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
Titus1:5 Krete Tuikulh gam sung tengah a manin puahphat ding a kisam lai a omte a sem ding le khua simah pawlpi upa a koih dingin tua gamah a hong nusia ka hi hi. Nang tungah ka hong gensa thute hoihtakin na phawk in:
Titus1:6 Upate pen paubaanna a om lote hi ding a
Titus1:7 Pawlpi siate pen Pasian’ nasem ahih manin paubaanna a om lo
Titus1:8 zinleleeng do a siam mi
Titus1:9 Upna bulpi tawh a kituak thute limtakin lenkip ding uh hi. Tua hileh thuhilhna man tawh midangte hanthawn thei ding uh a
Titus1:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu a mang lo
Titus1:11 Sum ngahtheih nading bekin a kilawm lopi-in thu hilhin biakna innkuan buppi nawngkaisak uh ahih manin thu a gen nawn loh nadingun khaktan ding ahi hi.
Titus1:12 Amau Krete gam mite sung panin a kamsang uh khat in
Titus1:13 Hih ama thugen a man mahmah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin thu upna man nei thei-in
Titus1:14 Jew mite’ tangthu phuahtawmte ahi a
Titus1:15 Lungsim siangthote a dingin na khempeuh a siang hi a

Titus2:2 Pasal khanghamte a kilawm a kituakin a omtheih nading
Titus2:3 Tua mah bangin mite in Pasian’ thu a gensiatkhak loh nadingun numei khanghamte zong a gamtat a khuahek uh a zahtakhuai ahih nading
Titus2:4 amaute sangin a nauzaw nupite in a pasalte uh le a tate uh a it nadingun a hilh ding
Titus2:5 thu ngaihsun thei
Titus2:6 Tua mah bangin khangnote zong amau pumpi a ki-ukzawh nadingun na hanthawn pha in.
Titus2:7 Nangma pumpi mahmah gamtat hoihna a kipan thu khempeuhah etteh hoih dingin na om in. Lungsim takpi tawh mite’ zahtaktheih dingin thu na hilh inla
Titus2:8 mite’ mawhmat theih loh ding kamhoihte na zang in. Tua hileh i langte in hong gensiat theih nading mu loin a mai uh zum lel ding hi.
Titus2:9 Silate in zong a tote uh thu mangin
Titus2:10 a guktak loh nading
Titus2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngahtheih nadingun Pasian in ama hehpihna hong lak khinzo hi.
Titus2:12 Eite in i lamet
Titus2:13 
Titus2:14 I mawhna khempeuh panin hong honkhia ding le ama neihtuam i suahtheih nadingin Jesuh amahmah hong kipumpiak a
Titus2:15 Hih ka hong thugente hilh inla
Titus3:1 Na mite in hong uk kumpite le aana neite’ thu mangin
Titus3:2 kuamah gensia loin
Titus3:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite zong nidangin haitatin
Titus3:4 Ahi zongin eite hong Honpa ahi Pasian’ itna le a migitna thu hong kilat ciangin
Titus3:5 amah in eite hong honkhia hi. Eite in na hoih i sepzawhna hangin hong honkhia hi loin eite tungah suahtakna le nuntakna thak a hong pia Kha Siangtho in hong sawpsiangna hangin a hong hehpihna tawh a hong honkhia ahi hi.
Titus3:6 Pasian in eite hong Hon Jesuh Khrih hangin eite tungah a kicing takin Kha Siangtho hong pia ahih manin
Titus3:7 ama hong hehpihna hangin Pasian tawh kilemin i lamet nuntak tawntungna a ngah thei ihi hi.
Titus3:8 Hih ka thugente a man mahmah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian’ thu a um mite in gamtat hoih a neihtheihna dingun hih ka hong thugente na lim ngaihsut ding ka deih hi. Ka hong thugente a hoih hi a
Titus3:9 Ahi zongin a haihuai thu kiselna
Titus3:10 Kitot
Titus3:11 Tua bang mite a kisiakhin hi a
Titus3:12 Artemas ahi a
Titus3:13 Sitni Zenas le Apollos-te a khualzinna uh manlang takin a paisuak theih nadingun na hihtheih bangin na huh inla
Titus3:14 I mite ommawk loin
Titus3:15 Kei tawh a om mi khempeuh in nang hong hopih uh hi. Thu upna sungah ei hong itte khempeuh na na hopihsak in. Note khempeuh tungah Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen.
Philemon1:1 Khrih Jesuh hangin thong a kia keimah Paul le i sanggampa Timoti in
Philemon1:2 le na inn-ah a hong kikhawm pawlpite le i sanggamnu Apfia le thu upna-ah galkap khawmpih Arkhippas-te tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi.
Philemon1:3 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
Philemon1:4 Pasian’ mite khempeuh na itna thu le Topa Jesuh na upna thu na zakhin ka hih manin Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simin nangmah hong phawkin Pasian tungah lungdamna thu ka ko tawntung hi.
Philemon1:5 
Philemon1:6 Thu umte ihihna hangin Khristian sungah eite i kikholh manin
Philemon1:7 Sanggam aw
Philemon1:8 Tua ahih manin Khrih hangin unau khat ihihna tawh hih dingin a kilawm bangin na gamtat nadingin thu ka hong gen ngam hi.
Philemon1:9 Hih bangin ka hong genna pen itna i neihna hang ahi hi. Tu lai takin Khrih taangmi ahi keimah Paul zong
Philemon1:10 Tua ahih manin Khrih hangin ka ta ahi Onesimas a dingin ka hong thumsak hi. Thong sungah ka om sungun kha thu tawh kisai-ah ama pa ka suak hi.
Philemon1:11 Nidangin nang a dingin amah a kimanna bangmah om lo a
Philemon1:12 Keima pumpi zahin ngaihsutna tawh nang kiangah amah ka hong puakkik hi.
Philemon1:13 Lungdamna Thu hangin thongkia-in ka om sungin nangma tangin kei a hong huh dingin ka kiangah ka omsak nuam hi.
Philemon1:14 Ahi zongin nangma nasep hoihna pen keima hong kalh hi loin nangma uttawmna tawh na sep a suahtheih nadingin nangma lungkimna om masa lopi-in bangmah ka hih nuam kei hi.
Philemon1:15 A tawntungin nang kiangah amah hong om paisuak theih nadingin tawlkhat sung nang kiang panin Onesimas a paikhia zong hi khathei ding hi.
Philemon1:16 Tu-in amah sal bek hi nawn loin sal sangin a thupizaw
Philemon1:17 Tua ahih manin nasepna-ah pawlkhat taktakin kei na hong ngaihsut nakleh kei na hong limbawl ding zahin amah na limbawl in.
Philemon1:18 Nang tungah hong khialh a
Philemon1:19 Keimah Paul in ka hong loh ding hi
Philemon1:20 Tua ahih manin sanggam aw
Philemon1:21 Ka hong genna sangin a hoihzaw a phazaw-in na gamta ding
Philemon1:22 Tua banah
Philemon1:23 Khrih Jesuh hangin thong ka kiatpih Epafras a kipan
Philemon1:24 ka naseppih Marka
Philemon1:25 Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha
Hebrews1:1 A beisa hunah Pasian in kamsangte zangin i pupite tungah a lam tuamtuam tawh a khen khenin thu na gen ngeizo hi.
Hebrews1:2 Ahi zongin tuhun nunung ciangin leitung vantung na khempeuh a bawlin a zat
Hebrews1:3 Tua Tapa in Pasian’ minthanna vang hong taangkhiasak a
Hebrews1:4 Vantung mite’ ngah minthanna sangin Tapa tungah Pasian in a piak min a liatzawk mah bangin vantung mite sangin Tapa lianzaw thampek hi.
Hebrews1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in vantungmi khat peuhpeuh tungah
Hebrews1:6 Tua banah
Hebrews1:7 Ahi zongin vantung mite’ thu a gen ciangin
Hebrews1:8 Ahi zongin Tapa’ thu a gen ciangin Pasian in

Hebrews1:14 Vantung mite pen Pasian’ na a sem
Hebrews2:1 Tua ahih manin i zaksa thuman thutakte i khahsuahkhak loh nadingin kiptak khotakin i letkip ding kisam hi.
Hebrews2:2 Vantung mite in hong gen thute thuman hi a
Hebrews2:3 Tua ahih manin a thupi mahmah hih hotkhiatna thudon loin i om leh suahtakna om thei ngei lo ding hi. A masa-in Topa mahmah in hotkhiatna thu hong pulak a
Hebrews2:4 Amaute’ thugenna banah Pasian in vangliatna lim
Hebrews2:5 Eite in genbelin i neih a hong tung ding leitung pen Pasian in vantung mite’ khut sungah koih lo hi.
Hebrews2:6 Lai Siangtho mun khatah a kigenna-ah
Hebrews2:7 Ahi zongin vantung mite sangin a neuzaw deuhin na bawl a
Hebrews2:8 na khempeuh na uk sak hi
Hebrews2:9 Ahi zongin Pasian’ hehpihna hangin mi khempeuh a dingin Jesuh a sih theih nadingin tawlkhat sung vantung mite sangin a neuzaw-in a kibawlna i mu a
Hebrews2:10 Na khempeuh ama a dingin a piangsak Pasian in tate tampi minthanna a ngahsak theih nadingin a thuakna tawh hotkhiatna thu-ah a makai dingin Jesuh a bawl ding a kilawm mah ahi hi.
Hebrews2:11 Mawhna panin mite a siangthosakpa le sianthosakna a ngah mite in
Hebrews2:12 “Pasian aw
Hebrews2:13 tua ciangin
Hebrews2:14 Tate a cih mite pen leitung cilesa a nei mite ahih manin
Hebrews2:15 Tua ahih manin sihna a kihtak manin sal bangin a om mite amah in hong suaktasak hi.
Hebrews2:16 Ama lunghihmawh pen vantung mite hi lo a
Hebrews2:17 Tua ahih manin mihingte’ mawhna a kimaisak theih nadingin Pasian’ na a sepna-ah mite a dingin hehpihna le cihtakna tawh Siampi Lianpen a suahtheih nadingin a sanggamte tawh a kibangin mihing lim a hong puak ding a kisam ahi hi.
Hebrews2:18 Ama pumpi mahmah in ze-etna le gimna thuak ahih manin tuhun ciangin tua bang a thuakte a hong huhthei hi.
Hebrews3:1 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ sapna a ngah mi siangthote aw
Hebrews3:2 Pasian’ inn sungah na a sepna-ah Moses a cihtak mah bangin hih siampi nasep a sem dingin a seh Pasian’ tungah Jesuh a citak hi.
Hebrews3:3 Ahi zongin inn a lam pa pen a inn sangin a minthanzawk mah bangin Moses sangin Jesuh pahtawizawk ding ahi hi.
Hebrews3:4 Inn khempeuh a lam na om ciat sam a
Hebrews3:5 Moses pen nasem khat hihna tawh Pasian’ inn sungah thu khempeuhah citak a
Hebrews3:6 Ahi zongin Khrih pen Pasian’ innsung a uk Tapa ahihna tawh a citak ahi hi. I lametna thu tawh kisai-in lungsim hanna le muanna tawh i omsuak nakleh eite pen Pasian’ inn ihi hi.
Hebrews3:7 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah
Hebrews3:8 gamlakah na om lai-un amah ze-etin
Hebrews3:9 Na pu na pate un kum sawmli sung ka nasepnate mu napi-in kei hong ze-et veve uh hi.

Hebrews3:11 Ka heh manin ka kiciam a

Hebrews3:13 Lai Siangtho in
