Hebrews3:15 Lai Siangtho in
Hebrews3:16 Pasian’ aw za napi-in amah a lehdo kuate ahi hiam? Moses in Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih mi khempeuh ahi uh hi.
Hebrews3:17 Kum sawmli sung kuate tungah Pasian heh ahi hiam? Mawhna bawlin
Hebrews3:18 Thupi takin Pasian kiciamin
Hebrews3:19 Tua ahih manin a up lohna uh hangin tawlngakna munah a lutzawh lohna uh i thei hi.
Hebrews4:1 Ahi zongin tu-in eite va pai-in amah tawh i tawlngak khawm theih nadingin Pasian in thuciam hong nusiat khin ahih manin tua tawlngakna munah a lutlah na suahkhak loh nadingun lau-in kidawm ni.
Hebrews4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Lungdamna Thu a zak uh mah bangin eite in zong i za hi. Amaute in Lungdamna Thu a zak uh ciangin upna tawh na sang lo uh ahih manin a thuzak uh amaute a dingin a phattuamna om lo hi.
Hebrews4:3 Ahi zongin eite ihih leh amah in
Hebrews4:4 Lai Siangtho mun khatah
Hebrews4:5 Hih thu mah na kigenkik a
Hebrews4:6 Lungdamna Thu a za masate in um lo uh ahih manin Pasian tawh va tawlnga khawm thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin va pai-in Pasian tawh a tawlnga khawm ding mi pawlkhat omlai hi.
Hebrews4:7 “Tuni
Hebrews4:8 Joshua in Pasian’ tawlngakna munah mite tunpih khin hileh Pasian in a nidang khat thu nunggen nawn lo ding hi.
Hebrews4:9 Tua ahih manin tu-a thu om zia-ah ci lehang ni sagih ni-in Pasian a tawlngak mah bangin Pasian’ mite a tawlngak nading omlai hi.
Hebrews4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nasepna panin Pasian a tawlngak mah bangin va pai-in Pasian tawh a tawlngate khempeuh zong a nasepna panun khawl ding uh hi.
Hebrews4:11 Tua ahih manin amaute in a uploh manun Pasian’ tawlngakna munah a lut zawh loh uh bang hi loin va pai-in Pasian tawh i tawlngak khawm theih nadingin hanciam ciat ni.
Hebrews4:12 Pasian’ thu nungta-in a gamtang hi a
Hebrews4:13 Pasian’ mai-ah seelcip theih ding bangmah om lo hi. Eite khempeuh i dinna ding pa’ mai-ah a kipiangsak na khempeuh a kiliah a ki-im thei om loin kimu sinsen hi.
Hebrews4:14 Tua ahih manin eite in Pasian’ omna vantung a va tung khinsa
Hebrews4:15 Eite’ neih Siampi Lianpen pa in i ginat lohna-ah eite a hong hehpih thei lo ding hi lo hi; eite mah bangin ze-etna khempeuh a thuak hi a
Hebrews4:16 Tua ahih manin a kisap hunin
Hebrews5:1 Siampi lianpen ahi peuhpeuh mipa pen a mite’ mawhna hangin Pasian’ tungah biakna le letsong a piaksak dingin ama mipihte lak panin kiteelin nasep a kiguan’ ahi hi.
Hebrews5:2 Amah zong lam tampi-ah a ginalo thei mi mah ahih manin thu thei lo mite le a khial mite tungah lungnem takin na sem thei hi.
Hebrews5:3 Amah zong miginalo mi mah ahih manin mite’ mawhna hangin biakna a pia hi bek loin ama mawhna mahmah hangin zong biakna a pia ahi hi.
Hebrews5:4 Tua bangin pahtawina a nei siampi lianpen nasep pen a sem dingte amau utthu tawh a kisehtawm mawk hi lo hi; siampi lianpen a sem dingin amahmah a kisehtawm hi lo a
Hebrews5:5 Tua mah bangin Khrih zong
Hebrews5:6 Mun dang khatah zong
Hebrews5:7 Leitungah mihingin Jesuh a omlai-in sihna panin amah a honkhia thei ding Pasian tungah thu ngenin khitui naptui tawh thumin na kiko hi.
Hebrews5:8 Amah
Hebrews5:9 Tua bangin a cingtaak mi a suahkhit ciangin ama thu a mang mite khempeuh a dingin tawntung hotkhiatna a kipatna hong suak a
Hebrews5:10 Melkhizedek gui zui-in siampi lianpen dingin Pasian in a bawl hi.
Hebrews5:11 Hih thu tawh kisai-in i gen ding tampi a om hangin note in thu thei hak mahmah na hih manun i gentel theih nading haksa hi.
Hebrews5:12 Tu-in note pen midang a hilh dingin sia na suahtheih ding uh hun hikhin napi-in note mahmah pen Pasian’ thu a bulpite hilh ding na kisam lai uh hi. Antak nethei nai loin nawi bek a nethei lai na hi uh hi.
Hebrews5:13 Nawi bek a ne laite pen naungek ahih manin a man le a man lo thu bangmah phawkthei nai lo uh hi.
Hebrews5:14 Ahi zongin antak i cih pen a sia le a pha a khenthei
Hebrews6:1 Tua ahih manin Khrih thu a kipat cilna lelte nusia-in a thuthuk zawte ngaihsutin nei ni. Bangmahin a kimang lo nasepnate nusiat ding
Hebrews6:2 tuiphumna le khut ngakna thu
Hebrews6:3 Eite in mainawt ni. Pasian in hong thukimpih ahih nakleh i mainawt ding ahi hi.
Hebrews6:4 A tawpkik khinsate a kisik kik nadingin kibawl zo lo hi. Pasian’ khuavak sungah amaute om khinin

Hebrews6:6 amaute a tawpkik leh
Hebrews6:7 A tungah a kia guahtuite hupin

Hebrews6:10 Pasian
Hebrews6:11 Note khat ciat’ lametna thu hong tun taktak theih nadingin a tawp dongin lawpin na thanop paisuak nading uh ka hong deihsak pha uh hi.
Hebrews6:12 Note thadah loin upna le lungduaina a nei mite bangin
Hebrews6:13 Pasian in Abraham’ tungah thu a ciam ciangin a tunsak takpi ding bek thu a ciam hi. Thu a ciam ciangin zong amah sangin a lianzaw kuamah om nawn lo ahih manin ama min tawh thu ciam a
Hebrews6:14 “Nang thupha hong pia-in suanlekhak tampi a nei dingin ka hong ciam hi
Hebrews6:15 Abraham in lungduai takin na ngak ahih manin Pasian’ thuciam a ngah hi.

Hebrews7:1 Abraham in a galsimna ah kumpite thatin gualzo-in a hong ciah ciangin A Lianpen Pasian’ siampi ahih banah Jerusalem khua kumpi zong ahi Melkhizedek in Abraham na dawnin thupha a pia hi.
Hebrews7:2 Abraham in a na ngah khempeuh sung panin Melkhizedek tungah sawm-ah-khat a pia hi. Melkhizedek min a khiatna in
Hebrews7:3 Melkhizedek’ pa le a nu a kipanin a suahna thu
Hebrews7:4 Tua ahih manin bangzah takin milian ahihna thu na thei uh hi. I pupi Abraham nangawn in zong gal sungah a ngah nate sung panin ama tungah sawm-ah-khat na pia hi.
Hebrews7:5 Levi suanlekhak sung panin siampi a sem mite pen Abraham’ suanlekhak mah hinapi-in
Hebrews7:6 Ahi zongin Melkhizedek ahihleh Levi’ suanlekhak hi lo napi-in Abraham’ tung panin sawm-ah-khat na la-in thuciamna a ngah mipa zong thupha a na pia lai hi.
Hebrews7:7 A lianzawte in a neuzawte thupha a na piakna pen a man thu hi a
Hebrews7:8 Siampite’ lakna tawh kisai-in ahihleh a sithei mi mah ahi siampite in mite tung panin sawm-ah-khat a la uh hi. Ahi zongin Melkhizedek’ lakna tawh kisai-in ahihleh Lai Siangtho in a gen mah bangin a nungta tawntung mipa in sawm-ah-khat a la ahi hi.
Hebrews7:9 Abraham in Melkhizedek tungah sawm-ah-khat a piak ciangin ama suan Levi in zong ama pupi Abraham tungtawnin a pia mah kici thei hi.
Hebrews7:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Melkhizedek in Abraham a na dawn laitakin Levi suak nai lo ahih manin a pupi Abraham’ sung mahah a omlai ahi hi.
Hebrews7:11 Israel mite in Levi’ suanlekhak siampite tungtawnin Thukham ngah uh hi. Levi’ suanlekhak siampite’ nasepna kicingtaak hileh Melkhizedek siampi nam zui-in siampi namdang a pian ding kisam nawn lo ding a
Hebrews7:12 Siampi nam kikheel ahih manin a thukham zong a kikheel ding kisam hi.
Hebrews7:13 Hih bang thute a kigenna i Topa pen a namtuam khat hi a
Hebrews7:14 I Topa pen Judah suan sung panin a piang ahih manin Moses in siampi thu a na gen ciangin hih Judah minam genin na nei lo hi.
Hebrews7:15 Melkhizedek tawh a kibang siampi namtuam khat hong pian’ ciangin hih thu hong kitelpha semsem hi.
Hebrews7:16 Amah pen mihingte’ bawl ngeina zui-in siampi a suak hi lo a
Hebrews7:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in
Hebrews7:18 Ngeina lui pen ginaloin
Hebrews7:19 Moses Thukham ahi ngeina lui in a cingtaaksak zawh bangmah om lo ahih manin eite in Pasian i naih theih nading lametna ahi ngeina thak hong kithun hi.
Hebrews7:20 Tua banah Pasian’ kiciamna zong hong omlai hi. Midangte siampi-in a kibawl laitakin tua bang kiciamna na om lo hi.
Hebrews7:21 Ahi zongin Pasian in Jesuh kiangah
Hebrews7:22 Hih bangin a kilamdang diakin a kibawlna in Jesuh pen kiciamna hoihzaw ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi.
Hebrews7:23 A kilamdanna a dang khat in: Siampi dangte pen sithei-in a nasep zom paisuak thei lo ahih manin a mi malin tampi pha uh hi.
Hebrews7:24 Ahi zongin Jesuh nungta tawntung ahih manin midang tungah a nasep ki-ap nawn loin amahmah in siampi nasep sem paisuak hi.
Hebrews7:25 Tua hi a
Hebrews7:26 Tua bangin a siangtho
Hebrews7:27 Siampi lianpen dangte in nisimin amau’ mawhna hangin biakna pia masa-in
Hebrews7:28 Moses Thukham in siampi lianpen a sem dingin cingtaakna a nei thei lo mihing mah na seh a
Hebrews8:1 Tu-in i gennop thu pen hih bang ahi hi: Vantungah Pasian’ tokhom taklamah a tu tua bang Siampi Lianpen khat a nei ihi hi.
Hebrews8:2 Amah in
Hebrews8:3 Pasian tungah letsong a tuamtuamte a pia ding le ganhing tawh biakna a pia dingin siampi lianpen a sem peuhpeuhte a kiseh ahih mah bangin eite’ Siampi Lianpen pa in zong bangkhat teitei a piak ding kisam hi.
Hebrews8:4 Jew Thukham tawh kizui-in Pasian tungah letsongte a pia ding siampite om khinta ahih manin leitungah Jesuh a omlai hileh siampi hithei het lo ding hi.
Hebrews8:5 Leitung a siampite’ sepsepte pen vantungah a om thu
Hebrews8:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian le mite kikalah Jesuh in a bawl thuciamna pen na a hoihzaw piak nading thuciamna ahih mah bangin Jesuh tungah a kipia siampi nasep pen siampi dang khempeuhte’ sep sangin a lianzaw ahi hi.
Hebrews8:7 Thuciamna a masa kimang thei hileh thuciamna a nihna kisam nawn lo ding hi.
Hebrews8:8 Tua ahih manin Pasian in ama mite mawhsakna thu na gen a
Hebrews8:9 Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih dingin a pu a pate uh ka khut tawh ka kaih lai a
Hebrews8:10 Ahi zongin tu-in Israel mite tawh ka bawl ding thuciamna hih bang ahi hi. Amaute sungah ka thukham ka guang ding a
Hebrews8:11 A neupen pan a lianpen dongin mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh ahih manin ‘Topa thei in
Hebrews8:12 A mawhna a khialhna uhah amaute ka hehpih ding a
Hebrews8:13 Pasian in thuciamna thak a gen ciangin thu ciamna lui pen a bei-in a seh ahi hi. Tua a bei thuciamna pen a maimangta ahi hi.
Hebrews9:1 A masa thuciamna nangawn in biakna zia ding le biak nading mun tawh kisai ngeina na nei tei sam hi.
Hebrews9:2 Puanbuk khat kibawl a
Hebrews9:3 Tua Siangtho Mun a kideina zomah Siangtho Pen Mun a kici a dei dang khat om leuleu hi.
Hebrews9:4 Tua sungah paknamtui hal nading kham kibawl biakna tau le kham tawh a kizut Thuciamna Singkuang om hi. Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah manna anlum a kikoihna kham beel
Hebrews9:5 Tua Thuciamna Singkuang tung sanah Pasian’ ompihna lim ahi kherub nihte om a
Hebrews9:6 Hih bang tengin a kibawl khit ciangin a dei puanung sungah nisim a nasep uh a sem dingin siampite a lut hi.
Hebrews9:7 Ahi zongin a dei sungnung sungah Siampi Lianpen pa bek kum khatin khatvei pai a
Hebrews9:8 A puanung inndei a om laiteng a sungnung ahi
Hebrews9:9 Hih bang omzia pen tuhun lai thu a lahna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian tungah a kipia letsongte le ganhing tawh biaknate in a bia mite’ lungsim siangsak zo lo hi.
Hebrews9:10 Zu le an
Hebrews9:11 Ahi zongin tu-in a hoihzaw thu a sem ding Siampi Lianpen Khrih hong tung khinta a
Hebrews9:12 Siangtho Pen Mun ah a tawntungin a kimang dingin khatvei bek Khrih a va lut ciangin biakpiak nadingin keel sisan le bawngno sisante va keng loin ama sisan va keng a
Hebrews9:13 Keel sisan
Hebrews9:14 tawntung Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian tungah a cingtaak biakpiak nadingin Khrih in a piak ama sisan in na tam semkhia zozaw ding a
Hebrews9:15 Thuciamna masa in a huamkhak mite
Hebrews9:16 Mi khat in a sih khit ciangin a gamhluah dingin a deih pa lai-in ciamtehin a koih leh a laibawl pa a sih phot ding kisam hi.
Hebrews9:17 A laibawl pa a hin laiteng tua lai kizang thei lo a
Hebrews9:18 Tua mah bangin thuciamna masa zong sisan a kizat ciangin thu suak thei pan hi.
Hebrews9:19 Moses in zong mite tungah Thukham sunga om thute a piak lai-in bawngno sisan
Hebrews9:20 “Pasian in note tungah a hong piak thuciamna sisan ahi hi
Hebrews9:21 Tua banah Moses in Biakbuk le biakna-in a kizang a sunga na om khempeuh zong sisan a theh hi.
Hebrews9:22 Thukham kizatna sungah na khempeuh sisan tawh kisiansuah a
Hebrews9:23 A taktak ahi lo vantung limte pen hih bangin siansuahna kibawl hi. Ahi zongin vantung nate in hih sangin a hoihzaw biakpiakna kisam hi.
Hebrews9:24 Tua ahih manin a lim ahi mihingte’ bawl Siangtho Mun sungah Jesuh pai lo a
Hebrews9:25 Kum simin Siangtho Pen Munah Jew Siampi Lianpente amau’ sisan ahi lo
Hebrews9:26 Tua bangin va pai zelzel hileh leitung piancil a kipanin a va thuak zelzel ding ahi hi. Ahi zongin amah biakna-in a va kipiakna hangin a kimang paisuak a suahtheih nadingin mawh maisak nadingin hun bei kuan ciangin amah khatvei a va kipia hi.
Hebrews9:27 Mi khempeuh khatvei si-in
Hebrews9:28 mi tampite’ mawhna a thuak dingin Khrih zong khatvei bek a kipia hi. A nihveina hong kilatkik ciangin mawhna thu tawh kisai nasem ding hi nawn loin
Hebrews10:1 Jew Thukham pen mailam hunah a taktak a hong tung ding lim lahkholhna hi bek ahih manin tua Thukham tawh kizui-in a kum a kumin a kipia biakpiakna in Pasian kiang a zuan mite mi cingtaak suahzo ngei lo hi.
Hebrews10:2 Thukham zui-in Pasian a bia mite in mawhna panin siansuahna ngahzo uh hileh a lungsim uhah kisuanna lungsim om nawn lo ding ahih manin biakpiakna piak kikkik kul nawn lo ding hi.
Hebrews10:3 Tua ahih manin biakpiakna a kipiak simin a kum kumin mite a mawhna uh a kiphawksak kikkik ahi hi.
Hebrews10:4 Tua hi a
Hebrews10:5 Tua ahih manin leitungah Khrih hong pai ciangin Pasian kiangah
Hebrews10:6 Meihal biakna le mawh maisak nadingin biaknate tawh nang na lungkim kei hi.
Hebrews10:7 Tua ahih manin
Hebrews10:8 “Ganhing le khawhsa tawh biakna na deih kei a
Hebrews10:9 tua banah
Hebrews10:10 Pasian’ deihna bangin Jesuh Khrih gamta a
Hebrews10:11 Jew siampite nisimin a nasepna uh munah dingin a kibang biakpiakna mah pia niloh uh a
Hebrews10:12 Ahi zongin Khrih in mawhna hangin khatvei a piakkhit ciangin a tawntung a dingin kimang ahih manin Pasian’ taklam ah tu hithiat a
Hebrews10:13 Pasian in ama khenuai-ah a galte khempeuh a koihsak nading hun ngakin a om hi.
Hebrews10:14 Mawhna panin a sianthosak mite
Hebrews10:15 Kha Siangtho in zong hih thu hong theihpih ahih manin
Hebrews10:16 “Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Mailam hunah amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding a
Hebrews10:17 “Amaute’ mawhna le a gitloh gamtatnate uh ka ciamteh nawn kei ding hi
Hebrews10:18 Tua hi a
Hebrews10:19 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
Hebrews10:20 Ama pumpi mahmah ahi dalna puan tawnin nuntakna lampi-ah i pai theih nadingin amah in lampi thak hong honsak hi.
Hebrews10:21 Pasian’ innsung a uk siampi lianpen zong i nei hi.
Hebrews10:22 Tua ahih manin mawhna thu-ah kisuanna lungsim om nawn loin
Hebrews10:23 Pasian in piak dingin a hong ciam thu muangngam ihih manin i lametna thu kiptakin len ni.
Hebrews10:24 Khatlekhat ki-itin a hoih nate i sep nadingin kihanthawn ciat ni.
Hebrews10:25 Mi pawlkhatte in kikhop a pelh bang hi loin
Hebrews10:26 Thuman thutak i theih khit ciangin mawhna i bawl hamtang lai leh i mawhna a kimaisak nadingin biakpiakna dang om nawn lo a
Hebrews10:27 a kihtakhuai thukhenna le Pasian’ thu a nial mite a kangtum ding meikuangpi bek omlai hi.
Hebrews10:28 Moses Thukham a zui lote pen mi nih le thum in mawh mah hi
Hebrews10:29 Tua bang ahihleh Pasian’ Tapa a simmawh
Hebrews10:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh
Hebrews10:31 A nungta Pasian’ khut sungah thumang loin i tunkhak ding a lauhuai mahmah ahi hi.
Hebrews10:32 A beisa hun a note tungah thupiangte phawkkik un. Pasian’ khuavak sungah na om khit uh ciangin haksatna tampi thuak napi-in tuate na lel kei uh hi.
Hebrews10:33 Mipi’ mai-ah hong kisimmawhin hong kibawlsia a
Hebrews10:34 Note in a hoihzaw
Hebrews10:35 Tua ahih manin thaman lianpi a hong ngahsak thei na lungsim hanna uh na khahsuah kei un.
Hebrews10:36 Pasian’ deihna bangin gamta-in
Hebrews10:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah
Hebrews10:38 Ahi zongin keima mi a thuman mite in ka thu umin nungta ding uh a
Hebrews10:39 Eite pen nungkikin a maimang mite ihi kei a
Hebrews11:1 Upna nei i cih ciangin i muhtheih nai loh i lamette ngah takpi ding
Hebrews11:2 Tanglai mite in upna a na neih manun Pasian in a na pakta hi.
Hebrews11:3 Pasian’ kampauna tawh leitung le vantung piang a
Hebrews11:4 A upna hang mah tawh Abel in Kain’ piakna sangin a santheih huaizaw biakpiakna Pasian’ tungah a na pia hi. Pasian in ama biakna na sang ahih manin a upna hangin mihoih hi
Hebrews11:5 A upna hang mahin Enok zong sihna tawh kipelh hi. Pasian in ama kiangah lato ahih manin kuamah in Enok mu nawn lo hi. Amah a kilaktoh ma-in Enok in Pasian’ lungkimna ngah hi
Hebrews11:6 Upna lo tawh kuamah in Pasian lungkimsak zo lo hi. Pasian kiang a zuan mi peuhmah in Pasian a om takpi ahihna thu le amah a zongte Pasian in thaman pia hi
Hebrews11:7 Noah in zong a upna hang mah tawh mailam a thupiang ding a muh theih lohpi mahin Pasian’ thugenna na mang a
Hebrews11:8 Pasian in ama tungah piak dingin a ciam leitangah Abraham a pai dingin a sap lai-in Abraham in Pasian’ sapna a manna pen a upna hang mah ahi hi. A pai nading mun nangawn thei lopi-in a gam le a lei nusia-in a ding khia hi.
Hebrews11:9 Pasian in piak dingin a ciam gamah a upna hang mah tawh gamdangpi hinapi-in peemta-in va om phot a
Hebrews11:10 Pasian in geelin a lam
Hebrews11:11 Sarah a ta neihtheih ding hun beikhin napi-in ama tungah thuciam pa zuau lo ding
Hebrews11:12 A cimang khinin a kingaihsun hih mi khat’ suanlekhakte pen vana aksi zah leh tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hi.
Hebrews11:13 Hih mite khempeuh in amaute tungah piak dingin Pasian’ ciam thute ngah nai lo uh a
Hebrews11:14 Tua bang mite in amau a dingin a gam a lei ding uh a zong ahihna uh hong kilang hi.
Hebrews11:15 Amaute in a nusiat uh leitung ngaihsutpi penin a nei uh hileh hong ciahkik theih nading uh hun ngah ding uh hi.
Hebrews11:16 Ahi zongin amaute’ lunggulh pen leitung sangin a hoihzaw vantung gam ahi hi. Pasian in amaute a dingin khuapi khat na vaihawmsak ahih manin
Hebrews11:17 Pasian in Abraham a ze-et laitakin Abraham in a upna hang mah tawh Pasian biak nadingin a tapa Isaac na pia ngam hi. Pasian mah in Abraham tungah tapa ka hong pia ding ci-in a ciam hinapi-in
Hebrews11:18 Tua a piak ding tapa pen Pasian in
Hebrews11:19 Pasian in a sisa nangawn hingkiksak thei ding hi
Hebrews11:20 A tapa Jakob le Esau in mai lamah thupha ngah ding hi
Hebrews11:21 Jakob a sihkuan ciangin a ciangkhut dawnah kingamin Pasian bia a
Hebrews11:22 Josef a sih ding ciangin Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat nading thu le ama luanghawm a bawl nading zia a vaikhaknate zong a upna hang mah ahi hi.
Hebrews11:23 Moses a suah ciangin a nu le a pa in hoihsa mahmahin
Hebrews11:24 Moses a gol ciangin Faro’ tanu’ tapa kicih ding a ut nawn loh ngamna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi.
Hebrews11:25 Tomno sung mawhna sungah nuamtakin om ding sangin Pasian’ mite tawh gimna thuakkhawm ding a utzaw hi.
Hebrews11:26 Mailamah a thaman ding mukhol thei ahih manin Egypt gam sunga hauhna le nopsaknate khempeuh sangin Khrih hangin simmawhna thuak taakzaw tham hi
Hebrews11:27 Moses pen kumpipa’ heh ding lau hetloin Egypt gam panin paikhia a
Hebrews11:28 Mi That Vantungmi in Israel mite ta upa pen khempeuh a thahkhak loh nadingin Paisan Pawi kipiangsakin
Hebrews11:29 Lei keu tunga pai bang keekin Israel mite in San Tuipi a kantan theihna uh zong a upna hang mah uh ahi hi. Amaute’ pai bangin Egypt mite in pai ding a sawm uh ciangin tui in a tuumcip hi.
Hebrews11:30 Israel mite in Jerikho khuapi ni sagih sung a kimvel khit uh ciangin a kulhpi a cipna zong a upna uh hang mah ahi hi.
Hebrews11:31 Numei paktat Rahab in thukante limtakin na zindo a
Hebrews11:32 Tu-a bangin gengen lai ding ihi hiam? Gideon
Hebrews11:33 Hih mite khempeuh in zong a upna uh hang mah tawh kumpi gam tuamtuamte zo-in
Hebrews11:34 meikuangpi mitsak thei-in
Hebrews11:35 Numeite in a sihsuah mite uh
Hebrews11:36 Mi pawlkhat in simmawhna
Hebrews11:37 Suang tawh a kidenglum
Hebrews11:38 Amaute a dingin leitung mite kilawm zo lo uh ahih manin galtai bangin gamlak le mualtung khawngah vak kawikawi-in
Hebrews11:39 Hih mite’ upna lian mahmah hi
Hebrews11:40 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite a dingin a hoihzaw-in thu hong vaihawmsak a
Hebrews12:1 Tua hi a
Hebrews12:2 Eite hong makai-in i upna a hong cingtaaksak Jesuh mitsuanin nei ni. Mailamah a ngah ding lungdamna hangin maizumna kihta loin singlamteh tungah sihna hong thuak a
Hebrews12:3 Tua zahta-in mawhnei mite’ langbawlna a thuaknate ngaihsun unla
Hebrews12:4 Tu ciang dong mawhna tawh na kidona uhah sihna zah ciang dongin na dona uh om nai lo hi.
Hebrews12:5 Pasian in note
Hebrews12:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a it mite thuhilh a
Hebrews12:7 Pasian’ hong thuhilhna na thuak ding mah uh ahi hi. Pasian in note ta-in hong ngaihsun ahih manin a thuak na hi uh hi. Pate’ thuhilhna le taiina a thuak lo ta kuamah om lo hi.
Hebrews12:8 Tate’ thuak bangin thuhilhna le taiina thuak loin hong kikoih mawk leh ta taktak hi loin zawlta na hi lel ding uh hi.
Hebrews12:9 Tua banah
Hebrews12:10 I leitung pate in amau’ hoihsak bangin nuntak tomno sung ngaihsutna-in hong thuhilhin gim hong pia a
Hebrews12:11 Thuhilhna tawh gim hong kipiak ciangin nuam kisa hetloin na kisa mahmah sam a
Hebrews12:12 Tua ahih ciangin a zaw nuangnuang na khutte uh le a no dakdak na khukte uh khauhsak un.
Hebrews12:13 Bai luangluangin a paite
Hebrews12:14 Mi khempeuh tawh na kilem theih nading uh hanciam un. Nuntak siangtho lo tawh kuamah in Topa mu zo lo ding ahih manin nuntak siangtho na nungta un.
Hebrews12:15 Pasian’ hehpihna a ngahlah na hihkhak loh nadingun na kidawm un. Zungkha a nei singkung hong khangin mi tampi gimsakin a siatsak bangin mite a siasak na hihkhak loh nadingun na kidawm un.
Hebrews12:16 Numei tawh a mawh mite suakkha kei unla
Hebrews12:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Esau in a pa kiang panin thupha ngahkik nuamin khitui naptui tawh a nget hangin a gamtatnasa a bawlkik theih nading lampi om nawn lo ahih manin bangmah ngahthei tuan nawn lo hi.
Hebrews12:18 Israel mite in a tuahsa bangin note in Sinai Mual tunga meikuang
Hebrews12:19 peengkul tumna awging le a kihtakhuai awgingte na za nai kei uh hi. Israel mite in awging a zak uh ciangin kihta lua uh ahih manin a zakkik nawn loh nadingun a thum uh hi.
Hebrews12:20 “Ganhing nangawn in tua mual a sukkhak le kidenglum ding hi
Hebrews12:21 Tua pen naklauhuai mahmah ahih manin Moses in zong
Hebrews12:22 Ahi zongin note pen Zion Mual
Hebrews12:23 vantungah a min a kikhum Pasian’ ta upate a kikhopna
Hebrews12:24 thuciamna thak a hong vaihawm Jesuh kiang
Hebrews12:25 Tua ahih manin note tungah thu a hong gen pa’ thugen na ngaih loh khak ding uh kidawm un. Hih leitungah thu a gen pa’ thu a ngai lote suakta lo ahih manin vantung panin thu a hong gen pa’ thugen ngai kei lehang i suakta kei zaw kan lai ding hi.
Hebrews12:26 Tuahun lai-in thu a gen ciangin leitung kiling a
Hebrews12:27 “Khat vei lingsakkik lai ding
Hebrews12:28 Tua ahih manin a kilingsak zo lo Pasian’ gam i ngah manin lungdamin
Hebrews12:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite’ Pasian pen a kangtum thei meikuang tawh a kibang ahi hi.
Hebrews13:1 Khrih sungah unau bangin na ki-itna uh na zomsuak un.
Hebrews13:2 Khualmite hoihtakin zin na do ding uh na phawk un. Mi pawlkhat in vantung mite zindo ahihlam a phawk lopi-in a do na hi gige uh hi.
Hebrews13:3 Amaute tawh thong a kiakhawm bangin kingaihsunin thong sunga om mite na phawk un. Note zong leitung pumpi mah tawh a nungta lai na hih manun gimna a thuak mite na phawk un.
Hebrews13:4 Mi khempeuh in nupa thu thupi ngaihsut uh hen la
Hebrews13:5 Sum deihluatna tawh na kipelh nadingun na nuntakna uhah kikem unla
Hebrews13:6 Tua ahih manin kimuanna lungsim tawh hangtakin
Hebrews13:7 Note tungah Pasian’ thu a hong gen
Hebrews13:8 Jesuh Khrih pen zani
Hebrews13:9 Thuhilhna lamdang a tuamtuamte zui-in lam man panin pialkha kei un. A zui mite tungah bangmah phattuamna a piangsak thei lo annek tuidawn tawh kisai ngeina zuihna in thahatna hong pia thei lo a
Hebrews13:10 Jew biakbuk-ah na a sem siampite in biakna tau tungah a kipia biakna sate nek nading thu nei lo uh hi.
Hebrews13:11 Jew Siampi Lianpen pa in mawhna hangin biak nadingin Siangtho Pen Munah a ganhing sisan paipih a
Hebrews13:12 Tua mah bangin Jesuh in zong ama sisan tawh mite’ mawhna a siansak theih nadingin khuapi pualamah a si hi.
Hebrews13:13 Tua ahih manin eite zong a pualamah pai-in Jesuh tawh maizumna thuakkhawm ni.
Hebrews13:14 Eite a dingin hih leitungah a kip khuapi om lo ahih manin a hong piang lai ding khuapi a zong ihi hi.
Hebrews13:15 Tua ahih manin Jesuh tungtawnin amah i biakna-in i kam tawh ama min pulakin Pasian phat tawntung ni.
Hebrews13:16 Khatlekhat tungah thuhoih kibawlin na kihuh ding uh mangngilh kei un. Hih bang gamtatnate pen Pasian a lungkimsak thei biakna ahi hi.
Hebrews13:17 Na makaite uh thu na mang unla
Hebrews13:18 Kote a dingin thu hong ngetsak niloh un. A tawntungin na a manin sepnopna lungsim nei ka hih manun ka lungsim uhah kisuanna om loin siang mahmah hi.
Hebrews13:19 Note kiangah Pasian in kei hong paisakkik baih theih nadingin nakpitakin thu na na nget nading uh ka hong thum pha nuam hi.
Hebrews13:20 Ama sihna hangin Tuucing Lianpa suakin
Hebrews13:21 ama deihna bangin na na septheih nadingun a kisam thuhoihte khempeuh note tungah hong guanin
Hebrews13:22 Sanggamte aw
Hebrews13:23 I sanggampa Timoti zong thong panin a suahtak khitna thu ka hong theisak nuam hi. Amah hong pai baih nakleh note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong tonpih ding hi.
Hebrews13:24 Na makaite uh le Pasian’ mi khempeuh na hopihsak un. Italy gam panin a hong pai mite in note hong hopih uh hi.
Hebrews13:25 Note khempeuh tungah Pasian’ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. Amen.
James1:1 Pasian le Topa Jesuh Khrih sila keimah James in Leitung mun khempeuhah kithehthangin a om minam sawm le nihte tungah hopihna lai ka hong gelh hi.
James1:2 Sanggamte aw
James1:3 Tua bangin na upna uh hong kize-etna na thuakzawh uh ciangin na kipna uh hong kilangsak ahihna thu na thei uh hi.
James1:4 A kisam bangmah om loin a cingtaak na suahtheih nadingun na thuakna uh hangin a tawntungin na kip paisuak nadingun na ngaihsun un.
James1:5 Pilna kisam na om uhleh Pasian kiangah ngen un. Mi khempeuh tungah Pasian dikin cingh mahmah ahih manin hong pia ding hi.
James1:6 Ahi zongin na nget uh ciangin hong pia takpi ding hi
James1:7 Tua bang mite
James1:8 
James1:9 Miniamte in liatna a ngah ciangin lungdam uh hen.
James1:10 Mihaute zong a niam uh ciangin lungdam veve uh hen. Lopa pak bangin a mangthang veve ding ahi uh hi.
James1:11 Ni hong suakin a sat ciangin lopate vul a
James1:12 A hoih takpi mah hiam
James1:13 Mi khat peuhpeuh in tua bang ze-etna a thuak ciangin
James1:14 Mi khatpeuh in ama deihna zui-in a gamtat ciangin mawhna a piangsak ahi hi.
James1:15 Lungsim utna a gol semsem ciangin mawhna hong piang a
James1:16 Sanggamte aw
James1:17 A hoih thu le na khempeuh
James1:18 Ama piansakte khempeuh lakah eite a masa pen i suahtheih nadingin thuman thutak zangin ama utthu tawh eite a hong piangsak tawm ahi hi.
James1:19 Sanggamte aw
James1:20 Mihingte’ hehna in Pasian’ sep ding thuhoihte khaktan hi.
James1:21 Tua ahih manin ngeina hoih lote le gamtat siate khempeuh nusia unla
James1:22 Nomau kikhem tawmin thu zak bek tawh maisak kei unla
James1:23 Mi khat in thu a zak bek tawh maisakin a zakna bangin a zuih kei leh limlangah a maitang a ki-en mipa tawh kibang bek hi.
James1:24 Limlangah a ki-en mipa in amah hoihtakin a kimuh khit ciangin paikhia a
James1:25 Ahi zongin mite a suaktasak thei thukham cingtaak hoihtakin a et khit ciangin a thu ngai-in a mangngilh pah hi loin
James1:26 Mi khatpeuh in Khristian ka hi hi
James1:27 Pa Pasian in a siangtho biakna citakin a ngaihsut thu in: Tagahte le meigong numeite a haksatna uhah hoihtakin kemin

James2:3 limtakin a kizem mipa zahtakbawl zaw-in
James2:4 mi a deidan na hi uh a

James2:6 note in mizawngte na simmawhbawl uh hi. Note hong bawlsia-in thukhen zum hong tun pahpahte
James2:7 Pasian in note a hong phuah min hoih a gensiate
James2:8 Lai Siangtho sungah
James2:9 Ahi zongin mi na deidan uhleh note a khial na hi uh a
James2:10 Mi khatpeuh in thukham dang khempeuh a zuih hangin khat a khialh nakleh a vekpi-in a khial mah ahi hi.
James2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh
James2:12 Tua ahih manin mi a khahkhia thei thukham tawh kizui-in thukhenna a thuak ding mi bangin kampau-in na gamta un.

James2:26 Tua ahih manin hu a diik lo
James3:1 Sanggamte aw
James3:2 Eite khempeuh a khialthei zelzelte vive ihi hi. Kampauna-ah a khial ngei lo mi a om leh a cingtaak mahmah hi a
James3:3 Sakol in i thu hong mantheih nadingin kamkaih i bulh a
James3:4 Teembawte ngaihsun dih un. Teembaw lian mahmah a
James3:5 Tua mah bangin leii zong i pumpi na sung panin a neu mahmah khat hinapi-in thusia lianpipi piangsak zo hi. Gam khempeuh zong mei-ek neuno khat pan kipanin a kangtum thei hi.
James3:6 Leii pen mei tawh kibang hi. I pumpi na sung panin a neuno khat hinapi-in i pumpi buppi a sia suahthei a
James3:7 Mihingte in gamsa
James3:8 Ahi zongin siattheih nading gukhal tawh a kidim
James3:9 I leii tawh eite’ pa ahi Topa i phat thei a
James3:10 Kam khat sung panin thupha le thusia pusuak khawm hi. Sanggamte aw
James3:11 Tuinak khat panin tui lim le tui lim lo hong luangkhia khawm thei ahi hiam?
James3:12 Sanggamte aw
James3:13 Note lakah pilin thuthei a kisa a om leh kiniamkhiatin pilin
James3:14 Ahi zongin na lungsim uhah enna
James3:15 Tua bang pilnate vantung panin a hong pai hi lo a
James3:16 Enna le huaihamna a om nakleh buaina le siatna nam khempeuh tawh kizom pahpah hi.
James3:17 Ahi zongin tunglam panin a kingah pilna a siangtho ahi hi. Mi tawh kilem thei-in dik a
James3:18 Kilemna a piangsak mite in lungnuam takin a tuh khaici in hoihna le dikna a piangsak hi.
James4:1 Note lakah a om kitotna le kilaina koi panin hong piang ahi hiam? Deihluatna lungsim na neih manun note’ pumsung a kitoktok niloh ahi hi.
James4:2 Na na deih uh a
James4:3 Pasian kiangah na nget sun uh ciangin zong note’ nopsak nading bek ngenin
James4:4 A citak lo mite aw
James4:5 Lai Siangtho sungah
James4:6 Lai Siangtho in
James4:7 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ thu na mang un. Dawimangpa na nial un. Nial le-uhcin no kiang panin taikhia ding hi.
James4:8 Pasian kiang nai un. Amah in zong hong nai ding hi. Mawhneite in na khut uh silsiang unla
James4:9 Dahin
James4:10 Topa mai-ah kiniamkhiat un. Tua hileh amah in hong lian bawl ding hi.
James4:11 Sanggamte aw
James4:12 Thukham a pia pa le thu a khen pa pen Pasian bek hi a
James4:13 Tuni ahih kei leh zing ciangin tua khua tua khua-ah va pai-in
James4:14 Zing ciangin na nuntakna uh bangci ding cih nangawn na thei kei uh hi. Meiilum tawlkhat sung kaii-in a mangthang pak tawh a kibang lel na hi uh hi.
James4:15 Note in
James4:16 Ahi zongin note kihisakin na kisial uh hi. Tua bangte hoih het lo hi.
James4:17 A hoih a manin gamtat ding thei napi-in a gamta lote a khial ahi hi.
James5:1 A haute aw
James5:2 Na neihsate uh muattumta a
James5:3 Na ngun le na khamte uh kekseu khinta hi. Hih kekseuna pen note langah teci suak a
James5:4 Na lo uh a hong khawhsakte a thaman pia lo na hih manun tu-in amaute’ phunna za un. Anla dingin na sawl uh mite’ phunna Vanglian Topa in za khinta hi.
James5:5 Hih leitung na nuntak sungun uang nekin na noptat mahmah uh hi. Note hong kigawh hun ding kiginna-in a kithausak phitphet na hi uh hi.
James5:6 A thuman mite mawhsakin na that uh a
James5:7 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
James5:8 Note zong na lungduai un. Topa hong pai ding hun naita ahih manin na lungsim uh na thahatsak un.
James5:9 Sanggamte aw
James5:10 Sanggamte aw
James5:11 Tua bangin a thuak mite a hampha mahmah hi
James5:12 Hih thute khempeuh banah
James5:13 Lungkhamna a thuak na om uhleh thu na ngen un. A lungdam na om uhleh phatna la na sa un.
James5:14 A cina na om uhleh pawlpi upate sam un. Amaute in thu hong ngetsakin Topa min tawh sathau hong zut ding uh hi.
James5:15 Upna tawh thu a kinget ciangin Topa in cinate noptuamsakin
James5:16 Tua ahih manin na ci uh a dam nadingin khatlekhat tungah na mawhna uh kipulakin thu na kingetsak ta un. Mihoihte’ thungetna in vang nei a
James5:17 Elijah zong eite mah bangin mi mawkmawk hinapi-in
James5:18 Tua ciangin guah a zuk nadingin thu ngenkik leuleu a
James5:19 Sanggamte aw
James5:20 tua bangin a khial mite lam manah a tunpihkik mipa in a khial mite a sih nading panin honkhia-in
1Peter1:1 Jesuh Khrih sawltak keimah Peter in Pontas gam
1Peter1:2 Pa Pasian in ama ngimnasa bangin note hong teel a
1Peter1:3 I Topa Jesuh Khrih’ Pa Pasian tungah lungdam ni. Ama hong hehpih mahmahna hangin sihna panin Jesuh Khrih a thawhkik sakna tawh eite tungah nuntakna thak a hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin i lametna kiam ngei lo a
1Peter1:4 Pasian in ama mite a dingin a koih thuphate i ngah nadingin lamenin i om hi. Tua thuphate sia ngei lo
1Peter1:5 Note’ upna hangin nitawp ni ciangin na ngah ding uh hotkhiatna nomau-a’ ahihna a kilatsak nadingin Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh a hong kepsak ahi hi.
1Peter1:6 Tua ahih manin tu laitakin mite’ bawlsiatna a tuamtuam na thuak manun tawlkhat na lungkham uh ahi zongin hih bang thuakna hangin lungdamzaw un.
1Peter1:7 Hih bang thuaknate in a um takpi mah na hihna uh hong kilangsak hi. A siathei khamte nangawn
1Peter1:8 Amah mu ngei lo napi-in na it uh a
1Peter1:9 Tua bangin na upna uh hangin kha thu-ah hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi.
1Peter1:10 Kamsangte in hih hotkhiatna thu mah kanin ngaihsut belin nei uh a
1Peter1:11 Khrih in gimna thuakin
1Peter1:12 Vantung panin a hong kisawl Kha Siangtho’ vangliatna tawh thu a gen thupuakte’ tung panin na zak uh Thute mah kamsangte in a gen laitakun
1Peter1:13 Tua ahih manin na lungsim uh ki-ukin a kigingsa-in om unla
1Peter1:14 Pasian’ thu na mang unla
1Peter1:15 Note a hong sampa a siangtho ahih mah bangin note zong na gamtatna khempeuh uhah na siangtho un.
1Peter1:16 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
1Peter1:17 Mi khempeuh amau gamtatna tawh kizui-in a kibang kimin thu a khen Pasian kiangah thu na nget uh ciangin
1Peter1:18 Na pu na pate uh nuntakzia
1Peter1:19 tuuno bangin paubaanna a om lo
1Peter1:20 Pasian in hih bang dingin leitung pianma pekin Khrih a teelsa hi a
1Peter1:21 Sihna panin amah hingkiksakin minthanna a pia Pasian
1Peter1:22 Tu-in lungdamna thuman na zuihna hangun note kisiansuah khinin
1Peter1:23 A sithei nu le pate sung pan hi loin a sithei lo nu le pate sung panin a nungta tawntung Pasian’ thu tawh naungek bangin a suakkik na hi uh hi.
1Peter1:24 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
1Peter1:25 ahi zongin Topa’ thu kip tawntung hi
1Peter2:1 Tua ahih manin gitlohna
1Peter2:2 Naungek suakcilte na bang unla
1Peter2:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in Topa’ hoihna thu na thei khinzo uh hi.
1Peter2:4 Mite in bangmahin kimang lo hi
1Peter2:5 Note zong nuntakna a piathei suangpi mah bangin kha thu tawh kisai biakinn lam nadingin na kizang unla
1Peter2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah
1Peter2:7 Tua ahih manin no a um mite a dingin amah pen a manpha suang hi a
1Peter2:8 a cihna leh
1Peter2:9 Ahi zongin note pen Pasian in a hong teelkhiat minam
1Peter2:10 Nidangin Pasian’ mi na hihloh uh hangin tu-in ama mi na hi uh a
1Peter2:11 Ka itte aw
1Peter2:12 Gentail mite in note mi hoih lo hi
1Peter2:13 Topa’ hangin leitung ukna aana neite’ thu na mang un. Kumpipa’ thu ahi a
1Peter2:14 a gamtat siate gim pia-in
1Peter2:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu thei loin a mot paupau mihaite
1Peter2:16 Sila ahi lo mi bangin gamta unla
1Peter2:17 Mi khempeuh zahtak bawlin thu uppih mite na it unla
1Peter2:18 Nasemte aw
1Peter2:19 Pasian’ thu na ngaihsutna uh tawh a kilawm lopi mahin gimna na thuak uhleh na thuakna uh hangin Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi.
1Peter2:20 Note na gamtat khialhna uh hangin hong kisat ciangin lungduai takin na thuak manun bangmah phattuamna om lo hi. Ahi zongin a manin gamta napi-in gimna na thuak uh ciangin lungduai takin na thuak uhleh Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi.
1Peter2:21 Khrih mahmah in zong note a dingin thuakin
1Peter2:22 Khialhna bangmah gamta lo a
1Peter2:23 Amah a kizahko ciangin na ko thuk lo hi. Gimna a thuak ciangin na tawnggawp lo a
1Peter2:24 Eite
1Peter2:25 Note
1Peter3:1 Tua mah bangin zite aw
1Peter3:2 na gamtat hoihna uh a muh uh ciangin Pasian thu hong um ding uh hi.
1Peter3:3 Na hoih nadingun puatham kizepna ahi sambawlna
1Peter3:4 Pasian’ muhna-ah a manpha mahmah ahi lungsim puakzia
1Peter3:5 A beisa hunah Pasian muangin thu um numeite in a pasalte uh thu mangin
1Peter3:6 Sarah zong tu-a bangmahin gamta a
1Peter3:7 Tua mah bangin pasalte aw
1Peter3:8 A tawpna-ah kong gennop thu in: Lungsim le ngaihsutna kikhat nei-in unau ki-itna lungsim nei unla
1Peter3:9 Hong bawlsiate siatna tawh thukkik loin hong samsia mite samsia kik kei unla
1Peter3:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in
1Peter3:11 Gitlohna pelhin hoih gamtat uh hen la
1Peter3:12 Topa in a thuman mite mu a
1Peter3:13 Note in a hoih gamtat ding utin hanciam le-uhcin kua in hong bawlsia ding ahi hiam?
1Peter3:14 A hoihin na gamtat manun gimna na thuak uhleh zong Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. Mite kihta kei unla
1Peter3:15 Na lungsim sung uhah Khrih zahtakbawl unla
1Peter3:16 Khrih nungzui na hihna hangun na gamtat hoihna uh hong gensia-in hong simmawhbawl a om ciangin a maizum theih nadingun na lungsim uhah kisuanna a om het lo dingin na siangtho om un.
1Peter3:17 Gamtatsia-in i om sangin Pasian’ deihna ahih nakleh i gamtat hoihna hangin gimna i thuak hoihzaw hi.
1Peter3:18 Khrih mahmah zong note a dingin si a
1Peter3:19 Tua kha nuntakna tawh va pai-in thongkia-in a om khate kiangah thu a va hilh hi.
1Peter3:20 Noah in teembaw a bawl hun laitakin Pasian in lungduai takin ngak hinapi-in hih kha a nei mite pawlkhat in Pasian’ thu mang lo uh hi. Teembaw sungah a om mi giat bek
1Peter3:21 Tui pen note a hong honkhia tuiphumna lim hi a
1Peter3:22 Tu-in vantungah tua Khrih pai khin a
1Peter4:1 Khrih in ama pumpi-in thuak ahih manin note in zong tua bang lungsim mah nei-in na kithakhauhsak ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi-in a thuak mite peuhmah
1Peter4:2 Tua ahih manin tu a kipanin na leitung nuntak sung uh mihingte’ deihna bangin gamta loin Pasian’ deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh ahi hi.
1Peter4:3 A beisa hunah dawibiate’ gamtat bangin a hoihkhop khat na gamta khinta uh a
1Peter4:4 Tu-in note in dawibiate pawlpih nawn loin ut utin na phengtat loh uh ciangin lamdangsa-in note hong kosia uh hi.
1Peter4:5 Ahi zongin amaute in a site le a hingte’ thu a khen dingin a om Pasian’ mai-ah thudotna thuak ding uh hi.
1Peter4:6 Tua thu hang mahin
1Peter4:7 Na khempeuh a bei nading hun hong naita hi. Nomau pumpi ki-uktawm thei-in pilvang unla
1Peter4:8 Itna in mawhna tampi khuhcip thei ahih manin lungsim takpi tawh khatlekhat ki-it ding thupi ngaihsut pha pen un.
1Peter4:9 Khatlekhat maitai takin zinleleeng na kido un.
1Peter4:10 Pasian’ piak na a zatsiamte bangin Pasian’ kiang panin na ngah uh nate
1Peter4:11 Minthanna le vangliatna a nei tawntung Pasian in Jesuh Khrih hangin thu khempeuhah phatna a ngah theih nadingin thuhilhte in Pasian’ thu na hilh unla
1Peter4:12 Ka itte aw
1Peter4:13 Tua bangin Khrih tawh thuakkhawm le-uhcin ama minthanna hong kilat ciangin note lungdam mahmah ding na hih manun
1Peter4:14 Khrih nungzui hihna hangin mite’ kosiatna na thuak uhleh note sungah a minthang Kha Siangtho ahi Pasian’ Kha Siangtho hong om ahihna lim ahih manin a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi.
1Peter4:15 Ahi zongin mi thahna
1Peter4:16 Ahi zongin Khristian hihna hangin gimna na thuak uhleh kuamah in maizum ngaihsut kei unla
1Peter4:17 Tu-in thukhen kipat hun ding hong tungta-in Pasian’ mi eite tungah hong kipan ahihleh Pasian kiang panin hong pai Lungdamna Thu a um lo mite a dingin bangzahin lungkhamhuai ding ahi hiam?
1Peter4:18 Lai Siangtho in
1Peter4:19 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ deihna bangin gimna a thuak mite gamtat hoihin
1Peter5:1 Keima pumpi mahmah zong pawlpi upa hi-in
1Peter5:2 Pasian in note’ khut sungah a hong piak tuuhonte hoihtakin na cing unla
1Peter5:3 Note’ kep dingin a hong kipia tuute
1Peter5:4 Tuucing pipa hong pai ciangin a mual ngei lo minthanna lukhu a hong pia ding hi.
1Peter5:5 Tua mah bangin no khangnozaw deuhte in zong a khanghamte’ thu na mang un. Lai Siangtho in
1Peter5:6 Pasian in ama hoihsak hun ciangin note hong laptoh theih nadingin a thahat Pasian’ khutnuai-ah kiniamkhiatin na om un.
1Peter5:7 Pasian in note hong kem ahih manin na lungkhamnate khempeuh uh ama kiang tunpih un.
1Peter5:8 Note pilvangin khua phawk un. Na gal uh ahi Dawimangpa
1Peter5:9 Leitungah thu um dang khempeuh in zong note’ thuak mah bangin a thuak ahihna thu thei unla
1Peter5:10 Tawlkhat na thuak khit uh ciangin
1Peter5:11 Tua Pasian in a tawntungin ukna vangliatna nei paisuak tahen. Amen.
1Peter5:12 Thu upna sungah mi citakin ka ngaihsut Silas’ huhna tawh hih lai tomno gelhin amah ka hong puasak hi. Hih thute pen Pasian’ hong hehpihna taktak hi
1Peter5:13 Note mah bangin Pasian in a teel
1Peter5:14 Khristian ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khrih thu um note khempeuh tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen.
2Peter1:1 Jesuh Khrih nasem le sawltak ahi keimah Simon Peter in: Eite’ Pasian le Honpa ahi Jesuh Khrih a thumanna hangin kote’ upna zah mahin upna manpha a nei mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi.
2Peter1:2 Pasian le i Topa Jesuh na theihna uh hangin hehpihna le nopsakna thupha note tungah tampi tak hong tung tahen.
2Peter1:3 Ama minthanna le a hoihnate a neikhawm dingin a hong sampa i theihna hangin Pasian’ deih bangin biakna mantak i nuntak theih nadingin ama vangliatna in eite’ kisap na khempeuh a hong pia hi.
2Peter1:4 Amah in piak dingin a hong ciam a manpha mahmah nate hih bangzia-in hong pia a
2Peter1:5 Hih thu hangin na upna ban uhah gamtat hoihna na behlap unla
2Peter1:6 na thutheihna uh pumpi ki-ukzawhna tawh na behlap unla
2Peter1:7 Pasian’ deih bangin na gamtatna uh sanggam ki-itna tawh na behlap un; na sanggam ki-itna uh itna thukpi tawh na behlapzawh nadingun na hanciam un.
2Peter1:8 Hih bang hoihnate a kicingin na neih uhleh i Topa Jesuh Khrih na theihna uhah thahatin kimanna na nei ding uh hi.
2Peter1:9 Ahi zongin hih bang hoihna a nei lo mite pen mittaw-in a gamla a mu thei lo mite hi a
2Peter1:10 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw
2Peter1:11 Tua hileh eite’ Topa le Honpa Jesuh Khrih Uk tawntungna sungah nuamtakin na lut thei ding uh hi.
2Peter1:12 Tua ahih manin note in hih thute thei khinin
2Peter1:13 Ka nuntak laiteng hih thute ka hong phawksakkikkik ding thuhoih khat hi
2Peter1:14 I Topa Jesuh Khrih in teltakin hong genkhin ahih manin hih leitung pumpi ka nusiat baih nading thu ka thei hi.
2Peter1:15 Tua ahih manin ka sih khit ciangin hih thute na phawkkik kik theih nadingun ka hihtheih zahin ka hanciam ding hi.
2Peter1:16 I Topa Jesuh Khrih a vangliatna le a hong paikik nading thute note kiangah ka hong gen uh ciangin mihingte’ phuahtawm tuanthute siksanin a hong gen hi loin
2Peter1:17 Vanglian Minthang pa in
2Peter1:18 Mual siangtho tungah amah tawh ka omkhawm laitakun vantung panin hong ging awte komau mahmah in ka za uh hi.
2Peter1:19 Tua ahih manin kamsangte’ gen thute a man taktak ahihna thu ka teltheih uh hi. Note’ lungsimah Zingsol hong suakin khua a hong vak matengin khuamial lak a mei taang bangin hih thute ngaihsun le-uhcin hoih mahmah ding hi.
2Peter1:20 Na phawk ding uh a thupi mahmah khat in: Lai Siangtho sunga om thugen kholhnate
2Peter1:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte in a deih manin mailam thugenkholh theihna a kingah hi lo a
2Peter2:1 Mite lakah kamsang man lo a omngei mah bangin note lakah sia man lo hong om ding hi. Siatna a piangsak thei thuhilhna a man lo hong lutpih simin
2Peter2:2 Tua bang hinapi-in mi tampi tak in amau’ gamtat hoih lohna zui ding uh a
2Peter2:3 Hih sia man lote in a huaiham manun note kiang panin sum a ngahtheih nadingun phuahtawm thu hong gen ding uh hi. Ahi zongin sawtpek a kipanin amaute’ thu a Khen ding pa a kigingsa-in om niloh a
2Peter2:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung mite nangawn in khialhna a neih ciangin Pasian in khahkhong loin hell khuk sungah khia a
2Peter2:5 Pasian in tanglai mite khahkhong loin amah a um lo mite
2Peter2:6 Pasian in Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite tungah thu khenin mei tawh haltum a
2Peter2:7 Ngeina bangin a gamta lo mite in Lot a lungkhamsakna panun Pasian in mihoih Lot a honkhia hi.
2Peter2:8 Tua mihoih pa
2Peter2:9 Tua ahih manin Topa in tua bang mihoihte a gimna uh panin suakta sakin
2Peter2:10 Pasian’ thu nialin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mite gim pia phadiak hi. Hih sia man lote kiphasakin hangsan mahmah uh a
2Peter2:11 Hih sia man lote sangin hatzaw-in a vanglianzaw vantung mite nangawn in Topa’ mai-ah minthanna a nei vantung mite gensia ngam lo
2Peter2:12 Ahi zongin mat ding le thah dingin a piang gamlak ganhing gilote bangin a pianpih lungsim uh zui-in gamta uh a
2Peter2:13 mite a gimsak mah bangun amaute tungah gimna kipia ding hi. A ut bangbangun suntangpi-in gamtat ding nuam a sa uh hi. Tua bang mite in note tawh ankuang hong umkhawmin
2Peter2:14 Numei bekbek etnopin nei uh a
2Peter2:15 Thuman lampi nusia-in gammang uh a
2Peter2:16 Balaam in ama mawhna hangin taiina a thuak hi. A pau thei lo la
2Peter2:17 Hih bang mite pen a kangcip khinsa ciktui
2Peter2:18 Amaute kiphasakin haipau uh a
2Peter2:19 Amaute pen siatna a piangsak thei zongsatna lelin sila hinapi-un mite tungah suahtak nading thu a gen uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite pen
2Peter2:20 I Topa le Honpa Jesuh Khrih theihna hangin leitung siatna sung panin suakta khin napi-un
2Peter2:21 Tua bang mite in amaute tungah a kipia thu siangthote thei-in a nusiat kik sangun thuman lampi a thei ngei het lo uh hileh amau a dingin hoihzaw thampek ding hi.
2Peter2:22 Paunak-ah
2Peter3:1 Ka itte aw
2Peter3:2 Tanglai peka kamsang siangthote’ thugen kholhte le note lakah sawltak na a semte in Topa le Honpa’ thupiakte a hong gensawn uh thute na phawkkik ding uh ka deih hi.
2Peter3:3 A masa penin na theih ding uh panin: Hun nunung lam ciangin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mi pawlkhat hong om ding a
2Peter3:4 “Amah a hong paikik nading a thuciamna a bangci ahi hiam? I pu i pate zong si khinta uh a
2Peter3:5 Amaute in a kitheihmawh bawl uh thu pen: Tanglai pekin Pasian in ama kampauna tawh vantung le leitung na piangsak hi. Tui sung panin tui mah tawh leitung na piangsak a
2Peter3:6 tui tawh a piansak leitung pen tui mah tawh na susia leuleu hi.
2Peter3:7 Tu-in tua Pasian’ kampauna mah tawh
2Peter3:8 Ahi zongin ka itte aw
2Peter3:9 Mi pawlkhatte’ ngaihsut bangin Topa in a kamciamna a hong tungsak hak hi zenzen lo hi. Note khat beek in siatna na thuakkhak ding uh deih loin na vekpi-un na kisik ding uh deih ahih manin hong pai nai lohna pen note hong khualna hizaw hi.
2Peter3:10 Ahi zongin theihkholh lohpi-in guta bangin Topa hong pai ding Ni hong tung ding hi. Tua Ni ciangin nakpitakin a ging in vantungte maimang sakin
2Peter3:11 Hih nate khempeuh hih bangin kisusia mangkhin ding ahih manin note a bangci mi dingin kilawm cih limtakin na ngaihsun un. A siangtho nuntakna nei-in Pasian’ deihna bangin na gamta unla
2Peter3:12 vantungte mei in kangtumin
2Peter3:13 Eite in Pasian’ hong ciamsa
2Peter3:14 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw
2Peter3:15 I sanggam Paul in Pasian’ piak pilna zangin note kiangah lai a hong gelhnate sungah a gen mah bangin note khempeuh in hotkhiatna na ngahtheih nading uh hun hong piakna-in Topa hong zekai ahihna thu na phawk un.
2Peter3:16 Lai a hong gelhna sungah a thugente tu-ate mah a gennuam ahi hi. A laigelhna sungah a telhak thu tampi om a
2Peter3:17 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw
2Peter3:18 Hehpihna thu le i Topa le Honpa Jesuh Khrih theihna thu-ah na khangto semsem zaw un. Tuhun a kipanin a tawntungin amah in minthanna ngah paisuak tahen. Amen.
1John1:1 Leitung piancil lai pek a kipanin a omsa ahi nuntakna a piathei Thu tawh kisai
1John1:2 Hih nuntakna pen a kimuthei a hong suah ciangin kote mahmah in ka mu uh hi. Tua ahih manin kote tungah a hong kilak
1John1:3 Pa Pasian le a Tapa Jesuh Khrih tawh kote pawlkhatin ka om uh mah bangin note zong kote tawh pawlkhat nong suahtheih nading uh deihna-in ka muhsa uh le ka zaksa uh thute a hong gen ka hi uh hi.
1John1:4 Kote’ lungdamna a cingtaak theih nadingin hih lai a hong gelh ka hi uh hi.
1John1:5 Ama kiang panin za-in note tungah ka hong gen uh thu in: Pasian
1John1:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian tawh ka kipawl hi
1John1:7 Ahi zongin amah
1John1:8 Mawhna ka nei kei hi
1John1:9 Ahi zongin Pasian kiangah i mawhnate va pulak lehang
1John1:10 Pasian in a mawh hi
1John2:1 Ka itte aw
1John2:2 Tua Jesuh hangin eite’ mawhna hong kimaisak a
1John2:3 Eite in ama thupiaknate i zuih leh amah a thei taktak ihihna hong kilang hi.
1John2:4 Mi khatpeuh in
1John2:5 Ahi zongin ama thu a zui mite pen Pasian a itna a kicingtaak taktak mi ahi hi. Hih bangin i gamtat leh Pasian tawh a kipawl taktak ihihna i thei hi.
1John2:6 Pasian tawh ka kipawl hi
1John2:7 Kong it lawmte aw
1John2:8 Ahi zongin note kiangah ka hong gelh thupiakna pen na zak ngei loh uh thuthak hi a
1John2:9 Mi khatpeuh in khuavak gamtatna ka gamta hi
1John2:10 A Khristian mipihte a it mite pen khuavak gamtatna a gamta hi a
1John2:11 Ahi zongin a Khristian mipihte a mudah mite pen khuamial sungah omin khuamial gamtatna a gamta uh hi a
1John2:12 Ka tate aw
1John2:13 Pate aw
1John2:14 Pate aw
1John2:15 Hih leitung nate le Pasian tawh a kizom lo thute deihluatin nei kei un. Mi khatpeuh in hih leitung nate a deihluat leh amah in Pa Pasian it taktak thei lo hi.
1John2:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi deihna
1John2:17 Leitung nate le leitung deihnate a beibei ding hita a
1John2:18 Tate aw
1John2:19 Khrih’ gal ahi hih mite pen ei’ pawl hi ngei napi-in hong taisan uh hi. Ei’ pawl taktak hileh eite tawh omkhawm paisuak ding uh ahih manin
1John2:20 Ahi zongin Khrih in note tungah Kha Siangtho hong piakhin ahih manin note khempeuh in a man na thei uh hi.
1John2:21 Tua ahih manin note kiangah lai ka hong gelhna pen note in a man na theih lohna hang uh hi loin
1John2:22 Tua ahihleh zuau thugen i cihte kuate ahi hiam? Jesuh pen Khrih hi lo hi
1John2:23 Tapa a nialte in Pa zong a nial hi a
1John2:24 Note in ahihleh a kipat cil a kipan na zak uh thute hoihtakin na zui un. A kipat cil a kipan na zak uh thute hoihtakin na zuih nak-uhleh Tapa tawh kipawlin
1John2:25 Khrih in eite tungah piak dingin a hong ciamsa thu pen hih nuntak tawntungna ahi hi.
1John2:26 Note khempeuh a hong sawm mite’ thu tu-a zah tawh khin phot ni.
1John2:27 Khrih in note tungah ama Kha Siangtho hong piakhin a

1John3:1 Pa Pasian in eite bangzah takin hong itna thu thei un. Ama hong itna lian mahmah ahih manin eite pen Pasian’ tate hong kici a
1John3:2 Ka lawm itte aw
1John3:3 Khrih a siangtho mah bangin amah tawh kibat ding a lamen khempeuh in zong a nuntakna uh siangthosak ding hi.
1John3:4 Mawhna i cih pen thukham palsatna ahih manin a mawh mi khempeuh thukham palsat ahi uh hi.
1John3:5 Khrih pen mawhna a nei het lo hi a
1John3:6 Tua ahih manin Khrih tawh a kipawl mite in mawhna bawl nawn lo uh a
1John3:7 Ka it tate aw
1John3:8 A kipat cil a kipanin Dawimangpa in mawhna bawl tawntung ahih manin mawhna a bawl mi khempeuhte zong Dawimangpa’ mi ahi hi. Hih Dawimangpa’ nasepna a beisak dingin Pasian’ Tapa a hong pai hi.
1John3:9 Pasian’ tate in mawhna bawlbawl lo uh hi. Pasian’ tate hi a
1John3:10 Hih pen Pasian tate le Dawimangpa’ tate a kilamdanna ahi hi. A manin gamta loin
1John3:11 A kipat cil a kipanin na zak tawntung uh thu pen khatlekhat i ki-it nading thu ahi hi.
1John3:12 Dawimangpa’ mi ahi
1John3:13 Tua ahih manin lawmte aw
1John3:14 Ei Khristiante khatlekhat ki-it ihih manin sihna khutsung panin paikhia-in nuntakna khut sungah a lut khinta ihihna thu i thei khinzo hi. Itna lungsim a nei lote pen sihna khutsung mahah a omlai uh ahi hi.
1John3:15 A Khristian mipih a mudah mi peuhmah mi that hi a
1John3:16 Itna i cih bangci theih ding ihi hiam cih leh: Khrih in eite a dingin a nuntakna hong pia hi. Ei zong i Khristian mipihte a dingin i nuntakna i piak ngam ding ahi hi.
1John3:17 Mi khat hau mahmah hen la
1John3:18 Ka it tate aw
1John3:19 Tua ahih manin tu-a bangin i om leh a thuman Pasian tawh a kipawl ihihna le ama mai-ah lungmuang takin a omthei ding ihihna i thei ding hi.
1John3:20 I lungsimah ei mawh i kisak leh zong
1John3:21 Tua ahih manin ka it lawmte aw

1John3:23 Ama hong thupiakna in: A Tapa Jesuh Khrih umin zui-in
1John3:24 Pasian’ thupiakna a zui mi khempeuh

1John4:2 Pasian’ Kha sawlna tawh thugente le adangte bangci khentheih ding na hi uh hiam cih leh: Jesuh Khrih pen mihing bangin hong pai hi

1John4:4 Ka it tate aw
1John4:5 Kamsang a kineihkhemte in leitung thu gen uh a
1John4:6 Ahi zongin note pen Pasian’ mite na hi uh hi. Pasian a thei mi peuhmah in kote’ thugen hong ngai uh a
1John4:7 Ka it lawmte aw
1John4:8 Pasian pen ki-itna ahih manin itna a nei lo mite in Pasian thei lo uh hi.
1John4:9 Pasian in eite hong itna hong bangci lah hiam cih leh: Ama hangin eite in nuntakna i ngahtheih nadingin a Tapa neihsun Pasian in leitungah a hong paisak hi.
1John4:10 Hih ka gen itna pen eite in Pasian i itna thu hi lo a
1John4:11 Ka it lawmte aw
1John4:12 Kuamah in Pasian mu ngei lo hi. Ahi zongin eite khatlekhat i ki-it leh eite tawh Pasian hong omkhawm a
1John4:13 Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian le eite a omkhawm ihihna leh Pasian in eite hong ompih ahihna thu i thei hi.
1John4:14 Pa Pasian in leitung mite a honkhia dingin a Tapa a hong paisakna thu kote in thei-in midang kiangah genbelin ka nei uh hi.
1John4:15 Jesuh pen Pasian’ Tapa hi
1John4:16 Tua hi a
1John4:17 Thukhen Ni ciangin kisuanna nei hetloin i omtheih nadingin eite in a cingtaak itna a nei ihi hi. Khrih mah bangin hih leitung i nuntakna-ah nungta-in gamta ihih manin tua bang kisuanna a nei lo ding ihi hi.
1John4:18 Itna nei lehang launa om lo a
1John4:19 Pasian in eite hong it masa ahih manin eite in itna i nei thei hi.

1John5:1 Jesuh
1John5:2 Pasian itin ama thupiakte i zuihna tawh Pasian tate a it ihihlam i kithei ding hi.
1John5:3 Pasian i it ciangin ama thupiakte a zui ihi hi. Eite a dingin ama thupiakte zuih ding a haksa lua hi lo hi.
1John5:4 Pasian’ ta ahite peuhmah in leitung nate zo uh a
1John5:5 Kuate in leitung nate zo ding ahi hiam i cih leh
1John5:6 Hih Jesuh Khrih pen tui tawh kiphumna le a sisan luangin sihna tawh a hong pai hi a
1John5:7 Hih thu-ah teci a pang thum om a
1John5:8 tuate pen Kha
1John5:9 Mihingte’ teci panna sangthei ihih leh Pasian’ teci panna i santheih ding thupizaw hi. Pasian in ama Tapa’ thu tu-a bangin teci hong pang hi.
1John5:10 Tua ahih manin Pasian’ Tapa a um mi peuhmah in Pasian’ teci panna a sang ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasian’ thugen a um lo mi peuhmah in ama Tapa thu teci pangin a gennate a um lo uh ahih manin Pasian pen zuaugen a suaksak ahi uh hi.
1John5:11 Tu-in Pasian’ teci panna in: Pasian in ama Tapa tungtawnin eite tungah nuntak tawntungna a hong pia hi.
1John5:12 Pasian’ Tapa tawh a kipawl peuhmah in nuntak tawntungna nei a
1John5:13 Pasian’ Tapa a um mite in nuntak tawntungna a nei na hih lamtak uh na theih nadingun hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi.
1John5:14 Eite in ama deihna tawh kituakin i nget nakleh i nget khempeuh Pasian in hong pia ding hi
1John5:15 Eite’ ngetna khempeuh amah in na za hi
1John5:16 Mi khatpeuh in a Khristian mipihte a sih nading zah ciang ahi lo mawhna a gamta a muh leh ama a dingin thu ngetsak tahen. Ama thungetna bangin Pasian in a nuntakna suksak lo ding hi. Hih pen sihna zah ciang mawhna a hilote ka cihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin sih nading zah ciang ahi mawhna om a
1John5:17 Gamtat khialhna khempeuh mawhna hi a
1John5:18 Pasian’ tate in mawhna bawlbawl lo uh hi. Pasian’ Tapa in amaute kem a
1John5:19 Leitung midang khempeuh Dawimangpa’ khut sungah a om ahi zongin eite pen Pasian’ mi ihihna thu i thei hi.
1John5:20 Pasian’ Tapa hong pai-in eite thu hong theisak ahih manin Pasian taktak a thei ihihna thu i thei hi. A Tapa Jesuh Khrih tawh i kipawlna hangin Pasian taktak mah tawh a kipawlthei ihi hi. Tua Jesuh pen Pasian taktak mah hi a
1John5:21 Ka itte aw
2John1:1 A khangham bel keimah Johan in Teeltuam ahi
2John1:2 Thuman thei ihih manin a tawntungin tua thu-ah i kip ding hi.
2John1:3 Pa Pasian le a Tapa Jesuh Khrih in dikna
2John1:4 Pa Pasian in eite hong thupiakna bangmahin na pawlpi mite pawlkhat in thu a mantakin a zuihna uh mu ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi.
2John1:5 Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it tonu aw
2John1:6 Itna thu ka hong gen ciangin Pasian’ thupiakte zui ding cihna ahi hi. A kipat cil a kipan na zaksa uh ahi hih thupiakna pen na khan tawntungun zui-in itna na nei ta un.
2John1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah midangte a khem tampi hong omta a
2John1:8 Tua ahih ciangin na sepsa uh thuman taankha loin
2John1:9 Khrih’ thuhilhna zui loin a khengvalin a pai mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl lo ahi hi. Ahi zongin a thuhilhna a zuite pen Pa Pasian le a Tapa tawh a kipawl ahi uh hi.
2John1:10 Tua ahih manin Khrih’ hilh ahi hih thute a hilh lo midang khatpeuh note kiangah a hong pai leh na inn uhah zong na tungsak kei unla
2John1:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang mite a’ ding thupha a deihsak mite pen amau’ nasep hoih lohna-ah zong a kipawl ahi uh hi.
2John1:12 Gen ding tampi ka neihlai hangin lai-in hong gelh lo zaw-in
2John1:13 Teeltuam ahi hih lai-a om pawlpi mite in hopihna kam hong khak uh hi.
3John1:1 A khangham bel keimah Johan in Lungsim takpi tawh ka hong it ka lawm Gaias tungah lai ka hong khak hi.
3John1:2 Ka lawm it Gaias aw
3John1:3 Nang a mantakin a gamta na hih takpi mah bangin
3John1:4 Tate bangin ka hong neih mite a mantakin a gamtatna uh ka zakna hangin ka lungdamna sangin adang lungdamna lianzaw bangmah om lo hi.
3John1:5 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw
3John1:6 Amaute na limbawlna thu
3John1:7 Amaute pen Pasian’ nasem dingin a khualzin khia uh hi a
3John1:8 Tua ahih manin Pasian thuman nasepna-ah nasem khawm mite ihih theih nadingin ei Khristiante in hih bang mite i huh ding ahi hi.
3John1:9 Na pawlpite kiangah lai ka gelh ngei hi. Ahi zongin na pawlpi sungah milian pen a ut Diotrefes in ka thugen hong mang nuam lo hi.
3John1:10 Tua ahih manin kong pai ciangin kote hong gensiatna
3John1:11 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw
3John1:12 Mi khempeuh in Demetrias phatkim uh a
3John1:13 Gen ding tampi ka neih hangin lai-in gelhkhiat ding kong sawm kei zaw hi.
3John1:14 Nang tawh kimu baih thei dingin kilamen ka hih manin
3John1:15 Nangma tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. Hih lai-a om i lawmte in hong hopih uh hi. Tua lai-a om i lawmte khempeuh a milipin na hopihsak in.
Jude1:1 Jesuh Khrih’ sila ka hih banah James’ nau keimah Jude in: Pasian’ sapna hangin Jesuh Khrih kepna sungah Pasian itna tawh a om mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi.
Jude1:2 Note khempeuh tungah hehpihna
Jude1:3 Ka itte aw
Jude1:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ thu a ngaihsun lo mi pawlkhat
Jude1:5 Note in na theihsa uh ahi ta zongin ka hong phawksak nop thu in: Topa in Egypt gam panin Israel mite honkhia khin napi-in amah a um lo mite a nung ciangin susiagawp hi.
Jude1:6 Amau’ aana neih huamsung bekah om loin a omna panun a paikhia vantung mite zong leinuai khuamial sungah sikkol kibulhin amau’ thu a kikhen ding Ni lianpi ngakin Pasian in a koihcip hi.
Jude1:7 Sodom khua le Gomorrah khua le a kiima om khuapi mite zong tua vantung mite mah bangin gamta uh a
Jude1:8 Tua mite mah bangin hih mite zong thumu-in kinei-in amau pumpi thanghuaisak uh a
Jude1:9 Vantung milian pa Mikhael nangawn tua bangin gamta ngam lo hi. Moses’ luanghawm kituhin Dawimangpa tawh a kitot laitakin Mikhael in Dawimangpa zahkona kammal zang ngam loin
Jude1:10 Ahi zongin hih mite in a theihtel loh uh thute simmawhbawl uh a
Jude1:11 Hih mite a dingin dahhuai mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kain’ gamtat bangin gamta-in
Jude1:12 Note’ annek khopna-ah zumna mel nei loin hong omgawp uh ahih manin hong siatsuah uh a
Jude1:13 a sepna uh tawh amau mah’ maizum nading a piangsak tuipi hualte
Jude1:14 Tanglai pekin Adam pan khang sagihna Enok in zong hih thu mah na genkhol a
Jude1:15 Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamtat lohna hang uh le kam hoih lopipi zangin Pasian a gensiatnate uh hangin Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamta lo mite tungah thu khenin mawhsakna pia ding hi
Jude1:16 Hih mite a tawntungin phunin khatlekhat mawhna kizong uh a
Jude1:17 Ahi zongin ka itte aw
Jude1:18 Amaute in note kiangah
Jude1:19 Hih mite in pawl kikhenna piangsakin
Jude1:20 Ahi zongin ka it note ahihleh a siangtho na upna uhah na kip semsem unla
Jude1:21 I Topa Jesuh Khrih in a hong hehpihna tawh nuntak tawntungna hong piak ding na ngakkawmun Pasian’ itna sungah na kip un.
Jude1:22 A um taktak zo lote hehpih unla
Jude1:23 meiphual sung panin dawhkhiat bangin midangte na honkhia un. Mi pawlkhatte’ mawhna-ah note zong na siatkhak loh nadingun kidop kawmna tawh na huh unla
Jude1:24 Ama minthanna mai-ah paubaanna om hetloin lungdam takin a hong paipih theih nadingin note na pukkhak nading panun a hong kem
Jude1:25 khat bek ahi eite a hong Hon Pasian in
Revelation1:1 Hih laibu pen a piang baih ding thute
Revelation1:2 Johan in zong a muhsa thu khempeuh na gen leuleu hi. Hih thute pen Johan in Pasian kiang panin hong pai thute le Jesuh Khrih in ama tungah a lahkhiat thuman thutakte a genna thu ahi hi.
Revelation1:3 Hih laibu a sim mite mi hampha hi a
Revelation1:4 Johan in Asia gam sungah a om pawlpi sagihte tungah a khak lai ahi hi. A beisa hun
Revelation1:5 thuman takin teci a pang
Revelation1:6 ama Pa Pasian’ na a sem dingin siampi le kumpi za-ah a hong koih hi. Tua Jesuh in minthanna le vangliatna nei tawntung tahen. Amen.

Revelation2:8 “Smyrna khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla
Revelation2:9 Na lungkhamnate uh le na zawnnate uh ka thei hi. A taktakin note a hau na hi uh hi. Jew mi hi lo napi-in Jew mi ka hi uh hi
Revelation2:10 Na thuak ding uh haksatnate kihta kei un. Dawimangpa in note pawlkhat thong sungah hong khia-in hong ze-et ding hi. Gimna na thuak hun ding uh ni sawm sung bek hi ding hi. Na sih dongun kei tungah hong citak un. Tua hileh nuntakna lukhu ka hong pia ding hi.

Revelation2:14 Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsak nading thu tawmkhat a om hi. Milim biakna ante nesakin
Revelation2:15 Tua mah bangin Nikolas pawlte’ thuhilhna a um mi pawlkhat zong note lak mahah a om hi.
Revelation2:16 Tua ahih manin na mawhna panun kisikkik un. Na kisik kei uhleh note kiangah kei hong pai baihin
Revelation2:17 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mi tungah a kiselcip manna an pawlkhat le min thak a kigelhna suangkang khat ka pia ding hi. Tua suangkang pen a ngahte simloh kuamah dang in thei lo ding hi.
Revelation2:18 “Thiatira khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla
Revelation2:19 Note’ gamtatna
Revelation2:20 Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsak nading thu khat om hi. Kamsang numei ka hi
Revelation2:21 Tua numei a kisikkik nading hun ka piak hangin a paktatna panin kihei nuam lo hi.
Revelation2:22 Tua ahih manin tu-in tua numei tawh a paktatna uh panin a kisikkik kei uhleh tua numei le amah tawh a paktat mi khempeuh

Revelation3:1 “Sardis khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla
Revelation3:2 Tua ahih manin khua phawk unla
Revelation3:3 Tua ahih manin note a hong kihilh na zaksa uh thute phawkkik unla
Revelation3:4 Ahi zongin Sardis khuasunga om note lakah a puan a ninsak nai lo tawmkhat na om uh hi. Tua bang mite kilawm uh ahih manin kei tawh puanpak silhin ka tonkhawm ding uh hi.

Revelation17:8 Tua na muh ganhing nidangin a om hangin tu-in om nawn lo hi. Ahi zongin tu-in kuahawm thukpi panin hong pusuakin sihna a thuak dingin paikhia ding hi. Tua ganhing nidangin omngei a
Revelation17:9 Hih thu-ah pilna le thutheihna kisam hi. Lutang sagihte pen tua numei a tutna mual sagih ahi hi.
Revelation17:10 Tua lutang sagihte pen kumpi sagihte zong a cihna ahi hi. Tua kumpi sagihte lakah nga beizo a
Revelation17:11 Nidangin omngei a

Revelation17:15 Tua ciangin vantungmi in hong genthuah lai a

Revelation17:18 Na muh numei pen leitung kumpi khempeuh tungah ukna a nei khuapi ahi hi

Revelation18:8 gimna in ni khatthu-in ban ding a
Revelation18:9 Amah tawh paktatin a kiphasak khawm leitung kumpite in tua khuapi a katna meikhu a muh uh ciangin dahin a kap ding uh hi.
Revelation18:10 Ama thuakna kihta-in a gamlapi-ah om ding uh a
Revelation18:11 Amaute’ na zuakte kuamah in lei nawn lo ahih manin leitung sumbawlte zong tua khuapi’ thuakna hangin dahin a kap uh hi.
Revelation18:12 A khamte
Revelation18:13 a sinnamon singnamtuite

Revelation18:17 Nai khat sungin a hauhna khempeuh maimang ta!” a ci uh hi. Teembaw ukte le a tungah a tuangte

Revelation20:6 Hih thawhkikna masa sungah a kihel mite pen Pasian’ mi siangtho hi a
Revelation20:7 Kum tulkhat a cin ciangin a thongkiatna panin Satan kikhah ding a

Revelation20:14 Tua ciangin Sihna le Misite’ Gam
Revelation20:15 A nungta mite a kigelhna laibu sungah a min a om lo peuhmah meiphualpi sungah kilawn hi.

Revelation21:3 Tokhom panin nakpitakin awging khat ka za a
